C: 「历史并非真实，客观尽可抹消；我们要让过去不存在于过去，它只存在于现在，在你我脑内，任人打扮。」 ——虚构史学家卢德多坎，《空白五千年》 有证据表明「虚构史学家」是一群得到星神神启的令使；他们常常孤身投入星海，前往一个又一个星球，致力于编造、混淆、破坏、抹消当地的历史。虚构史学家相信前事决定后世：当一片宇宙、一颗星球、一处文明、一个国家拥有确定无疑的历史，它的未来发展就已注定，一切可能性都从未来消失，仅余可悲而寂寥的死板进程。为了保护世界免于客观凋零的不幸命运，虚构史学家以「神秘」为唯一旨意，决心将宇宙笼罩在一片迷雾之中。 虚构史学家秉持着旁人难以理解的崇高利他目的，孤独而决绝地执行着破坏历史的使命。他们的理论甚少被大众理解，而他们对客观事实的露骨憎恨则多少有些极端。许多世界开始意识到这群「神秘」令使对非物质文化造成的不可逆破坏。在银河中，虚构史学家的名声堪比反物质军团。博识学会曾公开谴责称：反物质军团毁灭了物质，而虚构史学家在毁灭宇宙本身。 【记录印戳】有鉴于本词条曾出现归属不明的内容编辑，特此声明：本词条不适用于任何参考，且后续将不再更新。
E: "History is not mired in truth, reality can be distorted. We should let the past cease to stay in the past. It only exists in the here and now, in our brains, where everyone can embellish it." — The Five Millennia Void by History Fictionologist Luddokan There is evidence that History Fictionologists are a group of Emanators that were enlightened by Aeons. They often plunge into the sea of stars alone, traveling planet to planet with the sole purpose of fabricating, obscuring, destroying, and erasing the local history. History Fictionologists believe that the past determines the future — when a civilization's history is definite, its future development is doomed as all possibilities are eliminated, leaving only a sad and rigid path forward. In order to save these worlds from the sad fate of objectivity, History Fictionologists consider Enigmata as their only creed and are determined to shroud the universe in mystery. History Fictionologists carry out their mission of destroying history alone and decisively, with an altruism that is difficult to comprehend. Their views are poorly understood by most, and their blatant hatred of objective facts is somewhat extreme. Many worlds are beginning to realize the irreversible, intangible damage that these Emanators of Enigmata have caused to culture. Across the cosmos, History Fictionologists have a reputation comparable to that of the Antimatter Legion. The Intelligentsia Guild has publicly denounced them: The Antimatter Legion destroys matter, but the History Fictionologists destroy the very universe itself. [Record stamp] In view of the fact that this entry has been edited with unknown attribution, it is hereby declared that this entry is inapplicable to any reference, and will no longer be updated.

C:
位于阿斯德纳星系的盛会之星，梦想之地。匹诺康尼是高悬在深黯星空中之上的奢丽酒店，也是星际名流觥筹交错，万邦豪客们一掷千金的度假胜地。人们来此寻找深埋心中、长久渴求的梦，通过酒店的入梦池踏入实现一切梦想的美梦国度。

极少会有客人关注匹诺康尼沉重的历史：千年以前，这里曾是公司建造的边陲监狱。被流放的罪人们历经迢迢苦旅，抵达此处，被强加一项危险的使命：修补忆质在现实星系中的泄口。在频繁暴露于忆质的劳作中，这些犯人意识到自己渐渐踏入一处奇妙的共有梦境，在其中他们寻得一个共同的梦想——「自由」。

万界之癌爆发后，边陲监狱的归属发生易主。与这场抗争相关的史料极为稀缺，且内容令人生疑。但有的记载明确指出，在悲悼伶人、假面愚者、无名客、厄兆先锋等一众派系的帮助下，囚犯们成了这片新生国度的主人。在此后的流放之地时期，不谐的杂音间或传出。直到「家族」降临并接管梦境，匹诺康尼终于经历了爆发式的繁荣，成为蜚声银河的度假胜地。
E:
The Planet of Festivities in the Asdana star system, also known as Land of the Dreams. A luxurious hotel positioned above the fathomless sky, Penacony is also a popular vacation spot where interstellar celebrities party the days away and the affluent from diverse worlds revel in lavish ventures. People flock here in search of dreams they've longed for or have already buried, and through Dreampools in the hotel are transported to a realm of dreams where everything can come true.

Rarely do guests pay attention to Penacony's heavy past. A millennium ago, it was a frontier prison established by the IPC. Exiled prisoners must survive an arduous journey across vast distances to reach this location, and are then forced to take up a dangerous duty: To mend the physical leak through which memoria seeps into the galaxy. As they frequently labor while being exposed to memoria, the prisoners gradually discovered themselves entering a captivating shared dream world, where they collectively obtained a single shared desire — freedom.

After the eruption of the Cancer of All Worlds, the ownership of the Frontier Prison changed hands. Historical records related to this struggle are scarce and often questionable. However, some accounts clearly state that with the assistance of various factions — including the Mourning Actors, the Masked Fools, the Nameless, and the Omen Vanguards — the prisoners emerged as the new rulers of this nascent realm. Sounds of discord could then periodically be heard during the subsequent times when it became a land of exiles. It was only when The Family descended and took control of the Dreamscape that Penacony experienced unparalleled and explosive prosperity, transforming into a renowned cosmic resort.

E: "Conclusion of the 8th Round of Approval Meeting: Failed"\n"Reason: Mr. Oti Alfalfa expressed his dissatisfaction with the texture of the relief. After the meeting, he needs to contact the Dreamweaver team for fine-tuning."

E: Investigate the Iris Family Crest at Dewlight Pavilion

E: Legion

C: 跃迁即将开始，你坐在沙发上等待列车启航。然而在一阵眩晕过后，你发现自己于未知的房间里醒来。
E: The warp jump was about to begin. You sat on the sofa, waiting for the Express to depart. However, after a bout of dizziness, you found yourself waking up in an unknown room.

C: 你与三月七、姬子进入画框。此处是幕前剧的第一幕，名为《囚人颂》。
E: You entered the painting frame with March 7th and Himeko. This was Act I of the Stage Play, titled Ode to Prisoner.

C: 你与丹恒乘坐分离的车厢前往翁法罗斯，却在着陆的过程中受到未知力量攻击。列车车厢受损失控，全速撞向地面。
E: You and Dan Heng boarded a detached car heading to Amphoreus, but during the landing, you were hit by an unknown force. The damaged car lost control and plummeted toward the ground at full speed.

C: 万敌回到悬锋城，于此完成独属于他自己的登基仪式。万敌将接过「纷争」职责，战斗在抵御黑潮的第一线。
E: Mydei returned to Castrum Kremnos, where he completed his own ascension ceremony. Mydei took up the mantle of Strife, fighting on the frontlines against the black tide.

C: 放下一切的白厄再次对权杖内核层发起攻击。他以怒火点燃此身，向投来目光的「毁灭」星神纳努克直接发起挑战，以三千万次轮回的怒火为其带去了一道短暂的伤口。
E: Having cast aside everything, Phainon struck once more at the Scepter's core layer. Consumed by wrath, he ignited himself and challenged Nanook, the Aeon of Destruction who had turned their gaze upon him, carving a brief wound with the fury of thirty million cycles.

C: 见你恢复意识，三月七推开正在抢救你的丹恒。「停——住口，人醒了！」
E: As you stirred awake, March 7th shoved Dan Heng aside mid-rescue. "Stop it. They're awake!"

C: 你与三月七、丹恒冲进危险的裂界。佩拉提议上报嫌疑人失踪或死亡，但布洛妮娅决定继续追击。
E: March 7th, Dan Heng, and you escaped into the dangerous Fragmentum. Pela suggested reporting you as missing or dead, but Bronya chose to continue the pursuit.

C: 在列车长帕姆的主持下，由全体乘客参与的跃迁航线会议开始。正当帕姆要宣布下一站的名字时，突如其来的变故打破列车上的平静。
E: Under the direction of Conductor Pom-Pom, the navigation meeting with all passengers aboard the Astral Express began. Just as Pom-Pom was about to announce the name of the next destination, an unexpected incident disrupted the peace on the express.

C: 星期日认为「未来」的别名正是「自我价值」。人们向往英雄，但绝大多数人终究无法成为英雄。然而弱者，也应当有幸福生活的权利。
E: Sunday believed that "the future" was simply another name for "self-worth." Though people yearn to be heroes, most will never become one. Yet the weak still deserve the right to a happy life.

C: 黄泉称自己遭到匹诺康尼放逐，并请星穹列车立即跃迁离开该星系。黄泉冒充巡海游侠，是为了与真正的巡海游侠取得联系，交还遗物。
E: Acheron claimed that she had been ejected by Penacony, and that the Astral Express should immediately warp away from the system. The reason Acheron impersonated a Galaxy Ranger was to get in touch with a real Ranger to return relics.

C: 你与流萤找到真正的炸弹，流萤提出由自己身着装甲将炸弹送入梦境深处的无人之地。
E: You and Firefly found the real bomb. Firefly suggested wearing her mech armor and sending the bomb into the no man's land deep inside the Dreamscape.

C: 缇宝将缇安娃娃安置在生命花园。白厄想了解有关「神谕」的过往，缇宝拜托缇宁带你与白厄去命运重渊，揭露最初的历史。
E: Tribbie laid Trianne's doll to rest in the Garden of Life. Phainon wished to know of the past regarding the prophecy, and so Tribbie asked Trinnon to bring you and Phainon to the Abyss of Fate to unveil that chapter of ancient history.

C: 你与丹恒重逢。好久不见，当你被困住的时候，丹恒经历了许多事情。
E: You reunited with Dan Heng after quite some time. While you were trapped, Dan Heng went through a lot.

C: 希露瓦被可可利亚的幻象激怒，杰帕德利用激将法促成了姐弟的联手。
E: Enraged by Cocolia's illusions, Serval teamed up with her brother after Gepard provoked her into action.

C: 赢下捉迷藏后，你向虎克打听丹恒的去向。虎克称丹恒被桑博带去了搏击俱乐部，并为你与三月七带路。
E: After winning the game of hide-and-seek, you asked Hook about Dan Heng's whereabouts. She explained that Sampo had taken him to the Fight Club and offered to lead you and March 7th there.

C: 你跟随黄泉穿越梦境，踏墙而行，攀上天花板…这种体验，果然只能在梦里才会出现。
E: You followed Acheron through the Dreamscape, climbing the walls, and walking on the ceiling.... This kind of experience would only be possible in a dream.

C: 你从「入梦池」中醒来，发现房间模样大变，气氛有些诡异。你决定调查一下周围环境。
E: You awakened from the Dreampool and found the room had been dramatically changed. The atmosphere seemed strange, and thus you decided to investigate your surroundings.

C: 你向阿圾米德证明了自己的智慧与耐心，获得一个「信任的证明」。
E: You proved your wisdom and patience to Trashiemedes and earned a Proof of Trust.

C: 你打开宝箱，房间里的灯霎时全部亮起。流萤猜测众多门扉中，或许有一道门可以让你们离开这里。
E: You opened the chest and all lights within the room lit up at once. Firefly guessed that there might be a door that leads out among the many others that don't.

C: 流萤的记忆述说着：「我们出发吧……」她提到「我们」，身边或许还有其他人。
E: Firefly's memory stated: "Let's get going..." She used the word "let's," there might have been someone else with her.

C: 「梦主」接见知更鸟、星期日和瓦尔特，称自己并不知晓星核的存在。「梦主」请星期日动用「同谐」的力量向自己发问，以证明清白。
E: The Dreammaster received Robin, Sunday, and Welt, claiming to be unaware of the Stellaron's existence. The Dreammaster asked Sunday to invoke the power of the Harmony to question him and prove his innocence.

C: 你们向乐手鞠躬谢幕，但剧目演出尚未结束，它的未来掌握在你的手里。
E: You bow to the musicians at the end of the show, but the play wasn't over yet. You hold their future in your hands.

C: 你们重返主舞台，剧院景象剧变，「秩序」力量初现端倪。
E: You returned to the main stage, and the scenes in the theater had drastically changed. The powers of the Order were showing their first vestiges.

C: 「警长」娃娃长叹一声，以其精湛的演技咽了气。很可惜，虚数中子弹不在这里。
E: The "Sheriff" Doll let out a long sigh and, with its exquisite acting, feigned death. Unfortunately, the imaginary neutron bomb wasn't here.

C: 你执意离开，拥抱睡蕉小猴所许诺的「自由选择」。属于你的开拓•忍道就此断绝，你将不再有忧烦愁苦，终日与群猿相伴。
E: You insisted on leaving, embracing the "freedom of choice" promised by the Slumbernana Monkey. Your trailblazing way of the ninja ends here. You would be free from worries and sorrows, spending your days in the company of monkeys.

C: 折纸大学正筹办一场有关「开拓」的学术研讨会。姬子与瓦尔特应邀参会，你与三月七、丹恒则作为「旁听生」前去体验校园生活。
E: Paperfold University was organizing an academic conference on "Trailblazing." Himeko and Welt were invited as speakers, while you, March 7th, and Dan Heng would attend as "auditing students" to experience the wonders on-campus.

C: 你终于抵达折纸大学校门口，远远望见三月七向你招手示意。
E: You finally reached Paperfold University and saw March 7th waving to you in the distance.

C: 时间差不多了，丹恒提议去办入学手续。彩色的校园生活正等着你们。
E: It was nearly time, and Dan Heng suggested completing admissions. A spectacular campus life awaits.

C: 你们来到富贵的玩具摊位，富贵积极推销模玩社的主力商品「睡蕉小猴玩偶」。三月七买下一只，却被告知当前只是预售，请静待发货。
E: You visited Richie's toy stand, where he enthusiastically promoted the Toys and Models Club's bestseller — the Slumbernana Monkey doll. March 7th bought one but was told it was only a pre-order and to expect delivery later.

C: 波提欧与知更鸟聆听外向的睡蕉粉丝歌唱。歌词中包含睡蕉小猴的名言——「放弃所有一切，眼前风光才能更好！」
E: Boothill and Robin listened to an outgoing Slumbernana fan singing. The lyrics included the famous Slumbernana Monkey saying — "Life grows beautiful for those who forfeit it all."

C: 停云分身提议组建停云商团，邀请三月七协助联络外界，显现其务实一面。
E: Tingyun's split personalities suggested making a Tingyun Merchant Guild, inviting March 7th to help them contact the outside world, showing the practical side of Tingyun.

C: 你们听到悬锋族人谈论王欧利庞与王储迈德漠斯的分道扬镳。遐蝶说，万敌曾带领一部分族人离开悬锋城，而欧利庞最终被万敌杀死。
E: You caught whispers among the Kremnoans that King Eurypon and crown prince Mydeimos have gone their separate ways. Castorice explained that Mydei had once led a faction of his people away from Castrum Kremnos. And in the end, Eurypon fell by Mydei's hand.

C: 万敌梦到素未谋面的母亲，向其询问学习战斗的意义。歌耳戈认为誓言与教条都脆弱不堪，她只以一个身份而战——迈德漠斯的守护者。
E: Mydei dreamed about his mother, whom he had never met. He asked her why it was necessary for them to learn to fight. Gorgo replied that she no longer put her faith in any oath or doctrine, and her only role was to be Mydeimos's guardian.

C: 欧洛尼斯的图腾虚位以待，若你已准备好成为翁法罗斯的支柱，便上前来。
E: Oronyx's vacant totem awaited you. If you had already made your preparations to become a pillar of Amphoreus, then all that remained was for you to step forward.

C: 那刻夏跟随凯妮斯来到议会，得知公民大会将在十五天之后举行。凯妮斯展开辩论，以争取那刻夏对于重返「黄金世」的支持。
E: Anaxa followed Caenis to the hub of the Demigod Council. He learned that the citizens' assembly would be held in fifteen days. Caenis started a debate with Anaxa to gain his support for a return to the Era Chrysea.

C: 凯妮斯展开辩论，以争取那刻夏对于重返「黄金世」的支持。
E: Caenis started a debate with Anaxa to gain his support for a return to the Era Chrysea.

C: 丹恒捡到学者们针对那刻夏的投诉信，控诉其亵渎神明。这使风堇想起那刻夏的炼金实验室，或许那里会有石版中查不到的线索。
E: Dan Heng found letters of complaint from students against Anaxa, accusing him of blasphemy. Hyacine was reminded of Anaxa's secret alchemy lab, where she suggested they might be able to find clues not on the teleslates.

C: 即便被强加与「赐死」的权柄，遐蝶并不怨恨塞纳托斯。凡人的生死不该被任何意志主宰，哪怕是神明也无法独力担起生死的天平。
E: Despite having the authority of "granting death to humanity" forced upon her, Castorice did not hate Thanatos. Rather, she believed that the life and death of mortals should never be dictated by another's will. No single being could bear the scales of life and death on their own, not even a god.

C: 在击败「天空」之后，你与丹恒就有机会重返家园。白厄赞许你为翁法罗斯做出的贡献，希望将告别留给未来，当下准备继续并肩作战。
E: After triumphing over "Sky," you and Dan Heng would have a chance to return home. Phainon praised your contributions to Amphoreus and hoped that your farewells would be reserved for the future. After all, your fight here was not yet done.

C: 往世的雨之民记忆质问：「塑造天空的艾格勒，为何要回避乌云的追赶？」风堇认为这会是一条线索。
E: The memory of the Rainfolk of the past questioned: "But Aquila, you who shaped the sky... Why do you avoid the pursuit of dark clouds?" Hyacine believed this to be a clue you could look into.

C: 你们与露奈比斯会合。被黑潮腐蚀的艾格勒召集眷属，试图将你们围困。
E: You met with Lunabis. Aquila, corroded by the black tide, deployed their Titankin and tried to encircle you.

C: 在「天空」火种的作用下，西风罗盘回应了风堇的呼唤，彩虹桥在你们面前自动延伸。
E: With the power of Sky Coreflame, the West Wind Compass answered Hyacine's call. The Rainbow Bridge extended before you.

C: 奥赫玛的黎明落幕，末日降临圣城。丹恒注意到某些建筑结构变成了数据体的材质，白厄猜想这与来袭的黑潮相关。
E: Dawn faded in Okhema and doomsday descended upon the holy city. Dan Heng noticed that parts of the architecture were turning into data streams, which Phainon suspected had to do with the black tide.

C: 风堇以天空后裔身份归还火种，与塞涅俄丝以及诸位英灵对话，在先祖期许中接过「天空」权柄。她将降下温柔的虹光，守护众多生灵。
E: As a descendant of Sky, Hyacine returned the Coreflame and spoke with Seliose and the honored spirits. Guided by her ancestors' hopes, she inherited the authority of Sky. She cast a gentle rainbow light upon the land to shield all living beings under her care.

C: 你前往列车站台，怪异的科员们试图阻止你，声称无名客的未来只有一片虚无与绝望。这反而使你更加确信，自己是一个无名客。
E: You headed for the station platform. Strange researchers tried to stop you, claiming the future of a Nameless held only emptiness and despair. But that just made you more certain that you were one of the Nameless.

C: Saber与Archer来到门外，想要营救御主。画外音传来提示，只要锯掉一个人的腿，大门就会打开，否则房间将原地爆炸。
E: Saber and Archer showed up outside the door, ready to save their respective Masters. The voice-over announced that the door will open as long as you two saw off a leg from one of you. Otherwise, the room will explode.

C: 你与Archer遇到音符小姐，她正被音符姥姥纠缠。音符姥姥召来众多使魔，战斗一触即发时，Saber赶到现场。
E: You and Archer ran into Miss Note, who was being pestered by Granny Note. The latter summoned a horde of Familiars. Just as things were about to get ugly, Saber burst onto the scene.

C: 你再次倾倒圣杯，纪念第二次逐火之旅的英雄们，逝者的祭奠以此作结。旧世的墓碑是海妖幻境的锚点，将其摧毁，即可粉碎这场幻梦。
E: You poured from the chalice again for the heroes of the second Flame-Chase Journey. Let this be the end of mourning the fallen. This tombstone of the old world served as the anchor of the siren's illusion. Destroy it, and the dream would break.

C: 三月七向长夜月展示由精魄变成的手账，其内容由相机中的照片构成。这就是「记忆」，也是三月七一路以来的「开拓」。
E: March 7th showed Evernight her journal made of her spirit, filled with photos from the camera. This was the "memories" and also March 7th's "Trailblaze" journey all along.

C: 姬子回应识刻锚的联系请求。布洛妮娅称贝洛伯格得到托帕的援助，已经准备好应对灾难。
E: Himeko responded to the Chronocognitive Anchor's contact request. Bronya reported that Belobog had received Topaz's support and was ready to handle the disaster.

C: 昔涟回到哀丽秘榭。故乡景象一如既往，仿佛昔涟从未离开。
E: Cyrene returned to Aedes Elysiae. Her homeland remained unchanged, as if she had never left.

C: 银狼请你从两道传送门中选择其一。螺丝咕姆解释，本质上说，银狼是在让她的同伴做选择。
E: Silver Wolf asked you to pick one of the two teleporters. Screwllum explained that, in essence, she was letting her companion decide.

C: 你与三月七来到边缘通路附近。杰帕德正在此率领银鬃铁卫维持秩序，他希望你们能尽情享受节日的氛围。
E: You and March 7th arrived near Backwater Pass, where Gepard was leading the Silvermane Guards to keep order. He hoped you could enjoy the festive vibe to the fullest.

C: 探测器在方才的战斗中不幸受损。桑博提议你们去磐岩镇找古物鉴定商巴列维，以出售古物的名义诱使其修好探测器。
E: The detector was damaged during the recent combat. Sampo suggested going to Boulder Town to find Balaway, an antique appraiser, and trick him into fixing the detector under the pretense of selling antiques.

C: 厨子称自己在案发时间外出采购食材，看到保姆偷偷进入了费斯曼的帐篷，并将一个箱子从中带出。
E: The cook claimed that during the time of the incident, he was out shopping for ingredients when he saw the helper sneaking into Fersman's tent and carrying out a box.

C: 在「家用寻物仪」的搜索下，你与虎克找到尤利安的时间胶囊，其上写有文字——「给<unbreak>50</unbreak>年后的尤利安」。
E: With the Home-Use Object Finder, you and Hook discovered Julian's time capsule, which bore the inscription — "To Julian, <unbreak>50</unbreak> years from now."

C: 调取的影像资料中有四张关于罗刹的监控图像，接下来，你们需要理清这些图像的顺序。
E: The retrieved footage contained four surveillance images of Luocha. Next, you needed to determine the correct order of them.

C: 三月七因为怕烫而不敢触摸加热器，符玄则抓住她的手按了上去。
E: March 7th hesitated to touch the heater for fear of being burned, so Fu Xuan grabbed her hand and pressed it down.

C: 丹恒告诉景元，自己以后不打算留在罗浮，而会跟随星穹列车。
E: Dan Heng told Jing Yuan he didn't plan to stay on the Luofu, but would follow the Astral Express instead.

C: 黑天鹅和桑博发现了一条<color=#f29e38ff>「烟熏红鲱鱼」</color>，这是花火特有的幽默感。
E: Black Swan and Sampo found a <color=#f29e38ff>Smoked Red Herring</color>, which was just another example of Sparkle's unique sense of humor.

C: 「孤云」认为这世界的人们会背叛、会臣服，却不会反抗；而无名剑士虽然从未取得胜利，但仍然相信会有人同他一起战斗。
E: Guyun believed that humans could betray or submit, but not resist. Yet the nameless swordsman, despite never tasting victory, still believed someone out there would fight alongside him.

C: 竞锋舰的礼炮响起。狼卒捎来迴星港的变故，末度恳求立即逃亡。呼雷斥责步离人如今的软弱，决定就地转化狼卒，组建猎群。
E: The Skysplitter's ceremonial cannons fired. A Wolftrooper arrived with troubling news from Stargazer Navalia, causing Mok Tok to beg for immediate evacuation. Disgusted by such cowardice, Hoolay scorned the borisin's weakness and decided to transform the Wolftrooper on the spot to form a new pack.

C: 去青雀安排的位置站好吧。
E: Take your position according to Qingque's plan.

C: 下雪大衣
E: Snowy Coat

C: 无冕之王子
E: Crownless Prince

C: 不错的投资方向，聊聊专利买断？
E: Not a bad investment direction. Wanna talk IP buyout?

C: 流梦礁
E: Dreamflux Reef

C: 收容舱段
E: Storage Zone

C: 机械聚落
E: Robot Settlement

C: 鳞渊境
E: Scalegorge Waterscape

C: 模拟宇宙
E: Simulated Universe

C: 模拟宇宙
E: Simulated Universe

C: 你联系了瓦尔特，效果拔群。
E: You contact Welt. The result is phenomenal.

C: 帮忙我不行，干饭第一名。
E: I'm useless when it comes to helping, but I am a champion eater.

C: 应该加个厕所。
E: Needs a restroom.

C: 人偶们开始「转圈圈」。
E: The puppets start spinning in circles.

C: 人偶们，不会给自己找点事做吗？
E: Puppets, why don't you find yourselves something to do?

C: 全部斩无赦！
E: Reject them all without mercy!

C: 你向公司申请调换摩托车。
E: You request a motorcycle replacement from the IPC.

C: 记得请三月七师父喝几杯奶茶。
E: Remember to treat Master March 7th to more than one cup of milk tea afterward.

C: 建造奇观才是文明的入门玩法。
E: Constructing wonders is the true gateway to the game of Civilization.

C: 早知道，还是天气预报。
E: Should've just checked the weather forecast.

C: 「哟~哟，老日在此，说唱不止。」
E: "Yo~ Yo, Sunny's in the house, droppin' bars non-stop!"

C: 我去，电子歌姬…歌哥。
E: Whoa, an electronic diva... or should I say, divo?

C: 反正都要没了，明显你更酷一些！
E: We're all toast anyway, but at least you'll go out in style.

C: 恰好在波月古海的无人岛上搁浅了。
E: Happens to run out of fuel on a deserted island in Lunarescent Depths.

C: 公司打算投资修缮雅利洛-Ⅵ上的一座建筑，以支持当地的重建工作，而具体的施工计划书则由克里珀堡提供。布洛妮娅挑灯夜战、尽可能平衡各方势力，最终拟定了几个方案。究竟该把宝贵的机会用在哪里？她询问起你的意见。
E: The IPC plans to invest in renovating a building on Jarilo-VI to support local reconstruction efforts, with the specific construction plans provided by Qlipoth Fort. Bronya burns the midnight oil, striving to balance various interests, and eventually drafts several proposals. Where should this valuable opportunity be used? She seeks your opinion.

C: 波提欧
E: Boothill

C: 永冬铭碑
E: Everwinter Monument

C: 折纸小鸟
E: Origami Bird

C: 伴手礼大促销-Ⅰ
E: Souvenir Sale I

C: 穿衣镜
E: Dressing Mirror

C: 水果摊
E: Fruit Stand

C: 银河球棒侠传说：启程篇
E: Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Departure

C: 「瑟希斯之心」
E: Heart of Cerces

C: 前往「神话之外」
E: Head to Exomyth

C: 冒险游戏机
E: Adventure Game Console

C: 欢愉
E: Elation

C: 「无尽膨胀升级」位面获得<unbreak>55000</unbreak>试炼点数
E: Obtain <unbreak>55,000</unbreak> trial points in the "Infinite Expansion Upgrade" plane

C: 在「忘却之庭」中累计获得#4星通关奖励
E: Obtain a total of #4 stars from clearing Forgotten Hall stages

C: 开拓等级达到#4级
E: Reach Trailblaze Level #4

C: 完成开拓任务「有龙矫矫，其渊渺渺」，并通关「忘却之庭•仙舟回忆其一」后获取角色「驭空」
E: Complete Trailblaze Mission "A Dragon Gallant, Its Ocean Distant" and clear Forgotten Hall: Memory of Xianzhou Stage 1 to obtain the character Yukong

C: 在折磨难度，难题等级大于等于1时，使用【持续伤害】演算倾向并通关第四位面
E: Clear the Fourth Plane at Conundrum Level 1 or higher in Torturous Difficulty using the "DoT" Extrapolation Alignment.

C: 完成第四遗迹深层探索的第#1层
E: Complete Deep Exploration level #1 for ruin 4

C: 在本关卡中达到#1分
E: Earn #1 point(s) in this stage.

C: 在「筑梦边境」击碎#4个可破坏物
E: Smash #4 destructible objects at the "Dream's Edge"

C: 在「白日梦」酒店-梦境完成#4次「同谐之蕾 • 拟造花萼（赤）」
E: Clear "Calyx (Crimson): Bud of Harmony" for #4 time(s) in The Reverie (Dreamscape)

C: 在「终极挑战」阶段，积分达到#2
E: In the Final Showdown phase, reach #2 Point(s)

C: 在「终极挑战」阶段，积分达到#2
E: In the Final Showdown phase, reach #2 Point(s)

C: 完成1次「差分宇宙」任意模式（阈值协议3及以上）
E: Complete Divergent Universe in any mode (Threshold Protocol 3 or above) 1 time

C: 击败第2波次首领
E: Defeat the second wave's boss

C: 完成火山星球的挑战后解锁
E: Unlock by completing the Volcanic Planet challenge

C: 在甜梦星球的冒险挑战中，积分达到#2
E: Reach #2 points in Blissdream Planet's adventure challenge

C: 在「《美梦往事》」的总集篇模式中获得#1分
E: Achieve a score of #1 in the Dreamjoy Memoir Anthology mode

C: 击败空间站「黑塔」决胜乐园的所有挑战者
E: Defeat all challengers in the Herta Space Station Victory Zone

C: 在超链接对决中完成2场绿光级挑战
E: Complete 2 "Green Light Level" challenges in Hyperlink Match

C: 在痛苦连环「超巨星」模式中，击败#3波敌人
E: Eliminate #3 wave(s) of enemies in the Cycle of Suffering "Supergiant Star" mode challenge

C: 在梦境训练的#4个关卡中，击败第1阶段首领
E: Defeat the 1st phase boss in #4 Dreamscape Training stage(s)

C: 在「留影计划·第一日」关卡中获得2个奖杯
E: Win 2 trophies in Operation Snapshot: Day 1

C: 任意角色值日等级达到<unbreak>40</unbreak>级
E: Any character's Duty Level reaches <unbreak>40</unbreak>

C: 累计触发4次激励格
E: Trigger Incentive Tile a total of 4 times

C: 在「『浴血战端』悬锋城」使用#4次「欧洛尼斯祷言」
E: Use Oronyx's prayers #4 time(s) in "Bloodbathed Battlefront" Castrum Kremnos

C: 「无尽膨胀培育」位面获得<unbreak>40000</unbreak>试炼点数
E: Obtain <unbreak>40,000</unbreak> trial points in the "Infinite Expansion Nurture" plane

C: 完成齿轮星球的挑战后解锁
E: Unlock by completing the Cogwheel Planet challenge

C: 完成「初始星球」的挑战
E: Complete the Initial Planet challenge

C: 餐馆星级提升至三星
E: Increase Restaurant Rating to 3-Star

C: 在剧情模式中累计战胜#4名不同的对手
E: Defeat a total of #4 different opponents in Story Mode

C: 累计强化#4次对战道具
E: Enhance a total of #4 Battle Item(s)

C: 完成「第四幕•翁法罗斯」任意1节开拓任务
E: Complete any 1 section of the Trailblaze Mission in "Amphoreus: Act IV"

C: 以「布洛妮娅」的贝洛伯格羁绊形态通关1次
E: Complete a stage once with Bronya's "Belobog" Bond form

C: 紫金及以上职级激活6减益
E: Activate 6 Debuff at Amethyst Gold rank and above

C: 提问：在杀戮之上，是否存在一种更伟大的力量……
E: Question: Past the scarlet curtain of blood and beyond slaughter, does an even greater power exist...?

C: 历经此前种种，大剧院近来总是阒无人声。而曾在此折翼坠地的男人，为了习得如何行于地面，必须先在此处飞向星空。
E: After all that has happened, the Grand Theater stands deserted. The man who crashed here with broken wings must learn how to walk on the land, but to do that, he must first fly toward the stars.

C: 静谧的监牢之中，曾困居其中的种子已然身作飞花飘离，但无根之花必然失却记忆，将珍贵的宝藏留在身后的孤坟。
E: In the silent prison, the seed once confined there had already turned into flying flower petals and drifted away. Yet a rootless blossom must lose its memories, leaving its treasures in the lonely grave behind it.

C: 冬兵进行曲
E: Winter Soldiers' March

C: 归风啊，席卷旧尘登云天
E: Zephyr, Uplift Bygone Dust Cloudsward

C: 相机里的世界
E: World Within the Camera

C: 莱斯利的心绪空间
E: Lesley's Emoscape

C: 湛蓝爵士的心绪空间

C:
尚未成为骑士的少女，在导师隐居的山洞中，接受出类拔萃的武艺指导。

「做得好。很快，我就没什么可以教你的了。你想用这份力量做什么？」

听闻神谕之后，少女心绪便早已不在训练之上。温和的导师看出了她的烦恼心思，轻轻将松脂涂抹在她常用的短剑上。「老师，我想活在真实之中。您听说了吗…雅努萨波利斯的圣女，以及她传来的神谕？」少女担忧着导师劝止自己，却早已暗下决心。

「可，什么是真实呢？」温和的导师反问她，「…你需用一生去分辨它，这并不容易。」

子夜她悄悄起身，想趁黎明到来之前就匆忙离去，却发现那叠好的披风，早已在启程的行囊之中。
E:
The girl, not yet a knight, received exceptional combat training in the secluded mountain cave of her mentor.

"Well done. Soon, there will be nothing more I can teach you. What do you intend to do with this power?"

The girl's thoughts were no longer on her training after hearing the divine oracle. Her gentle mentor noticed her troubled mind and quietly applied resin to the blade of her trusted short sword. "Teacher, I want to live in truth. Have you heard... about the Holy Maiden of Janusopolis and the prophecy she delivered?" The girl feared her mentor would try to dissuade her, yet her resolve had already been set.

"But what is truth?" The gentle mentor asked in return. "...You will need a lifetime to discern it, and that will not be easy."

At midnight, she quietly rose, hoping to leave in haste before dawn arrived, only to find that her travel pack already contained a neatly folded cloak.

C:
自从「陨石星群」造成的停滞开始，「晨昏交界线」便成为了萨尔索图人狭隘的生命线。

当一切刚开始的时候，人们仍然以为昼夜交替理所当然。晨昏线拂过大地，翻越山峰、跨过沟壑，给未醒的带去黎明，给将眠的送上晚霞…而当光与暗的步伐缓慢之后，白昼和黑夜不再熟悉，无尽漫长的酷热严寒如同地狱泥沼，将深陷其中的生命缓慢埋葬。于是，挣扎求生的萨尔索图人，搭上飞行的移动城市，追逐着晨昏。

登上移动城市「风滚草」的瞭望台，顺着前进的方向看去，前方是白昼，身后则是黑夜。

「风滚草」的追赶并非只是为了生存，更是为了尊严的生活。它前进得比晨昏线更快一些，清晨就会步入午后；比晨昏线更慢一些，黄昏便潜入深夜。生性乐观的萨尔索图人还原了每一个「平凡一日」。与生俱来中的浪漫基因，让他们能在安宁闲适的午后吟唱，也能在满缀繁星的夜晚酣睡。

然而，顽强执拗的飞翔却终究是陷落了，移动城市的残垣断壁还是被晨昏线甩在了身后。

多年以后，两座始终互不相见的移动城市矗立在一起，残骸中炮塔分别指向彼此。想必是某座城市跨越过半颗星球的昼夜奔向了另一座城市，率先挑起了战争。两座城市惨烈的战争痕迹在沙丘之下若隐若现，连同无名的仇恨合二为一，化为了同一座废墟。

萨尔索图星沉默着，不知从何时起，它的自转周期渐渐减少，将在无人的未来迎来星球自愈。
E:
Ever since the stagnation caused by the Meteoric Starfall, the terminator line had become the lifeline of the Salsottians.

When it all started, people still took the shifting of day and night for granted. The line of dawn and dusk swept across the earth, climbed over mountains and ravines, brought dawn to those still awake, and sent sunset to those who would soon sleep... But when the rhythm of light and darkness slowed down, day and night were no longer familiar, and the seemingly eternal heat and coldness were like the quagmire of hell, slowly burying all lives entrapped within. This was why the Salsottian people, barely surviving at the time, boarded the floating mobile city and began their chase with dawn and dusk.

Climbing atop the observation deck of the mobile city of Tumbleweed and looking in the direction that they were moving, daylight lies ahead and dark night behind.

The pursuit of "Tumbleweed" is not only for survival but also for a dignified life. When it moved faster than the terminator line, then the early morning light would march into the afternoon; when slower than the terminator line, then the dusk light would fade into the late night. In this way, the naturally optimistic Salsottian managed to restore every day to its original state. The romance in their bloodline blessed them with the easygoing spirit to sing leisurely in peaceful afternoons and sleep soundly on starry nights.

However, this voyage of tenacity and perseverance would, at last, come to its final downfall, and the ruins of the once mobile city were eventually left far behind by the ever-shifting terminator line.

Years later, the two moving cities that had never met each other would finally stand against each other, with their respective turrets among the wreckage still aimed in opposition. One of the two cities must have crossed half of the planet to the other one and started the initial incursion. Traces of brutal warfare between the two cities were still occasionally discernible under the sand dunes, which merged with unnameable hatred and morphed together into the same ruins.

Planet Salsotto kept its silence. And ever since a certain unknown time, the duration of each of its rotation cycles had somehow gradually decreased, ushering in its own self-healing in an unpopulated future.

C:
孤独的水手与此前的到访者一样，徘徊在大海与城邦之间，驻足在尘世与欢乐的门槛上。他拭去搁浅的鲸鱼伤口中流溢的油脂，在夜幕时分点亮灯塔，然后在灯光前端坐，用水漫琴弹奏起那些尚未被奏响的歌曲。

灯塔随着琴键奏鸣，整个斯缇科西亚沉浸在乐曲之中。那些或和缓或急促的曲调，激起了斯缇科西亚女王有关享乐的无穷遐想。水手从最后一个休止符开始倒着演奏，使曲调诙谐跳跃。于是白色的长船载着杂耍艺人，轻巧地穿过河道。盛装的男女拥挤在两岸，以金箔和羽毛装饰的假面遮住面庞，女王也混迹其间，徜徉在丁香和杏仁的香气里。

水手整顿节奏，使音符急促而激昂。于是以整座城邦为舞台的戏剧中，扮演海盗的民众挥舞黑旗攻陷从未设防的城墙，劫掠美酒和金币，将贵族们送上摆满鲜花的绞刑架，然后用王冠给全城乞丐加冕。在谢幕时刻，人们将高塔付之一炬，再伴着琴声狂舞，烂醉如泥。

翻涌的海浪打湿乐谱，洇开柔和舒缓的音符。女王在灯塔前的迷雾中迈入新的剧本，她一袭鱼尾蓝裙，出演法吉娜的眷从——海妖们的女王。

在故事里，海妖们受命在海洋深处抵御尘世难以想象的苦痛，以血肉将漆黑的灾厄引入满溢之杯，换取斯缇科西亚永世的欢乐。到了那应允的时刻，海妖们终将循着灯塔的灯光和弦声，沿着堤道步入斯缇科西亚。斯缇科西亚人将执起她们的手，一同参加那永不歇止的宴会。

斯缇科西亚女王步入水中，享受一次想象中的死亡。在那月相无法约束波涛的夜晚，大海深处，海妖们空心的泪水如泡沫般上升，她们期冀，她们等待，窥探此生未见的月光，然后血肉消融。可惜，此夜并没有月光，只有灯塔明灭如故——泪水代替海妖们升上波光粼粼的海面，漂泊的浮沫消散在浪潮之中。

孤独的水手得偿所愿。宴饮者眼含幸福的泪水，祝贺他得以步入斯缇科西亚，当第一声欢歌响起，死亡凋敝的羽翼便已经覆盖在这座永世欢乐的城邦之上。
E:
Like those who came before him, the lonely sailor lingers between sea and city, poised on the threshold between the mortal world and revelry. He wipes the oil seeping from the wound of a stranded whale. At nightfall, he lights the beacon. Then, seated before the light, he begins to play melodies yet unplayed on the water lyre.

The lighthouse hums with each note, and all of Styxia is swept into song. The melodies, sometimes gentle, sometimes fevered, stir boundless fantasies of delight in the Styxia Queen's heart. When the sailor begins to play in reverse from the final semibreve rest, the tune becomes whimsical and sprightly. Then, white longboats carry tumblers and jesters and glide through the canals. Men and women in splendid attire line the shores, their faces covered in masks decorated with gold leaf and feathers. The Queen slips among them, drifting through the scent of lilac and almonds.

Then, the sailor sharpens the rhythm, the notes ringing wild and triumphant. A city-wide play unfolds with Styxia as the stage. Townsfolk dressed as pirates wave black flags, storming the walls that were never defended. They plunder wine and gold, hang nobles upon flower-strewn gallows, and crown every beggar in the city. At the finale, the tower is set ablaze, and the crowd dances madly to the lyre's music, drunk beyond reason.

The crashing tide dampens the sheet music, blurring notes that are soothing and slow. In the mist before the lighthouse, the Queen steps into a new script. Dressed in a sea-blue fishtail dress, she plays the attendant of Phagousa — the Queen of the sea sirens.

In this tale, the sirens are tasked to guard an anguish beyond mortal imagination in the ocean's deepest. Using their flesh and blood, they guide the pitch-dark calamity into the Chalice of Plenty, exchanging for Styxia's eternal joy. When the appointed time comes, the sirens will finally follow the lighthouse's light and the lyre's song, and walk along the causeway to enter Styxia. The people of the city will take their hands, and together, they shall join the never-ending celebration.

The Queen of Styxia wades into the water, embracing an imagined demise. On a night when the tides break free from the moon's restraints, the hollow tears of the sea sirens rise like foam deep beneath the waves. They hope. They wait. They gaze upon moonlight they've never known — then their flesh dissolves. A pity that there is no moonlight tonight. Only the lighthouse flickers, as always — The tears ascend instead of the sea sirens, surfacing onto the glimmering sea surface, like floating foam that dissolves into the waves.

The lonely sailor is granted his wish. The revelers, eyes glistening with blissful tears, welcome him into Styxia. By the time the first note of the song rings out, the withered wings of death have already covered this city of everlasting joy.

E: If an enemy is under any DoT status when receiving an attack, they will take DMG from a random DoT on them.

E: Increases CRIT Rate.

C: 我方全体【<u>执念</u>】层数超过<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>层时，使终结技与忆灵造成的伤害提高。
E: While all allies have more than <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> "<u>Obsession</u>" stacks, increases DMG dealt by Ultimate and DMG dealt by memosprites.

C: 万象无常骰曾在宇宙中极为常见，造成无数微小但邪恶的混乱。它的使用方法是这样的：手掌紧紧握住骰子，默念任意一句有意义的话，想着你最想吃的食物同时将骰子掷出。某一面向上时你会得到意外之财，某一面向上时你会收获美好的爱情，但更多面的结局是疾病、霉运、诅咒和终生相伴的梅雨。尽管如此，仍有许多人热衷于投掷万象无常骰，并快乐地宣称这不过是假面愚者的一个玩笑。
E: Entropic Dice are common in the universe and cause countless tiny but malevolent disturbances. To use it, you grab the die tightly and think of any meaningful sentence in your head, then as you throw the die, think about the food you want to eat the most. You will receive unexpected wealth if the die lands on a certain number and wonderful love on another number, but the ends you will meet for other numbers include illness, bad luck, curses, and lifelong rain. Despite this, many people still love to play with these dice, and happily declare that these items are just a joke made by the Masked Fools.

C: 只有在面对最扑朔迷离的案情时，塔兰顿忠诚的裁决官才会请出裁决器。裁决器两端的狮口紧紧咬住证物，那证物也许是一把带血的匕首，也许是一瓶染毒的蜜酿，但无论证物是什么，天平都会倒向更具真实性的一侧。当然，有些犯人会制造出所谓的完美犯罪，但他们忘记了，最可信的证据永远隐藏在他们的内心。只要将犯人的手指塞进狮口，塔兰顿就会让他们知道，是他们的嘴更硬还是狮牙更硬。
E: Talanton's royal judges would only take out the Judgment Device when faced with the most enigmatic cases. The lion heads on the two sides of the device would each tightly clamp down on a piece of evidence — These could be a bloodstained dagger or a bottle of poisoned honey brew, and the scale would always tilt favorably towards the item that's more indicative of the truth. While some culprits can indeed create "perfect crimes," they tend to forget that the most reliable evidence will always remain in their hearts. Put the suspect's finger into the lion's mouth, and Talanton will show them how their denials are nothing before the lions' teeth.

C: 在黄昏战争前，混沌星云膨胀所产生的爆炸碎屑可以作为饵料，其特有的宇宙尘埃芳香能够吸引到古兽前来觅食。但在这场覆界浩劫之后，「碎星芳饵」似乎失去了其原有作用，无论学者如何研究改造饵料，都再没有人能够成功寻得古兽身影。\n（该奇物已发生数据膨胀）
E: Before the Dusk Wars, the exploded fragments born out of the expansion of disordered nebulas could be used as lures, and their unique aroma of cosmic dust could attract Leviathans to feed on them. However, the Shattered Star Bait seems to have lost its original effectiveness after that catastrophic disaster. No matter how much scholars researched and modified the lure, no one was ever able to glimpse the form of the Leviathans again.\n(This Curio already underwent data expansion)

C:
不必多言，在血亲的根系里，我们已知晓你的来意。
在刻法勒创造人类以前，仙女木便已遍及世界，
与无知的你们不同，我们的理性扎根于大地，
智慧如雨露在其间流淌，即使凋零，也终有新生的种子传承。
我们仍能记得，
瑟希斯的灵智教导我们如何舒展叶片，如何思辨自我，
来往的学者曾被我们质问至沉默，
树庭最初的贤者，因我们的低语而灵光乍现。
那场弑神的旅途，若你想要知晓我们的答案，就侧耳倾听吧，
花瓣落入土壤，死亡成就新生，失败也绝非终结。
E:
There is no need for words. Through the roots that connect our blood, your intent is already known to us.
Before Kephale created humanity, the White Dryad had already spread across the world.
Unlike your ignorant kind, our reason is deeply rooted in the earth.
Wisdom flows among us like the morning dew. Though we may wither, our seeds carry the promise of renewal.
We remember.
Cerces taught us to unfurl our leaves, to question our very being.
The travelling scholars all fell silent by our questions.
The first sage of the Grove got their revelation from our whispers.
So, are you seeking answers to the godslayer's journey? Then just lend your ear and listen.
Petals fall off, bury in the soil. Death nourishes new life. Failure is never the end.

C:
欢迎来到我的育种室，第一位参观者。
如你所见，这里没有土壤和幼苗，
那些粗糙的工作自然有吉奥里亚的信徒完成。
而我需要做的，是让记忆的种子规律生长。
你看那粉色的，是少女成为舞者的梦想，
她出生于政治世家，此生注定与舞台无缘。
而在我的培养皿中，她正在翩翩起舞，
假以时日，少女便来此地将记忆采撷，
我敢保证，比她亲身经历得还要鲜活。
你再看你蓝色的，冒险家的梦想，
金色的，将军的梦想……
至于那些灰色的，只不过是实验的失败品罢了。
E:
Welcome to my seed greenhouse, honored first visitor.
As you can see, there's no soil or seedlings here.
Those mundane tasks are left to the followers of Georios.
My role is to nurture the seeds of memories, ensuring their regular and orderly growth.
Look at that pink one — it's the dream of a young girl becoming a dancer.
Born into a political dynasty, her fate seemed sealed, far from the stage's embrace.
Yet, within my incubator, she's dancing gracefully.
One day, the girl will come here to collect her memory.
Trust me. They'll be more vivid than her real-life experiences.
Look at the blue one — it holds the dream of an adventurer.
The golden one embodies the dream of a general...
As for those gray ones, they're mere remnants of failed experiments.

C: 成功的标准比
E: Ideal Success Ratio

C: 最爱与纯美骑士打交道的派系恐怕是假面愚者，这些愚者时常拿骑士对伊德莉拉终将归来的信仰逗闷取乐，而高洁的骑士总是十分虔诚，固执地践行纯美的信仰。出于上述理由，悲悼伶人从骑士团的精神中获得了共情——他们收藏了纯美骑士在践行「纯美」时牺牲的一颗牙齿，它也如此美丽。
E: The faction that likes dealing with the Knights of Beauty the most are most likely the Masked Fools. These Fools like to amuse themselves by exploiting the knights' faith in the eventual return of Idrila, while the knights themselves remain ever-pious and obstinate practitioners in the ways of Beauty. Due to the reasons listed above, the Mourning Actors developed a sense of empathy for the knights from the spirit they demonstrated, and they collected a tooth sacrificed by the Knights of Beauty in their practice of seeking aesthetic perfection, with the tooth's desirability enduring even till the present.

C: 黑塔曾为一个遥远的故事收藏了一份模型：龋齿星系联邦政府总为不定期到来的区域充气糖果风暴焦头烂额，财务部门每个自然年都花费无数信用点对被侵蚀土壤进行修复。曾有一位无名客到达过此星球，并试图探索它的型状，在数月探索后发出惊呼：「宇宙是不规则的，就像个牙齿！」
E: Herta once collected a model for the sake of a faraway story she heard. The federal government of the Cavity System always found themselves irregularly hard-pressed by a storm of invading inflatable candies. Thus, their financial affairs department were forced to spend uncountable credits to resolve the damages inflicted upon their corroded soil each natural year. Once, there was a Nameless that passed by this planet, and they sought to suss out its shape, and after several months of exploration, they cried out in shock: "The universe is irregularly shaped, just like a tooth!"
