C: 角色故事·四
E: Character Story: Part IV

C: 相比「列车长」帕姆，「领航员」姬子，「护卫」丹恒，「什么都会的」瓦尔特，即使自称为「勇士」，连三月七都很难说清楚自己在列车上的分工。 但三月七的一举一动，无时无刻不都在影响列车组的行动方针。 「三月七旅客摔倒了……」 「三月，小心头顶的方铅矿球。」 「小三月，那边的景点拍过照了吗？」 「我相信小三月，她说不好吃，那就肯定不好吃。」 与其说三月七容易让人放心不下，不如说她总是会让人放在心上。 当然，三月七对此毫无察觉，她正在全力思考适合{NICKNAME}的列车组定位。
E: Compared to Pom-Pom the conductor, Himeko the Navigator, Dan Heng the Guard, and Welt the Jack-of-all-Trades, even March 7th has a hard time explaining her role aboard the Express despite calling herself a "Warrior." But March 7th's every move affects the crew's course of action all the time. "Passenger March 7th slipped and fell..." "March, watch out for the galena ball above your head." "March, have you taken pictures of the sights over there?" "I believe March. If she said it's not delicious, then it's truly not delectable." Rather than calling March 7th someone who constantly worries people, it would be better to say that she works her way into people's hearts. March 7th, of course, is oblivious to this, and is struggling to think up the right role for {NICKNAME}.

C: 「——日志 筑城纪元████年██月██日。」 「在克拉拉的指引下，已有为数众多的流浪者在本基地周围建立聚落，并依靠克拉拉的救助维生。这一行为与『存护』之指令并不相悖，然而，其中有许多人试图通过本基地的运输通道进入上层区。为此必须将基地大门封闭，以避免加剧贝洛伯格的灭亡进程。」 「克拉拉曾就此事与我发起讨论：她认为封闭大门这一行为是『无法理解』的。对此，我已告知演算结果：大守护者将过多资源投入到对裂界的战事上，这一行为反而会加速上层区的覆灭；对于下层区而言，与之隔绝将是最好的选择——下层区人民将因此争取到更多存活的时间。最终，克拉拉对此表示认可。」 「绝大多数人类的行为毫无逻辑可言，可克拉拉并非如此——她由我抚养、在自动机兵间成长，其一切行为举止都更多出自真正的理性。她的存在或许能够影响到关于贝洛伯格灭亡进程的演算结果，但仍需更多观察。」
E: "— Log ██/██/████ AF." "Under Clara's guidance, many vagrants have established settlements around the periphery of the base, and rely on Clara to survive. This behavior does not contravene the orders of Preservation. However, many of them are trying to enter the Overworld via this base's transport passage. The gates of the base must be sealed tightly to avoid accelerating the demise of Belobog." "Clara has discussed this with me before. She believes locking the gates is an 'incomprehensible' act. I responded with my predicted calculations: By over-committing her resources to the war against the Fragmentum , the Supreme Guardian is accelerating the destruction of the Overworld. Isolation would be the best option for the people of the Underworld — this would buy them more time to try and survive. In the end, Clara finally agreed." "Most humans behave illogically, but Clara doesn't — she is raised by me and grew up among automatons, and her behavior is more based on pure rationality. Her presence may impact predicted calculations of Belobog's demise, but more observations are required."

C: 若要问彦卿除剑术之外还寄情何物，只能换得一句干脆的回答—— 「兴趣只会影响我拔剑的速度！」 犹如孩童热爱玩具买个不停，他不惜倾尽所有零花，购入工造司所出的大部分宝剑——真气操作的飞剑、近身接战的短刃、自在伸缩的软剑…每一种规格功能都如数家珍，并且时常购入双份，一柄拆封使用，一柄入室珍藏。到了月底往往落得个「吃将军，用将军，可怜巴巴求将军」的地步。 少年爱剑，天经地义。在他所藏的仙舟剑器上倒映闪烁着的是一个梦： 成为罗浮第一，不，是仙舟第一；摘取罗浮「剑首」，乃至联盟「剑魁」的冠称。 自「饮月之乱」后，罗浮云骑军中武艺之尊「剑首」 的名衔已空悬数百年——并非无人想要争取，而是某些更隐秘难言的原因： 前任剑首，那位留下十三奇功的传奇剑士，触犯天律，被抹去了名字。连她所得到的荣誉，也成了旁人难以触碰的痛处。 但对意气洋洋的少年而言，是时候将历史翻篇，写入新章了。
E: If you ask Yanqing what other interests he has besides sword fighting, you'll be met with a simple answer — "Interests are temporary, my sword is forever!" Like a child infatuated with toys, he spares no expense in buying most of the blades manufactured by the Artisanship Commission — flying swords controlled by qi, daggers for close combat, flexible swords that can bend and adjust... He knows different sword's spec and function like the back of his mind. He'll even buy an extra copy — one to use in combat, and one for his collection. This leaves his finances in a sorrowful situation at the end of each month, where he could only beg the general for food and daily necessities. It's completely natural for teenage boys to love swords, but a specific dream flickers and dances among the Xianzhou swords in his collection. To become the best on the Luofu — no, the best across all the Xianzhou ships. To take the title of Sword Champion on the Luofu, and even take the title of Sword Preeminence across the Alliance. Since the Sedition of Imbibitor Lunae, the title of Sword Champion among the Luofu Cloud Knights has remained vacant for centuries. Not that nobody wants to claim it, but for a rather more embarrassing reason: The previous Sword Champion, a legendary swordmaster with 13 outstanding accolades, violated the laws of heaven, resulting in her name being wiped from the face of the cosmos. Even the prestigious title that she bore became a sore spot for others. But for this vastly impressive teen, it's now time to turn over a new page in the annals of history and write another chapter.

C: 她曾回到窟卢的旧地，但迎接她的既非狼嚎，也非狐鸣，只是一个望不见底的深壑。光浪的烧灼后，甚至连枯骨都未留下。 但她依旧追逐着流星，这里的每一个人都是——那是帝弓的光芒，是他们身处险境的精神支撑。 也正因如此，当面对丰饶民的再次进犯，她无法相信眼前的景象——流星正在向他们落下。 即使这里有无数丰饶孽物集结，也有无数曜青军士苦苦死战。 但流星破空的声响宛如步步逼近的死神，让她通体冰冷，如堕地狱之中。 那位在她心中战无不胜的将军，也于帝弓之光下化作齑粉。她绝望地奔走在战场上，试图带回存活的人们，直到在光芒的余波中失去意识。 她狂怒般地呐喊，但无人能听见她的声音。 一切归于寂静。 至此之后，她经常会做噩梦，梦见有人向她伸出手，但在她到达之前，他们已被光淹没。 「还不够…还不够……」 她也曾泪流满面地从梦中醒来，但她知晓所有的承诺，只有在战场上才能得到实现。 她披带铠甲，走向阵列的最前方。任由狂乱涌入血液，以赤手空拳为军士开辟前进的血路。 她如流星一般降临于敌阵，如山的怪物在她的轰击下四分五裂。 在众人的注视下，她以一己之力迫使敌方大军不断后退。 「天击将军！天击将军！」 微弱的呼声化作彻地的战吼，一股庞然而原始的意志正在她的感染下苏醒。 她于血雨中停下脚步，于狂暴中怒而沉声道—— 「我向你们许诺。 终有一日，我会比帝弓的光矢更快。 终有一日，我们不必再目睹『流星』落下。」 那一天，那场雨中，她在血与火的淬炼下新生。
E: She had once returned to her old home of Koolur. However, what greeted her there was neither the roar of wolves nor the call of foxes, but simply a bottomless ravine. After the light waves had engulfed everything in flames, not even bones remained. However, she still follows the shooting star. Everyone here follows it — It is the light of the Reignbow, their spiritual support in times of great danger. That's precisely why she could not believe her eyes when the Denizens of Abundance attacked again — the shooting star is now descending on them. Even if there are countless Abominations of Abundance gathering there, there are also countless Yaoqing soldiers boldly fighting to the death. Yet the sound of the shooting star splitting the skies grows ever closer, like the footsteps of death itself. Her whole body feels cold, like she had suddenly plummeted to the icy depths of hell. Under the light of the Reignbow, even the general she has always regarded as invincible is ground to dust. She desperately runs onto the battlefield, trying to bring back any survivors, until she loses consciousness in the residual light. She looses a roar of rage into the air, but no one can hear her. Everything is reduced to silence. From that day, she would have constant nightmares. People in her dreams would reach out their hands to her but, before she could arrive to help them, they are devoured by the light. "More... I have to save more..." She would awake from these dreams with her face covered in tears. But she knows that all her promises could only ever be fulfilled on the battlefield. She puts on her armor and walks to the very front of the formation. She allows the madness to seep into her blood and uses her bare hands to tear open a crimson path for her forces to advance. She descends on the enemy like a meteor, and mountain-like beasts crumble to dust under the force of her attacks. She single-handedly pushes the enemy armies to retreat before her soldiers' eyes. "The Merlin's Claw! The Merlin's Claw!" The weak call she heard before has completely transformed into a battle cry, as a great and primitive will wake with her infection. She stands still among the rain of blood and roars out in a berserk rage "I promise you all. One day, I will be faster than the Reignbow's Lux Arrow. One day, we shall no longer have to witness the falling of 'shooting stars.'" On that day, in that rain, she is reborn and recast in blood and fire.

C: 「…并非人选择刀，而是刀选中了人。▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇…那一日，看着『刀』经由我手锻成，再被交予少女手中，我意识到，在对抗▇▇▇▇的道路上，她选择了——或是被选中——踏上那条▇▇迈向明日的道路。▇▇▇▇▇这是一个美好的时代，即便出云国依旧面临威胁，人们也依旧怀抱希望，相信▇▇会被尽数斩落，天下将重获自由…▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇……」\n\n——古老的残卷
E: "...Warriors don't choose their blades, but rather their blades choose them. ██████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████... On that day, as I witnessed the blade I had crafted being passed on to that girl, I realized that in the fight against ▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇, she had chosen — or been chosen — to embrace the path that ▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇ led her toward a new tomorrow. ▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇ there would be a bright future. Despite the peril looming over Izumo, its people would hold onto hope, believing that the ▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇ shall one day be vanquished, and the world shall be liberated... ▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇▇..."\n\n— An Ancient Scattered Manuscript

C: 怀表走到傍晚七点，他早早吃完晚饭，躺在了橱柜改造的小床上。 他望着眼前闭塞的黑暗，听着怀表永恒不变的嘀嗒声音，这是他最幸福的剧场时光——没有工作，没有现实，只有最自由的幻想。 穿越迷雾之后，他幻想的故事已到了最精彩的海战环节。他伸出双手，把被海浪打翻的伙伴拉回来，他又在画面上划了一道横线，好像那样就可以把大海里的怪物干掉…… 「船长，船长，快起来，天晴啦！」 他揉了揉眼睛，不可置信地看着面前的景象： 一只金色的怀表长出了手脚，穿上了制服，戴着红色的领结，正招呼着他过来。 一面银色的镜子映出他的样子，一边摆弄自己的长裙，一边用望远镜观察远处的景象。 昨夜的风暴消失无踪，凉爽的海风吹拂着他的制服，远处已然是新大陆的轮廓。 「看啊，船长，海岸已经不远了！」 钟表小人与镜子小姐拉起他的手，轻轻地一跃。他还没有反应过来，三个人便一起跳上了云端。望着脚下无垠的大海与新月般的大陆，钟表小人和镜子小姐欢呼雀跃，拉着他跳起了踢踏舞。他握紧了伙伴的手，心中又惊又喜。 「你们…你们是我的伙伴吗？」 「是啊，我们一路经历了那么的困难，迷失过好多次方向，终于到新大陆啦！」 …… 天亮的时候，他从梦中醒来，一滴眼泪从他眼角滑落。 他看了看自己的卧室，原来是怀表压在了胸口，镜子从墙上掉了下来。 他擦掉泪水，觉得好像什么都没有失去，但又好像什么都失去了。
E: As the pocket watch struck seven o'clock in the evening, Misha finished his supper and settled onto the cot that had been modified from a cupboard. Gazing into the darkness surrounding him, he listened to the ceaseless ticking of the pocket watch — the most blissful hours of his day. No work, no reality, only unrestricted flights of fantasy. After traveling through the fog, his fantasy story reached the most exciting part of the sea battle. He extended his hands, pulling back his companions who had been knocked over by the waves, and he drew another line across the canvas as if vanquishing a sea monster... "Captain, Captain, wake up, it's clearing up!" He rubbed his eyes and looked incredulously at the sight before him. A golden pocket watch, which had transformed into a figure with arms and legs, dressed in a uniform and a red bow tie, beckoned him over. A silver mirror lady reflected him, adjusting her gown and peering through binoculars at the distant scene. The storm from the previous night had disappeared without a trace. A refreshing sea breeze fluttered Misha's uniform, and in the distance, they could see the outline of the New World. "Look, Captain, the coast is not far off!" Taking Misha's hand, Mr. Pocket Watch and Miss Mirror gracefully leaped onto the clouds. Before he could react, the three of them were airborne, gazing at the boundless sea and the crescent-shaped continent below them. Mr. Pocket Watch and Miss Mirror cheered, pulling Misha into a joyful tap dance. He held his companions' hands tightly, his heart filled with amazement and joy. "Are... Are you my companions?" "Yeah, we've faced countless challenges and gotten lost many times along the way, but we've finally found the New World!" ... At dawn, Misha woke up from his dream, a tear rolled down from the corner of his eye. Looking around his bedroom, he noticed the pocket watch pressed against his chest, and the mirror had fallen off the wall. Wiping away the tears, Misha felt as if he had lost nothing, yet he had lost everything.

C:
你记得不多。
你并非来自此地，也并非来自彼方，你本不去往任意一处——
直到模糊的声在你耳边吹拂，那悲伤爱怜的劝导，似是而非的催促……
种子扎根。你睁开双眼，那说话的人已不在。

只是声音愈来愈多愈清晰。
有无虑的关照，有镇静的劝告，有毅然的坚持，有温柔的点拨……
你看到锦线正织成明日。

巨大的兽自无垠降下，
金色的瞳从黑夜俯视，
你也不再被过去抛弃。
你还将开拓漫长旅途，
踏过的荆棘都成了路。

列车鸣笛，愿你抵达将至的未来
——以你自己的意志。
E:
You don't remember much.
You're not from around here, nor did you come from elsewhere. You're not really going anywhere—
Just then, that indistinct voice whispers into your ear. That sorrowful and tender persuasion, that deceptive goading...
The seeds take root. You open your eyes, and the speaker is no longer there.

But there are more and more voices, and they are getting clearer and clearer.
Some give easygoing care, some calmly provide advice, some speak firm support, and some gift gentle direction...
You see the silken thread being woven to form tomorrow.

A huge beast descends from infinity,
golden pupils stare down from the darkness,
and you are no longer abandoned by the past.
You will also set upon a long journey,
and the thorns you have stepped on have become your path.

The train whistles, wishing you a successful journey to the coming future
...by your own will.

C: 椒丘：人莫予毒
E: Jiaoqiu: None Can Hurt Me

C: 你睁开眼，发现自己仍在空间站，还好这次不需要再面对什么陌生的天花板。\n刚刚的经历仍在你的脑中盘旋，如果这一切是真的，你希望姬子就在附近。\n你的心中，还有一堆疑问需要她的解答。
E: You open your eyes and find yourself still in the space station, staring at a ceiling that doesn't look so strange.\nYou are living through what just happened. It seems your mind is not playing tricks on you. You wish Himeko was here.\nYou have so many questions to ask.

C: 贝洛伯格的大守护者矜持而威严，说话滴水不漏，你最不擅长对付的就是这种人。\n好在守护者将各位当作贵客相迎，甚至还安排大家下榻高档酒店…好，你决定了：这就是你完全信任她的理由。\n总而言之，谈判结果着实喜人——但这结果能够让那位总板着脸的戍卫官露出微笑吗？
E: The Supreme Guardian of Belobog is elegant and majestic. She speaks with precision and reveals nothing more than what is needed. You're not good at dealing with people like her.\nGood thing the Guardian sees you as honored guests and has even arranged for your stay at a high-end hotel... You've decided: This is enough reason to fully place your trust in her.\nAll in all, the results of the negotiation were optimistic — but are they enough to put a smile on the stern Captain's face?

C: 你们最终达成一致：将止痛剂分一半给克拉拉，让她带回去治疗流浪者。\n尽管娜塔莎不像是会因为这种事大发雷霆的人，但你的心里还是有些愧疚和不安——\n娜塔莎究竟会对此作何反应？恐怕只有亲自问问她才能知道了。
E: You come to an agreement: Give Clara half of the painkillers to take back for the vagrants.\nEven though Natasha isn't the type of person to lose her mind over something like this, you still feel a little bad and troubled...\nHow will Natasha react to this? Guess you'll have to ask her personally to find out.

C: 你们与邓恩的交涉堪称轻松写意：堂堂铁卫队长被各位打到昏迷、生死未卜，而你们拿到了解锁能源中枢大门的密钥。\n整个禁区的铁卫闻讯纷纷赶来，现在的你们只要像对付邓恩那般对付其他人即可。\n还等什么？快去解锁能源中枢大门吧！
E: Your encounter with Dunn turns out to be easy indeed: You knock the dignified Silvermane Captain out cold and acquire the encryption key that unlocks the gate to the energy hub.\nThe Silvermane Guards from the entire restricted zone rush over to the scene. All you have to do now is make them join Dunn.\nWhat are you waiting for? Go and unlock the gate to the energy hub!

C: 在亲眼见证朗道家姐弟二人在疆场上并肩作战的模样后，你才真正认识到坚韧与英勇究竟是为何物。\n你们方才成功穿过杀声如雷的战场，却又立刻遁入沉默的裂界迷宫中——周遭的死寂使你不禁感到毛骨悚然。\n某种凶险的事物确乎潜藏在这令人窒息的空气中…现在只有一边仔细侦察周围，一边设法深入裂界了。
E: After witnessing the Landau siblings fighting side by side, you truly understand what perseverance and bravery really mean.\nYou just made your way through a fierce battlefield, and now you find yourself inside a Fragmentum maze deafened by silence — the deathly quiet of this place sends a chill down your spine.\nSomething dangerous seems to lurk in the suffocating air here... All you can do now is to carefully investigate the surroundings while trying to figure out a way to venture deeper into the Fragmentum.

C: 巨大的机关门扉再次阻断了你们的进路。\n有了在铁卫禁区操作旋转栈桥的经验，你们很快意识到：要想解锁眼前的机关，必须找到与之相连的装置才行。\n这种装置通常不会设在更远的地方…就在附近找找看吧！
E: A giant mechanism gate stops your advance once again.\nArmed with the experience of dealing with the gear bridge in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone, you quickly realize that if you want to unlock the mechanism in front of you, you'll have to find the device linked to it.\nThese types of devices aren't usually set up very far... Try looking in the area!

C: 告别风雪转霁的贝洛伯格，列车再次驶入星穹深处。\n少女的心思犹如三月春风飘忽，等闲变却风向。在投出关键一票后，列车即将奔赴下一站：仙舟「罗浮」。\n不知为何，丹恒坚持留在车上。于是这一次的开拓，只能由你、三月和瓦尔特先生来完成了。
E: The Express gallops into the depths of the interstellar sea after bidding farewell to Belobog, where snow had given way to sunshine.\nThe heart of a maiden is as flighty as a spring breeze, easily changing its direction. After casting your important vote, the Express will head towards its next destination: The Xianzhou Luofu.\nFor some reason, Dan Heng insists on staying on the train, meaning that March 7th, Mr. Yang, and you are the three who will complete the trailblaze journey this time.

C: 为了令搜索行动事半功倍，停云展示了工造司发明的便利工具——一只寻人追物的机巧犬「谛听」。不过要熟练使用「谛听」，却要额外花些工夫。
E: To make searching operations exponentially easier, Tingyun has introduced a handy tool invented by the Artisanship Commission — Diting, an ingenium dog used for tracking. Getting proficient at using this tool takes some a little bit of practice.

C: 抵达「迴星港」，你们展开搜索行动。猎物总会不自觉留下痕迹，而分辨痕迹是否属于猎物，则是考验猎人技巧的时候了。
E: Having arrived at the "Stargazer Navalia," you begin searching for Kafka and the hunt is on. Prey always leaves behind traces of its presence unwittingly, and now is the time to hone your hunting skills and determine whether the traces you find belong to the prey or not.

C: 航线会议结束了，帕姆说的「三件事」果然不包括星穹列车其实可以变形成巨大机器人一事。不得不说，这真的很让人失望，但老无名客追迹之旅和匹诺康尼本身倒也足够吸引人。\n在正式开始跃迁以前，不妨和大家交流交流各自的安排吧。当然，你也可以收听新一期星际和平播报，看看列车组是不是真的能天天上新闻。
E: The navigation meeting has come to an end and the "three things" that Pom-Pom mentioned do not include the Astral Express being able to transform into a giant robot. Though you have to admit this is disappointing, a journey to track a trace of the old Nameless and Penacony itself are enticing enough topics.\nBefore the warp begins, why not discuss your individual plans with everyone? Of course, you could also check in on the newest Interastral Peace Broadcast and see if the Crew can really make the headlines every day.

C: 离开诊所后，映入眼帘的是一座由垃圾桶构成的巨大王国。一名名为莎塔娜的垃圾桶找到了你，请求你帮助垃圾桶们从烦忧中解脱，带领众垃圾桶获得解放——前提是取得三个「信任的证明」。\n你找到了阿圾米德，他委托你帮忙清点最后三个垃圾桶——桶里究竟藏着什么呢？
E: As you leave the clinic, what lies before your eyes is a giant kingdom formed of trashcans. A trashcan by the name of Shatana finds you and asks for your help in freeing the trashcans from their worries and leading them to liberation — The prerequisite is that you acquire three Proofs of Trust.\nYou have found Trashiemedes, who tasks you with checking the final three trashcans. What could be concealed inside?

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n通向深处的道路扑朔迷离，恐怕你得开动脑筋，活用梦境的性质才能继续前进。
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere, and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nThe path into the depths is complicated and confusing. You may have to think outside of the box and creatively utilize the characteristics of the Dreamscape to continue onwards.

C: 流萤被「死亡」带走了。她是个温柔又勇敢的女孩…也许你应该和那位游侠一起为她献上哀悼。
E: Firefly has been taken by "death." She was a gentle and brave girl... Perhaps you should join the Ranger in mourning her.

C: 列车组的各位也平安抵达了「黄金的时刻」，并和你交换了各种信息。经过一番激烈的讨论，你们决定答应砂金的合作请求。在拟定下一步计划前，先和伙伴们分别讨论一下各自在意的事情吧。
E: The Crew safely arrives at the Golden Hour and exchanges info with you. After an intense discussion, you decide to work with Aventurine. Before planning the next step, take some time to discuss what everyone is concerned about.

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C:
……

商人：「会计！你我都是主人的忠仆，理应秉着忠诚相勉！你为何对我下此毒手！」
会计：「因为主人用泥土造化了你，用烈火造化了我。我比你高贵！」

会计：「你们不曾为旧主效命，而不清楚他的威能。他能夺走我们自由，便也能赐予我们自由！你们怎敢与我刀兵相向？」
艺人：「因为主人用烈火造化了你，用辉光造化了我，我比你高贵！」
侍卫：「因为主人用烈火造化了你，用鲜血造化了我，我比你高贵！」
参谋：「主人终将归来！祂至忠诚、至卑微，却至尊贵的仆人，便是那不曾争抢、虔诚信仰者。」
新至的主人：「而我——我将成为诸位新的家人，并将你们从死去的幻影中解放！」

……
E:
...

Merchant: "Accountant! We are both loyal servants to our master. We should use our loyalty to encourage each other! How could you scheme against me!"
Accountant: "Because the master crafted you from clay, and me from fire. I am more noble than you!"

Accountant: "You have never served the old master and will never understand his true power. Our freedom is his to give and take as he pleases! How dare you cross arms with me?"
Artist: "Because the master crafted you with fire, and me from radiance. I am more noble than you!"
Retainer: "Because the master crafted you from fire and me with blood, I am more noble than you!"
Advisor: "The master will return! The servant who serves THEM with the most loyalty, the most humility, and yet the most noble — he would be that devoted believer who never robbed or fought what was not his."
New Master: "As for me... I shall forge new bonds of Kinship and liberate you from the clutches of death."

...

C: 公司决定与家族携手共建匹诺康尼，全宇宙的学者们也将不遗余力地提供帮助…好一派皆大欢喜的热闹景象。至此，「梦想之地」匹诺康尼之旅也便告一段落。\n是时候踏上新的旅途了。
E: The IPC decides to develop Penacony alongside The Family, and scholars from all over the universe will assist in every way they can... It is a lively scene where all's well that ends well. With this, your journey to Penacony, the "Land of the Dreams" has come to an end.\nIt's time to embark on a new adventure.

C: 始终藏在阴影中的翡翠女士终于现身，她将和托帕共赴与家族的会谈。\n家族方的代表是苜蓿草家族的家主奥帝•艾弗法，一位经验丰富、眼光毒辣的皮皮西商人。即便精明如两位「石心十人」的女强人，她们也难以预料这场会谈的走向……
E: Madam Jade, who had been hiding in the shadows this whole time, finally appears. She and Topaz will attend the meeting with The Family.\nThe Family rep is Oti Alfalfa of the Alfalfas, a seasoned, eagle-eyed Pepeshi merchant. Smart as two of the Ten Stonehearts, not even they are able to predict the direction this meeting will take...

C: 实际惊险！原来虾蟇•忍者并非叛忍，而是心中另有妙算，真乃智囊忍也。此刻，借助你的忍法潜入缭乱•忍侠的追忆片段中，寻找救度众生的甘露吧！\n直视忍者的过往可能会发生应激反应，请自备救心丸、镇静剂与尿不湿。
E: Thrilling! Turns out Ninja Gama is not a renegade ninja, but a wise ninja with a solid plan. Now, use your ninjutsu to dive into the Dazzling Ninja Hero's fragmented memories in search of the panacea that promises the world's salvation!\nStaring a ninja's past in the face may trigger stress responses. Please bring your own heart medications, sedatives, and adult diapers.

C: 战争虽然结束了，但新的恶仍会在没有正义的土地兴起。面对无法无天的银河，人们只有自求多福——或踏上自己的忍道。
E: While the war has ended, new adversaries will inevitably arise in realms devoid of justice. In a cosmos lacking laws, everyone must rely on their own abilities... Or forge their own way of the ninja.

C: 虽说并非是真正加入星穹列车，但此前的对手请求同行，仍然值得慎重对待。虽说…你其实很想要一个可以欺负…不，加以引导的老幺。
E: Although it is not a request to formally join the Express Crew, a former opponent's request to travel alongside you is still worthy of due consideration. That being said... You would really enjoy having a junior you can bully— you mean give guidance to.

C: 名为缇宝的女孩借助奇妙的时空复现能力帮助难民脱离了险境，一行人即将安全奔赴奥赫玛。
E: A girl named Tribbie aids the refugees to lead them out of danger, using her remarkable ability to replicate space and time. The group is now preparing for a safe departure to Okhema.

C: 阿格莱雅对奥赫玛的掌控程度远超我们想象，此前的风波已然传到她的耳中。这位黄金裔的领袖展现出她铁血冷酷的一面，以极端手段再度确认我们的来意。历经如此险境，我们需要重新思索翁法罗斯之旅的可行性。
E: Aglaea's control over Okhema runs far deeper than we anticipated, and the previous incident has already reached her ears. This leader of the Chrysos Heirs revealed a cold and unyielding side, going to great lengths to reassess our intentions. After such perilous moments, we must reconsider the viability of our expedition in Amphoreus.

C: 借黄金狮首之口，{NICKNAME}一行人得知疯溃的尼卡多利正在酝酿针对奥赫玛的恐怖袭击。事已至此，唯有继续前进，挫败恶意的源头。
E: Through Chryseus Leo, {NICKNAME} and the party learned that the maddened Nikador is planning a devastating attack on Okhema. With events taking this dire turn, their only option is to press forward and eliminate the source of this malevolence.

C: 遐蝶向寡言的斗士格奈乌斯坦露了此行的目的。一行人继续前行，沿途收集情报，誓要将尼卡多利的五瓣神魂归位，阻止不死神躯的诞生、重铸纷争泰坦的荣耀。
E: Castorice reveals the true purpose of our mission to Gnaeus, the silent gladiator. The party presses on, gathering information on the way, vowing to return Nikador's five soul fragments to their rightful place to prevent the creation of their immortal divine body, and to reforge the glory of the Strife Titan.

C: 昔日流思遍地的树庭，如今却陷入诡异的静默。{NICKNAME}一行人设法进入树庭，发现内部似乎情况不对……
E: The Grove, once filled with scholarly discourse, has now fallen into an eerie silence. {NICKNAME}'s group manages to enter, only to find that something seems amiss inside...

C: 重回故乡，缇宁不禁睹物生情，也回想起许多本已忘却的人、事、物。
E: As Trinnon returned to her homeland, familiar sights stirred forgotten memories within her — of people, moments, and treasures she thought time had washed away.

C: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的职责。\n未流淌着黄金血的异乡旅者也接受了泰坦的试炼，希望{NICKNAME}和迷迷一切顺利。\n「那不存在于预言之中，却由我纺入命运的，也并非仅此一例。」我想起了初次见到阿格莱雅时听到的这句话。
E: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the authority of Time.\nEven as an outland traveler, whose veins carry no golden blood, has accepted the Titan's trial. Wishing {NICKNAME} and Mem the best of luck.\n"I've woven many unforeseen events into the tapestry of fate, this is but one instance." I remembered hearing this the first time I met Aglaea.

C: 你记得「长老」阿蒙内特，也记得这座信仰塞纳托斯的城邦哀地里亚，这是你回忆开始的地方。\n主动使用你与生俱来的天赋，学会如何接受它。\n「证明自己是个合格的圣女，或是具备如此决心吧。」
E: You remember "Elder" Amunet as well as Aidonia, this city-state that worshiped Thanatos. This is where your memory begins.\nActively use your natural-born talent and learn to accept it.\n"Prove that you're a capable Holy Maiden, or that you have such resolve."

C: 阿格莱雅的留言让白厄下定了决心，他号召众人，意图控制住混乱的局面，安抚民众。事实证明，他是一位优秀的演说家。
E: Aglaea's final words gave Phainon resolve. He gathered everyone, determined to bring order to the chaos and calm the people. And indeed, he proved to be a gifted speaker.

C: 因为先前的事件影响，我前往树庭，意图调查并记录下这个世界的泰坦神话与相关研究，却在那里偶遇了处理要事的风堇。收集火种的任务已经刻不容缓，所以我决定见证风堇完成天空的仪式，获得前往艾格勒所在之处的手段。
E: Still reeling from recent events, I went to the Grove, hoping to investigate and record the myths of the Titans or some manner of related research. There, I unexpectedly encountered Hyacine, who was dealing with urgent matters. The task of collecting Coreflames could wait no longer, so I chose to witness Hyacine perform the Skyward Rite and gain the path to Aquila's location.

C: 艾格勒于激战之后坠入黄金池中，其火种也顺利被风堇所接收——当务之急，是从逐渐崩毁的天空堡垒中逃离。
E: After a fierce battle, Aquila plunged into the pool of gold, and their Coreflame was seamlessly claimed by Hyacine. Now, the urgent task is to flee the crumbling sky fortress before it collapses entirely.

C: 呈现在{NICKNAME}面前的第三幕，似乎是逐火之旅的终点，但与白厄一同见证末世的，是那名在我们的认知中，殒命于他童年时期的少女——昔涟。
E: The third act, as it plays out before {NICKNAME}, appears to mark the end of the Flame-Chase Journey. But the one who witnesses the world's end times with Phainon is Cyrene — the girl we believe to have perished in his childhood years.

C: 为了避免召唤出不认识的从者，是不是该恶补下匹诺康尼历——钟表小子系列了？
E: To avoid summoning a total stranger, maybe it's time to brush up on your Penaconian History: The Clockie Series?

C: 一场多么美的宴会，君王举起杯中的野心，令臣子与万民酣醉。但若细品蜜酿回味，甜中又夹杂了几分咸腥和苦涩，醉中难免伴着晕眩与痛楚——但在灵魂飞往高空的狂欢中，无人需要俯瞰大地。\n除非你飞到了最高、最高的地方，那里的寒风会让你清醒。\n继而咸腥、苦涩、晕眩、痛楚会如瀑布天降，抱着你下坠。
E: What a spectacle this banquet of power is, where the ruler's ambitious toast leaves everyone intoxicated with possibility. Beneath the sweet honey brew, though, salt and bitterness linger on the tongue.\nThe higher the revelry soars, the less anyone notices the world below. That's the trick of it all.\nOnly those who reach the absolute summit feel the sobering winds of truth. Then comes the inevitable fall. Salt, bitterness, vertigo, pain... all rushing up to embrace you as gravity collects its debt.

C:
船呵，波涛又把你推向海上，
怎么办？毅然停住吧，进港！
难道你没有看见，舷边已没有划桨，桅柱已被强劲的西南风折断，帆杆在嗟怨悲鸣，没有缆绳，船体怎经受得住风浪的猛烈冲击？
风帆已经破碎，神像也已失去。
——你要千万当心呵，不要作风暴的玩具。
E:
O ship, the waves are pushing you back to sea.
What now? Firmly stop. Turn toward the harbor!
Can't you see? The oars are gone from your sides. The mast has snapped in the fierce southwest wind. The rigging groans with sorrow. No ropes remain. How will your hull survive the crashing waves?
The sails are torn, and the divine statue has vanished.
— Beware. Do not let the storm toy with you.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C: 群山层岩之下隐藏着无名泰坦的大墓，此处褪去了神话的装饰，直白地展现了「权杖」内部的景象。\n长夜月应该就在此地，继续前进吧。
E: Beneath the layered mountains lies the great tomb of the nameless Titan. Here, myth has been stripped away, revealing the unadorned workings of the "Scepter."\nEvernight must be close. Keep moving.

C: 智械哥留下关于「墓碑」的注释作为遗言。种种迹象表明，德谬歌的确存在。该是与智械哥对峙的时候了，他的忌惮正是不容忽视的证据。
E: Old Intellitron left notes about the "tombstone" as his final message. All signs indicate that Demiurge does indeed exist. It's time to confront old Intellitron, for his apprehension is the undeniable proof.

C: 愿望，只是救世主执念的一部分。深入归墟的旅途中，我们又与刻律德菈、海瑟音、缇安、缇宁等伙伴重逢。每位黄金裔都目睹了白厄一路走来的孤独抗争，也都毫不犹豫地化身同行的记忆，只为与救世主并肩作战。
E: Wishes are but a part of the Deliverer's obsession. During our journey deep into the ruin, we reunited with other companions such as Cerydra, Hysilens, Trianne, and Trinnon. Each Chrysos Heir witnessed Phainon's solitary defiance along the way, and they transformed without hesitation into memories that walk with us, only to be able to fight alongside the Deliverer.

C: 位于最前线的基座舱段危险重重，守望此地的科员于孤独中等待着后方的援助。此刻，一位名叫亚伯拉罕的故人正要直面他的阿喀琉斯之踵……
E: The Base Zone on the frontline is engulfed in grave danger. The researchers are alone and waiting for support. At this moment, an acquaintance named Abraham is about to face his Achilles Heel...

C: 在第一可疑藏匿点蹲守失败后，拉明娜继续履行承诺，帮助你寻访「水魈」踪迹。在她的带领下，你结结实实地一脚踩入了水魈布设的圈套。所幸拉明娜随身携带治愈药剂，怪物突袭终成了一场虚妄的陷阱。\n经历连环挫败，你与拉明娜改换策略，重审「宓堂传语」，前往密信所指地点，这一次，绝不失手。
E: You have gained nothing at the first of the suspected hiding places. Lamina keeps her promise and helps you look for the Xenohydro. Under her guidance, you step into the trap set by the Xenohydro. Thankfully, Lamina brought some healing potions with her. The surprise monster attack turns out to be a fabricated pitfall.\nAfter a series of failures, you decide to change your strategy and re-examine the Letter From Locus Silentii. You head to the place the letter points out, and you won't miss again this time.

C: 在艾丝妲的苦心与你的帮助下，拉明娜理解了「独立」的真意。\n只有「波少」受伤的世界达成了。
E: Through Asta's effort and with your help, Lamina understands the meaning of independence.\nMaster Capote is the only loser in this incident.

C: 由于你拿捏着古恩实验不端的把柄，他按照你的抉择处置了原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>，也就是所谓的希拉。\n而你也见证了选择的代价。
E: Using the unethical nature of Gunn's experiment as leverage, you persuade him to do just as you decided and dispose of Prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak>, also known as "Sheila."\nYou get to witness the price of choice.

C: 要重启电梯，必须找齐备用电源。尽管供电房间附近有怪物出没，但你还是决定深入险境……
E: To restart the elevator, you need to find all of the backup batteries. Even though there are monsters roaming near the power source room, you have to go deeper into the fray...

C: 接受艾丝妲的远程协助，了解收容舱段的状况
E: Receive remote assistance from Asta and learn about the condition of the storage zone

C: 维修工程师为你联通了终端机的数据，现在你可以使用终端机了。
E: The engineer helps you gain access to the data in the terminal. Now you can use it.

C: 你实在没想到，看起来神神叨叨的克里斯，居然在虚拟论坛里惹出了这么多麻烦。难怪他会对你做出那样的举动，这一切都合理了起来。既然他也不是感染者，那么，答案会是谁呢？
E: You didn't expect Chris to cause so much trouble in online forums. No wonder he treated you like that. Now it all makes sense. But if he is not infected, who is?

C: 一艘飞船…与星穹列车发生了追尾？还有神秘来客找上门来了！\n看来，你们得共同解决本次的列车「危机」了……
E: A spaceship... has somehow rear-ended the Astral Express!? And there are mysterious visitors approaching the cabin!\nLooks like you'll have to figure out this latest Express "crisis" together...

C: 列车…竟被巨真蛰虫吞进了腹中？！
E: Has the Express somehow... been swallowed up by a Giant Sting!?

C: 空间站竟然有隐藏的秘密舱段？！这恐怕是很多科员都不曾知晓的事情。你单独前去调查，里面似乎盛放着许多不可思议的东西……
E: The space station has a secret zone? This might just be something not even most the researchers know about. You investigate alone, and find the space filled with many incredible objects...

C: 根据矿头安东尼娜的描述，在「大矿区」里似乎有一位矿车工老师傅正在为笨徒弟犯难，亟待你这位「金牌助教」拯救……\n尽管你一不懂矿车，二不懂授课，但这都不是问题——因为这些完全可以用「开拓」的精神补足。\n事不宜迟，前往「大矿区」找到矿车工老师傅，一展「开拓者」的风采吧！
E: According to Supervisor Antonia's description, a senior mine cart operator is troubling over his not-too-bright apprentice over at the Great Mine. He's waiting for you, the Ace Assistant, to save him...\nYour lack of knowledge in mine carts and education is not a problem, because all of it can be substituted with the spirit of Trailblazing.\nThere's no time to waste, go to the Great Mine and find the senior mine cart operator and begin your trailblazing!

C: 矿车工老师傅似乎为你准备了新的谜题——去问问他准备的如何了吧。
E: The senior mine cart operator seems to have prepared a new puzzle. Go and inquire about his preparation

C: 克拉拉似乎给小机器人起了个响亮的名字——帕斯卡。这简短的名字似乎使它在你心中的地位变得有所不同…但这也有可能是错觉，暂时忘了它吧——现在的你面临着更重要的问题。\n帕斯卡似乎还不能流利地说话。要想解决这一问题，你必须和克拉拉一起寻找可供替换的其他合适外壳才行。
E: Clara seemed to have given the little robot a nice name. It is now called Pascal. This name makes you feel a bit different towards it... but it could also just be an illusion. Forget about it — You currently face a more important matter.\nPascal doesn't seem to be able to talk fluently. To fix this problem, Clara and you have to look for a suitable robot shell to place it into.

C: 娜塔莎与养母短暂的团聚过后，管家带来了令人震惊的消息——只身前往雪原的瓦赫居然曾给娜塔莎寄来信件。\n从信中得知，瓦赫在雪原中仍在继续自己对「风雪免疫」的研究。\n娜塔莎难以掩饰自己的激动情绪，于是邀你一同前往城郊雪原进行调查。
E: After Natasha's short reunion with her adoptive mother, the butler brings a piece of shocking news: Vache, who went to the Snow Plains alone, had sent a letter to Natasha.\nAccording to this letter, Vache was continuing his research on "Blizzard Immunity" in the Snow Plains.\nNatasha is so excited. She invites you to go investigate in the outlying Snow Plains with her.

C: 你与娜塔莎一同前往雪原，试图在一片白皑中寻找瓦赫生活过的痕迹。\n你们找到了瓦赫许久以前留下的实验器材，但仅有这些还远远无法定位他的行踪。\n但娜塔莎还不想放弃，你们必须继续深入雪原的腹地。
E: Natasha and you head towards the Snow Plains, searching for traces of Vache's life.\nYou find the lab equipment that Vache left long ago, but that alone is far from enough to locate Vache's whereabouts.\nNatasha doesn't want to give up, so you have to go deeper into the Snow Plains.

C: 卢卡将他的「修炼计划」告知了你和希儿，并且希望你们能够全程陪同，见证他的成长。\n试炼的第一个目标是…帮忙打杂。\n你打败了窃贼，找回了机械师卡西迪的两个机械伙伴。把这个好消息告诉他吧。
E: Luka tells you and Seele about his "trial plans" and wants you to accompany him the whole way to witness his improvement.\nThe first goal of the trial is to... help with chores.\nYou defeat the thief and recover Cassidy the mechanic's two robot friends. It's time to tell Cassidy the good news.

C: 在那位云骑的帮助下，你顺利抄写完了《千手慈怀药王救世品》。现在将抄写好的经文交给绿芙蓉，一定就可以顺利打入药王秘传内部了吧…但愿如此。
E: Thanks to that Cloud Knight, you finished transcribing the Thousand-Handed Merciful Medicus' Salvation without a hitch. Once you give the transcribed scripture to Green Hibiscus, you'd be sure to infiltrate the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus... such is the hope.

C: 陶德意在研究持明族的历史，但传闻中能见证持明族历史变迁的「鳞渊境」他却进不了。无奈之下陶德拜托你去往鳞渊境，为他拍摄几张照片，以供他完成研究。
E: Todd intends to study the history of the Vidyadhara. However, he couldn't enter Scalegorge Waterscape, where rumors say the history of the Vidyadhara race can be viewed. With no other alternative, Todd asks you to go to Scalegorge Waterscape and take some photos for him to complete his research.

C: 陶德在持明卵前驻足，不料发现自己写满研究笔记的笔记本丢了，想来想去怕不是丢在之前到访的地方了。他拜托你回到持明族龙尊雕像附近，寻找他的笔记本。
E: Todd stops in front of the Vidyadhara eggs and realized that he lost his notebook full of research notes. After thinking about it, he might have lost it at the place he was at before. He asks you to go back to the Vidyadhara high elder statue and look for his notebook.

C: 温符瑞发来了一个能找到线下工作人员的地址，光明磊落的你却要像地下工作者一样与人接头。暗号是「尘寰相见，好礼相送」，鼓起勇气去向周围的人打听打听吧。
E: Wen Furui sent an address where the in-person operative can be found. You are open and forthright by nature, but now you have to think like a spy. The passphrase is "Acquaintance from the mortal coil, luxurious gifts from beyond." Gather your courage and ask the people around you.

C: 经历了一番波折之后，终于是将温符瑞的礼物寄到黛青小姐手里。去和空间站的温符瑞打个招呼，告诉他这件事情吧。
E: After going through a lot of twists and turns, you finally sent Wen Furui's gift to Ms. Daiqing. Go chat with Wen Furui at the space station and tell him about it.

C: 根据名侦探三月七的推理，罗刹就是在这里与星核买家接头的。找找看吧，这附近应该有适合搞邪恶交易的地方。
E: According to Genius Detective March 7th's deduction, Luocha should have met with the Stellaron buyer here. Look around, there should be a location suitable for illegal trades around.

C: 在解决了种种阻碍之后，三月七终于接近了自己记忆的起点。可越是靠近，她就越是不安——这「阻碍」究竟是从何而来呢？\n此时符玄的警告在她的心中不断回响，使她几乎想要停下脚步，回头折返……\n「但开拓者绝不能回头，即使是在回头的时候。」三月七对这个冷笑话颇为得意，决定之后讲给丹恒听。
E: After overcoming various obstacles, March 7th finally approaches the starting point of her memories. However, the closer she gets, the more anxious she feels — Where is this "obstacle" coming from?\nFu Xuan's warning echoes in her mind, making her almost wanting to stop and turn back the way she came...\n"But Trailblazers must never turn back, even when they turn their back." March 7th is pretty satisfied with this dry joke and decides to tell it to Dan Heng when she gets back.

C: 返乡路上不一定是殷勤的问候，反倒尽是劝阻丹恒回头的人。也许丹恒回到仙舟罗浮并不是一件令人开心的事？\n顺带一提，能有这么多人能认出他，也与他刻意展示身份有关吧。一向低调的丹恒也不习惯吧。
E: It seems the way home isn't comprised of polite greetings but people urging Dan Heng to turn back. Perhaps his return to the Xianzhou Luofu might not be the happiest affair...\nSeeing how many people can recognize him with the barest mention, this might have to do with his revealed identity. This doesn't seem like something the usually circumspect Dan Heng is used to.

C: 地衡司已经判明「模拟云吟术」并非是次元扑满个体行为，接下来你和地衡司决定展开「牧场行动」。\n接下来就是抓扑满、抓很多扑满，直到完成行动、彻底收官……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission has ascertained that the "imitated cloudhymn magic" isn't something caused by one Warp Trotter alone. Following this, you and the Realm-Keeping Commission have decided to begin a "Herding Operation."\nWhat you need to do next is capturing Trotters. Lots and lots of Trotters. Capture them until the operation concludes and the whole thing comes to a close...

C: 小聪回到了长乐天，还没能从告白的失败中走出来，去把你打听到的消息告诉小聪吧。\n你听说仙舟的持明族大多性格淡漠，不擅长与人产生依恋关系，但那不过是刻板印象罢了。\n小聪啊，小聪，争点气吧。
E: Cong returned to the Exalting Sanctum, but he hasn't recovered from the failure of the confession. Go and tell Cong what you've learned.\nYou learned that most of the Vidyadhara in Xianzhou are indifferent and not good at forming attachments with others. But at the end of the day, that's just a stereotype.\nCong, just give it your all!

C: 完了，完了，这又是被人讹上了…不过这大概也不是你第一次遇到这种事了，不如跟上去看看她葫芦里卖的到底是什么药吧。
E: Oh no, this is blackmail all over again... But it's probably not the first time you've encountered this kind of thing. Follow her to see what exactly she has up her sleeve.

C: 放生仪式结束也有段时间了，等等看事情的进展吧。
E: It's been a while since the release ceremony ended. Wait and see how things unfold.

C: 你们与彦卿虽然分别不久，但却依稀有了错觉，这小子似乎应该可能是有那么些长高了。
E: Although you and Yanqing have not been apart for long, but you seem to feel that this kid has somehow grown a little taller.

C: 在丹鼎司新任司鼎的斡旋下，你们顺利打发了来自公司专员的责难，随她一同前往丹鼎司小叙。但这场未期的谈话却再起波折，与彦卿交锋的少女剑客早已等候多时。
E: Under the mediation of the newly appointed Alchemy Commission's Cauldron Master, you all successfully fended off the accusatory blame from the IPC Specialist, after which you had a chat with her at the Alchemy Commission. But more speed bumps threatened this doomsday talk, for the swordswoman had been waiting long for a showdown with Yanqing.

C: 在局外人的操弄之下，罗浮仙舟羁押许久的巨恶，步离人战首呼雷最终脱出牢笼大开杀戒。此刻幽囚狱中的局势危如累卵，你们唯一能做的，只有在他逃出此间前，关上幽囚狱的大门。
E: With the machinations of external parties, the borisin Warhead, Hoolay, a heinous criminal who had been imprisoned on the Xianzhou Luofu for ages, managed to break free and embark on a wanton massacre. The Shackling Prison was plunged into imminent peril — closing The Shackling Prison's gates just before he managed to flee was all that you all could do.

C: 空无一物的战场中，新死的顽敌再度现身于眼前。老练的猎手将面对一场特殊的逐猎……而她，已成猎物。
E: On the empty battlefield, a tenacious and freshly-dead foe makes an appearance once more. The veteran hunter is primed to go on a special hunt... but this time, she is the prey.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 你帮助名为查德威克的老人补上了他缺失的情绪碎片。\n现在，你可以和他好好谈谈了。
E: You have helped the old man named Chadwick fix his missing mood pieces.\nNow, you can have an uninterrupted talk with him.

C: 门外传来了脚步声，去看看究竟是谁。
E: There are footsteps outside the door. Go see who it is.

C: 听巴罗说，猎犬家系正在追捕筑梦师，帮助巴罗将那些人引开。
E: According to Barlow, the Bloodhound Family is arresting Dreamweavers. Help Barlow to distract them.

C: 冷芯与你一起到尾翼视察，提出更换尾翼涂装与为飞艇命名的事项，你心中浮现了几种方案……
E: You and Caldwick inspect the airship's empennage. As he raises the business of changing the empennage paint and naming the airship, several ideas come to your mind...

C: 求生、财富、信仰、荣耀、所要守护的事物…一切战士都有拼死而战的理由，为战而生的眷属也不例外。这位敌人为何要对自己不可能战胜的城邦挑起争端呢？\n从这个本应疯狂的战士口中，你听到了两个未曾听闻的名字。这些事情的真相与你寻找金丝的目的并无干系，但探索未知也确实是无名客的工作——至少比一拳打死她有趣，你接这活儿总不会真的是为了战斗吧？
E: Survival, fortune, faith, honor, things they want to protect... Every warrior has a reason to fight to the death, and the Titankin that live for battle are no exception. Why would this enemy initiate a conflict against a city that they have no hope of defeating?\nYou hear two unfamiliar names from the mouth of this supposedly crazed warrior. Though finding the truth behind these names has nothing to do with your objective of finding the golden thread, it is also the duty of a Nameless to explore the unknown... At least it would be more interesting than finishing her off with a single blow. You didn't just take this job to get into fights after all, right?

C: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n你救出了天谴猎手，以及她念叨的那位帕里斯——一个油腔滑调的年轻人。多亏翁法罗斯是个封闭的世界，他这说话方式拿到外面去，估计要在星际和平网络论坛里被笑话几百楼。
E: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nYou rescue the Furiae Archer and this "Paris" that she had mentioned so many times... A glib and cheesy young man. He's fortunate that Amphoreus is a closed-off world. If anyone outside of Amphoreus heard him speak like that, there's no doubt he'd be trolled brutally on the Interastral Peace Network.

C: 第三站，匹诺康尼！\n爱德华医生夸赞了我的作品，莫非我真的是天才？
E: Third stop, Penacony!\nDr. Edward praises my work. Could I really be a genius?

C: 配音演员塞琳对音乐剧明星塔米拉小姐的处世之道十分感兴趣。\n她委托你去上层区的机械屋打听和她有关的信息。\n真是一位有事业心的小演员，尽你所能帮她的忙吧。
E: The voice actress, Celine, is very interested in the musical star Tamila's way of life.\nShe asked you to find out about Tamila at the Overworld's workshop.\nWhat an ambitious aspiring actress. Help her to the best of your abilities.

C: 配音演员塞琳似乎在为什么事感到苦恼。\n找她聊聊，看看你能如何帮到她。
E: Celine, the voice actress, seems to be distressed about something.\nSpeak with her and see if there is anything you can help her with.

C: 捉迷藏比赛已经开始。寻找一个合适的藏身点吧！
E: The hide-and-seek competition is on. Find a suitable place to hide!

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 没想到艾丝妲为佩佩定制了如此神奇的同步功能…你和佩佩以全新的形态出击，继续追查丢失奇物的下落.
E: Asta has developed an incredible synchronization feature for Peppy... Now you and Peppy can venture out in a new form and continue to track down the lost Curio.

C: 感应门再次故障，你被困在其中，眼下找艾丝妲投诉设备质量也来不及了，还是先和佩佩想办法开门吧。
E: The sensor door has malfunctioned once again, trapping you inside the room. Instead of complaining about its poor quality to Asta, you should focus on finding a way to open the door with Peppy.

C: 收到奥列格的邀请，你前往残响回廊参与清理裂界怪物的作战行动。\n和奥列格谈一谈，了解一下战场的现况。
E: You receive Oleg's invitation to an operation to clear the Corridor of Fading Echoes of Fragmentum monsters.\nTalk to Oleg to get a sense of the current situation of the battleground.

C: 地衡司收到居民在丹鼎司洞天里发现近似「云吟术」的异象，并且在异象中遭遇了隐身怪物。\n广进根据异象的规律，在海滩上备好了饵食，希望借此找到引起异象的元凶……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission received reports that anomalies resembling cloudhymn magic have been spotted in the Alchemy Commission delve, and that invisible monsters were encountered within this phenomenon.\nBased on the patterns of anomalies, Guangjin has prepared bait on the beach in hopes of uncovering the true source behind the phenomenon.

C: 清理区域内的所有污染。
E: Cleanse all contamination within the area.

C: 司舵秘书亲临现场，这里一定是发生了不得了的突发情况。\n和夕葵谈一谈，搞清楚发生了什么事吧。
E: Something big and unexpected must have happened for the Helm Master's Secretary to personally arrive at the scene.\nSpeak with Xikui to understand more about the situation.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 据说半神议院在闲时也偶尔会有戏剧演出，真的吗，那个开会的地方？
E: Rumor has it that the Demigod Council occasionally hosts theatrical performances during their free time. Is this for real? At that place where they hold meetings?

C: 「选择」真的存在吗？在卡芙卡看来，一切选择都是虚假的，只是命中注定的可能性之一；自由意志根本不存在，你身在此处这一点就是明证。她的想法多少有些悲观和虚无了，而你可以接受，也可以否认。
E: Does "choice" really exist? From Kafka's perspective, all choices are illusions and merely represent predetermined possibilities. Free will does not exist, and your presence here is clear proof of that. Her ideas are somewhat pessimistic and nihilistic, and you can either accept or reject them.

C: 「选择」真的存在吗？在卡芙卡看来，一切选择都是虚假的，只是命中注定的可能性之一；自由意志根本不存在，你身在此处这一点就是明证。她的想法多少有些悲观和虚无了，而你可以接受，也可以否认。
E: Does "choice" really exist? From Kafka's perspective, all choices are illusions and merely represent predetermined possibilities. Free will does not exist, and your presence here is clear proof of that. Her ideas are somewhat pessimistic and nihilistic, and you can either accept or reject them.

C: 某种与「冰雪」有关的…不好说，雷金的灵感真的靠谱吗？
E: Something to do with "ice"... It's difficult to pinpoint. Is Regin's intuition trustworthy?

C: 龙尊造像希望你帮它找出丹枫藏在此处的宝藏…怎么又是寻宝故事？算了，西衍先生开心就好。
E: The Statue of the High Elder wishes you can help it find the treasure Dan Feng hid here... why is this an adventure treasure seeking story again? Never mind. As long as it makes Mr. Xiyan happy.

C: 原来在小吃摊上吃饱肚子并不是正事。白露打算去清玩斋买些药罐子。\n现在就继续跟着你的小导游前进吧。
E: As it turns out, filling your stomachs at the food stalls isn't what you've come here for. Bailu intends to go to Elegance Pagoda to buy some medicine jars.\nYou should keep on following your little guide.

C: 暂时处理了码头的问题，工人们提出还可以从物流上降低成本。\n本着「吃瓜就要吃到底」的原则，继续陪着小秘书去鹤运物流看看吧。
E: With matters on the docks temporarily resolved, the workers also mentioned that their logistical costs can be reduced as well.\nSince you're seeing the gossip through to the end, you should continue following Mingxi the secretary and head to Heron Express.

C: 拍摄完绘影图形之后，需要和素裳讨论一下「商业宣传」的方向，并决定下一处拍摄主题。\n你当然可以相信素裳的商业直觉，不过，有没有一种可能，直接问问小秘书会更有效率？
E: After shooting the visiograph, you need to discuss with Sushang about what direction the "business promotion" is supposed to take, and decide the theme for the next promo.\nYou can definitely choose to trust Sushang's business instincts, but might it be wiser and more efficient to directly ask Miss Secretary Mingxi?

C: 想要挑战每个决胜乐园的冠军候补，必须先完成乐园对应的试炼。\n呜呜伯们似乎对守护宝藏兴致不高。这哪里是「巨龙」，明明就是「青雀」。
E: You must complete the corresponding trials first if you wish to challenge the championship contenders of the Victory Zone.\nThe Wubbaboos don't seem to be terribly enthused about guarding the treasure. And what kind of "dragon" is this? That's clearly just Qingque.

C: 胸腔激荡，脚步也变得轻快。你将与另一个人展开角逐，唯有强大且好运的那方能够继续前进。
E: With your chest surging and your footwork brisk, you and your foe begin a struggle for victory. Only the one who is powerful and fortunate may continue onward.

C: 十妖在林，不如一妖在手。岁阳唯一该去的地方，就是绥园中的镇妖塔。
E: The only good heliobus is a captured heliobus. The only place they should go is the Suppression Towers in Fyxestroll Garden.

C: 这一次请将宝烛留下相片中，而不是以「鬼影」的方式。
E: This time, please make sure to capture Arkeri in the photo instead of as a "ghostly figure."

C: 哈努兄弟必须要得到众人的力量才能完成任务…虽然听起来很扯，但这是真实有效的。\n现在，对着电视加油助威吧——不然这梦泡还剩下什么东西可玩了呢？
E: Brother Hanu needs everyone's help to accomplish this mission... It may sound crazy, but it's actually really effective.\nNow, face the TV and cheer — What else is there to do in the dream bubble?

C: 进入了淑女的心绪空间。淑女会习惯性地隐藏内心，到底哪边才是它的真实想法呢？
E: You've entered Lady's Emoscape. Lady will habitually hide its heart. What are its true thoughts?

C: 因为与「钟表匠」的关系，你成为了克劳克影业的特邀导演，开始剪辑《美梦往事》的影片…\n影片的剪辑工作正在继续，帮助克劳克影业完成更多影片吧！
E: Thanks to your relationship with the Watchmaker, you have been made a special guest director for Clock Studios and have begun editing the Dreamjoy Memoir movie...\nEditing is still going on. Help Clock Studios complete more films!

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•演技派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「演技」的考验……\n演技是什么？你完全不理解这个词的意思。对你而言，真诚永远是最强的必杀技。
E: The first choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia: Acting Challenge arena. According to the guide's instructions, your "acting" skills will be tested here...\nWhat are acting skills exactly? You have no idea. For you, sincerity has always been the ultimate instrument.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 经过十五日的剑术练习与奇遇，三月七与你所想一致，仅仅是剑斗胜利已经不能满足了。\n十五日中，你们多次与椒丘一同经历「江湖奇遇」，也许可以向椒丘寻求一点建议。
E: Great minds think alike. A duel victory is no longer March 7th's and your goal after all the swordplay training and adventure in the last fifteen days.\nYou've both experienced numerous "wanderlust escapades" with Jiaoqiu during this period. It could be a good idea to ask Jiaoqiu for some advice.

C: 折纸大学的校庆正在进行中，其中最为盛大的活动——「音乐派对」即将开启。\n这时，知更鸟突然约你在校园里见面，究竟是有什么事情呢？
E: Paperfold University's anniversary is happening in full swing and the music party — the biggest event in this festival — is about to begin.\nRobin suddenly asks to meet you on campus at this moment. What is happening?

C: 桑博即将在店里上架新的宝贝…不过在此之前，他还需要你的帮助。
E: Sampo is about to add some new treasures to the store... but before that, he still needs your help.

C: 拍摄告一段落，和三月七就这幅作品谈谈吧。
E: With the photography session wrapped up, have a chat with March 7th about this work

C: 依靠树庭的泰坦神迹，以及脑内关于测试的残存记忆，你成功在圣树的根系网络中仿造出了差分宇宙。按照卡利多托斯的说法，这是最适合你的求学场所，用命途的方程式去理解翁法罗斯的神话和历史。说起来，这算不算是——模拟宇宙的模拟宇宙？
E: Using the Titan Miracle from the Grove and remnant memories pertaining to the test, you successfully emulated a counterfeit Divergent Universe in the Sacred Tree's root system. According to Calidorthos, this is a most appropriate place for you to gain knowledge by using Path Equations to understand Amphoreus' myths and history. Come to think of it, isn't this a simulated version of the Simulated Universe?

C: 波提欧这车性能不错，攻击性极强，这多少能抚慰你不知为何被报名参赛的心理阴影…你决定用它参加海选赛的第一轮比赛，但愿巡海游侠的威名能吓退对手。
E: Boothill's car has great performance and a strong offense, I suppose this can somewhat soothe the unsettling feeling of having been strangely signed up for this competition... You decide to participate in the first round of qualifiers with it, and hope that the Galaxy Ranger's notorious reputation can scare off your opponents.

C: 第二次迷其林美食评审就要开始啦，和餐馆的伙伴一起去参加吧！\n甜蜜蜜节的菜品，是否能征服评审员的味蕾呢？
E: The second Memchelin Food Review is about to begin! Gather your restaurant crew and join!\nWill the dishes from the Sweetie Festival charm the judges' taste buds?

C: 为了复原「特调配方」，你受邀成为「惊梦酒吧」的特邀调饮师。在黑塔的协助下，你完成了第一份配方。接下来，又会有怎样的客人不期而至呢？
E: To restore the "Special Recipe," you've been invited as a guest drinksmith at the Dreamjolt Hostelry. With Herta's help, you've completed the first recipe. Now, what unexpected guests will walk through the door next?

C: 驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大虽然顺利完成了考核，但在最后关头，欧洛尼斯祷言却出现了失控的情况。它有些不知所措，随之便不知道跑到了哪去。作为家长，你是唯一一个能解开它心结的人。找到它，去和它聊聊吧。
E: Although Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas has completed the assessment, Oronyx's Prayer lost control at the final moment. It became confused and ran off somewhere. As its guardian, you are the only one who can help untangle its emotional knots. Find it and have a word with it.

C: 不过，你也不必太过担忧。被星核阻塞航线的情况，我们不是第一次遇上了。就算不清楚「星核」的本质原理，还是有办法抵消它的影响。
E: But there's no need to worry — this isn't the first time our route has been obstructed by a Stellaron. Even if we don't know much about them, at least we know how to neutralize their influences.

C: 要是能顺便带一点儿当地特产就更好了帕。
E: ...and bring Pom-Pom back some local specialties?

C: 我们可以卖星核猎手一个人情。
E: Maybe we can sell our friendship to the Stellaron Hunters.

C: 卡芙卡…唔，帕姆不喜欢她，有一股危险的味道。
E: Kafka... *sigh* Pom-Pom doesn't like her. She smells of danger.

C: 三对二，那么，列车团以多数票同意前往仙舟！
E: Three against two. Well, it looks like the Astral Express crew has a majority vote to head for the Xianzhou!

C: 怎么，有回家的感觉啦？
E: *sigh* Now you know how I feel when you copy me.

C: 丹恒好神秘啊。
E: Dan Heng sure is a mysterious guy.

C: 欢迎回家，三位。
E: Welcome home, you three.

C: 然后错过一趟精彩的大冒险？我不确定你会喜欢那种感觉。
E: *chuckles* And miss out on a great adventure? I don't think you'd like that.

C: 各位可以先回自己的房间休息，或者在这节车厢稍歇，喝杯咖啡之类的。大家都是熟人了，随意便好。
E: You can head back to your rooms for some rest, or stay here and make yourselves a cup of coffee, whichever you like.

C: 黑塔…你见过她吗？我很好奇拿自己的名字命名太空站的人品味如何，是高是低。
E: Herta... Have you ever met her? I'm curious about the tastes of someone who used their own name for a space station.

C: 不认识。
E: No idea.

C: 他肯定还是个热爱生活的人吧？不然这块不着调的电子屏幕是无法让人沉浸于愉快的虚拟世界当中的。
E: He must enjoy real life. There is no way that this unreliable screen could allow a person to be immersed in that pleasant virtual world.

C: 「星核」就在眼前，抓紧时间。
E: The Stellaron is up ahead, let's hurry.

C: 我叫{NICKNAME}。
E: My name is {NICKNAME}.

C: 你和三月一起回去吧。
E: You and March go back together.

C: 烦请各位多绕一点路…有劳了。
E: So I'll have to trouble you to take a bit of a detour... Apologies.

C: 我有权保持沉默。
E: I have the right to remain silent.

C: 如果有其他疑问，也欢迎来找我和姬子。
E: If you have any other questions, you are welcome to come to Himeko and me.

C: 哎，多亏了她，我才能数着星星睡觉。不然就得回去继承家业了，光想想就觉得可怕极啦。
E: Hey, thanks to her, I can count the stars to sleep. Otherwise, I would've had to take over the family fortune. Just thinking about it terrifies me.

C: 想了解「光锥」。
E: I'd like to learn about Light Cones.

C: 多么有哲理的话语，没错，当你愈接近「死」时，愈会意识到当下才是「生」的时刻！
E: How insightful, yes of course. The closer you approach death, the more you appreciate life.

C: 帮大忙了，年轻人。原本负责这块的科员阿尔弗瑞德，他刚刚在收容舱段…没有回来。
E: That was very helpful of you, kid. Alfred was the researcher in charge of this — he was in the storage zone earlier... He didn't make it back.

C: 拯救非人生物！
E: Save non-human life!

C: 保护奇物权益！拯救非人生物！
E: Protect rare item rights! Save non-human life!

C: 「奇物编号<unbreak>2691</unbreak>：热量黑洞。能吸收热量，但不包括食物。」
E: "Curio No. <unbreak>2691</unbreak>: Energy Black Hole. It can absorb energy, but not food."

C: …通讯断了。
E: ...We lost communications.

C: 关于「星核」…
E: About Stellarons...

C: 我还能回空间站吗？
E: Can I return to the space station?

C: 你希望我来吗？
E: Do you want me to come along?

C: 你的判断都很准确。
E: Your judgments are always accurate.

C: 嗯，那很好。
E: Mm, okay then.

C: 对呀，你是最大的功臣呢～
E: Yes, and you are the hero.

C: 你怎么刚走就又回来了？！
E: You just left. Why are you back again!?

C: 有什么事？
E: Can I help you?

C: 对了，你要去隔壁的话……
E: So, if you're headed next door...

C: 列车跃迁在即，请各位速至列车大厅集合。
E: The Express is about to conduct a warp jump. All passengers, please gather at the main hall.

C: 果然只是心理暗示吧！
E: Come on, that's just using psychological suggestion!

C: 坚定的「筑城者」们建立了这座城市。在「{RUBY_B#星神}存护{RUBY_E#}」克里珀的护佑下，贝洛伯格虽受风雪侵凌，却永远温暖。
E: The steadfast Architects built this city. Under the protection of Qlipoth {RUBY_B#Aeon}the Preservation{RUBY_E#}, Belobog remains forever warm in the face of unrelenting cold.

C: 时候不早了，各位也累了吧。我安排你们入住城中最舒适的旅店休息，好好睡上一觉。明天中午我会派人邀请各位，我们好好地商议这件要事。
E: It's getting late, and you must be tired. I will arrange for you to stay in our most comfortable hotel. Rest there, and get a good night's sleep. Tomorrow, at noon, I will dispatch someone to escort you here, and we can discuss this urgent matter in greater detail.

C: 哇噢，好帅气的姐姐！
E: Oh wow — she's cool!

C: 坏掉了？
E: Broken?

C: …不，我想说的其实不是这个。
E: ...That's... not what I was going to say.

C: 冲呀！
E: Go, go, go!

C: 依我之见，先拜访希露瓦•朗道比较好。
E: I think it'd be best to pay a visit to Serval Landau.

C: 你和可可利亚很熟？
E: Do you know Cocolia well?

C: …又被你教训了。行吧老弟，你慢点走，下次来听我跟佩拉排练。
E: ...You're telling me off again. Fine, whatever bro. You better be going, come listen to Pela and my next rehearsal.

C: 老弟去拿水壶的时候，我才是真的提心吊胆啊……
E: I almost lost my cool when he went for his flask...

C: 我们想请你帮忙破译密码。
E: We need your help to decipher something.

C: 是的，我和希露瓦小姐在我的传家宝铁盒上发现了一串密码。请问佩拉小姐可以帮忙看看吗？
E: Yep. You see, Miss Serval and I found a line of code on my heirloom tin box. Can you take a look, Miss Pela?

C: 还真是有趣的冒险经历呢，可惜我没跟着你们去。干脆下次找个机会去调查一下那些机关，把它们都拆开看看好了～
E: What an interesting adventure. Such a pity I didn't go with you. We should find a chance to investigate those mechanisms and dismantle them next time.

C: 不，你们不必道歉。
E: No... No need for apologies.

C: 而且，那位瓦尔特先生的话我很赞同呀。贝洛伯格的命运，最终还是得由她的子民掌握……
E: Besides, I agree with Mr. Yang. Ultimately, the fate of Belobog is in the hands of its own people...

C: 资源…规划…你现在怎么就爱往我脸上甩这种词？
E: Assets... parameters... You sure love your fancy words.

C: 不对不对，才不是这句台词！我们是来拍照留念的。
E: Hey, that's not your line! We're here to take a photo, remember?

C: 抱歉，爸爸，本来应该让你也见自己女婿一面的。但他在杂志社的工作实在太忙，脱不开身。
E: Sorry Dad, I wanted to introduce you to my husband too, but he can't get away from the publisher today.

C: 老实说，我觉得那姑娘在对我掩饰什么。以我对可可利亚的了解…她才不是那种会突然转变心意的家伙。
E: ...Honestly, I feel that girl is hiding something from me. I knew Cocolia well, and she was never one to suddenly change her mind.

C: 毕竟…今天可能要找你咨询挺多事的，只好用这种方法弥补啦。
E: There's something I need your help with — I had to make it up to you somehow.

C: 原来如此…怪不得希露瓦的神情那么慌张。原来她心里是这么盘算的……
E: I see... no wonder she seemed so flustered. So that's what's on her mind...

C: 全推进去。
E: Push them all in.

C: 寄往边境高墙的信件投递最晚——大约需要两天。
E: Mail sent to the border wall will be delivered last. It will take around two days.

C: 这儿有桌子，椅子，和一张招牌。根据招牌上的画和文字：你可以在这里喝咖啡。
E: There are tables, chairs, and a signboard. According to the signage and text, you can drink coffee here.

C: 柜子里放着千奇百怪的东西。
E: There are a multitude of strange objects in this cabinet.

C: 你看见牌子上写着：「『初雪八落』——恒温保存，家装佳品！」
E: You see a sign that says: "First Snow — easy to maintain, best home decoration!"

C: …太可惜了，你本来还想尝尝。
E: ... What a pity. You wanted to try some.

C: 但你的内心毫无喜悦。因为同伴纷纷掩起鼻子离开了你。
E: However, you fail to reach enlightenment given that your companions just ran for cover holding their noses.

C: 你知道桑博去哪里了吗？
E: Do you know where he went?

C: 呣呣呣～地底都是鼹鼠党的地盘！
E: Umm, The Moles control everything underground!

C: …欺软怕硬的渣滓！
E: Spineless thugs!

C: 为了平息事态，奥列格首领带着「地火」扎进矿区，把城镇治安交给了我。但里面情况吃紧，我也得去支援……
E: In order to quell the situation, Chief Oleg brought Wildfire into the mine and left me in charge of security for the towns. But the situation in the mine is critical — I have to back him up.

C: 结果就是两拨人发生了剧烈冲突，损失惨重。
E: And that's how the clash started. Now both sides are dealing with heavy losses.

C: 但是，史瓦罗先生……
E: But, Mr. Svarog...

C: 这不用你提醒，我也不止一次怀疑过自己，但履行义务的责任心总是会占到上风。
E: I don't need you to remind me, and I didn't have every confidence that I was doing the right thing. But the sense of duty to carry out an order is bound to prevail with me.

C: 你还不了解他？只要是重要的事，你根本不能指望桑博这种人。
E: You don't know him at all yet, do you? You can't rely on people like Sampo when it's important.

C: 慢着！我还没答应让你加入呢！
E: Hold up! I never said you could join us!

C: 有这些应该就够应付一阵子了，你们一路小心，千万不要勉强自己。
E: These should be enough to get by for a bit longer. Be careful. Don't push yourselves too hard.

C: 思前想后，我现在能做的事就只有一件——当面向她问个明白。
E: I've thought it over. There's only one thing I can do — go ask her directly.

C: 是史瓦罗克星！下层区的大英雄——{NICKNAME}！
E: It's the bane of Svarog! The big hero of the Underworld — {NICKNAME}!

C: 在地上要是碰到机械相关的问题，我有时会去找她，后来嘛…因为一些特殊原因，就不怎么去光顾了。
E: I used to go to her sometimes when I had any mechanical problems above ground. But for... various reasons, I don't visit her workshop much anymore.

C: 拿来穿呗，不然呢？难不成就放在门口做摆设吗？
E: To wear it of course, or what? Leave it around as house decor?

C: 又不是我自己穿，要那么干净做什么呢？
E: It's not like I'm gonna wear it myself, so why does it need to be clean?

C: 您有空的话多来啊，不用客气。老板说了，您来打挑战赛就等于免费给拳手们指导业务，我们巴不得您多来喂喂招儿。
E: And please make yourself at home. Boss said you coming to challenges is like free training for these boxers. We are very grateful for your visits.

C: 不打扰你了。
E: I'll leave you to it.

C: 我、我才没有一个人…我在等妈妈下班。
E: I—I'm not alone... I'm waiting for mummy to finish work.

C: 您现在在天梯榜上的位置是…第<unbreak>71</unbreak>名！这排名真是突飞猛进啊。当然，这次的胜利也伴随一笔丰厚奖金。记住，钱包想快乐，就找史考特！
E: Your current ranking is... No. <unbreak>71</unbreak>! That's a great jump. Of course the winner's prize is yours for the taking, here you go! And remember, if you know what you've got, come to Scott!

C: 俱乐部的新星{NICKNAME}不负众望，终于再次踏上擂台！{M#他}{F#她}一路摧枯拉朽，来到天梯榜的第十七位——此处强者云集，其中何人将与{M#他}{F#她}对垒？
E: The club's new star, {NICKNAME}, isn't disappointing us — {M#he}{F#she} is stepping into the ring once more! {M#He}{F#She} had no trouble with the previous opponents on {M#his}{F#her} way up to rank <unbreak>17</unbreak>. And now, which tough challenger will be facing off against {M#him}{F#her}?

C: 其实我们才是最大功臣…
E: We quite literally saved the world...

C: 应该没严重到那个程度。看，他已经醒了。
E: I... don't think that's necessary. Look, he's awake.

C: 唉，也不知道这辈子还有没有机会再见他一面，再到宾馆大堂去喝杯茶……
E: *sigh* I remember chatting in the hotel lobby and drinking tea. I wonder if we'll ever get another chance to do that...

C: 对了，你手下那些新兵蛋子，对下层区的地形应该完全不熟悉吧？「地火」会抽派弟兄们陪你们上前线的。
E: Your troops will be unfamiliar with the layout of the mine — I'll send some of my men to be your guides.

C: …啊，是你们！是在大矿区救了我们俩的——你、你们是上层区的「银鬃铁卫」大人，对吧？
E: Ah, it's you! You saved us from the monsters in the mine. You guys are... Silvermane Guards from the Overworld, right?

C: 垃圾箱的盖子敞开着，似乎在催促你把失去意识的巡逻士兵丢进去。
E: The opened lid of the dumpster seems to be urging you to leave the unconscious bodies of the patrolling soldiers inside.

C: 两只垃圾桶紧紧地并排站着，或许这就是世界上最美好的事情：有另一个自己坚定地站在你的身边，即使只是一只垃圾桶。
E: The two trashcans stood tightly side by side. This might be one of the most beautiful things in the world, to have another self standing by your side, even if it is just a trashcan.

C: 1个好看的垃圾。
E: One beautiful piece of trash.

C: 该派系成员委托公司向西格玛叁号星系发出警告，在柔贰号星系大规模蔓延的恶性噬硅细菌存在向该星区传播的趋势。
E: Members from the Vanguards have asked the IPC to alert the residents that there are signs of an outbreak of a malignant silicon-eating bacteria in Sigmar-III. The bacteria had previously been seen proliferating in Mollis-II.

C: 据可靠消息，小股不法分子通过某种特殊手段，将荷尔斯泰因星系全部居民有关「语言」的记忆全部窃走。
E: Research from reliable sources suggest that certain criminal groups snatched all the memories relating to "language" from the residents of Holstein via unconventional means.

C: 关于卡芙卡…
E: About Kafka...

C: 我是要你耐下性子，彦卿。仙舟治平与剑术不同，徐徐图之，方能成势。何况这棋局中的暗手还没揭开呢……
E: I'm saying you need to have patience, Yanqing. Governing Xianzhou is different from a sword fight. The only way to build momentum is to work slowly. Besides, we still don't know who's really moving the chess pieces...

C: 咳咳，遇到这样热情好客的主人，不好好享受一下真对不起人家的一番心意啊。对吧，杨叔？
E: Ahem! S—Seeing as our hosts are so thoughtful, I guess we should help ourselves. Right, Mr. Yang?

C: 恩公观察得挺仔细嘛。仙舟上风云雨雾都是机巧造景，受地衡司风雨台的调遣。
E: How perceptive. Our wind, clouds, rain, and fog are all artificial. The Realm-Keeping Commission's weather pavilion manages the environmental conditions here.

C: 抱歉，此处暂时被封锁了，请另行寻找通路。
E: Sorry, this place has been sealed off. Please go another way around.

C: …你是问「仙舟有没有可能是我的故乡」？
E: ...Are you wondering if the Xianzhou is my homeworld?

C: 就像宿命般的邂逅。
E: Like a fated encounter.

C: 我想这大概就是星核猎手经常在你身边出现的原因。
E: I think that may be why the Stellaron Hunters won't leave you alone.

C: 虽然我想说不辛苦…但，我已经连续在这儿站了六个时辰了。这场灾难，什么时候才能结束呢？
E: All in a day's work, although I've been standing here for twelve hours now... I just want this to be over.

C: 可是，也没瞧见谁在等人呀？咱们四处找找吧？
E: ...but I can't see anyone waiting for us. Should we look around?

C: 这下毕不了业了…
E: I won't be able to graduate at this rate...

C: 这位云骑姑娘是什么人？
E: Who is this Cloud Knight girl?

C: 不过你这么一问，好像我还真在哪里见过他？有点眼熟……
E: But now that you mention it... maybe I did see him somewhere? He seems a bit familiar...

C: 呜汪！
E: Woof!

C: 停云小姐时不时会带些商团的外宾来星槎海游览…我刚才一晃眼还瞧见她呢，正往街道里边走。
E: Miss Tingyun sometimes takes intergalactic business delegates on tours around Starskiff Haven... In fact, I just saw her walk by, she was heading down the street.

C: 你有权保持沉默…
E: You have the right to remain silent...

C: 这女人，分明是挑衅咱们！
E: Ugh, she's clearly taunting us!

C: 「为迷宫里乱窜的小老鼠们备下的奶酪~」
E: "A little cheese for the rats in the maze~"

C: 不要紧，该来的终究还是来了。
E: Unimportant. The inevitable is already upon us.

C: 再瞧现在，仙舟沦落成了何等模样？！甘受妖弓驱使，屡遭丰饶之民涂炭，「十王司」甚至逼迫我们放弃长生……
E: How far the Xianzhou has fallen! We consent to be commanded by the Devilish Archer, suffer continuously at the hands of the Denizens of Abundance, and the Ten-Lords Commission even forces us to give up our immortality...

C: 那，恩公们不妨先到处看看，小女子找个地方歇歇脚。
E: Good idea, why don't you take a look around, benefactors? My feet need a rest.

C: 但现在你瞧——嘻嘻，「唯有星神的力量才能再现神迹」。没错，没错，伟大的药王「丰饶」！
E: But look upon it now, hehe — "only the power of an Aeon can recreate the miracle." Yes, yes, the mighty Sanctus Medicus! The Abundance!

C: 我当时只觉…身边都是敌人。脑袋里只有恨意，想一人杀出去……
E: I just felt there were... enemies all around me. I only felt hatred. I wanted to kill everything in my path...

C: 云骑看守着一个喃喃自语的犯人。
E: The Cloud Knights are guarding a prisoner who is murmuring to himself.

C: 太卜随斥候前去探察敌情了，请您在此稍作逗留。
E: The master diviner has gone ahead with the scouts. Please wait here for her.

C: 前往「鳞渊境」
E: Head to Scalegorge Waterscape.

C: …你刚刚做了什么？
E: ...What did you do?

C: 是回报他们的时候了。
E: It is time to repay them.

C: 你拂袖轻抚古老的遗迹，手上的细砂如玉屑般白皙莹然，轻轻律动，仿如有生。
E: You gently caress the ancient ruins with a sleeve. The fine sand upon your hand is as white and translucent as jade shards, pulsing as if they were alive.

C: 「持明其耋，独行景景。波月粼粼，沧海沉珠。」……
E: "And as the day is almost gone, return alone to water's song, beneath the waves in silver shell, await new life that time will tell."

C: …我无意挑起争端。来到仙舟，只为确认朋友安全。
E: ...I have no interest in stoking conflict. I came to ensure the safety of my friends.

C: 也是时候返回迴星港，去见驭空大人了。
E: It's time to go back to Stargazer Navalia and see Madam Yukong.

C: （我看她就是很享受……）
E: (I think she's enjoying herself...)

C: 我谨代表星穹列车感谢太卜。
E: On behalf of the Astral Express, I would like to thank you, Master Diviner.

C: 罗浮的麻烦…才刚刚开始。不知太卜能否顺利接手……
E: The Luofu's troubles... have only just begun. I don't know if the master diviner can take all this on.

C: 驭空小姐……
E: Madam Yukong...

C: 她不曾在战场上与我并肩战斗，但也是另一种意义上的「战友」。没有停云他们与商团的帮助，罗浮就无法在这短短三十年间恢复生机。
E: She never fought alongside me on the battlefield, but in her own way, she became a comrade-in-arms. Without the help of Tingyun and the guild, the Luofu would not have been able to recover in the space of just thirty short years.

C: 以她为名的茶
E: The tea named after her

C: 告慰的纸鸢
E: The soul-soothing paper kite

C: 我自己一个人就能去。
E: ...Or I could just go there myself.

C: 呜~
E: *whimpers*

C: 喂，你看什么看，没看见哥儿几个正发愁呢吗？嗯…这化外民怎么看着那么眼熟啊？
E: Hey, what are you looking at? This is our conversation, okay? Hmm... Why does this outworlder seem so familiar to me?

C: 我不在那里，回头。
E: I'm not there. Turn back.

C: 没错，朋友！
E: That's right, pal!

C: 别在意。但他们教过我「朋友就是埃维金人的武器」——在「同谐」虎视眈眈的情况下，咱们的「朋友」确实越多越好。
E: I'm not offended. But they did teach me that friends are weapons of the Avgins. Even under the watchful eye of the Harmony, we need as many friends as we can get.

C: 等入梦后，您就能体会到我说的了，匹诺康尼一定不会让您失望！
E: You'll know what I mean when you enter a dream. Penacony will not disappoint!

C: …我明白了，难怪这里没有{NICKNAME}的名字。我们答复家族的时候，{M#他}{F#她}还没有登上列车。
E: ...I understand. No wonder {NICKNAME}'s name here is missing. When we responded to The Family's invitation, {F#she}{M#he} hadn't even arrived on the Express.

C: <color=#ff3a3e>后来又看见你走进同一间房间，多少就明白了。刚才情况紧急，一时想不到其他说辞…擅作主张，希望你不要介意。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>I later saw you walking into the same room, so I began to connect the dots. The situation got a bit tense... I hope you don't mind that I pulled this stunt.</color>

C: <color=#ff3a3e>巡海游侠，黄泉…这是他们称呼我的方式，你随意使用吧。我们应该还会再见面的。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>Galaxy Ranger, Acheron... This is what they call me. You can call me whatever you want. We will likely meet again.</color>

C: 匹诺康尼的美梦本质上是由「忆质」构成的世界。只有掌握它的性质，你才能在其中自由行动。
E: Essentially, the dream of Penacony is a world formed by memoria. Only by fully understanding its nature can you move freely within it.
(Hmm? He's...)

C: 这是在做什么？
E: What's going on?

C: 谁的声音都可以吗？
E: Anyone's voice will do?

C: 还有这么便利的功能？
E: That's quite a convenient feature.

C: 三月七。
E: March 7th.

C: 你们驾驶雪地车闯入泰科铵大球馆，扰乱会场秩序，致使比赛中断，并导致二十名开拓客和你们一起无偿劳动三个月，以修复大球馆外立面的严重损毁——
E: You rode snowmobiles into the Taikiyan Stadium and disrupted the match, causing the match to be suspended. Because of you, Twenty Trailblazers were forced to repair the severely damaged exterior of the stadium for three months without pay...

C: 你们入侵餐车后厨，向所有人宣称那里需要消杀，致使四十二块香香酥酥脆脆帕姆帕姆派不翼而飞，并带走了保鲜柜上层最后一碗列车锅，令列车长挨饿——
E: You barged into the kitchen of the dining carriage, claiming that the whole area needed disinfection. This resulted in the loss of <unbreak>42</unbreak> Crispy Crumbly Pom-Pom Pies. And because you also took the last serving of the Express Special in the fridge, I was left starving...

C: 这跟阿基维利有半点关系？
E: What do all these have to do with Akivili?

C: 此前我们收到通知，说有不法分子借着盛会的幌子潜入了匹诺康尼。眼下正是谐乐大典前夕，别有用心之人不在少数……
E: We got a tip that some criminals were planning to take advantage of the festivities around the Charmony Festival to sneak into Penacony. Now that the festival is just around the corner, there are likely many shady characters lurking around...

C: 发出一声可爱又古怪的啼叫后，这只有棱有角的小鸟飞向了远方。
E: After letting out an adorable chirp, the bird flies away.

C: 说笑了伙计，这是匹诺康尼——你就是在做梦啊！
E: You're such a hoot, buddy. This is Penacony, of course you're in a dream!

C: 她是流萤，是我的向导。
E: This is Firefly. She's my tour guide.

C: 对，我今儿想带两位朋友来贵宝地玩一玩，不知道咱这沙龙还有空位嘛？
E: Right. I have two friends here who want to come with me. Any seats left inside?

C: 那个…我觉得——只是我觉得——这台电视可能有猫腻。
E: Well... I do think there's something fishy with this TV.

C: 你在求救吗？
E: Are you asking for help?

C: 哎，我问你哦……
E: Hey, let me ask you something...

C: …但能给我们一些私人空间吗？
E: ...But, can we have some privacy, please?

C: 哈，朋友——你看起来像我一样…开心！
E: Ha, buddy. You look... as delighted as me!

C: 是什么呢？
E: What is it?

C: 不要骗我…
E: Don't lie to me...

C: 把那个东西交出来！
E: Give me that!
█beg█you██ █I████ ███ █scared█...

C: 呃…只有一个宝箱？好可疑，要打开看看吗……
E: Er... Just one chest? I'm sure that's not a trap. Should we open it...?

C: …我请求您，使此地的垃圾袋恢复宁静，再度联结众桶吧——如此一来，便能向那伪王发起反击。
E: ...I implore your help to restore peace to the trash bags, so that the trashcans here may be united once more. Then, we'll be able to launch a counterattack against that undeserving king.

C: 你已得到了我的信任，希望你能将此物连带着我的心一并收下。我将为你而战，伟大的灵魂。
E: You have earned my confidence. I wish for you to accept this item and my heart as a token of my sincere gratitude. I will fight for you, O glorious soul.

C: 黄泉确实有些奇怪，但…
E: Acheron has her peculiarities, but...

C: 她的话不可尽信，有不少刻意诱导的成分。
E: It's best to be skeptical of her. There's a significant amount of intentional misdirection in her words.

C: 这边，亲爱的。
E: This way, darling.

C: 的确。
E: That's true.

C: 「机甲」…耐人寻味的说法。我记得猎犬家系在追捕这么一位罪犯——「身穿银色盔甲的高大男性」。
E: "Mecha"... What an intriguing statement. I recall the Bloodhound family is pursuing a criminal — "a tall male in silver armor."

C: 还记得先前是怎样教你的吗？感受忆质的流向，走上墙面，然后…靠近它。
E: Still remember what I taught you? Feel the flow of the memoria, walk up the wall, and then... get close to it.

C: …引领你归还清醒的世界。
E: ...guiding you back to the waking world.

C: 什么螳螂捕蝉黄雀在后啊…但总感觉砂金指控黄泉小姐的理由也很微妙，该相信他说的话吗？
E: Are we missing the forest for the trees here...? I always felt that Aventurine's reasons for accusing Miss Acheron were highly subtle. Can we believe him?

C: 不是不愿，而是不能…我走过的路太长，对于加诸此身的种种，三言两语无法言明。
E: It's not that I don't want to. It's just that I can't... I've come so far, and I can't sum up all of that in just a few words.

C: 有关你的记忆不只属于你——我所知甚多，亦预言更远——只要用点手段，死者也能开口说话。
E: You see, memories of you are not yours alone. They travel in other people... Other things. I know much, and I can predict even more. With some help, the dead can be made to speak.

C: 「但那似乎无法实现了。宴会之星并不欢迎大丽花，我也不需要成人礼…而你，我知道你在寻找什么……」
E: "But that seems unrealistic. Dahlia's not welcome on the Banquet Star, and I don't need a coming-of-age ceremony... And you, I know what you're looking for..."

C: 它是很重要，但更重要的是你，我最爱的弟弟…我不会责怪你，但你要记得妈妈说过的话……
E: It is important, but not as important as you, my dearest brother... I don't blame you, but you must remember what mom said...

C: 上次我就提醒过你，你那身幻想战衣根本就不存在。
E: Right, and as I mentioned, that fantasy raiment of yours doesn't exist.

C: …这是个测试。在正式谈话前，你得先向星期日证明自己的价值。
E: ...It's a trial. You got to prove your worth to Sunday before you can speak with him.

C: 说说你的计划吧。
E: Tell me about your plan.

C: 那就试试看——看「同谐」会不会拒绝你。
E: You can try — and we'll see if the Harmony rejects you.

C: 「埃维金人是否没有任何读取、篡改、操纵自己或他人思想的能力？」
E: "Do the Avgins have any ability to read, tamper with, or manipulate one's own or another's mind?"

C: 「——你憎恨，并想要亲手毁灭这个世界吗？」
E: "...Do you hate and wish to destroy this world with your own hands?"

C: 我从没想过会有人和他思路一致。说真的，你最好去看看心理医生。
E: I never imagined someone would share his way of thinking. Honestly, you should see a shrink.

C: 拉帝奥，你这混蛋……
E: Ratio, you wretch...

C: 如果我是你，就会立刻闭嘴。不该说的话少说。
E: If I were you, I would shut my mouth. It's wise to remain silent when you should.

C: 好久不见，星穹列车的各位，你们的事我从砂金那里都听说啦…嗯？
E: Long time no see, Astral Express crew. Aventurine has told me a lot about your happenings... Hmm?

C: 既然这样…我只好如各位所愿，低下我高贵的头颅向各位求情了……
E: If that's the case... I'll just have to acquiesce to everyone's wishes, lower my esteemed head and plead with everyone...

C: 由于某些原因，她的愿望很难实现。不过我想办法带了一件衣裳给她。
E: For certain reasons, her wish was difficult to fulfill. But I managed to bring her a garment.

C: 也许瓦尔特先生也听说过，那里有一艘名为「黄昏号」的巨轮停泊在梦海之上，轻歌曼舞，夜夜不休。
E: Perhaps Mr. Yang has heard — there is a large boat called the "Eventide" anchored along the Sea of Dreams, where soft music and dancing persist endlessly every night.

C: 你们这些年轻人，一天到晚净想着剑走偏锋，这可不行。真正的好戏是要用心才能拍出来的。
E: You youngsters are always looking for a quick way to get an audience, but you know what? A truly great show never comes easy.

C: 哦！又是个「不怕死」的年轻人。给你句忠告，别觉得自己的想法有多么超前。
E: Ah, I see! Another fearless youngster looking for death, huh? Well, let me give you a piece of advice. Don't think you're the first one who's ever thought of that idea.

C: 如果风言风语也可以的话…虽然和死亡无关，但据说在现实酒店，曾经发生过客人一睡不起的情况。
E: Well, if you're up for some gossip... It's not about death, but there have been some rumors about a guest at the reality Hotel who fell into a deep sleep and didn't wake up.

C: 我手里只缺两样东西了：第一，真相背后的意义；第二，揭露它的方法。
E: Right now, there are only two things missing from my grasp: The meaning behind the truth and the means to expose it.

C: （每个人加入家族前都要这样受刑么…混蛋，我都想把我的大脑送出去当证据了……）
E: (Does everyone have to go through so much torment before joining The Family?... Darn it, now I just want to dig out my brain and use it as evidence...)

C: 想喝点什么？我来准备。
E: What would you like to drink? I'll whip it up for you.

C: 「钱币铸成的阶梯亦可通往幸福」…这话的意思是我们可以把它拿走咯？虽然不知道划不划算…不过还是多谢啦！
E: "Stairs made of coins can lead to happiness." Does this mean we can take it? I'm not sure if it's a good deal... but thank you anyway!

C: 稍等。
E: Just one moment.

C: 用这杯「黄金国」向你致意，逐梦客——
E: Here's to you, dream seeker, with this glass of El Dorado...

C: 先找找有没有可以通报的人吧。
E: Let's see if there's anyone waiting to greet us.

C: …小心，有人来了。
E: ...Watch out. Someone's approaching.

C: 其他家主也提出了和您一样的疑虑。但在我看来，真正的凶手绝不会像那位使节一样招摇过市…更何况我早已亲手为他套上枷锁。
E: Well, other family heads share the same suspicions as you, but in my opinion, the true murderer would never have drawn as much attention as that ambassador did... Not to mention I personally shackled him a while ago.

C: 不过，我反而要将瓦尔特先生的疑虑提示给二位。在我看来，更应当对砂金保持警惕的是你们…恶人固然无法撼动高墙，但却能将尖刀刺进义人的心脏。
E: However, I'll give you a suggestion regarding your suspicions, Mr. Yang. You should be more cautious of Aventurine... While the wicked can't break through high walls, they can plunge their evil dagger into the heart of the righteous.

C: 这是……
E: Is this...
Uhh...

C: …嗯，来吧。
E: ...Sure, come on.

C: …瓦尔特先生。
E: ...Mr. Yang.

C: 嗯。
E: Mhmm.

C: 「匹诺康尼的梦境中并不存在『真正的死亡』」。
E: "'Real death' does not exist in Penacony's Dreamscape."

C: 我总有一天也会走到那里。
E: I'll get there, one day.

C: 会有那么一天，当天上再度洒落下雨，我会听见母神的呼唤，知道命定的时刻已至，我应去和我的家人重逢。
E: There will come a day when the sky will drizzle, and I will hear the call of Gaiathra Triclops and know that it is time for me to go and be reunited with my family.

C: 究竟是什么东西让你在这不停地说疯话？比起我，你更应该去关心那群正在影视乐园闹得热火朝天的外宾。
E: What exactly is making you say all this nonsense? You should be more concerned about the outworld visitors who are making a scene in the theme park than me!

C: 巡海游侠？
E: A Galaxy Ranger?

C: 知更鸟…小姐？是那位闻名宇宙的超级明星——知更鸟小姐！
E: Miss Robin...? That's the renowned cosmic superstar — Miss Robin!

C: 我完全理解了！
E: I completely understand!

C: 第一次看见时，我也很惊讶。这里的天空，就像是…十二梦境的倒影。
E: When I first saw it, I was in awe too. The sky here, it's like... a reflection of the twelve Dreamscapes.

C: 是列车长提到的无名客之一。
E: It was one of the Nameless mentioned by the conductor.

C: 他昏倒了。想必是负面情绪太过强烈，引来了附近的忆域迷因。
E: He passed out. His intense negative emotions attracted the nearby Memory Zone Memes.

C: 是三月七小姐啊，欢迎。这几位是……
E: Welcome, Miss March! Who might these be?
