C: 很高兴你们在匹诺康尼的梦中开始了新的生活。只是……
E: I'm glad that you found a new life here in Penacony, it's just...

C: 那后来…他们又是怎么反目成仇的？
E: Then... how did they turn against each other?

C: 正如米哈伊尔相信未来的无名客，我们也会无条件地相信过去的无名客。他们愿意为自己热爱的土地献出一生，又怎会带着对未来的遗憾匆匆离去？
E: Just as Mikhail believes in the Nameless of the future, we unconditionally believe in the Nameless of the past. How could they leave with regrets for the future when they were ready to dedicate their lives to the land they loved?

C: 很好。向其他家人展现热心、勤行善工，如此便能与家族重修旧好。平安回去吧。
E: Very well. Show your dedication and goodwill to The Family, and you shall be reinstated among them. Now, please leave in peace.

C: 即便最终交涉结果不尽人意…我也会拒绝登台。如果没有「调弦师」，{RUBY_B#「同谐」的化身}「齐响诗班」{RUBY_E#}便不会降世，大典也就不过是场普通的演出。
E: Even if the negotiation does not go smoothly... I'll refuse to go on stage. Without the Chordmaster, the {RUBY_B#Embodiment of Harmony}Harmonious Choir{RUBY_E#} would not arrive, and the Charmony Festival would be just a grand performance, and nothing more.

C: 但…你应该也知道，能从梦境里带回现实的东西非常有限。
E: But... you know that only a few things can be brought back from the Dreamscape to reality, right?

C: 但我们心目中的那座乐园…不应该有终点。
E: However, the paradise in our dreams... it doesn't have to end.

C: 勉勉强强吧。这里的人都太好骗了，稍微给点甜头就会上钩，有危险的时候又缩得飞快——简单说，就是人傻钱多还怕死呗！
E: Barely. The people here are way too gullible. A little bait is all it takes for them to bite, and they run away at the slightest hint of danger. In other words, they're naive and cowardly!

C: 所以这才是我无法歌唱的真正原因？笼罩匹诺康尼的阴影，其实是……
E: So this is the true reason I can't sing? The shadow that envelops Penacony is actually...

C: （这俩宝贝什么都不知道。没必要继续套话了。）
E: (Well, looks like I won't get any fudgin' clues outta these two — they're clueless.)

C: 出了什么事啊？我可是专门从哈衣艾怡联邦赶来的，别让我白跑一趟啊！
E: Do you think there's anything to be worried about? I've traveled all the way from the Hyai'i Federation, and I don't want my trip to be ruined!

C: 你的「江湖智慧」就是找茬？
E: Is this your idea of "street smarts"? Starting an altercation?

C: 情况确实不甚明朗。盛会之星一定发生了什么，但公众却对此毫无认知。想必是有家族的位高权重者在掩盖事态吧。
E: The situation is unclear. Something must have happened on the Planet of Festivities, but the public is unaware of it. Someone in a position of power within The Family must be covering it up.

C: 这场雨，持续多久了？
E: How long has this rain been going on for?

C: 衷心祝愿你们成功走到最后，成为新生代的匹诺康尼巨星！那么在正式开赛前，还有什么想说的吗？
E: I wholeheartedly hope you make it to the finish and emerge as the next superstars of Penacony! Now then, is there anything you'd like to say before the competition officially begins?

C: 哈哈，真不愧是…居安思危的开拓者！
E: Haha, there's that... uh, the ever-vigilant Trailblazing spirit we all know!

C: 它这是在…说什么？
E: What exactly is he... talking about?

C: 你怎么也在？
E: How come you're here too?

C: 好在侏儒兔机甲驾驶员、流浪的猫咪决斗家、银河忍者、四驱智械等三十二位落难者全都渡过难关，安然无恙…我便将大家一齐带领至此，与万千美丽的生灵同享谐乐。
E: Fortunately, the Mini Rabbit Mech Pilot, Stray Cat Duelist, Galactic Ninja, and Quad-drive Intellitron, along with thirty-two other souls in distress, all emerged from their predicaments safe and sound... I then led them all here to revel in the harmony with the countless other splendid beings.

C: 告知「钟表匠」和星核的真相。
E: Tell the truth about the Watchmaker and the Stellaron.

C: 透过调律，各位可以更直观地理解我的情绪，这也意味着我将对你们毫无隐瞒。
E: Tuning allows you to intuitively grasp my feelings, which also means that I cannot hide anything from you.

C: 哦，原来你在啊？
E: Oh, you're here.

C: 你说的…是那三次「死亡」吗？
E: You mean... my three "deaths"?

C: 眼下正是关键时刻，试问，那位调和众音的{RUBY_B#知更鸟}神选者{RUBY_E#}在哪里？
E: This is a crucial moment for us. So, where is the {RUBY_B#Robin}chosen one{RUBY_E#} who harmonizes the varied sounds?

C: 「万物自此蒙受各自的记号，世人自此得以知晓善恶与利害。」
E: "Thus, all things were marked, and the world learned to discern between good and evil."

C: 「银河残酷而无情，灯蛾家系试图开垦列车留下的银轨，却遭遇虫群余孽，惨遭覆灭。」
E: "The Lampmoth Family endeavored to extend the silver rail left by the Express, only to be eradicated by the remnants of the Swarm, leaving nothing in the unforgiving Cosmos."

C: 有关「秩序」的一切到此为止，不知各位有何感想？
E: That concludes everything related to the Order. What are your reflections on this, my dear guests?

C: 我能感受到你喜悦的心情…如此一来，你的记忆也会变得非常美妙呢。
E: I can feel your obvious excitement... That means your memories will also become even more beautiful.

C: 帮我看看，我是不是要飞升了？
E: Help me take a look, am I about to ascend?

C: 这意味着什么？
E: What does that mean?

C: 嗯，我赞成。
E: Sounds good to me.

C: 唔…我觉得江户星的状况可能更紧急一点。身为无名客，我们更应该向他们伸出援手吧？
E: Hmm... I personally think the situation on Edo Star might be more urgent. As Nameless, should we not extend a helping hand?

C: 终于尘埃落定了，不是么？最后——做得不错，朋友。
E: Seems the dust has finally settled, no? Well done, friend.

C: 拉扎莉娜
E: Razalina

C: 我想，除了那唯一的一处破绽，你在美梦中经历的仍是真实发生过的。唯有如此，他才能让你抵达理想的终点：解救匹诺康尼的危机，踏上下一段「开拓」之旅。
E: I believe what you experienced in the sweet dream, except for that flaw, was real. Only in this way could you reach the destination, lifting the crisis in Penacony and embarking on your next trailblazing expedition.

C: 只有时常回望来时的路，我们才不会忘记自己应当前往何处…还有那些曾与我们并肩而行的人们。
E: Only by reflecting on our steps can we remember the path we should be walking on... and the companions who have walked alongside us.

C: <color=#ff3a3e>愿死亡结束你漫长的梦……</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>May death be the end of your boundless dream...</color>

C: 如果诸位有所主张——就尽管向我证明吧。
E: If you have any objection, feel free to make your case...

C: 已死的星神，我向你致敬。
E: O, fallen Aeon... may I honor you.

C: 出发去找大家吧。
E: Let's go meet up with others.

C: 好啦好啦，别那么馋嘴，也给别的客人留一点嘛！
E: There, there. Don't be so greedy. Leave some for the other guests!

C: 太一之梦破碎后，蒙托尔星系的家族分家闻风赶来，迅速控制了现场。橡木家系的大多数成员都失去了意识，所幸没有生命危险。
E: After Ena's dream was shattered, The Family branch from the Montour System soon arrived and swiftly took control of the situation. Most members of the Oak Family fell unconscious, but fortunately, their lives were not in danger.

C: 公司有什么动作吗？
E: Did the IPC make any move?

C: 「同谐」需要找到新的方向，只有与过去告别，我们才能驶向明天。
E: The Harmony needs a new direction. Only by bidding farewell to the past can we actually sail into the future.

C: 而它们再换得的一切，都会让「石心」变得更加坚不可摧，在终将到来的「列神之战」中，实现{RUBY_B#「钻石」}「存护」{RUBY_E#}的伟业。
E: And whatever we gain from it will fortify the Stonehearts in return, allowing us to achieve the great cause of {RUBY_B#Diamond}the Preservation{RUBY_E#} when the war among the Aeons eventually comes.

C: 如果要实现我的愿望……
E: If they can really grant my wish...

C: 啾啾，啾啾……
E: Chirp, chirp...

C: <size=36>一——！</size>
E: <size=36>One...!</size>

C: 「祂也永远不会同你道别，永远不会用谎言伤害你——赞美阿哈！」
E: "THEY will never say goodbye to you, never tell lies to hurt you — praise Aha!"

C: 我会把这枚炸弹带到{RUBY_B#原始忆域}梦境的深处{RUBY_E#}…至少是尽可能深的无人之地。这样就没人会受伤了。
E: I will take this bomb into {RUBY_B#Primordial Memory Zone}the depths of the Dreamscape{RUBY_E#}... as deep as possible, where there are no living souls around. That way, at least no one will get hurt.

C: 原来如此…怪不得常听到帕姆在走廊上焦虑踱步。
E: I see... No wonder I can regularly hear Pom-Pom pacing anxiously up and down the corridor.

C: 要、要读书吗……
E: D—Do we have to study?

C: 恐怕要让你失望了，折纸大学不会为旁听生颁发凭证。但我相信，你会收获远比证书更有价值的事物。
E: Sorry to disappoint, but Paperfold University doesn't issue certificates to guest students. However, I believe you'll gain something far more valuable than a certificate.

C: （我的房间还是上次那间…准备入梦吧。）
E: (I'm staying in the same room as the last time I was here... Time to enter the dream.)

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉~
E: ♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na~ ♪

C: 我遇到了好多猴子…
E: I met a lot of monkeys...

C: 老师也好学生也好，这儿的人可真有个性。
E: The teachers and students here sure are unique.

C: OK，第二个问题：你最引以为傲的优点是什么？
E: Okay, second question. What are you most proud of about yourself?

C: 首先要选择的是…甜品中最重要的香蕉，一共有三个品种……
E: The first thing you must choose for your dessert is... the banana. There are three types...

C: 使用金黄睡蕉。
E: Use the golden Slumbernana.

C: 加入「安逸」。
E: Add "Tranquility."

C: 嗯？你们怎么没穿校服啊！扣分！
E: Huh? Where's your school uniform? You're getting a demerit!

C: 我是新生，给我一件。
E: I'm new. Give me a uniform.

C: 朋友？
E: Friend?

C: 还挺像回事儿，来，让哥们也试试？
E: Sounds impressive. Sign me up, pardner.

C: 谁答应你们把这里据为己有了？
E: Who made you owner of this place!?

C: 嗯，只要旁敲侧击，然后……
E: Indeed. We need only sound them out and—

C: 我也不是没拷问过其他人，有了这根皮带，受不了的时候，你们可以自己爬过去上吊。
E: I ain't no greenhorn interrogator, pardner. This belt is put here so that ash-voles like you can crawl over and hang yourselves when you can't take no more.

C: 只要能被一枪爱死，有什么哲学都无所谓。
E: Say whatever they like. They're nothing but smashed fudges once I put my bullets into them.

C: 哈，哥们说什么来着？这年头哪还有人玩合唱？
E: Hah! What was it you said? Who in their right mind would sing in a choir in this era?

C: 你拜入师门已有五年，不惧苦修的熬煎，不畏试炼的艰险，百般忍法皆已精娴。
E: You've trained under me for five years. After rigorous tests and trials, you've mastered hundreds of ninja techniques.

C: 今日我赐你「缭乱•忍者」之名，你将成为我等讨伐邪忍的尖兵，引领忍之都砥砺前行。
E: I hereby bestow upon you the title of Dazzling Ninja, entrusting you to be my weapon to defeat the evil ninja and guide the Ninja Capital into the future.

C: 还有学校里的助蕉…
E: Those Assistananas as well...

C: （首先，保持平和的心态……）
E: (First, calm your mind...)

C: 你想起过去邂逅过的一个个桶，它们如黑洞般神秘而美丽的洞口令你陶醉，你的心神被桶纳入其中，安宁与祥和伴随降临在你胸口鼓动的小小垃圾袋里……
E: You recall the cans you've encountered in the past, their mysterious and beautiful openings like black holes mesmerizing you. Your spirit is drawn into the cans, bringing peace and tranquility to the little trashbag beating in your chest...

C: 同学，你刚刚居然敢反抗蕉师？真是太酷了，我早看他不顺眼了！
E: Wow, did you just challenge the BananAdvisor? That's SO COOL! I've always found him annoying!

C: 用真名多无聊啊，一点都不个性！
E: Pfft! Real names are boring and not special at all!

C: 别让八千八逃了！
E: My <unbreak>8,800</unbreak> Alfalfa credits!!! Don't let it get away!

C: 太好了！睡蕉小猴的人气远超我们想象。富贵同学，跟蕉师来取货吧。
E: That's fantastic news! We underestimated Slumbernana Monkey's popularity. Come with me, Richie. I'll get you more stock.

C: 天才俱乐部#64原始博士，没有人知道他的真名，但他犯下的罪行寰宇皆知，其中最骇人听闻的便是「返祖实验」。
E: Member #64 of the Genius Society, Dr. Primitive. No one knows his real name, but his atrocities are infamous throughout the cosmos. The most horrifying one of all has to be his atavistic experiment.

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉，蕉蕉蕉蕉~
E: Ba na na na... Ba na na na~

C: 嗯？你怎么还这么清醒？真是个不可*蕉化*的差生啊。
E: Hmm? Why are you still lucid? Truly an incorrigible student!

C: 真的假的，我也要上吗！？
E: Hey, do I really have to fight too?

C: 回答正确。五个琥珀纪前，博识学会培育出了一种人类自认完美的香蕉，那便是「金黄睡蕉」。
E: That's correct. Five Amber Eras ago, the Intelligentsia Guild cultivated a banana species that humans deemed perfect: the golden Slumbernana.

C: 金黄睡蕉迅速统治了水果市场，它营养丰富、味道甜美、表皮还会散发出迷人的金色光泽，让每个星际香蕉园的夜晚都如同「黄金的时刻」一般闪耀。
E: The golden Slumbernana swiftly dominated the fruit market. Nutritious, sweet, and its peel gives off a mesmerizing golden sheen. It transformed every interstellar banana plantation into a spectacle akin to the Golden Hour at night.

C: 是百货•忍徒和虫豸•邪祟——
E: It's Ninja Initiate Merchant and Fiendling Pest—

C: 蕉蕉蕉——
E: Bana, bana, bana—!

C: 很难形容出对方在人群中究竟有何不同——他看了过来，眼神中的清澈令人惊叹。
E: It's hard to describe what exactly sets him apart in the crowd — he looked over, and the clarity in his eyes was astonishing.

C: 帮我在外面守着。
E: Keep watch outside.

C: 当然，诉诸武力并非我的目的，我来此是为了「证明」，而非征服。
E: Naturally, resorting to violence is not my intention. I'm only here to prove something, not to subjugate.

C: 多么神奇啊，无论是这美梦剧团，还是我本尊，他只需一枪就能了结。
E: Miraculous... Be it the Sweet Dreams Troupe or myself, he can end it all with just one shot.

C: 你是忆者？
E: You're a Memokeeper?

C: 以那位导演的作风，如果不能剪辑出乱破的记忆，我们恐怕也无法离开这里。务必谨慎行事。
E: Given how that director does things, we probably can't leave this place if the memetic virus from Rappa's memories isn't extracted via editing. Let's proceed with caution.

C: <size=36>银河忍法帖•前尘•影事录</size>
E: <size=36>Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: Past Reverie</size>

C: 信息稀释度<unbreak>74</unbreak>％，意识锚点锁定，模因刻录即将开始。
E: Information dilution at <unbreak>74%</unbreak>. Consciousness anchor locked on. Memetic etching is about to begin.

C: 快点！再不修好，游侠就要找上门了！
E: Well be quick about it! If we don't fix it soon, the Rangers are gonna find us!

C: ——住手！
E: ...Stop!

C: 能人<unbreak>22</unbreak>……
E: Denisovan <unbreak>22</unbreak>...

C: 乱破，她是邪忍的部下。
E: Rappa, she is a follower of the Evil Ninja.

C: 且慢！既然在下已是能与邪忍抗衡的忍侠……
E: Wait! Since I am now a ninja hero who can contend with evil ninjas...

C: 这些记忆足以创造出摧毁模糊的爆点，来为这出荒诞的猴戏画上句号。而在此之前……
E: These memories are enough to create a sensational hit that will destroy ambiguity and bring a close to this absurd monkey show. But before that...

C: 在{NICKNAME}•忍者如贼星坠落之后，其余诸忍亦会延续蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉——
E: After Ninja {NICKNAME} fell like a deceitful star, the rest of the ninjas will also banananananaa...

C: <size=36>思丁格：</size>\n风波平息后，折纸大学开始重新筹办校庆……
E: <size=36>Stinger:</size>\nAfter the storm dies down, Paperfold University starts to re-organize the school anniversary festival...

C: （看见他了。在和那头蠢狮子辩论么？）
E: (There he is. Is he engaged in a debate with that foolish lion?)

C: ——大哥，冷静！
E: Calm down, calm down!

C: 哼，口气不小…可悲的狗鼠，和你们那懦弱的王有得一拼！
E: Hmph, those are some big words for a pathetic rat like you... No different from your cowardly king!
Parted the waters...?

C: 让我也加入吧。
E: I wanna try, too.

C: 也许…出事了？
E: Maybe... something happened?

C: 怎么会？不应该呀……
E: But that shouldn't be...

C: 这是什么…野兽吗？还是「死亡」泰坦的眷属？
E: What kind of... beast is this? Or is it the Death Titan's Kin?
Mmm...

C: 不过，阿雅…你怎么知道那刻夏还活着？
E: Agy... how do you know that Anaxa is still alive?

C: 除了…{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}。它是不得已才将力量交给我们的。
E: ...With the exception of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, that is. They didn't lend us their power willingly.

C: 我名为阿那克萨戈拉斯，神悟树庭七贤人之一，「智种学派」的创始者。丑话先说在前头：第一，别叫我那刻夏。
E: My name is Anaxagoras, one of the Seven Sages of the Grove of Epiphany and the founder of the Nousporists. Before we go any further: Rule number one, do not call me Anaxa.

C: …状似身披长袍、盘坐冥想，还会唱歌的老翁。
E: ...resembling an old man, draped in robes, seated in deep meditation, and capable of singing.

C: 一言既出，驷马难追。要是用悬锋人的口头禅来说，那就是：开拓者的字典里绝没有「玩笑」二字。
E: Once spoken, words are irrevocable. As the Kremnoans would often say, "the word 'joke' does not exist in the Trailblazer's dictionary."

C: 不过，要说吾没甚二心，那确是胡搅蛮缠了。嗯，倒不如接住这话头交代了好——
E: Although, it would be absurd to say that I have no other motives. Since you've brought it up, I might as well take this chance to explain...

C: 唔，其实缇安还找到了这个——会不会和你们说的那个人有关系呀？
E: Oh, actually, Trianne also found this. Could this be related to the person you're talking about?

C: 如果真是神话中的信物，理应会有效果。
E: If it's indeed the token mentioned in the legends, there should be a reaction.

C: 结果，它看到了那块大琥珀，刚想看看，就被大家包围了！
E: But just as they went to take a closer look at that big piece of amber, they were surrounded!

C: 精准而优雅，简直不费吹灰之力…这也算得上是挑战嘛？
E: Precision, and grace. That did not take much effort... Was this supposed to be a challenge?

C: 呵呵，当然了。毕竟汝等方才拾得的残片，与吾没有分毫干系。
E: Hehe, obviously. After all, the fragment that you picked up just now is completely unrelated to me.

C: 卡吕普索阁下，你这是……
E: Lady Calypso, this is...

C: 什么？难道说，你是用这种方法……
E: What? Do you mean that, you're using such a method...

C: 看来，阁下的朋友早已到了。
E: It seems your friend arrived before us.

C: 说起来，汝等还有位红发的同伴不是？
E: Speaking of which, don't you also have a red-haired companion?

C: …嗯。看来你全都明白呀。
E: ...Yes. Looks like you know everything.

C: 我并无谴责之意。逐火之旅不是儿戏，这我早有觉悟。
E: I have no intention of condemning you for it. The Flame-Chase Journey is not a game, and I have long understood this.

C: 他前边在真言狮口那儿数数呢。我好奇想跑过去瞧瞧，但又怕是他设下的陷阱……
E: He was counting near Verax Leo when we went to hide. I thought about taking a peek, but who knows if it might be a trap he set?
Uh...

C: 来吧——
E: Let's do it!

C: 在试炼里，我和那家伙交手了。但过去这么久，即便我带着决心一路战斗、成长、变强…我还是战胜不了它。
E: I fought it in the trial. But even though I've been fighting, improving, and resolutely getting stronger all this time... I still couldn't defeat it.

C: 翁法罗斯的野风有铁锈的味道。赫菲斯辛总笑话我喝蜜酿加羊奶，说把鲜红的血色拌得不伦不类。他生得瘦小，但在战场上凶悍无比，杀敌如麻。
E: The wind in the wilds of Amphoreus smells like rust. Hephaestion would always tease me about adding goat milk to the honey brew, claiming I ruined the blood-red color of the drink. He had a scrawny figure, but was a relentless force on the battlefield, dispatching foes without so much as a blink.

C: 这五位…我还是第一次听说他们的名字。
E: ...This is the first time I've heard you mention these five and their names.

C: 不同的悬锋人，你果然是……
E: A different kind of Kremnoan, you truly are...

C: 嗯…黑色的海浪啊……
E: Hm... A dark wave...

C: （满满当当的…好像都是妈妈留给我的。）
E: (It's packed full... Mama must have left all of these for me.)

C: …*我们*还在梦里吗？
E: ...Are we still in a dream?

C: （话是这么说，但噩梦是个坏兆头。记忆越来越模糊不清了，连妈妈的样子都……）
E: (Nevertheless, that nightmare is ominous. Memories are slipping away... even the image of Mama...)

C: 没什么！只是…又想起树庭的事。
E: Nothing! Just... remembering what happened at the Grove.

C: 唔，结果！还是没找到「翻红瑞」……
E: Ugh, still no luck finding any "safari"...

C: 好消息我已知晓：吾师能安然归来，便是证明。
E: I already know the good news. Tribbie's safe return is proof of that.

C: 难道…在说人家？
E: Do you mean... me?

C: 感谢你。愿你们荣归，战场的骄子。
E: You have my thanks. May you return in glory, elites of the battlefield.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>这是一段荒谬且卑微的历史。</color>人们如蝼蚁般奔赴战场、贪婪掠杀，也如蝼蚁一般…遭到践踏。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>This history is sheer absurdity and inferiority.</color> People surged onto the battlefield like ants, plundering and slaying for their own greed, only to be trampled upon... like ants.

C: 在圣城的时间，我一直在向你学习：制定战略，领导众人，回应变数…但直到最近，我才看清了你真正令人诚服的特质。
E: Throughout my time in the holy city, I've gleaned valuable lessons from you — strategy, leadership, and adaptability to change... Yet, it's only recently that I've come to realize the truly remarkable quality you possess.

C: …为了翁法罗斯！
E: ...For Amphoreus!

C: 我…迷迷还得准备一下。
E: I... Mem still needs some time.

C: 指引世人者，灵魂必遭歧路分离，碎作千片化身，如琉璃掷地……
E: The one who guides the world shall see their soul shattered into a thousand fragments, akin to glass crashing upon the ground...

C: 老奥帝先生将这樽「圣杯」赠给了我，作为对参与圣杯战争的人的补偿。我希望将它摆放在晖长石号上，他本人也表示赞同，按照他的说法……
E: Old Oti gave me this "Holy Grail" as a token of gratitude for everyone who participated in the war. I wanted to display it on the Radiant Feldspar. He agreed wholeheartedly, saying...

C: 来，{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}，向观众们展示一下你手上的那个…这叫啥来着…文身？
E: Come on, {M#buddy}{F#girl}, show the audience that... uh... what's it called... tattoo... on your hand?

C: 你不是一直想创作一部惊世骇俗、留名青史的杰作吗——关于这点，你和芮克先生都有同样的追求。别浪费我为你们创造的条件……
E: You've always dreamed of creating a masterpiece that would shake the world and cement your name in history, haven't you? On that point, you and Mr. Reca share the same goal. Don't waste the opportunity I've created for you...

C: 把死人从坟里召唤出来彼此厮杀，然后赢家通吃？这鼻行兽养的比赛规则实在和我爱不到一个壶里去，典型的公司小可爱思维。
E: Summoning dead guys from their graves to duke it out, winner takes all? That sounds like something those IPC shirtbags would come up with. No heckin' way I vibe with that kinda setup.

C: 打雷了？
E: Was that thunder?

C: 看起来，和你的从者一样，他也来自另一个世界。
E: Looks like, just like your Servant, he's from another world.

C: 张嘴就把别人的真名报了出来…你到底有没有素质？
E: Did you just say my True Name out loud? Ever heard of tact?

C: 未知世界的餐馆…会吃到什么好吃的呢……
E: A restaurant in an unknown world... I wonder what kind of delicious surprises await...

C: 在我看来，慎重对待是上策。御主，你怎么看？
E: In my view, it's best to proceed with caution. Master, what do you think?

C: 音符小姐！你没事就好——
E: Miss Note! I'm glad you're okay—

C: 我曾经无数次想象，如果没有拔出这把剑，如果有比我更适合成为王的人选……
E: I've wondered countless times... had I not drawn this sword, or had there been someone more suited to be king...

C: 我打败过塔塔洛夫。
E: But I defeated Tatalov.

C: 看你的简历似乎没什么特长，我先给你安排点轻松的工作好了……
E: Well, your resume doesn't show any particular skills, so I'll start you off with some light tasks...

C: （好乱的桌子，是要我把这些全都整理干净吗？该从哪儿开始呢？）
E: (What a messy desk. Am I supposed to organize all this stuff? Where do I even start?)

C: 好精准的预判！
E: What clairvoyance!

C: 要我说，像你这样的年轻人，就该找个师傅学上一身本事，闯出自己的天地，像个英雄那样，无拘无束。
E: Young ones like you should really find a mentor, learn some skills, and carve your own path. Live like a true hero, no strings attached.

C: 这场闹剧就要结束了，但在那之前——我希望您能走出大剧院，亲眼看看那些艺者，无论曾有多少诋毁，在他们眼中，您是一位「英雄」。
E: This farce is nearing its end, but I hope you can step out of the Grand Theater before you disappear, and meet Penacony's artists. You are still a "hero" to them — No matter the slanders your name bears.

C: 三打二，优势在我。
E: Three against two. The advantage is mine.

C: 狠狠地揍他！
E: We should give him a good thrashing!

C: 你以英灵的身份被召唤。
E: You were summoned as a Heroic Spirit.

C: 即使现在的你还不够强大，我相信总有一天，你会成为照亮银河的星辰。
E: You may not be strong enough now, but I have faith that you'll eventually become a star that illuminates the entire cosmos.

C: 毕竟，愿望这种东西，如果说出来就不灵了。
E: You see, wishes lose their power once spoken aloud.

C: 静默三幕剧•其一
E: The Silent Stage: Act I

C: 小心，知更鸟小姐！
E: Miss Robin! Watch out!

C: 客观来讲，这是你在这部电影里看到的第一场少儿不宜的内容，你一度怀疑，知更鸟召唤的其实是Berserker。
E: Honestly, that might be the first R-rated scene in this whole movie. You start to wonder if Robin actually summoned a Berserker.

C: 正打算活动筋骨。
E: I was just about to do some stretches.

C: ♪请不要～因我们而～～感伤♪。
E: ♪ Please don't~ be sad because of us~ ♪

C: 呱呱呱呱呱呱呱呱呱呱呱。
E: *ribbit ribbit* *ribbit ribbit* *ribbit ribbit*

C: 游侠女士，就麻烦你护送这只…小鸟回去和Saber她们会合，我们尽量速战速决，找到剩余的知更鸟和我那不靠谱的御主。
E: Miss Ranger, we'll count on you to escort this... little bird back to Saber and the others. We'll wrap this up fast, find the rest of Miss Robin, and track down my unreliable Master.

C: 嘶，突然感觉身体一阵恶寒。
E: Tch, just felt an ominous chill run down my spine.

C: 各位，你们是不是忘了我还在这儿呢。
E: Everyone, aren't you forgetting something? I'm still here!

C: 方才对各位的敌意，都是为了欺骗敌人不得已而为之。我特地潜伏在奥帝身边，就是为了在这一刻，为真正配得上圣杯的您献上胜利！
E: My earlier hostility was just an act to fool our enemies. I infiltrated Oti's group specifically for this moment — to help you win the Holy Grail, the only one who truly deserves it!

C: 你是怎么做到的，朋友？
E: How did you do it, friend?

C: 既然如此，你能把老奥帝先生的计划告诉我们了吗？
E: Then, could you tell us Old Oti's plan?

C: 空有艺术的追求却没有与之相配的能力…这在影视行业并不少见。
E: Artistic ambition without the necessary skills to back it up... A common sight in the film industry.

C: 或许是我记错了，失礼了，请二位继续享受美梦吧。
E: My bad, I must be mistaken. Sorry about that. Sweet dreams to both of you, sirs.

C: 至少她没有受到我的牵连。
E: At least she was spared from the consequences of my actions.

C: 星期日将一些苜蓿币放在了气泡锂犬面前。
E: Sunday places some Alfalfa credits in front of Bubble Hound.

C: 嗷嗷——
E: Awoooo, awoooo!

C: 奥帝购物中心。不过那条路上也有猎犬，还是避开人流吧……
E: Oti Mall. There are Bloodhounds stationed along the way, though. It might be better to take a quieter route...

C: 咳咳，他的事先放一边，得赶紧让停云小姐恢复原状才行。
E: Ahem, let's leave this discussion for later. For now, we should be focusing on returning Miss Tingyun to her normal self.

C: 失礼了。万维克，请尽你所能吧。
E: Then kindly forgive our intrusion. Please do your best, Wonweek.

C: 疤痕？
E: My scars?

C: 「要么到这边来，重新回到世上，带着它们一起。这是二选一。」
E: "Or bring them with you when you return to the world here. These are your two choices."

C: 我会委托别人送你回去…这么说来，倒是有群可靠的朋友，和你颇有渊源。
E: I'll arrange for someone to send you home... which reminds me, you seem to have some dependable friends with close ties to you.

C: 你的身体…往后的日子会很辛苦吧？
E: Your body... It's going to be tough from now on, isn't it?

C: 物尽其用…是何意？
E: Take advantage of the situation? What do you mean?

C: 「愿你的天空永远星光灿烂。」
E: "May your sky be forever radiant."

C: 「那陌生的群星也会成为我们重逢的故乡。」
E: "Then those unfamiliar stars will one day be the place of our reunion."

C: 那两张字条，如果被人发现，会变成对她不利的证据。
E: Those two notes. If someone finds them, they can be used as evidence against her.

C: 经此一役，盛会之星的形势将由「同谐」、「存护」彼此制衡，共同监管，而在「开拓」的助力下，会有更多势力来到这里，匹诺康尼会逐步变为银河中的公共地带。
E: After all this, the Harmony and the Preservation will keep the situation on the Planet of Festivities in balance. With the momentum from the Trailblaze, more forces will arrive, and Penacony will become a public space in the Cosmos.

C: 而后如人般生，如人般死。
E: Then, be born as a human and die as one.

C: 我总算不是老幺了。
E: Finally, I'm no longer the newbie.

C: 谢谢各位包容，感激不尽。
E: Thank you all for your forgiveness.

C: 你放入了更多好看的垃圾，垃圾桶很高兴，向你默默致意，离开前，你莫名感到很有尊严。
E: You insert more Pleasant-Looking Trash. The trashcan is overjoyed and silently pays its respects to you. Before you leave, you suddenly feel a sense of dignity.

C: 那里前不久刚遭遇反物质军团袭击。根据公司说法，敌人已经被击退了，但江户星暂时关闭了通行权。没什么我们能做的事。
E: They suffered an ambush by the Antimatter Legion some time ago. According to the IPC, the enemy was repelled, but Edo Star placed their planet on temporary lockdown. I'm afraid there's nothing we can do there.

C: 我的看法也一样。虽说前路未卜，但另外两个站点也谈不上多么安全。既然都要冒险，不如大胆一点。
E: I feel the same. While we know nothing about Amphoreus, we know the other two worlds aren't exactly safe options. Anyway, if it's a risk we're taking, we might as well throw in some adventure for good measure.

C: 哇，怎么还演上煽情戏了…多大点事，别怕。
E: Haha, what's with the melodramatic turn... I'll be fine.

C: 这下力大砖飞了，冲啊！
E: Woohoo, a powerful engine to send cars blasting off in space!

C: 不可以！这是紧急情况下的备案，可不要觉得列车能随便当积木拆！
E: Oh, no you don't! Only in extenuating circumstances! Don't go thinking you can detach cars from the Express every which way, alright!

C: 咯咯咯…但是…我们本来不就…在天上吗？
E: Brrr... But... aren't we already... in the sky?

C: 欸嘿嘿…女士，要不您自己听？
E: Eheheh... Why don't you listen for yourself?

C: 谁在偷看我们？
E: Show yourself, peeping Tom!

C: …如果这是您的「神谕」，我没有不听从的道理。
E: If that is "divine will," then I have no reason to disobey.

C: 遐蝶小姐，不和我们一起吗？
E: Miss Castorice, why aren't you joining us?

C: 有些涣散。难道说……
E: Is somewhat unfocused. Could it be that...

C: 住口，万敌！你想让圣城毁于一旦吗？
E: Enough, Mydei. Are you trying to destroy the holy city?

C: 还有点不好意思。
E: This feels a little embarrassing.

C: 转述此前的对话。
E: (Summarize your earlier conversation.)

C: 这倒霉日子，又是被{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的喽啰入侵，又是被倒下的石柱挡在家门口…真是没法过了。
E: Nothing has been going right these days. First those minions of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} attack, and now this column collapses right outside our home... Can we really keep going?

C: 我已经摸清了你们的底细…
E: I now know all there is to know about you...

C: …我也不想再推敲他们给事物命名的规律了。
E: ...I'm not even going to bother guessing their logic for naming things.

C: 降临在翁法罗斯的「三相神谕」，还有黄金裔肩负的使命，你们应该已经听说了吧。对于我们，追逐预言就是旅途的目的，思忖太多并无意义。
E: You've probably now heard about the tripartite prophecy that descended upon Amphoreus and the mission of the Chrysos Heirs. For us, pursuing the prophecy is the purpose of our journey. Therefore, thinking too much about other things is unnecessary.

C: 阿格莱雅传达给我们的，更多是一种集体的使命。但你作为个人，白厄，又在其中扮演了什么角色？
E: What Aglaea conveyed to us was more of a collective mission. As an individual, what role do you play in all of this, Phainon?

C: 他遇到的人好像很难缠，还是先别打扰了。
E: He seems to be dealing with someone difficult right now. Let's leave him to it.

C: 走吧，再去别处看看。
E: Let's go and look elsewhere.

C: …真是神奇。
E: ...How intriguing.

C: 哇，新的玩具！
E: Wow, a new toy!

C: 怎么看都只是一尊雕像，该怎么和它交流？
E: No matter how I look at it, it just looks like any other statue. How do we even interact with it?

C: 它们的饲料很干净，是干燥的红土。边上就有一些。
E: Their feed is dry redsoil and it's very clean. There is some over there.

C: 原来「属于你的火种」是这个意思。
E: So, that's what you meant by "your Coreflame."

C: 同样地，我至今不知道神谕为何会选中自己，但我得感谢它…若非踏上这段旅程，我大概已经变成战场上的孤魂野鬼了吧？
E: To this day, I still don't know why the prophecy chose me, but I'm grateful for it... Without this journey, I might've already become a wandering soul on the battlefield.

C: 我一直坚信，黄金裔的旅途绝非寥寥数人的史诗，我们必须团结一切潜在的盟友——尤其是二位这样的英豪。
E: I've always believed that the journey of the Chrysos Heirs is not meant to be the saga of a select few, and that we must unite all potential allies, especially heroic figures like you.

C: 十二尊泰坦的图腾，犹如十二双居高临下的眼目，监视着这个由它们创造、支撑与毁灭的世界。
E: The totems of the Twelve Titans stand like twelve pairs of watchful, imperious eyes, overseeing the world they forged, nurtured, and ultimately brought to ruin.

C: 无所谓，算上又如何？
E: Doesn't matter to me even if you do.

C: 别担心，万敌很强，我也一样。
E: Don't worry. Mydei is strong, and so am I.

C: 风中传来低沉的呢喃。是悠久历史的回响，是神明的挽歌……
E: A faint murmur rides the wind — a whisper of ancient history, the elegy of God...

C: 王…储……
E: Crown... prince?

C: 迈德…漠斯……
E: M—Mydeimos...

C: 令人不快的话语，应该无需再传译了。
E: I don't think there's a need for me to convey any words that'll only irritate you further.

C: 原来如此。的确，弑神者却要寻求猎物的帮助，是多么伪善的一件事啊。
E: I see... God-slayers asking their prey for assistance is a hypocritical act indeed.

C: 对不起了，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}……
E: My apologies, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}...

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 交给你们吧。
E: I'll leave it to you.

C: 「观隅反三，君命无二，凭城借一」——
E: Three of a kind, two pair, ace...

C: 需要，记忆。帮助…我会。
E: Need, memories. Help... I can.

C: 我知道你不会错过，{NICKNAME}。
E: I knew you wouldn't miss this, {NICKNAME}.

C: 迷迷，有办法！
E: Mem, knows!

C: 这样，完成。记忆，收集。
E: There, done. Memory, collected.

C: （你的…「弱点」，会成为他人恶意的靶标。对芸芸广众而言，作恶总比行善代价更小…这是经验之谈。）
E: (Your vulnerabilities will make you a target for others' malice. For many, it's easier to do wrong than to do good — believe me, I know from experience.)

C: 那…您是为了{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的祭典而来？
E: So... you're here for {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s festival?

C: 真是哈托努斯打造的？
E: Are these really crafted by Chartonus?

C: 我…无法那么精确地控制力量，这么做风险太大。
E: I... can't control my strength with that much precision, the risk is too great.

C: 利用场上的工具解开谜题吧，两位阁下。
E: Let's make use of the tools here to solve the puzzle.

C: 我想…是的。
E: I think... you're right.

C: 「吾等，将神王的『勇气』封藏于剑皿之中。」
E: "We shall hereby seal the god-king's Courage within this sword vessel."

C: 再壮丽的死亡都不可能甜美……
E: But even the most magnificent of deaths can never be sweet...

C: 咳…咳咳……
E: *cough* *cough*

C: （破碎的泰坦之声）
E: (Titan's fragmented voice)

C: 人家不是狗！也不是宠物！是……
E: I'm not a dog! Or a pet! I am...

C: 「我们于此索求神性，以填补世界的裂缝——」
E: "We seek your divinity, to mend the rifts of the world—"

C: 「…你将在恐惧中抛却凡躯，然后自苦痛中重生为神。」
E: "...In fear, you shall abandon your mortal body, and in suffering, be reborn as a god."

C: 嗯…他的言语中还透露着犹疑。
E: Yes, there was hesitation in his words.

C: 他们还不知道？
E: They don't know yet?

C: 阿格莱雅大人，你和那刻夏老师的关系…也一直如此吗？
E: May I ask, Lady Aglaea, has your relationship with Professor Anaxa always been like this?

C: …「穿着华服的大地兽」。
E: ..."a dromas draped in finery"?

C: 没错。{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}选择了他。
E: He was indeed chosen by {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}.

C: 恰恰相反，论成神的资质，你是唯一能仰赖的人选。但正因如此，我更不想胁迫。
E: On the contrary, you are the only one who qualifies to attain divinity. Yet, for that very reason, I do not wish to pressure you.

C: 都走到这一步了，所有人都在期待你成为英雄呢！
E: We've come so far, and everyone is counting on you to be the hero!

C: 你也来找阿格莱雅？
E: You need Aglaea for something too?

C: 不。我们也许会被提及，但元老院的目标另有其人。
E: No. Although we might be mentioned, the Council of Elders has another target in mind.

C: 那时你遍体鳞伤，几道伤口还在不断往外渗血。我勉强把你扛了出来，用仅剩的一丝力气止住了血。但我也被坍塌的落石砸中，失去了意识。
E: You were severely injured back then, with several wounds still bleeding profusely. I struggled to carry you out and used the last of my strength to stem the bleeding. But then, I was also hit by a falling rock and lost my consciousness.

C: 阿格莱雅大人和白厄阁下正在浴池议事，他们也很担心。如果可以，请去报个平安吧。虽然我也不知道现状能否称作「平安」……
E: Lady Aglaea and Lord Phainon are currently discussing some matters in the baths. They're worried about you, too. If possible, please go there and let them know that you're well. Although I don't actually know whether your current situation can be described as "well"...

C: 潮水声…？
E: The sound of tides...?

C: 可我此番前来，不见主人殷勤献礼，反倒遭了质问。更荒唐的是，这位主人还磨好了屠刀，教侍从在暗处候着——
E: And yet, ever since I arrived, I have not been welcomed with warm courtesy or ceremonial gifts. Instead, I am met with intense scrutiny. Even more absurd, the host has sharpened their blade and instructed their servants to lie in wait in the shadows...

C: 相信您一定记得：这里站立过无数口若悬河的雄辩家，以煽惑人心的语言，奏凯而归；也站立过无数渎神的哲人，因拒绝为自己申辩，饮鸩赴死。
E: Surely you remember that countless eloquent orators have stood in this spot before and emerged victorious by stoking public sentiment with their words. And yet, there have also been innumerable blasphemous philosophers who set themselves up for failure because they refused to defend their actions.

C: 咦？格奈乌斯阁下，此行怎不见汝那伴身的爱枪了？
E: Oh? Why didn't you bring your favorite spear with you on this trip, Gnaeus?

C: 缇宝大人…？
E: Lady Tribbie...?

C: …谢谢你，缇宝大人。
E: ...Thank you, Lady Tribbie.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>轻轻触碰。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>A gentle touch.</color>

C: 这是最后一次机会：动手。
E: This is your last chance. Do it.

C: 不…我已经「死」了。
E: No no... I'm already "dead."

C: 当我以为自己的触碰，或许不会再带来悲伤……
E: When I thought that perhaps my touch would no longer bring sorrow...

C: 原来大地兽就是猫咪。
E: I see. So a dromas is a cat.

C: 哎呀灰子，我要给你的可不是人们几千年前买鱼用的破贝壳……
E: Oh, please! Dear Gray Mystery, I'm not giving you broken seashells people used in the markets millennia ago...

C: 你想说什么？
E: What are you trying to say?

C: （算了…时间不早了，出发吧。）
E: (Never mind... It's getting late. I'd better get going.)

C: 你知道该怎么做。
E: You know what to do.

C: 你怎么现在就以死者自居啦，别放弃呀！
E: Why are you identifying as a dead person now? Don't give up on yourself!

C: 当然，因为这是他们企图掌控逐火之旅的方式——
E: I see. So that is how they plan to control the Flame-Chase Journey...

C: 没想到在这里也能找到记忆的残像…大概和{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的符文有关吧？
E: I didn't think that we'd find vestiges of memory here... Maybe they've got something to do with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s rune?

C: 恕我冒昧，我只是个遥远彼邦来的倒霉学者，跌入冥河，作了亡魂……
E: Please excuse me. I am but a scholar from a distant land who had the misfortune of falling into the River of Souls and turned into a member of the dead...

C: 没错。如果我们能齐心战胜它…那你也再不必为不死的诅咒所扰了。
E: That's right. If we can work together and defeat them... You won't have to be troubled by the curse of immortality any longer.

C: …阁下请冷静。若是不慎跌进了冰冷的冥河…您恐怕就真的会溺亡于此。
E: ...Please calm down. If you were to fall into the icy cold River of Souls... I'm afraid that you really would die here.

C: 是啊……
E: That's right...

C: 求你…别向冥界…回头……
E: Please... don't... turn back... to... the nether realm...

C: 生老病死乃是自然颠扑不破的法则，它随「死亡」诞生一同写就。生者离世，其灵魂将觐见{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}，并由后者裁决将去往何处……
E: Aging is an unbreakable law of nature laid upon humankind, created at the same time as "Death." When the living die, their souls will meet {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}, who would determine where every soul goes...

C: 你不必再独自肩负「死亡」的权柄…毕竟，它本就应该由两只手共同举起。
E: You don't have to shoulder Death's authority on your own anymore... It was always meant to be held in two hands anyway.

C: 你已经…下定决心了？
E: You've... made up your mind?

C: 虽然大费周章走到这一步，但我对证明本来已不抱任何期望。毕竟，过去的皆已过去，要想证明我们是往日英雄的传承，无异于痴人说梦……
E: For all the pains I took to reach this point, I had already lost hope of ever obtaining definitive proof. After all, the past is in the past. Proving that we are the legacies of heroes of the past is a hopeless endeavor.

C: 但现在，我要让各位失望了。因为，我会对你们说：即便{RUBY_B#万敌}「纷争」之半神{RUBY_E#}已为我们挡下许多，但「它」就要来了。
E: Much as it pains me, I must disappoint you: While {RUBY_B#Mydei}the demigod of Strife{RUBY_E#} has done everything in his power to hold them back, "they" are still coming.

C: 呵，那敢情好。感谢您的肺腑之言。
E: Heh, very well. I thank you for your honesty.

C: 他在说…什么东西？
E: What is he talking about...?

C: 死刑！死刑！
E: Let him die! Let him die!

C: 欢迎来到西风尽头，我的冥界。
E: Welcome to my realm, where the west wind ends.

C: 我对阁下承诺过，会倾尽全力为它写下另一种诠释。现在，我既已成为半神，命运迎来结局——
E: I promised you that I would do everything in my power to give it another meaning. Now, as I stand as a demigod and destiny draws to a close...

C: 虽无法改写宿命，却还是为自己的叙事诗写下了最后一枚韵脚……
E: She might not have been able to change her fate, but she still wrote the final verse of her epic herself.

C: 它说……
E: They said...

C: 当然有。我就算真忘了自己是谁，也依旧聪明至极。
E: Of course there's a point. Even if I forget who I am, I'll still have my brilliant mind.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>世界的本质——灵魂——就像一粒粒微不可见的种子，记录着某人对世界本身的部分记忆。而「我们」正是种子绽出的芽，长成的参天大树。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The very essence of the world — our souls — are tiny invisible seeds that hold records of each person's memories of the world, and "we" are the buds that sprout from these seeds to grow into great trees.</color>

C: 正如种子会受环境影响，我们的面貌也将在诸多记忆里有所不同，但我们承载的那一部分将永恒不变，因为世界本身正是如此。
E: Just as seeds are affected by their environment, so too will our appearances differ across memories. But the partial memories we carry will always be the same, because that is just how the world is.

C: 哼，承让。
E: Hmph, that is true.

C: （快到了……）
E: (Almost there...)

C: …有件事我始终没有深究，黑天鹅小姐。
E: ...Miss Black Swan, there is one thing that I haven't looked into deeply until now.

C: 身份，我有过许多，未来还会拥有更多。但若您只是需要一个称呼，不妨用我惯常的化名吧——
E: I have many identities, and I'm going to have even more in the future. But if you just need a form of address, you can use my common alias...

C: 你怎么也念起来了……
E: ...Why are you chanting that too?

C: 翁法罗斯的泰坦神话…
E: Amphoreus' Titan mythology...

C: 可能…是因为我吧。黑潮对翁法罗斯的「光明」格外敏锐，也许是天空祭司的赐福吸引了它们。
E: The black tide is remarkably quick to detect the light of Amphoreus, so I... or rather, the blessings of the Sky Priest in me, might have unknowingly called them to me.

C: 我从未伤害过任何人…你出于愤怒降下的惩罚，与我这无辜之人太过严苛！
E: I've never harmed anyone... The punishment you deliver out of rage is far too harsh for someone innocent like me!

C: 嗯！索拉比斯、露奈比斯——
E: Yes! Solabis, Lunabis —

C: *我们*有些累了，想要小睡一会儿…希望在梦里，*我们*能和妈妈，还有姐妹们团聚呀……
E: We are so tired now. Maybe it's time for a little rest... and in our dreams, we will see Mama again, along with all our sisters...

C: 是岁月祭司的仪器，还残留着神力么？
E: A Time Priest's instrument. Does it still have any divine power left?

C: 唷！你来啦？恭候多时！
E: Oh! You made it? I've been waiting for you!

C: 不说话？还是懒得说话？又或者…你真的跟条蠢狗一样，连人话都听不明白？
E: What's wrong? Cat got your tongue? Or maybe you're just too dense to understand plain speech?

C: 结果到最后…我…还是……
E: In the end... I...

C: 数日之前，奥赫玛的「昏光庭院」……
E: A few days ago, in Okhema's "Twilight Courtyard"...

C: …但至少有一件事，我们可以达成共识。那是任谁也不能曲解的，关于你的真相——
E: ...At least there is one thing we can agree on. The truth that no one can distort —

C: 行啦，弄得紧张兮兮的。你我都合作过多少回了，哪次不是完美收官？
E: All right, all right, stop making a fuss. How many times have we collaborated, and when did it ever not end in a perfect outcome?
Hmm...

C: 有一点你没有说错，来古士阁下。的确，我们必须设法返回列车伙伴身边……
E: You weren't wrong about one thing, Lord Lygus. Indeed, we must try to return to our companions...

C: 这个问题，人家憋在肚子里好久了！你是在变得越来越强，但不安的种子，也在人家的小身体里发芽长大哦！
E: I've been holding this question in for a long time! You're getting stronger, but seeds of unrest are also growing in me!

C: 「无能」。
E: Incompetence.

C: 我早说了，如今你不但痴盲，而且昏聩。近些日子，你对奥赫玛的掌控变弱了。
E: Like I said, you're not only blind but deaf too. Lately, your control over Okhema has weakened.

C: 传说{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}曾祝福过这双靴子，令所有者能以神速疾行，且不会激起任何响动……
E: Legend has it that {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} blessed these boots, allowing anyone who wears them to move swiftly and silently...

C: 桀桀桀，你怎么急了呀？消消气，消消气…没想到天不怕地不怕的赛飞儿大姐头，居然会怕水呀！
E: Hehe, what's got you so worked up? Relax, relax... Who would've thought the fearless Lady Cipher was afraid of water!

C: 咳…也不知道泰坦发明它的时候是怎么想的，是吧？
E: Ahem... Seriously, what was the Titan thinking when they came up with this thing?

C: 疼、好疼！我这看不见的千年老腰啊，你干嘛——
E: Ow, my poor old back — what are you doing?

C: 我印象里，「诡计」的化身对逼人吐露真言的金线深恶痛绝。你绝对不可能替阿格莱雅辩护……
E: And as far as I know, the embodiment of "Trickery" despises that golden thread, which forces people to speak the truth. You'd never defend Aglaea...

C: 嚯，可不是嘛。
E: Ho, indeed it is.
Hehe...

C: 嗯…我们目睹了她最后的时刻。
E: Yes... we witnessed her final moments.

C: …没事，我还扛得住。
E: ...It's fine. I can handle it.

C: 自我们认识起，你就一直将我视作伙伴…我在你身上第一次体会到了什么是普通人间的友谊。
E: Ever since we first met, you've seen me as a friend... It was the first time I understood what everyday friendship was like.

C: …我又何尝不是呢。
E: ...I feel the same.

C: 我已向这世界续借了太多时光——现在，大限到了。
E: I've already borrowed too much time from this world... And now, the time is up.

C: …「美丽」，对吗？
E: ...It's "beauty," isn't it?

C: 我看某些人的表达欲如此旺盛…不妨由你先来，哀丽秘榭的白厄——提问：你的理想是什么？
E: Since some of you are so eager to speak, why don't we start with you, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae? What is your post-graduation aspiration?

C: 嘿…谢谢夸奖。
E: Heh... Thank you.

C: 哇，没想到你还这么有心…这里面装着什么呀？
E: Wow, didn't expect you to be so thoughtful... What's in it?

C: 赛飞儿发动翻飞之币的能力，瞬移离开了涡心……
E: Cipher uses the Coin of Whimsy's ability and teleports away from the Vortex...

C: 那位先祖的英魂和你说了什么，介意和我说说吗？
E: Do you mind sharing what your ancestor's spirit said to you?

C: …语气有些敷衍啊，伙计。
E: ...You sound a little insincere there, buddy.

C: 结束聆听，继续赶路。
E: Stop listening and move on.

C: 安歇吧，眷属。
E: Rest now, Titankin.

C: 「遮蔽烈阳吧，『天象画壁』！」
E: "Blot out the blazing sun, Celestial Mural!"

C: 小心——有威胁，而且不止一个！
E: Be careful! There are multiple threats!

C: 就像…在冥河边徘徊的魂灵……
E: Like ghosts lingering by the River of Souls...

C: ——还能以金焰创造黎明！
E: — With golden flames, I can forge a new dawn!

C: 啊…「救世主」阁下？
E: Ah... Lord "Deliverer"?

C: 假设从这里到最近的祭仪水盆有万步之遥…那我们要做的就是一路奔跑，然后企盼她会在还剩九千步时跟我们汇合。
E: If the nearest ritual basin is ten thousand paces away... then what we have to do is to run in that direction and hope she meets us after one thousand paces.

C: 走吧…该离开这里了。
E: Let's go... It's time to leave this place.

C: 这股能量很熟悉，近似风堇为人疗伤的明光术…只是更加强大。
E: This energy feels familiar, like the luminous arts that Hyacine uses to treat people... but it is much more powerful.

C: 人家也说不好…总之，感觉很不妙。
E: I'm not sure... In any case, none of this feels right.

C: …喂？小鬼？
E: ...Hey, brat?

C: 但是！凭着这一桩精妙的诡计，我们骗过了这世上所有的白痴、恶徒、灾难，实现了那亿分之一的可能……
E: But! With an exquisitely brilliant scheme, we fooled all the fools, villains, and disasters of this world, and achieved that one-in-a-hundred-million possibility...

C: 略去个中繁杂的推演，我向二位提出请求：为阻止「毁灭」的怒火席卷寰宇，恳请一位无名客能留在翁法罗斯，承担内应。
E: Putting aside the complex details of the inferences involved, I have a request to make, for one of you Nameless, to stay behind on Amphoreus, acting as an informant, in order to prevent the wrath of Destruction from ravaging the cosmos.

C: 最后的█ █两条█信息：
E: Two ███ final ███ messages

C: ——无妨。残酷的逐火已经让我抛弃了幻想，未来不可能是一片沐浴着西风的理想乡，静候着我们踏入其中……
E: It doesn't matter. This cruel Flame-Chase Journey has made me abandon my fantasies. The future is not a paradise with a gentle west wind, waiting for us to step in...

C: 那辉煌的灵魂已临到此地，行走过熙熙攘攘的黑夜；他携来黄金的火与血，胜利地步入白昼——
E: The radiant soul has arrived, having walked through the bustling nights, bearing the golden fire and blood, stepping with pride into daylight—

C: 此刻，它就在前方，等待着您……
E: Right now, it awaits you ahead...

C: 屋顶。
E: Let's try the roof.

C: 院子里到处都是落叶……
E: Leaves have taken over the courtyard...

C: 远处的海，一望无际啊。
E: The sea stretches out as far as the eye can see...

C: 可是，如果占卜的结果不尽如人意，那该怎么办？
E: But... What if we don't like what the cards tell us?

C: 要是能让我和那裁缝女的出身换一换，换我做高高在上的大小姐，她做穷人，做小偷，看她还能不能成为现在的样子！我嘛，说不定也会成为「赛金织」！
E: Just think, if I traded places with that seamstress! Me in the mansion, her on the streets! I'd like to see if she'd still become the "Goldweaver" then! Maybe I'd even take her place!

C: 愿它能与你同行，化作你的记忆…激起未来的涟漪。
E: May they journey with you, become your memories... and spark rippling waves of change in times to come.

C: 对不起，村长大人！哀丽秘榭陷入危机，身为她的孩子…我绝不能袖手旁观！
E: Forgive me, Chief! But Aedes Elysiae needs us... and as her child, I must act!

C: 为什么…为什么…？！
E: WHY... WHY IS THIS HAPPENING!?

C: 一如启程之日，耳畔那位伙伴的声音……
E: Those words his friend spoke long ago, when his journey began lingered...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>铭记过去，成为明天的英雄吧。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Remember the past, and become the hero of tomorrow.</color>

C: 还不够……
E: Not enough...

C: 它就像是…一面破碎的{RUBY_B#屏幕}石版{RUBY_E#}。
E: They're more like... a shattered {RUBY_B#screen}teleslate{RUBY_E#}.

C: …你害怕了吗？在了解到自己的本源后……
E: ...Are you afraid? After learning the truth of your origins...

C: 于是，岩层开始倒转，历史重新罗织。
E: And so, the layers of rock began to reverse, and history wove itself anew.

C: ——可惜，现在只有你有这个本事。
E: Too bad, now only you have the ability to do that.

C: 你走吧，赛法利娅。给我们一点私人时间。
E: Go, Cifera. Give us some time in private.

C: 这不是为她，而是为你。
E: This isn't for her, but for you.

C: 我会铭记在心…一如既往。
E: I'll keep that in mind... as always.

C: 也正因此，我才会选择在迢迢苦旅的尽头战胜试炼，接过「死亡」的权柄……
E: And it is precisely for this reason that I chose, at the end of this arduous journey, to overcome the trial and take the authority of "Death"...

C: 然后，他会杀死我，击碎这幅躯壳…<color=#dbc291ff>他会继承我的火焰和记忆，继续踏上征途。</color>
E: Then he'll kill me. Shatter this body... <color=#dbc291ff>take my flames, my memories, and carry on the path I started.</color>

C: 我唯一能做的，就是与天空融为一体，然后……
E: The only thing I can do... is become one with the sky itself. And then...

C: 无数的记忆…在涌向我。
E: Countless memories... are flooding in.

C: …看来，你已经准备好启程了。
E: ...Looks like you're ready.

C: 把世界交给我吧，白厄。
E: Leave the world to me, Phainon.

C: 众英灵啊，看吧！悬锋最后的祭典已经开场——
E: O martyrs, behold! The last Kremnos Festival has begun—

C: >>>管理员批注：第一次惨烈的失败。
E: >>> Admin Notes: The first devastating failure.

C: >>>附注：认为对象策略已与永劫回归#42几乎完全匹配，并注意到对象心智函数部分损毁，并有不可逆风险。
E: >>> Note: Subject strategy now nearly identical to Eternal Recurrence #42. Mind function degradation detected, with possible irreversible damage.

C: 不过，虽然有很多话想说，但现在不是回忆过去的时候，对吗？
E: There's so much I want to say, but unfortunately... this isn't the time to reminisce.

C: 向前「开拓」吧。就像从前那样，让我们创造一个值得被铭记的未来。
E: Let's "trailblaze" onward like before, and create a future that's worth being remembered.

C: 「渡河之后，将是人世间的悲剧；但不渡河，则是自身的沦亡。」
E: "After I cross this river, it will be a tragedy for mankind. But if I do not cross, then it will be the end of me."

C: 咦，这是…？
E: Huh? Is this...?

C: 如果有一天，翁法罗斯连这些都能抛弃…那，无论是普通人、黄金裔，还是泰坦诸神，恐怕都与野兽无异了吧。
E: If Amphoreus one day abandons this... then all of us, commoners, Chrysos Heirs, Titans, become no better than beasts.

C: 除却这些刻着繁复名号的鳞片，我只是凯撒身侧的一尾游鱼，一柄剑旗。
E: But beneath these shiny scales engraved with complicated titles? I am just a swordfish at the Imperator's side.

C: 但令人遗憾的是，戍卫在城外不远处的乱石堆中发现了他的遗体。
E: Unfortunately, guards found his corpse among the rocks not far from the city.

C: 现在，或许您愿意听取我的谏言了？
E: Now, perhaps you're willing to hear my counsel?

C: 请问，这位<color=#dbc291ff>「神礼官」</color>是？
E: May I ask, who is this <color=#dbc291ff>"Theoros"</color>?

C: 可以不必总是在凯撒视线下了。
E: Now we don't always have to be under the Imperator's watchful eye.

C: 都说了，那家伙的技术既陈旧又复杂，还不亚于天才。但说到底，又不是星神，会搞定的。
E: I've told you, his technology is both outdated and complicated, no less than genius. But ultimately, he's not an Aeon. We can handle him.

C: 屏住…呼吸……
E: Hold... your breath...

C: 我们还是早日逃去其他城邦吧？
E: We better flee to another city-state while we still can, huh?

C: …啊，你们好！欢迎来参加宴宴宴会！
E: ...Ah! Hello! W—Welcome to the b—b—ba—banquet!

C: 是担心我在蜜露中布了毒饵？那么，请让我自证清白。
E: Are you worried that I might have poisoned the Dew? Well then, let me prove my innocence.

C: 随我再走几步吧，神礼官。
E: Walk a little longer with me, Theoros.

C: 呃、呃呕…这蜜酿的劲…过得还真快。
E: Urk... This honey brew... sure wears off fast.

C: {NICKNAME}，小心……
E: {NICKNAME}, careful...

C: （隔离…指令？）
E: (Command... isolation?)

C: …你怎么啦？从刚才开始，一句话都不说。
E: ...Are you okay? You haven't said anything for a while.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆」浮黎</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>无漏主</color>{RUBY_E#}已经向你投来了瞥视，别想抵赖——那本「故事书」，就是最好的证明喔。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Fuli the Remembrance</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>The Master of Anāsrava</color>{RUBY_E#} has already glanced at you. Don't deny it. That "storybook" is the best evidence.</color>

C: 嘘，不用说出来。我知道，有许多疑问在你的记忆中打转，你很无助。暂且把它们放在一边吧。现在，你只需相信我。
E: Shh. There's no need to say anything. I know. You have so many questions swirling around in your memories at this moment, and you feel so helpless. Put them aside. For now, all you need to do... is trust me.

C: 「永恒圣城」…其永恒何以企及诗篇所述？
E: The "Eternal Holy City"... What part of that eternity ever lived up to its descriptions in poetry?

C: 我的母亲，不必忧心。我们都是海洋的孩子，会为您分担宿命。
E: Mother, worry not. We're all children of the sea. Let us bear your fate together.

C: 说吧，你有何种愿景？
E: Tell me. What is it you seek?

C: 在王的征程抵达尽头之前，她的生命与野心，就已被深海埋葬。
E: Before the sovereign's conquest reached its end, her life and ambition had already been swallowed by the deep sea.

C: 「大地之半神」荒笛，生于光历前约<unbreak>2000</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3961</unbreak>年。
E: Terravox, the Demigod of Earth. Born approx. <unbreak>2000</unbreak> years before the Light Calendar system. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3961</unbreak>.

C: 现在，你必须给俱乐部一个说法了。一个确切的答案，而不是用冗长的比喻掩盖真相……
E: You better have an explanation for the Society. We want an actual answer, not another prolonged metaphor to cover up the truth.

C: 你是诞生于翁法罗斯，却因{NICKNAME}的到来而苏醒，因{M#他}{F#她}行于「记忆」命途而成长的模因。
E: You are a memetic entity born in Amphoreus, yet you only awakened with {NICKNAME}'s arrival, and only matured as {F#s}he embarked on the Path of Remembrance.

C: 看不出来，这个世界的女皇竟如此年幼。
E: I did not expect the empress of this world to be so young.

C: 这个世界名叫匹诺康尼，是一座建立在梦土中的永恒之城。
E: This world is called Penacony, an Eternal City built upon a land of dreams.

C: 「那是一场幻想列车之旅。我有幸和凯撒在星空下进行了深入交流。而在那场对话的最后，我向她问了这样一个问题——」
E: "It was a journey on a fantastical train. I had the honor of having a heart-to-heart conversation with the Imperator under the stars, and I asked her this question at the end of that discussion..."

C: 「在鳞渊境开海前，{NICKNAME}说的最后一句话是什么」…很巧妙的问题，但答案却很简单。
E: "What was the last thing {NICKNAME} said to you before you parted the waters at the Scalegorge Waterscape?" ...A tricky question, but one with a simple answer.

C: 当你们将忆质用作与我抗衡的手段，何不设想这样一种可能性……
E: You used memoria to resist me, but did you not consider the possibility that...

C: 战争早已开始了，螺丝咕姆。四条命途会将银河推向终结，而「毁灭」只是其中之一。
E: The war has long begun, Screwllum. Four Paths will push the cosmos to its end, and the Destruction is only one of them.

C: 「难以想象，他们的车厢仍在真空中漂浮……」
E: "It's hard to believe that their Car is still floating in the vacuum of space..."

C: …不，这样不好。
E: ...No, that's not polite.

C: 三月…是她保护了我们么？
E: Was it... March protecting us?

C: 如果找不回{NICKNAME}和三月，姬子小姐……
E: Miss Himeko, if we can't get {NICKNAME} and March back...

C: 喂，别自顾自启动呀！这东西要怎么停下——
E: Hey! Don't just activate like that! How do I stop this thing—

C: 我明白。有任何异常，就往我身后靠。
E: I know. Duck behind me if anything happens, okay?

C: （还好没被「长夜月」拿走…试试看吧。）
E: (Thankfully Evernight didn't take that book... Let's try using it.)

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>格式化进程：<unbreak>0.015%</unbreak>……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Formatting progress: <unbreak>0.015%</unbreak>...</color>

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>正在访问：回归#33550337——</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Accessing: Recurrence #33550337—</color>

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>分支#3，已归档。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Branch #3, archived.</color>

C: 昔涟？
E: Cyrene?

C: 除了还算伶俐的口齿，你有什么能和我抗衡的武器？
E: What weapons do you have to stand against me besides your somewhat witty words?

C: 可别把人家看扁了呀？除了口才和魅力——
E: Don't underestimate me! Besides my charm and eloquence I can—

C: 不是还有手机吗？怕了吧，好玩到不行的「豹豹碰碰大作战」幽灵头号种子选手——豹子头•丹恒？
E: I still had my phone! Scared now, Dan Heng the "Seal Head"? The first seed competitor with the ghost seal in the super-duper fun "Seal Slammers"?

C: 这一世，翁法罗斯出现了一个巨大的变数。
E: That a massive variable has emerged in Amphoreus in this cycle.

C: 即便内在是一片「长夜」，我也不会害怕。
E: I won't be afraid, even if my inner world is nothing but an "evernight."

C: 明明…是我们先来的…呜呜…
E: But... we were here first... *sniff*...

C: （嗯？这是什么？）
E: (Hm? What's this?)

C: （不过泡个澡的功夫，哪冒出来这么多惊喜？）
E: (All I did was take a bath... How did so many surprises pop up?)
(What's this...)

C: 记得和{NICKNAME}初遇的时候，她们也出现在你的记忆里。
E: When I first met {NICKNAME}, I remember they were there in your memories too.

C: 我会守在这里，绝不打扰你。
E: I'll stay right here. I promise not to disturb you.

C: 既然「毁灭」已将忆潮彻底驱散，该深入其中了。
E: Now that the Destruction has quelled the memoria tide, it's time for me to go deeper into the Grove.

C: 对于新生的持明，前世只是一场幻戏。你明白这是「你」的记忆，但无法感同身受。
E: The previous life is just an immersia to a newly-born Vidyadhara. You know rationally that these are "your" memories, but it doesn't feel like you experienced them yourself.

C: 怎么就要举杯了？不等等丹枫吗？
E: We're already toasting? Why don't we wait for Dan Feng?

C: 「长夜」开出的价码并不高昂，只要我施行「大地」神权，为她遮蔽行迹。
E: "Evernight" did not ask for much in return. She only wished for me to use the divine authority of "Earth" to hide her tracks.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>荒笛…时至今日，为了「不朽」龙力，你愿意做出多少牺牲？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Terravox... After all this, how much are you willing to sacrifice for the power of the Permanence?</color>

C: 它告诉我，发起最后一次僭叛，将开垦荒土、守望大陆的重任交予天外的「开拓」……
E: It tells me to commit one final act of treason: Entrust this heavy task to the Trailblazers from beyond the sky. Let them tend to the wild terrain and safeguard the lands...

C: 何不伴那水中月，一饮而尽？
E: Why not join that Water-Mirrored Moon and be fully imbibed?

C: 这是「长夜月」的原话么…如果没理解错，她打算让你遗忘翁法罗斯，包括与我们同行至今的黄金裔。
E: Are those "Evernight's" exact words? If I'm not mistaken, she intends to make you forget Amphoreus, including the Chrysos Heirs who have journeyed with us up till now.

C: 另有一位功臣。
E: Is thanks to someone else.

C: 我会举杯等你凯旋，而后……
E: I'll raise a glass while I await your triumphant return, and then...

C: 「先出发的人…全都被淹没了…连一丝心识都没有留下……」
E: "Those who came here first... all drowned... Not even a trace of their consciousness was left behind..."

C: 随我来吧。我很荣幸，能为一位「不朽」的龙裔提供指引。
E: Come with me. I am honored to guide a Scion of Permanence.

C: 出神入化的枪术，十分精彩。
E: What splendid spearmanship. Truly remarkable.

C: 但这一世，面对我的呼唤，卡厄斯兰那从未回应。
E: But in this cycle, Khaslana never answered my calls.

C: 只不过我注意到，每当提及她时，你的思想总会泛起一阵涟漪。就好像……
E: But I noticed your thoughts would generate a curious ripple whenever you mentioned her. It's almost like...

C: 审讯卷宗已经上呈元帅。依照十王律令，镜流与罗刹，当继续押往「虚陵」。
E: The interrogation records have been submitted to the Marshal. According to the Ten Lords' Decree, Jingliu and Luocha shall continue to be detained in the Xuling.

C: 这是我的判断——要彻底击落一名大君，必须不计伤亡，不惜代价，只怕……
E: My assessment is this: To completely take down a Ravager, we must disregard casualties and spare no cost. My only fear is...

C: 难道，是「赞达尔」？
E: Could this be... "Zandar's" doing?

C: 不如来点好消息吧：这地方呀，乍看是座废墟，但是个人都能猜到，肯定没这么简单——
E: Let me share some good news with you. This place may look like a ruin at first glance, but anyone can tell... it's not that simple.

C: 如今，白厄不再孤身一人。
E: Phainon's not facing this alone anymore.

C: 走吧，速战速决。
E: Come on. Let's make it quick.

C: 启动仪式。
E: Begin the ritual.

C: 溶解「愿望」和「绝望」。
E: Dissolve the "wishes" and "despair."

C: 无数个夜晚，你别无选择。但现在，你的使命结束了。
E: For countless nights, you had no other choice. But now, your mission has come to an end.

C: 最后的逐火之旅，一如过往三千万次……
E: The final Flame-Chase Journey, just like the thirty million before it...

C: 「小小一簇毒株，竟能滋生出席卷寰宇的灾祸。」
E: "To think such a tiny pathogen could spawn a calamity that engulfs the entire universe."

C: 话虽如此，距离光历<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年，还有好久好久呢。
E: You say that, but it's gonna be ages till we reach Light Calendar <unbreak>4931</unbreak>.

C: 「哪怕银河尺度的危机，尘埃落定后，也只是一段旅程的回忆，漫长航线上的一点。」
E: "Even a cosmos-spanning crisis, once the dust has settled, is nothing more than a memory of the journey... A single point on our long road."

C: 怎么做？
E: How?

C: 然后，带领文明开创伟业。
E: Then, we lead civilization to glorious feats.

C: 长夜月，我将「记忆」织作群星——
E: In the Month of Evernight, I weave Remembrance into countless stars in the sky...

C: 喜欢啥，送你。
E: Take whatever you like.

C: 哎呀，你不会真的信了吧？放心吧，多洛斯人最讲礼数了，才不会做这种事情呢。
E: Oh my, don't tell me you actually believed that? Don't worry, Dolosians are the most well-mannered folks around. They'd never do anything like that!

C: 瞧，{NICKNAME}，把律法的皇女和纷争的王储塞在同一个房间就会是这样的结果。
E: See, {NICKNAME}? This is what happens when you put the Empress of Law and the Crown Prince of Strife in the same room.

C: 毕竟，一想到小灰的明天会多么温暖灿烂，*我们*就由衷地喜悦，也彻底松了口气呀。
E: After all, just thinking about how warm and bright Little Gray's tomorrow will be fills us with genuine joy and lets us breathe a sigh of relief.

C: 也许…和你们，还有大伙儿一起漫游银河，就是我现在最强烈的念想。当然，是所有人一起。
E: Maybe... roaming the cosmos with you all is my strongest desire right now. All of us together, of course.

C: 该回家了，{NICKNAME}。
E: Time to head home, {NICKNAME}.

C: 原来，这个名字背后不是人家的「过去」……
E: So that name... it was never my "past"...

C: 让它成为「记忆」的楔子，衔接起熟悉的岁月。
E: Let it become Remembrance's anchor, tying together the times we knew so well.

C: 哀…丽……
他们将会愤怒，将会在三千万次无可奈何中，一遍又一遍地缝补支离破碎的心。
E: They will rage. And in thirty million moments of helplessness, they will stitch their shattered hearts back together, again and again.

C: 悄悄地…迷！
E: Quiet... mem!

C: 宁可断尾求生，也要采取行动，这种心情我们再熟悉不过……
E: Choosing to act even if it'll cost him dearly... We know that feeling well.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>却被当成了另一个人。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>They were mistaken for someone else.</color>

C: 所以，为什么呢？答案是——
E: Why was I like that, then? That's because...

C: 「英雄之旅，走过漫漫长夜。哭着笑着，再度走向明天……」
E: "The Hero's Journey crosses through the long night, through tears and laughter, and once again heads towards tomorrow..."

C: >>>是否允许写入？
E: >>> Allow write access?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>格式化进程已完成。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Formatting complete.</color>

C: 看来，又要到分别的时候了呀。
E: Looks like it's time to say goodbye again.

C: 对啦！我来为你讲述「迷路迷境」的故事吧：哀丽秘榭的树林里，住着一群可爱的小朋友，它们的名字能连成一首歌谣——
E: Ah! Lemme tell you the story of the "Membrance Maze": A group of cute little friends live in Aedes Elysiae's forests. Their names can be connected into a song...

C: 桃子。奇怪……
E: Peach. Strange...

C: 「粉色的头发，还有这对耳朵，她生来就是『岁月』的祭司。」
E: "Pink hair and those ears... She was born to be the priest of 'Time'."

C: 学习
E: Learn

C: 也有些时候，它是深不见底的伤害，是浸染万物的「毁灭」。
E: And sometimes... It's a bottomless well of hurt, a Destruction that can stain the entire world.

C: 只有「哀怜」，最初抗拒分离的情感，能让「毁灭」停下脚步……
E: Only "lament," the first emotion that fought against the pain of separation, could stall the Destruction's steps...

C: 就像花开花落，我讲述，你聆听。
E: I'll read, and you'll listen, like how flowers always bloom then wither.

C: 我化身为诗歌中的小妖精，与{NICKNAME}相遇，却遗忘了一切。
E: I turned into a little fairy from the stories and met {NICKNAME}, yet I forgot everything.

C: 一颗迷路的「心」，当然要被放回「身体」里。
E: A lost "heart" needs to be placed back into its "body."

C: 就这样，一无所有的「心」踏上了回归「身」的旅途。
E: And thus, the empty "heart" began its journey to return to its "body."

C: 切勿质疑已死之人的决心。
E: You don't want to test the resolve of a dead man.

C: 但同为「智识」行者，如果你的灵光乍现，能为论证带来更多变量……
E: But should your sudden inspiration bring more variables to the proof, then as a fellow pathstrider of the Erudition...

C: 哈哈，没准她的忍法真不是开玩笑呢。
E: Haha, maybe her ninjutsu really is the real deal.

C: 连接「谒见系统」到权杖▀▄█启动硬件路线超频！▄█▀▄██▀▄████
E: Connecting Audience System to Scepter▀▄█Hardware overclocking activated!▄█▀▄██▀▄████

C: 缇里西庇俄丝
E: Tribios

C: 赛法利娅
E: Cifera

C: 好啦那我先整理账册啰，晚点交回科里。你也早点休息，不送~♪
E: Okay, I'll sort out the ledger for submission later. You should go get some rest.

C: 年轻人，就是性子急。唠嗑就讲究一个慢字，再说了，我哪句话不是重点？
E: Kids these days are always so impatient. The key to having good conversations is to let things sink in. Besides, which one of my words is not on point?

C: 显影看看？
E: Try the Autoradiograph?

C: 他啊…可是巴不得自己的废话能被更多人听见。
E: That guy... just wants more people to hear his nonsense.

C: 不要怀疑自己的眼睛，以上就是「卡利白」的珍贵秘方。
E: Do not doubt your eyes. Above is the precious secret recipe of Kapo-Kali.

C: （动手吧。）
E: (Let's do it.)

C: 随身物都没有逃过「巴卜昂乓嘭」的命运，只剩下一些毫无印象的垃圾。
E: None of my belongings escaped that "Babracadabra" mishap. All that was left was a bunch of unrecognizable garbage.

C: 哔嘟！检测到超镍零件，启动归位复机程序。
E: *BEEP* Ultra Nickel Parts detected. Initiating recovery procedure.

C: 请选择要察看的监控区域。
E: Please choose the surveillance area you want to review.

C: 不见奇物再收容小队，只有「军团」游荡的余孽。
E: The Curio Collection Squad is nowhere to be seen, only the wandering monsters of the Legion.

C: 不过我想，既然这道关于爱情和莱斯莉的难题是由时间出予他作答的……
E: But I think it is "time" who threw this question at him, about love and Lesley...

C: 多吃几顿好的，多睡几天大觉，把自己抛入研究工作的海洋，甚至找点不着调的缺德乐子…相信他早晚也能振作起来。
E: With a couple of good meals and a good rest, he'll throw himself back into his research, or even indulge himself in a random hobby... I'm sure he'll get over it sooner or later.

C: 怎么能说是差使…你愿意来帮忙，我们真的感激不尽。
E: This is not an "order" at all... If you are willing to help, we'd really appreciate it.

C: 最好快点…
E: Well, hurry up...

C: 当我还是一个籍籍无名的小科员时，第一批为建设「黑塔」耗尽心力的人曾告诉我，「这个宇宙并不友好，它是广阔而黑暗的。」
E: Back when I was an unknown researcher, I was told by the first group of people who worked on the construction of Herta Space Station, "This universe is never friendly. Rather, it is vast and dark."

C: 小队缉拿水魈也有一段时间了，却无功而返。我手底下还有一名叫做<color=#dbc291ff>亚伯拉罕</color>的成员失踪了…可谓屋漏偏逢连夜雨。
E: The squad has been searching for the Xenohydro for some time, but to no avail. A member of the squad named <color=#dbc291ff>Abraham</color> has even gone missing... It is true what they say — when it rains, it pours.

C: 好{F#丫头}{M#小子}！你去动动那边的配控装置，就能到我这边来…咳、咳咳。
E: Good {F#lass}{M#boy}! If you operate on the control device over there, you can come to me... Cough, cough.

C: {F#丫头}{M#小子}你动作还挺快，这边好东西不少，你自己找找啊。我有急事，先走了。
E: So, you've got some pretty quick moves. There are lots of nice things here. Help yourself. I got other things to attend to. Bye.

C: 相反，甚至有些…过于完美了。当然，这是你的福分，毕竟天赋异禀不是小概率事件，你的天赋分配，可能都点在了健康上。记忆力差了点，也在情理之中。
E: On the contrary, they're a little... too perfect. Of course, that's your gift. After all, having a talent is not an unusual occurrence, and your talent seems to be your physical health. So, in turn, it's only fair that you might have a poor memory.

C: 如果根本找不到这样的房间，那就把这一切当作是我的神经错乱和胡言乱语吧。
E: If you can't find this room at all, then maybe I am losing my mind.

C: 我这么说吧，所谓剧本只是我参考希拉的口吻，经过二次加工虚构创作而成。
E: Let me put it this way. I wrote that so-called script by imitating Sheila's speech. It is still fictional.

C: 请修正希拉的认知。
E: Please "fix" Sheila's cognition.

C: 直到有一天，「正义」不再成了一个纸上谈兵的词——「绝灭大君」降临在了女科员的故乡，她的母星即将毁于一旦——两人第一次对如何执行「正义」产生了分歧。
E: Until one day, justice was no longer just an ideal. A Lord Ravager came to the female researcher's hometown, and her home planet was about to be destroyed. For the first time ever, the two disagreed on how justice should be implemented in this scenario.

C: 然而「黑塔」在一切有涉星神的行动中都选择了中立，而负责通报这条冷酷无情的讯息的接线员，正是那名男科员。
E: However, the space station had chosen to remain neutral in all actions involving the Aeons, and the operator responsible for relaying this ruthless message was none other than the male researcher himself.

C: 劳驾您确认完成了之后，过来知会我一声，我得把终端机的安保系统重新加固一下。
E: Please let me know when you are done. I'll need to reinforce the terminal's security system.

C: 说得挺有道理的。
E: That makes sense.

C: 上周的记录也蛮怪的。
E: The entries for last week are pretty odd too.

C: 但是很抱歉。我已经用我的生命发起誓言：卡波特，绝不会将阿兰队长的秘密，告诉任何人！
E: Regrettably, I already swore on my life that I, Capote, would never tell anyone Captain Arlan's secret!

C: 别说是开除我。哪怕你今天用我的命来威胁我，我也会对你大声说「不」！
E: Why not threaten to KILL me while you're at it? I've said it once and I'll say it again — I will not yield!

C: 你胡说！修行可不止是瀑布那么简单！依我看，大哥他肯定是想了解更多的战斗技巧，所以去麻烦见多识广的三月七小姐了。
E: No way! Brother Arlan's trial wouldn't be as simple as just standing under a waterfall! I think he wants to learn fighting skills from Ms. March.

C: 说不定，穿着这双鞋，对他而言也是枷锁，也是痛苦呢？
E: Maybe even these shoes are painful shackles for him...
Huh...?

C: 你没有带给我任何的压力！
E: You didn't give me any pressure!

C: 你重复这句话好多次了，丹恒到底说了什么啊……
E: You keep saying that — what did Dan Heng even say...

C: …就这？
E: ...That's it?

C: 欸，你是防卫科的阿兰大人吧？偷偷告诉你们，「呜呜伯」行踪诡秘，成人闻之色变，唯恐避之不及。
E: Hey, aren't you that Captain Arlan from the Security Department? Let me tell you something in confidence. Wubbaboos are sneaky and mysterious. Even fully-grown humans are scared of them, which is why people will try their best to avoid any encounters.

C: 不愧是你，轻松解决怪物，还把呜呜伯要的东西都带回来了。
E: As expected of you, neither defeating the monster nor finding what Wubbaboos want seemed difficult to you.

C: 原来呜呜伯要我找的东西，属于这样一位科员。真难理解…毕竟我阿德勒是不会有研究失利这种烦恼的。
E: So, the belongings that the Wubbaboo wanted me to find belonged to such a researcher. How... unrelatable. After all, I, Adler, have never faced a dilemma such as unsuccessful research.

C: 不是你叫我来的吗？
E: Didn't you ask me to come?

C: 是个戴墨镜的女人？
E: Was it a lady in sunglasses?

C: 等下等下，我知道了！这应该是奇物的效果，这里原本有一段预设好的折叠空间，估计被入侵者发现并利用了。
E: Hold on, I got it! It might be an effect from a curio. There was a pre-established folded space here, and the intruders found it and took advantage of it.

C: 我是不理解这种想法啦，但现在看来…这些涂鸦可能也是对方故意留下的？为了让我们有迹可循？
E: I don't understand that way of thinking, but it seems like this graffiti... might have been left behind for us on purpose as a clue?

C: 比起对决，那更像一次试探。她进攻，我防守，不分胜负，双方都有所保留。她没能攻破差分机球的防御，我也未阻止她扬长而去。
E: It was more like a test than a duel. She would attack, and I would defend — neither of us gave it our all. She wasn't able to break through my defenses and I wasn't able to stop her from leaving.

C: 涂鸦就像是数据的双向通道。你们能以此回溯她留下的痕迹，她也能通过涂鸦的存在与消失监测你们的进度。
E: The graffiti is like a two-way data tunnel. You can use it to retrace the trail she leaves behind, and she can monitor your progress by seeing which pieces of graffiti have disappeared.

C: 离开？…为什么？不是要抓捕我吗，给我戴上镣铐，扔到遥远的流放之地？
E: Leave? But... why? Aren't you trying to catch me? Don't you want to cuff me and exile me on some distant planet?

C: 对于感情交融的有机生命，也许是季节流转下的一片落叶，对方身上那些被时间雕刻过的纹路。
E: To sentimental organic lifeforms, it could be the first falling leaf in the change of seasons, or the marks carved onto someone through the passage of time.

C: 而对于我，也许是字符编织过后依旧能够打动人心的图景，一种被你们称之为情感的伟大之物。
E: And for me, perhaps the image of symbols woven together — still able to move the heart... something great that you call emotions.

C: 好啦，别又哭又闹的，你已经不是小孩子了。
E: Alright, alright, stop with the tantrum. You're not a kid anymore.

C: 但空间站不一样，抬头低头都能见着艾丝妲站长。要是运气好，你还能被黑塔女士骂上几句——那可是天才俱乐部的会员诶！
E: But the space station is different — you can hardly escape the Lead Researcher Asta. If you're lucky, you can even get your ears chewed off by Madam Herta — she's a member of the Genius Society!

C: 这家伙…真相其实是这样的：他救我之前这么跟我说「请你先发誓，承认『纯美女神伊德莉拉美貌盖世无双。』」
E: That guy is unbelievable. Before he rescued me, he said something like: "You must pledge to acknowledge Idrila, the Beauty, as the most peerless beauty of all!"

C: 所以啥时候能下车啊…我就等着你们快点解决堵车了啊，银河英雄们。
E: So, when can I get off the Express? I need you guys to solve this traffic jam problem ASAP!

C: 嗯嗯…这里似乎没什么特殊的！
E: Hmm... nothing out of place here!

C: 你方才说，「蛰虫」在你眼中变成了{NICKNAME}提过，你却没亲自遇见过的「美」之事物。
E: You mentioned the Sting transformed into an object of beauty, something that {NICKNAME} once spoke of, but that you never personally encountered.

C: 你说我是怎么了？平常我都不做梦。梦里那个偷了银枝飞船的我，还对我自己说「快去找银枝」……
E: What's wrong with me? I never dream. After stealing Argenti's spaceship, I said to myself: "Go find Argenti."

C: 哈？！什、什么？！那么大的虫子，他打算自己一个人去对付？
E: Ha!? Wh—What!? He wants to fight that huge bug on his own?

C: 在宇宙的猩红长夜里，我的一生比赤子更为忠诚！
E: In the sanguine, eternal night of the universe, my existence professes a loyalty greater than the guileless!

C: 逻辑：可以向黑塔本人求证。
E: Affirmation: We can ask Herta herself.

C: 大家好不容易才从灾难中缓过神，我担心不安扩散，就封锁了消息，让防卫科秘密调查。
E: People were just starting to regain their footing after the catastrophe. I didn't want panic to spread, so I suppressed the reports and told the Security Department to investigate in secret.

C: 咦，你也在找他？好巧，我们也是。
E: Oh, really? What coincidence — we're looking for him too.

C: 好像也没毛病…但似乎又不太对。
E: She's not wrong... but that doesn't feel entirely right either.

C: （再从头回忆下吧，我可能漏掉了什么…对了，艾丝妲提到的另一个名字。）
E: (Let's go over it from the start, I may have overlooked something... Right — Asta mentioned another name.)

C: …这样啊，你也察觉到小姐的压力了么？
E: ...I see. Could you also tell that Lady Asta was feeling the pressure?

C: 别装了，请你闭嘴。
E: That's enough pretending. Please be quiet.

C: 那团火焰一定还在舱段某处。找到它，总有办法把她带回来。
E: That flame must still be somewhere inside the station. Find it, and we'll find a way to bring her back.

C: 我有洁癖，见不得笨蛋、傻瓜、白痴，看见了，就想死——可惜这空间站也和博识学会一样，并无天才，遍地凡庸。
E: I have a fastidious nature — I cannot stand fools, idiots, or imbeciles. Seeing them fills me with dread. Regrettably, this space station is just like the Intelligentsia Guild — devoid of geniuses and filled with mediocrity.

C: 阿兰带人赶到时，这些失踪者大多因过度惊吓而奄奄一息，但都没有生命危险。
E: Many of them were shaken by their experience when Arlan found them, but they are otherwise fine.

C: 冥火也是一种能量生命，会被显像仪捕捉到痕迹。跟上它。
E: The infernal fire is also a form of energy lifeform. The imaging device will pick up its trace. Follow it.

C: 我的确有了点灵感，便尝试在空间站进行生命培育。
E: A surge of creativity led me to explore the cultivation of life on the space station.

C: 阮•梅正克制自己的情绪
E: Ruan Mei is suppressing her emotions

C: 空间站的空气令人舒适。结论：知识在其中流淌。
E: The air in the space station has a pleasant quality. Affirmation: Knowledge flows within it.

C: #23阿茶在机械城中的最后岁月给予了我启发，如她那般长寿的生命也会走到尽头。
E: The final days that Genius Society member #23, Acha, spent in the Mechanical City showed me that even the longest of lives, such as hers, have a limit.

C: （你也在这儿？看来这里就是单向通道的另一头。）
E: (You're here too? Seems like this is the other end of that one-way path.)

C: （是楼上传来的声音！）
E: (That sound's coming from above!)

C: 判断：寻路需求，嘶嘶。
E: Assessment: Seeking directions. *buzz*

C: 我不理解…
E: I don't understand...

C: 这么好的社团还能解散？
E: How could such a great society disband?

C: 诶…我突然想起来，昨天有个叫塞琳的姑娘来发布了委托，说是希望有人去花店买束花给她。
E: Oh... Come to think of it, there was a girl named Celine who posted an assignment yesterday! She wanted someone to go to the florist and buy her a bouquet of flowers.

C: 这样啊，那您把诉求跟我说下，比如送什么样的人，我来给您出出点子。
E: I see. Why don't you tell me more about what you're looking for? Tell me who they're for and I'll come up with some suggestions.

C: 你的声音比我更适合音乐剧，形象和演技也很出色，完全可以走到舞台上，做一名真正的音乐剧演员。
E: Your voice is more suited to musicals than mine, and your appearance and acting skills are also remarkable. You could easily walk up to the stage and become a real musical performer.

C: 运送物资，帮助他人，让大家能够继续活下去…你现在做的事，某种意义上也是在继承他们的意志，他们是不会伤害你的。
E: Transporting goods, helping others, making sure others stay alive... The work you are doing now is also an extension of these Guards' will. They would never harm you.

C: 姬子点开了小机器人的程序，同步了最新的数据。
E: Himeko accesses the little robot's programs and synchronizes it to the latest data.

C: ——还真是冰天雪地呀。
E: Brrr. It really is one big snowball.

C: 根据坐标定位，目标就在前方不远处。
E: Based on the coordinates, the target should be up ahead.

C: 哎哟！
E: Yeowch!

C: 住口！你在说什么胡话——
E: Silence! What kind of nonsense are you—

C: 不过帕姆说离邀请函上的赴会时间还差挺久的，该做点什么消磨时间呢……
E: ...but Pom-Pom said the banquet we were invited to is still a little ways off. Hmm... what can I do to pass the time...?

C: 没办法，咱们主动上去问问吧？我印象里的公司员工态度都还挺好的。
E: There's only one way to find out — let's go ask. I've always found IPC staff easy to talk to.

C: 那就先从上层区开始吧，出发。
E: Let's start with the Overworld.

C: 不用了，你们去吧。我这边还有些善后工作要处理，被赶出去的矿民都还蒙在鼓里。
E: Go on without me, I still have stuff to take care of. The miners need to know what happened here.

C: 合同签订后的两年，黑云和雾霾消失了，人们开始摘下面罩；三年后，植被和树木重新开始生长、繁盛；五年后，许多一度绝迹的动物重新进入了人们的视野，活蹦乱跳。
E: Two years after signing the contract, the dark clouds and haze disappeared, and people began to take off their masks. After three years, vegetation and trees began to grow and thrive again. After five years, many animals — previously on the brink of extinction — reappeared.

C: 我有些话想传达给大守护者。掌握了这些额外的信息之后，你一定能做出更明智的决断。
E: There is some important information that I must pass on to you, Supreme Guardian. It is my hope that it will better equip you to make a wise and informed decision.

C: 什么也不做、不说，就这么眼睁睁地看着他们签下不平等的合约——那不是「无名客」的作风。
E: Standing idly by and watching them sign an unfair contract... goes against everything the Nameless are about.

C: 准备好了。
E: Ready.

C: 尽管几率很低，我仍然希望你们能够避免冲突局面。
E: While it is unlikely, I still encourage the avoidance of any potential conflicts.

C: 简直比上班还累…
E: It's even more exhausting than working in an office...

C: 时刻关切列车组成员的状态，本就是领航员的分内责任。
E: Well, you know, keeping an eye on the crew is just another part of a navigator's job.

C: 根据病历簿上的记录，有一些病人最近没来复诊，说实话我有些担心——虽然类似的情况时有发生，但从来没有像最近这么频繁。
E: According to my patient records, there are a few that haven't come for their follow-up visits. It happens from time to time, but never as regularly as this. I'm a bit concerned...

C: 嗯，我也有同感。
E: Mm, I agree.

C: 你…我在诊所里见过你，你不是那个帮娜塔莎跑腿的家伙吗？
E: You... I've seen you at the clinic. You run errands for Natasha, right?

C: …哎，现在的年轻人，可真难打发……
E: Hmph... Kids today don't give up easily.

C: 嗯？你又想说什么？我耳朵不太好使……
E: Mm? Did you want to say something else? My ears are terrible...

C: 能做出这种事…足以证明他们不是什么纯粹的「互助会」。
E: Any organization doing something like that is interested in more than just "mutual aid..."

C: 等会儿，你这身打扮…你是那个女医生的熟人吧？我之前去诊所的时候瞥见过你，肯定没错！
E: Wait a minute, your clothes... Are you friends with that doctor woman? I've seen you at the clinic before — I know it!

C: 看你的表情…我想你对那种所谓「特效药」的性质已经有判断了，对吗？
E: By the look on your face... I'm assuming you've come to understand the wonder medicine all too well.

C: 我回来了。
E: I'm back.

C: 上层区…哼，我都快忘了，你以前还是个上层区的大小姐呢。
E: The surface... Hmph, I almost forgot that you were an Overworld big shot.

C: 他将人体的畏寒性视作疾病，希望能研制出与之对抗的药物，让人类能在寒潮中生存。那样的话，人们就可以走出贝洛伯格，在雪原中重建家园。
E: He saw the human body's vulnerability to cold as a disease, and wanted to cure it so that humanity could survive the Eternal Freeze. If he succeeded, people would be able to leave Belobog and rebuild their homes in the Snow Plains.

C: 他的实验被揭发以后，我和奥列格商议了很久，讨论该如何给这件事善后。
E: When his experiments were exposed, I spent a long time with Oleg discussing how to handle the aftermath.

C: {NICKNAME}选手宣布继续进行比赛！{M#他}{F#她}接下来将要面对的会是谁呢？让我们掌声有请——
E: Contestant {NICKNAME} is ready to continue the match! Who will be {M#his}{F#her} next opponent? Put your hands together for...

C: 「行动」总比「空想」要好，如果不嫌弃的话，{NICKNAME}你就跟上来吧。
E: Actions are better than words. If you don't mind, {NICKNAME}, follow me.

C: 在页面最下方键入了一行未提交的本地小字：
E: At the bottom of the page, there is a line of unsubmitted words:

C: 怎么样？现在有感觉好些吗？
E: How's that? Are you feeling better now?

C: 终于抓到了你，贼喊捉贼的「异星水魈」。如果你不是，那倒是请你看看，站在那边的又是谁……
E: I've caught you, Xenohydro! If you are not Xenohydro, then who that is standing over there?

C: 早该猜到了…
E: I should have guessed...

C: 我能理解你的苦衷。
E: I can understand why you did it.

C: 写好这封信之后，我很长一段时间都找不到合适的人，来转交劝慰信。还好水魈从来只是小打小闹，回收它也不必急于一时。
E: After I wrote it, I couldn't find the right person to get it delivered. Fortunately, the Xenohydro is just a prankster, and there's no rush to retrieve it.

C: 好啦，既然我的初衷已经达成，我宣布，异星水魈案就此告一段落，这是{NICKNAME}来回帮忙的奖赏。
E: Well, now that my objective has been achieved, I announce the Xenohydro case is officially over. Here is your reward. Thanks for all your help.

C: 困住我的东西，总会不断地出现…它们不希望我走出去。是因为我犯了什么错吗？他说过，犯了错误就该道歉…可希莉儿该找谁道歉呢？
E: There's always something trapping me here... They don't want me to get out. Did I do something wrong? He said, "you should apologize if you do something wrong"... But who should I apologize to?

C: 又解开了一个谜题，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}的脑子真好用！
E: That's another puzzle solved, {F#ma'am}{M#sir} — you're so smart!

C: 别贫嘴了…
E: Stop wasting your breath...

C: 我想不是。如果是埋在下面的话，这里不应该写「把我挖开」吗？
E: I don't think so. If it's buried underneath, shouldn't it say "dig me up"?

C: 那我们就分头行动吧。各自的调查完成之后，我们就在大桥另一边会合。
E: So let's split up. After we finish our respective investigations, we shall meet on the other side of the bridge.

C: 现在想想，对于我们这一家来说，「送花」还真是件有仪式感的事呢。爸爸、妈妈、瓦赫、还有我…只要遇上了值得纪念的事情，我们总会靠送花来表达喜悦。
E: Now that I think about it, sending flowers is quite the tradition in my family. Mom, dad, Vache, and I... whenever something good happened, we sent each other flowers to celebrate.

C: 等待瓦丝卡为你挑选鲜花……
E: You wait for Vaska to get the flowers for you...

C: 而且上下层的封锁也不是你的错，女儿。你不用为此感到自责。
E: It's not your fault that they sealed off the passage between the surface and the underground. Don't be so harsh on yourself, daughter.

C: 救命…恩人？
E: Saved... your soldiers?

C: …「瓦赫——吾兄」。
E: "...Here lies Vache, my brother."

C: 走吧，约好的时间快到了。可不能让老人家等太久。
E: Let's go, my mom will be there soon. Best not to leave old folks waiting!

C: 已经这么严重了吗？到底有多少人参与了文物偷盗……
E: That bad, huh? How many exhibit thieves are there...?

C: 第一件事…我听说这个团伙办事非常张扬，甚至会把招募告示贴的满街都是。你们要是能找到他们的告示，说不定能从印在上面的信息里获取到些线索。
E: Firstly, the group in question has a very public presence — they post recruitment notices all over the street. If you can find a notice, you might be able to glean some clues from it.

C: 不正面回答的话，我就默认你答应了哦？
E: Well, you didn't say no, so I'll count that as a yes.

C: 这是……
E: Look...

C: 快夸她，史瓦罗！
E: Quick, Svarog, say something nice!

C: 而且「微缩胶片」里还存着跟你、三月小姐和丹恒先生相关的图像，策展方想借此机会，把星穹列车到访贝洛伯格的故事讲给所有人听。
E: Some of the images stored on that film are related to you, Miss March 7th, and Master Dan Heng. The curators of the museum wanted to take this opportunity to tell the story of the Astral Express' visit to Belobog.

C: 客房的房门纹丝不动，你感觉有一丝凉意略过自己的膝盖——要是在这冰冷的走廊里再多站一会儿，你自己恐怕就要变成{F#寒腿阿姨}{M#寒腿叔叔}了。
E: The door remains unperturbed, and you feel a chill breeze brush past your knees... If you stayed any longer in this freezing hallway, you would soon turn into a {F#Miss Cold Feet}{M#Mr. Cold Feet} yourself.

C: 呃…大概<unbreak>40</unbreak>多个？
E: Uhh... about <unbreak>40</unbreak>?

C: 便笺在这里——上面的内容我还没看过，您要不要亲自过目一下？
E: Here — I haven't read the content. Do you want to take a look?

C: 为此，佩拉小姐决定向贝洛伯格全体公众发出职位邀请。如果有人能够向我们推荐合适的人选，还可以获得豪华奖励！
E: That's why Miss Pela has been sending out invitations to the entire populace of Belobog. There's also a splendid reward for anyone who can recommend the right candidate to us!

C: 那么，面试就到这里了。接下来公布面试结果……
E: Let's call it a day then. I'll announce the result now...

C: 喔——听起来很有趣！是什么考验呀？这张纸是什么？
E: Wow — sounds awesome! What kind of test is it? What's this piece of paper for?

C: 我就知道你靠得住——那就麻烦你掌掌眼啦。
E: I know I can always count on you. I'll entrust my resume to you then!

C: …呵呵，真是太有趣了。
E: ...Hehe, how interesting.

C: 所以嘛，倒也不是我不乐意帮忙，只是我实在不适合这种工作。不好意思啊，让你白跑一趟了。
E: It's not that I'm not willing to help, but I'm not suitable for the role. I'm sorry for making this a fruitless trip for you.

C: 恭喜你，希儿！
E: Congrats, Seele!

C: 流浪者和矿队冲突也不是一天两天了…你能帮忙暂时调剂关系，大家已经很感激了。
E: The conflicts between the vagrants and the mining team have lasted for quite a long time... Even if you have just temporarily mitigated our rather tense relationship, it is greatly appreciated.

C: 呵呵，不管是为什么吧…我很感激。
E: Haha, whatever your motivation was... I appreciate your help.

C: 当然了，矿队才不会承认这种说法。嗐，你说这事闹的……
E: The mining team could not agree with that, of course. *sigh* I'm too old for this...

C: 要说有什么可惜的，就是我的矿脉探测器不见了…那可真是个好宝贝啊。
E: It's just a shame that I lost my vein detector... It was indeed a treasure.

C: 不过爱贪小便宜。
E: But a bit of a cheapskate.

C: 我觉得你很可疑。
E: I think you're suspicious.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>裁缝。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The tailor.</color>

C: 当然在！你和虎克小妹妹战斗时的英姿，我可是一秒都不想错过啊，嘿。
E: Of course! I wouldn't want to miss out on seeing you and Miss Hook's acts of heroism, would I?

C: 对不起，老爹，虎克什么也没做到……
E: I'm sorry, daddy. I didn't help one bit...

C: 只找一件，不行就拉倒。
E: Just one. Otherwise, forget it.

C: 三、三成？行…行吧。等会儿，我翻下有没有零钱……
E: <unbreak>30</unbreak>—<unbreak>30%</unbreak>? Alright... Wait, let me see if I've got any change...

C: 你也要亲自下场？
E: Do you have to go there in person?

C: 谢谢你替我担心，姐姐。但请你相信我作为军官的判断。
E: Thanks, Serval, but please trust my judgment on this.

C: （它刚才…是不是提到了姐弟两人的名字？）
E: (Did it just say "Gepard" and "Serval"?)

C: 不过，我已经不在乎了——从今以后，我和那个女人再无关系。
E: Anyway, it doesn't matter anymore... From here on out, I'm over that woman.

C: 多亏了寒潮啊…不然我们根本吃不到七百年前的生鱼片。
E: It's all thanks to the Eternal Freeze. We can eat raw fish from <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago!

C: 啊…是七百年前的生鱼片。
E: Ah... <unbreak>700</unbreak>-year-old raw fish.

C: 吃得好饱…现在，我们只要等极光出来就好了吧？
E: I'm so full... guess now we just wait for the light show.

C: 玲可，当心——有怪物靠近了！
E: *gasp* Careful, Lynx — there are monsters coming!

C: 不管怎么样…先专注于战斗吧。
E: Let's focus on the fight first.

C: 应该快要到极光出现的时间了……
E: It's about time for it to appear...

C: 「佩妮娅•谢尔盖耶夫娜」……
E: "Penya... Sergeyevna..."

C: 原来那个「陌生人」就是佩拉啊……
E: So, that "stranger" was Pela...

C: 没想到还有这种故事。
E: I never knew any of this...

C: …啊，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}也是为了这些物资而来的吗？
E: ...Uh, is that what you're here for too?

C: 史瓦罗先生没有伤害大家的意思，他只是相信自己的计算结果…他觉得和人们交涉的效率总是很低。
E: Mr. Svarog doesn't want to hurt people, but he always follows the calculations of his analysis. He thinks that interaction with humans is... inefficient.

C: 小钻机很珍贵吗？
E: Is the drill rig really that valuable?
