C: 唔，本来我想先荡会儿秋千再…那行吧，找人的活就交给你们这些大人吧！
E: ...A—Actually, I sorta wanna go play on the swings for a while... I'll leave the seeking to you guys!

C: 帕斯卡它…似乎曾经是铆钉镇的护卫机器人之一。
E: So Pascal used to be a robot guardian of Rivet Town...

C: 用于标识「情感」的模组不断受损…到了最后，它就变成了只知道不停收集零件的小机器人。
E: The module used to detect emotions was frequently damaged, eventually turning him into a small robot that did nothing but collect parts.

C: 你明明担心得坐立不安。
E: Oh please — you've barely sat still since they left.

C: 喂喂，当着这么多双眼睛撬门，你当流浪者跟机器人是瞎子啊？
E: Whoa, whoa! Pry it open? In front of all these vagrants and robots? They have eyes, you know.

C: 桑博，你知道答案吗？
E: Sampo, do you know the answer?

C: 右手？给，你想干嘛——哎哟喂，疼疼疼！
E: My right hand? Here you go. Why is this part of the— Hey, hey! Ow, ow, ow!

C: 别想那些没用的了，这家伙要进攻了！
E: Wishful thinking, it's about to attack!

C: 这家伙，好像脾气很差的样子……
E: Seems like this one's got a temper...

C: 对对对，多亏了你。
E: Yeah, yeah, thank you very much.

C: 协议…启动。开始…扫描…校验。
E: Protocol initiating... Scanning... Verifying.

C: 我理解你的心情，克拉拉。你也希望下层区的情况能有转机，但同时又不想让任何人受到伤害，对吗？
E: I know how you feel, Clara. You want new hope for the underground, but you don't want anyone to get hurt in the process, right?

C: 就算知道笼子外面的世界并没有多美好…人们也还是想把头探出去看看。
E: Even if the world outside the cage isn't beautiful... people still want to know what it's like.

C: 申请调用数据库资料，编号<unbreak>13175</unbreak>。加密级别：最高。
E: Requesting database materials cache. Serial number, <unbreak>13175</unbreak>. Encryption level: Highest.

C: 十多年的封锁下来，下层区已经元气大伤。既然「炉心」的封锁解除了，我们首先要补充急缺的资源，让大家先喘口气。
E: Ten years of being sealed away has sapped the Underworld's vitality. Now that the Furnace Core is no longer blocked off, we need to prioritize the people and replenish our resources.

C: …我只是想先在心里梳理清楚。这些历史的碎片，我曾经学到的那些知识…现在全在我脑子里乱成了一团。我…我不知道自己该相信什么。
E: ...I just want to be clear in myself, first. These fragments of history, the teachings I studied... It's all muddled together in my mind... I just... I don't know what I should believe.

C: …不，你应该很清楚自己该做什么。
E: ...No, you just have to be clear on what you should do.

C: 谢谢你，桑博。
E: Thank you, Sampo.

C: {NICKNAME}，又要麻烦你盯好这孩子了。不过我看你还挺乐在其中的，就不说多余的话了。
E: {NICKNAME}, I'm going to have to trouble you to keep an eye on this kid again. You seem to be doing a good job, so I'll leave it at that.

C: 哼，你以为能骗得了我？表面装得越友善，背后心机就越重！
E: Haha, you think you can fool me? The friendlier they are on the outside, the more devious they are on the inside!

C: 这个大叔，好像很容易生气的样子……
E: Seems like this guy's got a real bad temper...

C: 可我不想把「菌菌」卖给怪大叔……
E: But I don't wanna sell Junjun to such a weirdo...

C: 这不，我看今天的拍品里多了几样适合小朋友的玩意，但是却没见到歌蒂的人影…她不会是回磐岩镇了吧？要是错过拍卖就太可惜了……
E: I've noticed there are a few more children's items at the auction today, but I haven't seen Gertie anywhere... She hasn't returned to Boulder Town yet, has she? It would be a shame if she couldn't make it to the auction...

C: …然后呢？
E: ...And?

C: 五百冬城盾两次——镶有黑宝石的手工玩偶，五百冬城盾，还有要加价的买家吗？
E: <unbreak>500</unbreak> shield for the erebus teddy bear, going twice! Any other offers?

C: …休息时间？{NICKNAME}，地髓探针会不会出什么问题啦？
E: ...A break? {NICKNAME}, do you think there's something wrong with the Geomarrow Probe?

C: 我们去问问吧。
E: Let's go ask them.

C: 四百八十！
E: <unbreak>480</unbreak>!

C: 七百二十冬城盾一次！
E: <unbreak>720</unbreak> going once!

C: 娜塔莎姐姐——
E: Natasha!

C: 虎克还可以帮娜塔莎姐姐打扫诊所半个月。
E: ...Hook could also help Natasha clean the clinic for... half a month?

C: 当然不行啦！鼹鼠党的人全都得听漆黑的虎克大人号令！
E: Of course not! All members of The Moles must obey Pitch-Dark Hook the Great's commands!

C: 而、而且，我在黑暗中瞧见他的轮廓…那人的脑壳竟然是方形的！对，没错，特别方！
E: Also, I saw the outline of him in the dark... That fella's head was absolutely square! Yes, you heard me, square!

C: 它在…求饶？大概是这样吧…克拉拉也不明白。
E: Was it begging for mercy? I'm not sure what happened either.

C: 为您播放趣味小知识一则：托比其实并不简陋。
E: Allow me to share a fun fact: Toby is not a primitive robot.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}，小心，它失去控制了！
E: {NICKNAME}, watch out! It's out of control!

C: 克拉拉将帕斯卡的核心移入了新的机械外壳中……
E: Clara transferred Pascal's Core Module into the new Robot Shell...

C: 帕斯卡…它逃跑的方向，好像是铆钉镇那边？{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，我们快跟上！
E: Pascal... Did he run off towards Rivet Town? Let's follow him!

C: 该个体长期使用遭受裂界污染的元件修复自身，因此会被连接基地网络的自动机兵识别为裂界生物。替换元件即可解决这一问题，不必担心。
E: This robot has been repairing itself using Fragmentum-contaminated components for an extended period of time. Therefore, automatons connected to the base network recognize it as a Fragmentum creature. This is a minor issue that can be resolved by replacing components, do not worry.

C: 我觉得这是个好办法。
E: That sounds like an excellent plan to me.

C: …没错。
E: ...Correct.

C: 其实…我听不懂…
E: In all honesty, I don't understand...

C: 它没有恶意，不会伤害他人。
E: It has no malice and will not hurt anyone.

C: 克拉拉意外发现…只要我跟史瓦罗先生提到{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}的名字，基地里的小家伙们就会变得格外开心。
E: ...I discovered that whenever I mentioned your name to Mr. Svarog, these guys at the base would get really happy.

C: …不行，启动不了。看来终端的能源被人为切断了。
E: ...Darn, can't activate it. It seems like someone's severed the energy supply to the terminals.

C: 总觉得有一股奇怪的味道……
E: *sniff* What's that weird smell...

C: 杰帕德长官刚刚回到前线。要不…我再跟他确认一遍吧？
E: Captain Gepard just returned to the front line. I could... reconfirm with him?

C: 没有别的路…只能正面应战了。
E: There's no other way... We'll have to fight.

C: 哼，我可不想欠铁卫的人情！
E: Hmph, well I'm gonna make sure I don't owe the Guards any favors when this is done!

C: …早说过了，杰帕德！「壁垒」还没修好，不要逞强！
E: ...I told you, Gepard, the Barrier hasn't been fixed yet! Don't try and be a hero!

C: 但总不能丢下老弟和这群铁卫不管吧，我可是朗道家的女儿啊！交给你们了！我相信你们能做到，我在你们身上看到了希望！
E: But I can't abandon my brother and the other Guards — I'm a Landau! It's up to you now, I believe in you. You've given me new hope!

C: 需要搭把手吗？
E: Do you need a hand?

C: 我们在城里见过面…
E: We met in the city before...

C: 不过，既然你出现在这里了，那肯定和这次事件脱不了干系——坦白从宽、抗拒从严，老实交代吧！
E: However, since you are here... you must have something to do with this. Be honest and tell me the truth!

C: 你没受伤就好。这群人私通黑商的物证我已经找到了…你应该也有要找的东西吧，茉莉小姐？
E: Thank goodness you weren't hurt. Also, I've found hard evidence of all their illicit dealings with those shady merchants. I believe you were looking for something as well. Is that right, Miss Molly?

C: 这些箱子…我不知道它们和我有什么关联。但我没法把视线从它们身上移开…也读不出它们的意义。
E: These boxes... I don't know what connection they have with me, but I can't take my eyes off them... and I can't figure out what they mean.

C: 我打不破这个循环。我不知道该怎么努力……
E: I can't break this cycle. I don't know what to do...

C: 边缘通路受到的侵蚀跟这里比起来，完全是小巫见大巫。
E: Compared to this, the corrosion we saw in Backwater Pass pales into insignificance.

C: 而你之所以能听见，是因为你身体里的东西…和这个世界的「星核」产生了共鸣。
E: ...and the one in your body... is resonating with the Stellaron on this world.

C: 抱歉，希儿。这个秘密，还请你和我一同把守…直到我们生命的尽头。
E: I'm sorry, Seele. Please protect this secret with me... till the end of our lives.

C: 你还好吗？哪里不舒服…头昏？乏力？还是……
E: Are you alright? Are you hurt anywhere? Do you feel dizzy? Tired? Or...

C: 那就让别人来「存护」吧。
E: Then let others carry on the will of Preservation.

C: 场地不算好，设备也有些简陋…见谅啦。
E: Not the nicest spot for a show, and the equipment could be better... sorry about that.

C: 你…是斯捷潘先生派你来见我的吗？
E: You... Did Mr. Stefan send you to meet me?

C: 我来帮你…我想听听你的故事。
E: I'll help you... I want to hear your story.

C: （那个希莉儿，居然是曾经的大守护者…难以置信。）
E: (So Cyrille was actually a Supreme Guardian... how unbelievable.)

C: 那我去去就回。
E: I'll be on my way then.

C: 我是谁？我在哪？我在做什么？
E: Who am I? Where am I? What am I doing?

C: 等等，我还有些疑惑。
E: Wait, I have some questions.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>货运型的星槎</color>根据货运量区分，基本<color=#dbc291ff>只有红和绿两种颜色。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Freight starskiffs</color> are differentiated by the amount of cargo they carry, and are typically colored <color=#dbc291ff>either in red or green.</color>

C: 门前大桥下，游过一群槎。快来快来数一数，二四六七八。
E: 'Neath the bridge near the gate... starskiffs just passed straight. Come come, count them right... One two three four, eight in sight.

C: 嘶…呼——
E: Sss... Ouch...

C: 之后有机会的话，再将梅姐的笔记还给她吧……
E: You should return Mei's notes to her when there's a chance...

C: 不像是通用的部件…有可能涉及非法改造。
E: Doesn't look like the original engine... looks like it's been illegally modified.

C: 不，{NICKNAME}，我一点儿也不怕。
E: No, {NICKNAME}, I'm not afraid of that at all.

C: 我拍完照片了。
E: The pictures are all done.

C: 噢，我真为你那独属于灵长目人科人属的偏见而感到悲伤。
E: Oh, I feel true pity for this bias of yours that's exclusive to primates belonging to the family hominid and genus homo.

C: 听你这语气，还有很多诗人？
E: When you put it like that, it sounds like there are multiple poets?

C: 我根本不懂写诗，我只懂得悲伤。
E: I don't know how to write poetry. All I know is sadness.

C: 你刚拍完，这就删掉了？我不相信，你拿给我看看。
E: Already? I don't trust you. Let me take a look.

C: 小聪很好，与他的前世不同，在工造机巧上有着十足的天赋。
E: Cong is a great guy. Unlike his previous lifetime, he is very talented in the manufacturing of ingenia.

C: 我忽然充满了自信，我要立刻再去向她表白一次。
E: I'm bursting with confidence now. I have to confess to her again.

C: 只要钱到位，就算要做「宇宙无敌天才卜者」的匾也可以做。
E: As long as you can afford it, I can even make one that reads "The Unparalleled Diviner, Supreme of the Universe."

C: 我问心无愧、有什么要回避的？
E: I have nothing to feel guilty about, so why should I?

C: 尘…寰相…见，好礼相…送…
E: Acquaintance... from the... mortal coil, luxurious gifts... from beyond...

C: 啊，我收到狐仙小姐姐的回复了，她给我说黑塔空间站的一次性餐具组合很好用！
E: Oh! I've received the foxian beauty's reply. She said the disposable utensil set from Herta Space Station is very useful!

C: 总之辛苦你啦，{NICKNAME}，这点小小报酬请务必收下！
E: Thanks for your hard work, {NICKNAME}. Here's a very small token of my thanks!

C: …黛青小姐姐，为了你，我要变成文化学者。等我到了仙舟，我一定要亲手将礼物送到你的手上。
E: ...Ms. Daiqing, I will become a cultural researcher for you. When I arrive at the Xianzhou, I will definitely hand my gift over to you on my own.

C: 那么接下来，要做的可就简单了。麻烦{NICKNAME}联系地衡司调查取证、追回款项了。
E: So now, the easy part. {NICKNAME}, can you contact the Realm-Keeping Commission to file a report, launch an investigation, and retrieve the money?

C: 这就是我扮演成狐人女子的理由了，你在网络上肯定也见过不少。
E: This is exactly the reason I catfish as a foxian lady. You must have seen plenty online.

C: 是这样的吗…但既然你要求了，我试试吧。
E: Is that so...? Since you insisted, I'll give it a try.

C: 所以，我其实没有受伤，我只会喜欢真正的狐人，这种假狐人是骗不了我的。
E: I don't actually feel hurt. I only like real foxian people, fake foxians like him will never fool me.

C: 好啊，成交。
E: Very well then. It's a deal.

C: 哎，瞧你的眼神，当时似乎还不打算放过那家伙？
E: Judging by the expression on your face, I'd reckon you weren't planning on letting him go so soon?

C: 唉，而我呢，我是个庸碌的蠢材。我畏惧老师的结局，所以把前半生都浪费在那些更容易得到名声和利益的课题上，临老了才重拾初心，来到这儿。
E: As for me, I'm just a mediocre and untalented person. In fear of ending up the same way as my teacher, I've wasted most of my life on things that would quickly get me rich and famous. Now that I'm getting older, I have decided to stay true to myself and come here.

C: 留下这些记号做什么？
E: What's the purpose of leaving these markings?

C: {NICKNAME}，我打算循着这条线索，看看贝尼尼老师留下了什么。
E: {NICKNAME}, I'm going to follow this lead and see what Bernini has left behind.

C: 但我想你也一样胜任，不是吗？毕竟你都顺利带回了拓片。
E: I guess you can protect me too, no? After all, you have brought back the rubbings safely.

C: 年轻时我总是享受孤独的研究和冒险，觉得自己无所不能。现在连一本笔记丢了，都要请求一位好心的年轻人施舍仁慈。
E: When I was young, I enjoyed taking solo adventures and trips and felt like there was nothing I couldn't do. Now, I have to beg for the kindness of a youngster to retrieve my lost notebook.

C: （咦…这就是陶德口中的「标识」啊…这个图案有点意思，但怎么是不完整的？）
E: (Hm... Is this what Todd meant by marking? This drawing is interesting, but it isn't complete.)

C: 嘿嘿，一次草率的实验，一个必然的结果。
E: Hehe, I just was a little sloppy with my experiment. An inevitable result.

C: 本小姐只是治病救人嘛，再说你刚才也不在…你刚才到哪儿去啦？
E: I was only tending to the sick! Besides, you weren't even here just now... Where did you go?

C: 你们两个先别吵了，那边好像是丹鼎司的人！
E: You two, stop arguing! I think there's someone from the Alchemy Commission over there...

C: 白露和半夏两人躲进了房间里压低了声音，一般人很难发现她们。
E: Bailu and Banxia hid in the room and lowered their voices. They should be hard to discover.

C: 我也是来抓她的。
E: I'm here to catch her as well.

C: 白露大人！我们不是商量好了吗…这件事绝不能告诉外人。
E: Lady Bailu! You promised you wouldn't tell anyone about that!

C: 于是我想到了白露大人，凡人腠疾，龙女垂泪便足以医治。可是能让白露大人亲自问诊的病历已经排到三十年以后了。
E: That's when I thought of Lady Bailu — the Dragon Lady that can heal mortals through tears alone. But it would take <unbreak>30</unbreak> years for her to treat all those in need.

C: 仙舟上哪有这种陈规旧俗啊。
E: Hah, the Xianzhou did away with all that nonsense eras ago.

C: 可以走、可以走，小声点儿。只要价格到位，我都能送…啊不对，是我那位朋友都能送，各位放心好了。怎么样，现在就出发吗？
E: Yes, you can. but please keep it down! I can take you there if the price is right... Uh, I mean, my friend can take you there... so relax. How about it? Shall we set off?

C: 人终有一死，有的人含恨而终，有的人能够寻得自己的埋骨之地。
E: Everybody dies. Some people die harboring hatred, while others get to visit their own burial site.

C: 有点像持明族的蜕生…
E: Kind of like the Vidyadhara tradition of hatching rebirth...

C: 啊…真是个讽刺的结果，不是吗？
E: Ahh... Isn't it ironic? Don't you think?

C: 孩子以年龄不符的老成姿势托腮想了片刻。
E: The boy cups his chin in thought for a brief moment in a pose that is beyond his age.

C: 哎呀，我的监护人来了，咱们之间的秘密谈话今天就到这儿吧。
E: Oops, here comes my guardian. That's enough of our secret conversation for today, then.

C: 问题没有答案，小小的孩子不再言语。
E: The question went unanswered, and the child spoke no further.

C: 留给我的时间不多，就只剩下最后一味「药」了。
E: I don't have much time left, and I only have one solution left...

C: 也许已经遭遇了不测。
E: Maybe something bad happened to him...

C: 嗯哼！
E: Uh-huh!

C: 你们帮我看一下…是不是什么卡住了……
E: Can you help me check...? It feels like something's caught...

C: …我和半夏姐姐约定…我要帮她治好你。
E: I promised Banxia... that I'd heal you for her.

C: 现在，把，嘴，闭上——！
E: SHUT! YOUR! MOUTH!

C: 做回你的无名客，别再搅动龙尊传承这潭浑水。
E: Return to being a Nameless — stay out of the high elder succession.

C: 时候不早了，你不是打算去鳞渊境修复「建木」封印，顺道谒见那位龙尊吗？快些走吧。我也得老实养病了……
E: It's getting late. You are headed to repair the Arbor's seal at Scalegorge Waterscape, and visit the High Elder, no? Farewell, for now. I should start taking this business of rest and recuperation a little more seriously.

C: 这种奇妙的感觉……
E: This feeling...

C: 长老，看看四周，你已往生多时了。留在这里的不过是古海之水的幻影罢了。
E: Elder, look around you. You've long since reincarnated. What remains here are just the mirages of the waters of the ancient sea.

C: 对不起，对不起，下次不敢了！
E: Sorry, I'm sorry! I won't do it again!

C: …丹恒，你有这样的导师吗？
E: ...Dan Heng, did you have a teacher like that?

C: …别理会她了。
E: ...Don't listen to her.

C: 给我介绍下这「追猎行动」。
E: Tell me about this "Hunting Operation."

C: 直接说吧，我听不懂你的设定。
E: Just tell me your conclusion. I don't get what you're trying to say.

C: 很简单，有很多只次元扑满，我们去将它们全部抓捕。
E: It's very simple. There are multiple Warp Trotters, and we need to catch them all.

C: 不过您知道的，这些小生灵胆小怯懦，想要全部抓捕也并不容易……
E: But as you know, these little creatures are timid, so it's pretty challenging to catch them all...

C: （这是普洱的隐藏设定，他会在危急时刻变身成金人。）
E: (That's Pu'er's little secret — he transforms into an aurumaton in dire situations.)

C: 对，就是这个道理…不是！你说什么呢…总之，几位要是想查，我可以破例给您四方览镜的权限…然后…净砚，你去帮几位贵客查案。
E: Precise— No! What are you talking about... Anyway, if you do want to investigate, I can grant you access to the Foursquare Mirror... Jingyan, you'll be assisting our esteemed guests in their investigation.

C: 你们愿意相信我，我很欣慰。但主要问题还是，地衡司的几位，能否相信我这种妄想般的判断呢？
E: I'm glad you believe in me, truly. But the problem remains: Will the Realm-Keeping Commission trust a judgment based on this logic?

C: 呵呵，我可不是这种人。隐书说，长乐天那边有家小吃摊的优惠券要到期了，赶着去用掉…她走了没多久，现在可能刚吃完吧。
E: Hehe, I'm not that kind of person. Come on! Yinshu said she had a voucher for a food stall over in Exalting Sanctum — she wanted to use it before it expired... You know, she's not been gone long — probably finishing up her food right now.

C: 那天，他来到店里，翻了几本书之后，将一本书拿给我…那是一本纸书，很老派。
E: He came in, looked at a few titles, and then handed one to me... an old paperback.

C: 放心好啦，我们嘴巴可严了。但是下次还是不要这么做了哦。
E: Don't worry, we can keep a secret. Just make sure it doesn't happen again!

C: 正是如此。根据机巧鸟的记录，他在进入空地的一个时辰后，离开了那片空地。
E: Yes. According to the cycrane recordings, he left the area two hours after he entered.

C: 既然小三月兴致这么高，那就试试看吧。
E: Hehe, well, seeing as you're so confident, let's give your idea a try.

C: （我们要试着解释罗刹在两小时之中做了什么。可是围着这个地方绕上二十圈，也用不了两个小时。）
E: (We're trying to uncover what Luocha did during those two hours. But even if he repeated this route twenty times, it wouldn't have taken him that long.)

C: （那毕竟是以杨叔为原型塑造的角色。）
E: (Don't forget — he's modeled after you, Mr. Yang.)

C: （杨叔说得对…那看来这一招行不通啊……）
E: (*sigh* True. Looks like using force isn't the right way...)

C: 没办法啦，角色有限，下次吧。
E: Too many faces, too small a budget. Maybe next time.

C: 二位刚才说，被一个金发的化外民救了…此人可是这位罗刹？
E: Excuse me, gentlemen. Would this blonde-haired, life-saving outworlder bear any resemblance to our suspect, here?

C: 不愧是星穹列车上的开拓者啊，气度不凡！虽然比喻有些奇特……
E: You Astral Express trailblazers have outstanding manners, though your allegories are a little odd...

C: 为人父母是会让一个人变得顽固的。要改变岩石，恐怕还得水滴日复一日地耐心琢磨。
E: ...becoming a parent often means we become obstinate. To erode a rock, one must be patient and persistent, like water.

C: 哈，瓦尔特先生和我妈真是不一样。她总和我说：「一旦踏上天空就无法回头了，飞行士可是和死亡共舞的。」
E: Ha, tell that to my mom. Her number one life lesson is: "You can't turn back once you enter the sky. Pilots are always dancing with death."

C: 她的性子像烈火，像停不下来的风。要说谁能稍稍让她安静片刻…只有那位战友了。
E: She was a flaming wind. The only one who could ever calm her... was her comrade.

C: 晴霓小姐，这是令堂的私人日记，我想我们不该看的。
E: Miss Qingni, I don't think the two of us should be reading your mother's diary.

C: 多少人想在天舶司混一份清闲的文职？你答应过我，会有始有终做好它。现在你不仅违背了天舶司的规制，还违背了我们母女的约定。
E: Do you know how many people dream of a relaxing desk job at the Sky-Faring Commission? You promised me to work responsibly in your post. Not only have you broken the Sky-Faring Commission's regulations, you've broken your promise to me.

C: 可他们都不知道，我是偷着去考的，因为如果被您知道了，您绝不会允许！
E: But no one even knew I had to take the test behind your back. You would never have allowed me to go if I told you about it!

C: （这是…刃的通缉令？仙舟还在缉拿刃吗？）
E: (This is... Blade's wanted poster? Is Xianzhou still hunting down Blade?)

C: 但如果你认为自己有权选择…如果你坚持要这么做，而且确实发自你的本心。那么，也许我会很高兴呢…我希望你能够凌驾于命运之上，这样的话，或许有一天，「你会改变我」。
E: But if you think you have the right to choose... if you insist on this and it comes from your heart... then maybe I'll be happy with the outcome. I hope you can rise above destiny, so that maybe one day, "you will change me."

C: 刃以前是什么人？
E: Who is Blade?

C: （卡芙卡…她将我送进星穹列车。关于她的一切都笼罩在迷雾里，我想知道更多她的事情……）
E: (Kafka... She's the one who put me on the Astral Express. Everything about her is shrouded in mystery and I want to know more...)

C: 是。
E: Yes.

C: （欺骗云骑。）
E: (Lie to the Cloud Knights.)

C: 情况不容乐观，请尽快随我们返回天舶司吧。
E: The situation is serious. Allow us to escort you back to the Sky-Faring Commission, immediately.

C: 你早说啊，名字我都报出去了。
E: Next time, why not remind me before I give up my name?

C: ……你受伤了。
E: ...You're hurt.

C: 没事就好。我是云骑素裳，刚从「曜青」仙舟调来这儿的！
E: Good. I'm Sushang of the Cloud Knights — I was just transferred here from the Yaoqing!

C: 说是没错，但去哪都要被误会一次，就很生气。
E: True... But we came here to trailblaze, not jailblaze.

C: 和离开时一样，几无变化……
E: Virtually nothing has changed since I left...

C: 你以为自己的身份是观光客么？
E: Have you mistaken yourself for a tourist?

C: 我知道…你不期待我的回答……
E: I know that you have no interest in my answer.

C: 他说过。但你依然欠我这一剑。
E: He did... but you still owe me the attempt.

C: 「美少女和可爱小狗之间的心灵感应」…啊，那不就是三月七说的吗？
E: "The psychic bond between cute girls and cute puppies" ...Hey, isn't that what March 7th said?

C: 我从没说过眼睛看不见。是你见我黑纱遮眼，想当然罢了。
E: I never claimed to be. You came up with that yourself.

C: 唔，文笔奇烂，节奏还拖沓…不对，我在干什么啊？
E: Eh, bad writing, terrible pacing... Wait, what was I supposed to be doing again?

C: 多吗？以前的规矩可是五万遍，我当年就抄了五万遍。现在是魁首大人疼惜苍生疾苦，才特地改成了五百遍。
E: Excessive? The old rules dictated that the text be copied <unbreak>50,000</unbreak> times — I myself undertook such a feat. Nowadays, the master takes greater pity on the common people, hence the number has been reduced to a mere <unbreak>500</unbreak>.

C: 你穿成这样那必然会被怀疑啊…
E: Of course, they're bound to have their doubts when you're dressed like that...

C: 好啊！药王秘传就喜欢你这种有干劲的新鲜血液！来吧，让我们看看你的本事吧！
E: Excellent! The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus loves enthusiastic new blood! Well then, show us what you're made of!

C: 你和我决斗，然后我会败给你，假装自己已经被你干掉了。你假托帮他们处理尸体，把我带离现场……
E: You and I fight, and I lose to you — I pretend that you finished me off. Then, you pretend to help them remove my body by dragging me out of here...

C: 这不是{NICKNAME}吗？没想到会在长乐天见面。
E: Is that the general's honored guest? I didn't expect to see you around Exalting Sanctum.

C: 至于你所获得的这张药方…这就在我的知识盲区之内了。
E: The prescription you acquired is... beyond my knowledge.

C: 向丹士说明了情况。
E: You explain what's transpired to the alchemist.

C: 有劳你了。
E: Thank you.

C: 嗯…真是一个险怪的药方。这方子的药理在下大概懂了，是要汲取龙裔之力，使自己获得…扬升。
E: Hmm... A strange and dangerous prescription, but I believe I understand the pharmacology... It involves drawing upon the strength of Long's Scions to attain the power of... ascension.

C: 公输师傅欸！怎么你就想不开留在里面了？
E: Master Gongshu! How could you stay inside?

C: 通缉令上的，应该就是星核猎手了。雪衣小姐，莫非…
E: This man on the wanted list... he's a Stellaron Hunter, right? Is that...?

C: 我是说——那，个，符，玄。这几个字你哪个没听懂。
E: I said "THAT" Fu Xuan. Is that so difficult to understand?

C: 做你认为对的事就好帕！
E: Just do what you think is right!

C: 这些应该够了…
E: That should be enough...

C: 只有这些吗？三月小姐能不能拿出失去记忆之前就拥有的东西。
E: Is that it? Miss March, are you not able to provide possessions from before you lost your memory?

C: （再等等）
E: (Wait)

C: 怎么回事…怎么又回到起点了？
E: What's going on... How come we're back at the start?

C: 你在我身后装摄像头了吗？
E: Have you been secretly filming me?

C: 英雄之剑物归原主，可喜可贺，可喜可贺！
E: This sword of heroes will finally be returned to its rightful owners! I couldn't be happier.

C: 难怪将军不想让她看到那剑…
E: That's why you didn't want her to see that sword...

C: 没想到，{RUBY_B#孤云}「米卡•奇瓦沙」{RUBY_E#}竟然被盗走了…嫌疑人竟还是怀炎将军的孙女？
E: Who could have thought that the {RUBY_B#Guyun}Miekka Kivessä{RUBY_E#} would be stolen... and that the prime suspect is General Huaiyan's granddaughter?

C: 那是…什么东西？哎，不管你说的究竟是什么……
E: What is... helio... what? Never mind...

C: 不了吧，我有球棒…
E: Maybe not, I have my baseball bat...

C: 「——亲爱的，你是不是暗恋我呀？好呀，既然你对我这么感兴趣，咱们就玩个游戏吧。」
E: "...My dear, do you have a crush on me? Well then, seeing as you're so interested in me, let's play a little game."

C: 有发现什么线索吗？
E: Any leads yet?

C: 再讲一遍。
E: Yes please.

C: 不必了，我记得住。
E: That won't be necessary. I remember it all.

C: …什么味道啊这是——地上怎么有条烟熏鱼？！
E: ...What's that smell? Why is there a smoked red herring there?

C: 卟卟——回答错误！你不会以为标新立异就能蒙对吧？
E: Wamp wah — wrong answer. That's funky, but a wild guess.

C: 这…这你可不能乱说啊！
E: This... Don't jump to conclusions!

C: ——「花火大人的尸体」。
E: ...Miss Sparkle's body.

C: 那姑娘说它们一直保持沉默，但如果对你有反应，就代表它们真是花火布置的谜题了。
E: That girl said they're always silent, but if they gave you a reaction, it means they're actually one of Sparkle's puzzles.

C: 所以，你究竟为什么对花火的挑战这么上心？还是说…你关心的是她这个人？
E: So, why are you so focused on Sparkle's challenge? Or should I ask... are you more focused on Sparkle herself?

C: 这样应该就行了吧。
E: That should do it.

C: 你们准备好了吧？
E: Are you ready?

C: 各位身为过客，对仙舟的历史了解不多，问出这样的问题也不奇怪。我来给各位讲个故事。
E: As outsiders, you are unfamiliar with the history of the Xianzhou. I cannot blame you for asking a question like this. Let me tell you a story.

C: 断折数千年，原本死灭枯萎的「{RUBY_B#丰饶遗物}建木{RUBY_E#}」重生了，仙舟前途难卜。
E: The {RUBY_B#Relic of the Abundance}Ambrosial Arbor{RUBY_E#} was felled thousands of years ago... now it returns to life. The future of Xianzhou is difficult to divine.

C: 恩公这是要启程了吗？小女子拾掇拾掇，这就一起走。
E: Y—You want to leave straight away? Let me pack some things. I'll be right there.

C: 小心，那东西正在变化……
E: Be careful, that thing is changing its form...

C: 虽说这螟蝗祸祖早已身陨，可祂孕育出来的那些蠹虫可一直都在宇宙中作乱呢……
E: Even though the Swarm Author has long fallen, THEIR begotten vermin has continued to wreak havoc among the stars...

C: 没事了，没事了喔~小鱼。
E: It's alright, everything's okay now, Xiaoyu...

C: 丰饶民中凶残著称的步离人，曜青的狐人体内便流着和他们近似的血脉……但他们不是「孽物」而是「仙舟人」。
E: Borisin, known for their ferocity among the Denizens of Abundance, are similar to the foxians of the Yaoqing genetically... But the foxians are not abominations — they're Xianzhou people.

C: 你在三余书肆看了一本联盟最近流行的小说，时间很快就过去了。
E: You pick up a book that has recently gotten popular across the Alliance. Time passes quickly.

C: 我体内寄宿着星核。
E: I host a Stellaron inside me.

C: 依我说，整个「放生帮」应该去放生那些充满力量的野兽，让他们脱离人类的掌控！不要猎鹰和斗犬，要让它们在自然中展现生命力！
E: If you ask me, I think everyone from the Unshackled should endeavor to free powerful beasts from human captivity! No more hunting falcons or fighting dogs! Let them unleash their vitality in nature!

C: 什么事，{NICKNAME}？
E: What's the matter, {NICKNAME}?

C: 情况比我想象中好一些……这些机兵的技术很古旧，抱歉，希露瓦小姐，我的意思是，古典。
E: Things are slightly better than I thought... The technology used in these automatons is archaic... Oh, sorry Miss Serval, I mean to say that it is vintage.

C: 不过既然{NICKNAME}已经饱以老拳，让它见识到厉害了，那么修好…不，治好它的工作就交给我吧。
E: Since {NICKNAME} has shown those automatons who's the boss here with their fist, I shall take on the duty of fixing... no, curing them.

C: 我就该被暴打一顿吗？
E: Do I deserve to be beaten up?

C: 你疑惑地返回长乐天，消磨了几个小时。
E: Feeling dubious, you return to the Exalting Sanctum and idle away for several hours.

C: 我一定不辱使命。
E: I won't let you down.

C: 别激动，别激动，等你养好病，我们再来陪你放生猛兽啊！
E: Take it easy. When you've recovered, we'll come and release beasts with you together!

C: 哎呀哎呀哎呀，行善积德，没想到反有恶报，真是可怜嗷~
E: Alas, no good deed goes unpunished. Poor things!

C: 退下吧，幽府武弁。此二人并无恶意。
E: At ease, Wraith Warden. These two are not your enemies.

C: …这里好像不是正确的地方，我们选错铜镜了。
E: ...This isn't the right place. We picked the wrong bronze mirror.

C: 要想一点点削弱它，吾等累死了也没有胜算。
E: We'd die from exhaustion before we manage to weaken it.

C: 信不信两说，但你的短信…
E: My beliefs aside, your messages...

C: 简单说说？
E: Could you make it quick?

C: 嗯，眼下确实也不适合长篇大论。放心，我用一句话将来龙去脉给你整明白。
E: Sure, I guess now's not really a good time for stories... Don't worry — I can sum it up in a single sentence.

C: 有道理，狂性大发，失去行为责任能力…还是你懂的多。
E: Makes sense. We went crazy and couldn't control ourselves... I like the way you think.

C: 哇噢，确实。没有目击证人就是没有喽。咱们快走吧。
E: Whoa! Nice! There were no witnesses, so this never happened, alright?

C: 看来还是得让尾巴大爷出来一趟…尾、尾巴大爷？
E: Maybe we should let Mr. Tail out for a bit... M—Mr. Tail?

C: 两位别怕，它只是说说的，尾巴大爷它吃素呢。
E: Please don't be afraid, he's only kidding. Mr. Tail is a vegetarian.

C: 真是顽固的家伙，没有我你压根没法离开这儿。何况我也不是在征询你的意见。
E: What a stubborn fool — you won't ever get out of here without my help. Anyway, I'm not here to ask your opinion.

C: …等等，不要无视我呀！
E: ...Wait! Please don't leave me!

C: 呜呜……
E: *sob*

C: 我很好奇，附身还没有解除吗？
E: Say, are you still possessing me?

C: 呜呜，后来…后来进了十王司，大家都怪怪的，我以为自己找到了归宿。但十王司的工作…实在太危险了！成天要和各式各样的妖孽鬼怪、不赦恶徒战斗……
E: Th—Then I got into the Ten-Lords Commission. Everyone there is weird, so I thought I'd found somewhere I belonged. But the job... the job is too dangerous! I have to fight demons and ghosts and bad guys every day...

C: 真的是五五开吗？
E: Evenly matched... Really?

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 要是两条腿没有抖得这么厉害，我就信了！
E: I would've believed you if your legs weren't shaking so much!

C: 只要别拖老子后腿，你想怎么胆小就怎么胆小，老子也不在乎。
E: ...and as long as you don't drag me down, I don't really care how much of a coward you are, either...

C: 其实你们两个关系还挺好的…
E: You two actually get along pretty well...

C: 这…声音…藿藿…来这边。
E: That... sound... Huohuo... this way.

C: 我和你一般大的时候，错失了许多宝贵的机会…听老师一句劝，柯柯娜——珍惜你的天赋，不要做出会让自己后悔的决定。
E: I missed many golden opportunities when I was your age... Listen to your teacher this once, Cocona. Treasure your talent, and don't make a choice you will regret.

C: 别说了，穿出去之后，别人都说合适呢，好像一下子年轻了好多岁。
E: Of course! Everyone complimented me when I wore it out, as if I looked ten years younger.

C: 你是说我们工作的态度不够真诚？
E: Are you saying our attitude isn't sincere?

C: 最近这批商品有问题…
E: There's a problem with this recent batch of goods...

C: 还记得吗？少女时期，你曾对自己许下承诺——无论未来发生什么，你都要一直微笑下去。可现在呢？你已经把它忘得一干二净……
E: Do you remember? When you were young, you once made yourself a promise — no matter what happened, you would always smile. But now? You've entirely forgotten...

C: 我自知我不是你的对手。在无法逃避的丑陋现实面前，一切美德都不堪一击。
E: I already know I am not your match. All virtues are shattered with a single touch before the inescapable and ugly truth.

C: 柯柯娜…消灭你的纯真、善良、诚实和原则——然后迎接你的成功。
E: Cocona... vanquish your innocence, kindness, honesty and principles, and then embrace your victory.

C: 结尾就是，十天之后，我们登上驶离匹诺康尼的飞船——「从梦中醒来」，拥抱真实的生活。
E: The ending is, in ten days, we will board the spaceship departing Penacony and wake up from the dream, embracing our real lives.

C: 你依旧紧握着柯柯娜的手，尽自己所能传导身体的温度。
E: Your grip remains tightened over Cocona's hand, trying your utmost to transfer your warmth to her.

C: 可我一直身处梦中，又怎么会睡着呢？我实在搞不清楚，难道只是一场幻觉……
E: But I've always been in a dream. How could I have fallen asleep? It's all very confusing to me. Could it have been an illusion...

C: 「迷路的人，向前看，那里并非空无一物」
E: "Lost ones, look forth. There lies not void."

C: 是被人叫醒了吧？
E: Did someone wake him up?

C: 我想起来了，这名字不是那位已故的大明星吗？您说他需要帮助的意思是……
E: I remember! Isn't that the name of that superstar that passed away? When you say he needs help, you mean...

C: 说吧，我不会告诉别人的。
E: Tell me, I will not tell anyone.

C: 那个，能说的我都已经告诉您了…不介意的话，能请您尽快离开吗？我要抓紧把这个房间收拾出来，后面还有客人要入住……
E: Um, I have told you everything I can... If you don't mind, could you please leave this place? I need to hurry up and tidy this room. There are other guests that wish to move in.

C: 这样…应该就够了吧？
E: That... Should be enough, right?

C: 抱歉令你失望了，姬莲小姐——但没有人是完美的。
E: Sorry to disappoint you, Ms. Jillian... But no one is perfect.

C: 你没事吧？
E: Are you okay?

C: 你找我有什么事吗？
E: How can I help you?

C: 佩德罗带着你来到了甲板上。
E: Pedro takes you to the deck.

C: （从今天起，本{F#小姐}{M#少爷}就算是这座酒店的主人了！）
E: (From today onwards, I will be the {F#mistress}{M#master} of this hotel!)

C: 我是「{NICKNAME}{F#女爵}{M#爵士}」。
E: I am {F#Dame}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}.

C: …哈哈哈哈！！真是活久见，谁能想到，我有生之年居然还能碰上这种好事？！
E: ...Hahaha! I've certainly lived to see everything now! Who'd have thought I would experience such good luck in my life?

C: 需要帮什么忙，您尽管开口——经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}！
E: If you need anything, just ask away... {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager!

C: 白日梦酒店的前台。它原本是通向那个奢靡、华贵、醉生梦死的世界的大门，如今在你的努力下变成了…咳，它变成了一种很*新潮*的东西。
E: The front desk of The Reverie Hotel. Originally the gateway to that luxurious, opulent, inebriated dream world, it has become thanks to your hard work... *ahem* It's become something very fashionable.

C: 反正，呃，情况就是这么个情况，续房的事就交给你了，大英雄！我现在得去调查这个「组织」留下的蛛丝马迹了……
E: Anyway, uh, that's how it is. I'll leave it up to you how many nights to extend the room, hero! Now I've got to get back to inspecting more clues left behind by this cult...

C: （今天是什么特别的日子吗……）
E: (Is today a special holiday...?)

C: 唔，请、请稍等，让我看看……
E: Uh, p—please hold up and let me see...

C: 哎呀呀，大老远的就听到你们在吵架……
E: Oh my, I could hear you two fighting from miles away...

C: 我感谢基因！
E: I'm grateful for my genes!

C: 这、这是……
E: This... This is...

C: （糟了，青雀不会要出事吧…得加快速度！）
E: (Oh no, did something bad happen to Qingque? I have to move faster!)

C: 喂喂喂！你走了，我们怎么办？
E: Hey! Hold on! What are we supposed to do if you leave?

C: 第一次听说！
E: I hadn't heard that!

C: 在下自然是在养伤嘛。多亏了灵砂司鼎，衔药龙女的精湛医术，咱们也算是恢复得差不多了，接下来要做的，不过是「谨遵医嘱」四个字。
E: I was having my wounds treated, of course! Thanks to the Healer Lady, Cauldron Master Lingsha, we are returning to proper form. All we've been told to do now is "listen to doctor's orders."

C: 与其说是我的麻烦事，不如说说是这位小师傅的…正好铖杰师傅也在这里，要不你自己讲讲？
E: It's not so much a problem for me, as it is for this guy... Since Master Chengjie is here now, maybe he can talk about it himself?

C: 那可是恩师生前留下的遗作，整个银河上下独一无二。
E: The manuscript is my master's legacy work of his lifetime, and it's the only copy in the whole cosmos.

C: 有什么不懂的你可以问，不过我也不太熟他们工造司的文档编号就是了。
E: If there's anything you don't understand, just ask, but I'm not too familiar with the documentation systems at the Artisanship Commission.

C: 就是这份设计稿了！
E: That's the one!

C: 不过，这份「星际和平公司的设计师入职邀请函」看上去也很重要，应该是和这份星槎手稿放在一起的，要不要也带过去呢？
E: However, this "IPC Designer Invite" seems pretty important too. I suppose it's kept in the same place as this starskiff manuscript. We should probably take it with us?

C: 莱恩•玛斯特隆佐…这、这确实是师傅的名字。这日期，和一百二十年前他收我为徒的日子，应该是同一天！
E: Ryan Masteronzo... Th—This indeed was my master's name. And this date, was the very same day <unbreak>120</unbreak> years ago when he took me on as his disciple!

C: 我知道的只是教材上关于星槎制造的知识，但从来还没走近瞧瞧那些生产线和生产过程呢。
E: All I know are the basic principles of starskiff manufacturing, but I've never personally been there to see the production line or the process with my own eyes.

C: 你提到了星槎的引擎？
E: You mentioned starskiff engines before?

C: 咱俩背后可一个人也没有啊…
E: Um... There's no one standing behind us, right?

C: 多亏了你来这里，我更加有动力了。请你之后也要来监督我，鞭策我！
E: Your presence really motivates me. Please drop by regularly to monitor my progress and encourage me!

C: 确实，傻瓜，操作…
E: Well, I must say it isn't very impressive...

C: 手稿里有还未公开的技术……
E: There are undisclosed techniques in the manuscript...

C: …莱恩老师不会错的。
E: ...Master Ryan couldn't have been wrong.

C: 难不成你还会召魂吗？
E: Can you summon his soul?

C: 你的人马？
E: Your people?

C: 铖杰，寒暄就不必了，你将我唤醒，一定是有重要的事情要问我，对吗？
E: Chengjie, let's cut to the chase. You have important questions for me, right?

C: 若能摄取完好的神识…
E: That is, if his soul essence is still intact for extraction...

C: 目前所追逃的犯人，就在这份名单里……
E: The fugitives are on this list...

C: 这确实是更优做法。
E: It's indeed the better solution.

C: 哈哈哈，这丫头！好不容易得享两天清福，被你说得跟什么坏事一样！
E: Hahaha, silly girl! Just a few days of hard-earned rest, and you're already making it sound like jail time!

C: 嗯…听你这么一说，确实有不少奇怪的地方，完全不像他的作风……
E: Mm... that does sound a little strange. Luka usually doesn't push himself so far...

C: …是热情过度了吧？不过卢卡做事一向风风火火，我早就习惯了。
E: ...Too passionate. Either way, it's classic Luka — I'm used to it by now.

C: 你的意思是……
E: You mean...

C: 没什么好说的，我们先把这片区域清理干净吧。
E: Enough talk. Let's clean up this area.

C: 哈哈哈，你就想问这个？我也不是什么事都跟师傅说的。
E: Hahaha, that's all you wanna ask? I don't necessarily tell master Oleg everything, you know.

C: 你让我印象深刻，「地火」的卢卡。
E: You make a strong impression, Luka of Wildfire.

C: 这到底有什么不寻常的地方嘛？他们不就是像列车组那样收到了来自景元的邀请？
E: What's so unusual about it? They simply received an invitation from Jing Yuan, just like the Crew, right?

C: 就是就是…呃，你这话听着不像好话。
E: Yeah, exactly... Uhm, are you being sarcastic?

C: 我和博识学会的拉帝奥教授亲如一家。有道是「上阵父子兵」，我出面是不是就算是博识学会出面了？
E: I'm pretty tight with Dr. Ratio from the Intelligentsia Guild, almost like family. Doesn't that make me practically a member of the Intelligentsia Guild too?

C: 怎么突然变得这么好说话了？既然你说不查了，那我也要将这个货箱一并带走，没有异议吧？
E: Why are you being so nice all of a sudden? Well, since you're not going to check it, I'll take this crate and be on my way. Is that okay with everyone?

C: 我们会切断这些机器的动力，在此之前请不要靠得太近了。
E: Nothing to see here. These machines are to be shut down, keep your distance until then.

C: 真是冤家路窄啊……
E: What a small world...

C: 炎老说笑了。衔药龙女年纪尚浅，又不通武事，怎能让她守擂？
E: You humor me, Elder Huaiyan. The Healer Lady is just a young lady who knows nothing about martial arts. How can I assign her as the ringmaster?

C: 除去炎老之外，在之后的几周内，我还会邀请各位同飞霄将军见上一面，接受她的提问以解其疑惑，希望各位到时候有所准备。
E: In the coming weeks, I'll also invite all of you to a meeting with General Feixiao, where you may need to answer her questions and clear up any doubts she might have. So, please be prepared for the meeting.

C: 飞霄，看在朋友的面子上，能告诉我，联盟打算如何降罪于罗浮的将军吗？
E: As your friend, may I ask how the Alliance intends to punish the General of the Luofu?

C: 这具金人勾魂使似乎在一击之间被敌人击碎。如此惊人的力量，也许是呼雷的手臂。
E: This aurumaton spectral envoy appears to have been smashed to smithereens with only a single strike. Hoolay likely slammed his arm in to deliver this shockingly destructive force.

C: 与此同时…长久镇于幽狱之底的步离人战首呼雷，已失去了踪迹。
E: Meanwhile, the borisin Warhead Hoolay, long confined to the depth of Shackling Prison, has vanished without a trace.

C: 我决定了，下一课，三月小姐从练习——
E: Given the situation, I believe Miss March should start by working on —

C: 此后，又过了些日子……
E: Time marches on, and days turn to more...

C: 这位是椒丘先生。
E: This is Mr. Jiaoqiu.

C: 不才椒丘，是曜青将军帐下的医士。
E: I'm Jiaoqiu, the healer working for the General of the Xianzhou Yaoqing.

C: 椒丘先生，怎么了？
E: What's up, Mr. Jiaoqiu?

C: 无论在哪个仙舟上，问女孩子的年龄都是不礼貌的。
E: It's not polite to ask a girl her age, no matter which Xianzhou ship you're on.

C: 您说的是呐。
E: You have a point.

C: 我有种奇怪的直觉，如果咱们现在悄悄跟上去，一定能掀开这几个家伙的马脚。
E: I have a feeling that if we secretly tail them, we'll definitely catch these guys in the act.

C: 怎么可能！这些狐人…这些狐人为什么会变了模样？
E: How is this possible? How did these foxians... change their appearances like that!?

C: 炎老，我说的这些正是联盟内部对景元将军的非议。只是今日他们借我之口问了出来，要不您把我的样子想像成那几个老家伙的嘴脸？
E: I'm simply bringing up the doubts about General Jing Yuan that exist within the Alliance. Since I'm representing them, perhaps you can just imagine me as one of those old geezers?

C: 我想，打从进殿起我就说了，<color=#dbc291ff>我所问的未必是我认为的</color>。
E: From the moment I walked in, I made it clear that <color=#dbc291ff>the questions I'd ask might not reflect my actual thoughts</color>.

C: 椒丘、貊泽奉天击将军飞霄之命，前来引渡步离人重犯「呼雷」前往曜青。
E: We're Jiaoqiu and Moze. General Feixiao sent us to extradite the borisin criminal Hoolay to the Yaoqing.

C: 要是有机会，我希望能以更好的方式带你们游历罗浮的景色。
E: I wish I could show you the real sights of the Luofu.

C: 此前{RUBY_B#镇伏岁阳}绥园伏魔{RUBY_E#}一事，真是有劳您奔波了，容寒鸦再度致谢。
E: Please allow me to express my gratitude to you again for {RUBY_B#Subduing Heliobi}subduing the demons in the Fyxestroll Garden{RUBY_E#}.

C: 两位，绝不能让这些孽物靠近！
E: We mustn't let these abominations get any closer!

C: 与此同时，{NICKNAME}、丹恒与寒鸦察觉到了狱中的情况业已失控……
E: At the same time, {NICKNAME}, Dan Heng, and Hanya realize that the situation in the prison is out of control...

C: 你说的不错。只是奇怪步离人从来更乐衷于暴力杀伤，制定如此精密周详的计划…不像他们一贯的风格。
E: Indeed, but borisin tend to favor direct and aggressive approaches. Crafting careful and precise plans like this... is simply not their style.

C: 我必须承认，罗浮的监狱设计得很复杂。
E: The prison on the Luofu is a real maze, I must admit.

C: 大人，离自由仅有一步之遥了。穿过大门，就再也没人能阻止我们了。
E: My Lord, we're just one step away from freedom. Once we pass through the gate, no one will be able to stop us.

C: 你说的是个万全的法子。可惜越是理想的方案，越难施展得开。依我看，你的方法至少有两方人马不会接受。
E: Your plan sounds solid, but unfortunately, solid plans rarely get a chance to be implemented. I believe there are at least two parties who won't accept your approach.

C: 步离狂徒伪装潜入幽囚狱，破狱释囚，制造混乱。
E: Borisin infiltrated the prison in disguise and released the prisoners, spreading chaos.

C: 药性与成分虽然不同，但原理确是一致的。
E: The medicinal properties and ingredients may differ, but the principle remains the same.

C: 如果这群步离探子全都服食了伪装药物，我建议就顺着这条线开始查起。两位，随我来。
E: If these infiltrators rely on the medicine to maintain their disguise, then following this lead in our investigation seems prudent. Please follow me.

C: 狐人一族日夜诅咒他的名字，甚至用他的名字来吓止小儿夜啼。任这样的巨恶在一夕之间痛快死去，联盟内的狐人又岂肯甘心？
E: The foxians curse his name day and night, and they even use it to scare children into staying quiet. How could they grant a swift death to such a great sinner?

C: 我听彦卿说过，公司的舰船遭到了步离人袭击。船上运送的就是这东西？
E: Yanqing told me that an IPC ship was attacked by borisin. Is this what they were transporting on the ship?

C: 别把步离人当成对仙舟一无所知的蛮子。你随身携带的玉兆，还有天上飞过的机巧鸟…仙舟人能追踪到我们的手段我全都一清二楚。
E: You see borisin as savages who know nothing about the Xianzhou, but in fact, we know all about your tracking tricks... like the jade abacus you're carrying and the cycranes in the sky.

C: （他竟然真的放我自由行动…他到底在玩什么把戏？）
E: (I can't believe he actually let me go... What game is he playing?)

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>我需要你的帮助。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>I need your help.</color>

C: 狼子们，随我一同，在猎物之间高视阔步！
E: Follow me, my cubs! We shall stride among the prey!

C: 嗨呀，不用担心。你要是趴下了，就让为师来会会你的对手咯。只是这么一来，罗浮仙舟的光彩可就全都归朱明啦，哈哈哈哈哈……
E: Come on, there's no need to worry about that. If you are defeated, then your opponent shall have to answer to me! Although, if that happens, the honor and the glory of the Xianzhou Luofu shall all be taken by the Zhuming, hahaha...

C: 咱们走吧。
E: Let's get going, then.

C: 喂喂，还没上场就打退堂鼓了吗？你好，我们俩都是演武仪典的参赛选手。
E: Hey! Are you trying to back out before you even hit the arena? Hello, we are both Wardance competitors.

C: 哈哈哈哈，看来二位还是挺轻松的，临危受命能有这样的状态可不容易。
E: Hahaha, I see you are both quite relaxed! Impressive, given the imminent danger you face!

C: 好多人啊。
E: There are so many people!

C: 三月，在「演武仪典」开始前，让为师再给你上一课。
E: March, before the Wardance begins, allow me to give you one more lesson.

C: 交通事故。
E: A traffic accident.

C: {NICKNAME}。
E: {NICKNAME}.

C: 呃，谁？请问…您说的这位是参赛选手吗？
E: Uhh, who? Are you... talking about a contestant here today?

C: 这就是你在剑术之外要学的另一课：「权衡」和「取舍」，我们永远在扪心自问却又永远无解的问题。
E: This is another lesson that you must learn outside of swordplay: Weighing your options and making a decision. There are always questions that we will ask ourselves but never be able to answer.

C: 第一场擂赛马上就要开始了…不知彦卿那边是否一切顺利？
E: The first round of the tournament is about to begin... I wonder how Yanqing and the others are doing?

C: 如何让多疑的恶狼服下毒药？
E: How do we get a suspicious and devious wolf to drink down poison?

C: 没错吧，飞霄？
E: Isn't that right, Feixiao?

C: 你的行止，与那些孽物毫无差别。
E: Your actions are no different from those of the abominations we stand against!

C: 对于真正的强者而言，「狐人」或「步离」只是一个名字，真正的强者能决定自己的道路。
E: For those who are truly strong, "foxian" and "borisin" are no more than labels. Someone who is truly strong chooses their own path.

C: 你所谓的弱肉强食，不过是狡辩。
E: Your so-called survival of the fittest is nothing but an excuse.

C: （熄灭它）
E: (Snuff it out)

C: 白露小姐！
E: Miss Bailu!

C: 就像我一开始说的那样。我会揽下所有罪过…成为替罪羊。
E: As I mentioned, I'll take all the blame and become the scapegoat.

C: 此番呼雷逃狱之事，引发不小的动荡，也令演武仪典被迫中断，当真是一场无妄之灾。好在后生可畏，几个年轻人赴汤蹈火，弭平了这场大灾，也算是不幸中的万幸。
E: Hoolay's escape caused significant upheaval and forced the Wardance to be put on hold — a truly unforeseen disaster. Fortunately, the younger generation showed their valor. They bravely tackled the crisis, putting an end to the disaster and providing a glimmer of hope in a dire situation.

C: 我也想啊…这家伙大概是怕我干扰他玩乐，连房间号都不肯告诉我。我说不出房间号，前台就不肯帮我联系他……
E: I wish... That fool probably thought I'd be cramping his style — he refused to even tell me his room number. And if I don't know the number, the concierge can't help me contact him...

C: 这样吧，彩拿篷先生，你留在汇合地点等待埃夫姆，朕去那些玩乐场所找找他。陌生的臣民啊，你若想帮忙，就随朕来吧。
E: How about this, Mr. Chenapon — you stay here and wait for Ephraim, while I look for him in those entertainment spots. My loyal subject, walk with me if you wish to help.

C: 你就不必再陪朕出梦了，朕自行前往便是。朕平时都在「黄金的时刻」巡视，往后若是遇到什么麻烦，记得随时来和朕商谈。
E: You need not accompany me out of the dream. I will go on my own. I'm always making rounds in the Golden Hour — if you run into any trouble, feel free to speak to me.

C: 眼前的老人平静地凝望着远方的梦想之城。
E: The elderly man in front of you gazes calmly at the City of Dreams in the distance.

C: …我知道了，查德威克博士，这是顾及您的面子。但就这一次…下不为例。
E: ...Fine, Dr. Chadwick. I'm doing this as a favor to you, just this once.

C: 记忆仍然残缺不全，很多片段都不完整…但我的的确确能看到它们了。
E: The memories are fragmented and incomplete, but I can see them.

C: 快出发吧，我太好奇了。
E: Let's set off right away. I can't wait to find out the truth.

C: 螺丝咕姆想要帮你。
E: Screwllum wants to help you.

C: 你们会在这里工作、研究、娱乐、谈心；你们会与世隔绝，直到项目问世或宣告失败。
E: You will work, research, have fun, and make friends here, isolated from the outside world until this project is launched or fails.

C: 我终于理解了…过去的二十年，在这里发生的一切都只是一场实验。我们亲手建造的一切…却从来就不属于我们。
E: I've got it, finally. What we've done here for the past twenty years is just an experiment. The result of our work... never truly belongs to us.

C: 锁定AI已开启。升温中…<unbreak>20%</unbreak>…<unbreak>40%</unbreak>…<unbreak>80%</unbreak>…腔室温度已达到阈值。
E: Lock-on AI activated. Warming up... <unbreak>20%</unbreak>... <unbreak>40%</unbreak>... <unbreak>80%</unbreak>... Chamber temperature has reached threshold.

C: 请容我否认，博士——你的努力不是徒劳。
E: Please allow me to rebut that, doctor. Your effort isn't in vain.

C: 您看到什么了，黑塔女士？
E: What did you see, Madam Herta?

C: ——从某种意义上来说，这里是个巨大号的「避难所」，专门接收那些不为梦境所容，却又离不开梦的可怜虫。
E: ...To a certain extent, this is a grand haven, specifically sheltering poor souls who could neither fit into the Dreamscape, nor leave the dream.

C: 我也想学筑梦。
E: I wish to learn how to weave dreams too.

C: 哦…真是张令人怀念的相片。
E: Oh... This photo really brings back memories.

C: 隐夜鸫家系中有很多人，大家是因为热爱而聚在一起的逐梦者。
E: There are many in the Nightingale Family who are Dreamchasers, rallied together over a common passion.

C: 他们与历史记载的不太一样。
E: They are quite different from how they were recorded in history.

C: 包在我身上。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 好在他没事。
E: Good thing he's fine.

C: （…这就是筑梦师巴罗的结局。）
E: (...This is Dreamweaver Barlow's end.)

C: 是的，我已经调查完了。
E: Yes, I'm done with the investigation.

C: 啊？可我没钱啊……
E: Hah? But I have no money...

C: 对此我有一个猜测：先前城邦遇袭时，疯王眷属在城内四处破坏，不少大地兽也受到了波及。
E: I shall hazard a guess at this: When the city was attacked, the Mad King's Kin wrought destruction along the streets, causing damage to many dromases.

C: 奥赫玛的资源有限，但也足够为绝大部分外邦人提供援助。真正的问题在于：<color=#dbc291ff>我们愿意付出代价吗？</color>
E: Okhema's resources are limited, but there is enough to aid most of the outlanders. The real question is: <color=#dbc291ff>Are we willing to pay the price?</color>

C: 避难所…卫兵……
E: Shelter... Guards...

C: 之前我听见卫兵说什么「大地兽工坊骚乱」、「抽签」、「物资分配」之类的，就没敢上去搭话。
E: I overheard the guards before, talking about some "dromas workshop incident," "drawing lots," "resource allocation" and whatnot, so I didn't dare ask them to clarify.

C: 德墨忒尔笑着走进屋子。返回时，她手上多了几个巨大的竹篮——大到让你怀疑她是怎么搬动的。
E: Demetria laughs as she enters the house. When she returns, several large baskets are hanging off her arms — they are so big you wonder how she's even carrying them.

C: 没事，你想看多久都可以。
E: No worries, take all the time you want.

C: 那我换一家。
E: I'll go to another shop then.

C: 看得再多，你也找不到比我更好的。
E: You can look, but you won't find a better establishment than mine.

C: 多谢你为我们提供这些，英雄。我很快就会把它发给同伴们。
E: Thank you for supplying us with food, hero. I will distribute them to our companions quickly.

C: …不要在这个时候念诵法吉娜的咒语啊！
E: ...Now's not the time to chant one of Phagousa's curses!

C: 即便我不说，相信你也能猜到大概——为了帮外邦人找到药品，我溜进了圣城存放物资的仓库。
E: I believe you have already guessed the gist of it, even if I don't say anything — to help the outlanders secure medicine, I slipped into the holy city's supply warehouse.

C: 公民们听不懂帕拉滕的学术词语，但「偷药喂给大地兽」的画面已经烙印在了他们脑海中。有人笑出了声。
E: The citizens can't understand Palaten's academic term, but the image of "stealing medicine to feed dromases" has already been imprinted in their minds. Some of them even chuckle out loud.

C: 之后再聊吧。
E: Let's chat next time.

C: 嗯，贵客，我们都还有要做的事，再见。
E: Indeed, honored guest. We still have much to do. Farewell.

C: 嗯，贵客，我们都还有要做的事，再见。
E: Indeed, honored guest. We still have much to do. Farewell.

C: 你谁也杀不了！
E: You will kill nobody!

C: 什么？太好了，请快帮帮我们吧！
E: What? Perfect! Please, come and help us!

C: 有奖励吗？
E: Is there a reward?

C: 是的，悬锋城便是这样的地方，而我的父亲——如果造主能称之为父亲的话——乃是带来纷争的尼卡多利。
E: That's right. That is exactly the kind of place that Castrum Kremnos is. My father — if you can call a creator father — was Nikador themself, bringer of strife.

C: 悬锋城督政官上。
E: The Ephor of Castrum Kremnos appears.

C: 啊？但我们这岂不是当了逃兵？
E: Huh? Would that not make us deserters?

C: 要我说，让自己沉浸在幻想中，还将幻想附加在其他人的身上，自说自话地上演一个人的悲剧——如此自私的「浪漫」，只是一场一个人的「纷争」。
E: If you ask me, immersing oneself in a fantasy and forcing that onto another person is no more than acting out a self-produced tragedy... Such a selfish "romance" is no more than "strife" that one suffers alone.

C: 抱歉…我不是故意的。
E: I'm sorry... I didn't mean to...

C: 他犹豫了片刻，继而将自己最为珍视的这捆金丝递给了面前的泰坦眷属——
E: He hesitated for a second, then proceeded to hand his most precious golden thread to the Titankin before him...
Umm...

C: 好像有股香味…不对，是陌生记忆的味道，从那里传过来的！
E: I can smell a sweet fragrance... No, this is the fragrance of an unknown memory! It's coming from over there!

C: 唉，您就别取笑我们了。
E: *sigh* Please don't tease us.

C: 后来发生的一切，恰如这位眷属所言。我们在废墟里找到了她，而她用预言救了我们。
E: Whatever happened next was exactly what the Titankin said. We found her among the ruins, and she saved us with her prophecy.

C: 枯瘦的身体已无法支撑这样的劳动，日渐被黑潮吞没的土地，没有地方能供你们耕种。
E: Your weakened bodies can no longer withstand such labor. As the black tide slowly swallows the land, there will be no place for you to farm.

C: 这是你唯一的命运。
E: This is your only destiny.

C: 绕了好远的路啊。
E: It has been a long way.

C: 别问那么多，来就对了。肯定不是逗你玩啊。
E: Don't ask, just be there. I'm not playing around.

C: 你们买的都是哪一卷？
E: Which volume did you all get?

C: …不得不说，这主意比科员们的课题有趣多了。可惜你不需要融资，不然我肯定投个几亿信用点。
E: ...I have to say that this idea is way more interesting than the researchers' projects. It's a shame you don't need funding, or I'd definitely invest a few hundred million credits.

C: 我…没法给你承诺。那颗星球会逐渐变成你熟悉的样子，但时间是未知数。
E: I... can't make any promises. That planet will gradually become how you remember it to be, but no one can tell when that'd be.

C: （它好像很着急的样子，还是赶快前往坐标标注的位置吧！）
E: (The Wubbaboo seems anxious. Hurry up and go to the marked place!)

C: （看上去头脑不是很清醒的样子，给它指路真的能看懂吗？）
E: (It doesn't look very clear-headed. Can it really remember all the directions I gave?)

C: 就昨天希拉展现出来的情况来看，我总感觉这样还不够好。当然，我很感激你的用心教导……
E: Judging from Sheila's performance yesterday, I don't think it was good enough. Of course, I appreciate your hard work...

C: 平时说话没必要这么正经。
E: You don't have to be so serious when you talk.

C: 你有什么兴趣爱好吗？
E: Do you have any hobbies?

C: 我记得，其他科的人员希望我能拓展业务去他们那儿兼任向导，古恩先生希望我不会误入歧途，这些事，我都记得的……
E: I remember that researchers from other departments want me to expand my scope of work to cover their fields, and I also remember how Mr. Gunn wants me to not be led astray. I remember these things...

C: 这人真不会说话…
E: This person is so difficult...

C: 那就再加一句…
E: Then add one more phrase...

C: 小钱而已，艾丝妲不会介意的。
E: It's just pocket change. Asta won't mind.

C: 报错结果我还得去复核一下，多亏有你在，谢谢！
E: I need to go confirm the error codes, but you've been a big help. Thank you!

C: 这不可能啊！
E: No way!

C: 不仅仅是有点吧？
E: More than just a little.

C: 有没有其他细节？
E: Any other details?

C: 回来啦！我刚好打算休息休息呢…话说你都查到了什么？
E: You're back! I was planning to have a break... Did you find anything?

C: 说到聚会的事我就头疼…哎，既然头发是染不成了，那眼镜总可以换换吧。
E: I get a headache every time I think about the party... *sigh* If I can't dye my hair, then maybe I can at least change my glasses.

C: 以前总听人说，所谓的潮流，其实就是个噱头，看来这话说得挺对。
E: I've always heard people say that fashion is just a trick, that it's not real. Looks like they're right.

C: 对吧？我也这么觉得。
E: Right? I think so too.

C: …多余的话就不说了，还是来聊聊怎么帮我交到朋友吧。
E: I'm not going to keep talking. We'd better discuss how I can make friends.

C: 没错，拍照。
E: Yes, photos.

C: 以摄影会友，是个好点子。
E: Making friends with photography as a hobby is a great idea.

C: 摄影需要故事方能吸引人的眼球，而站在你眼前的恰巧是一个有故事的男人——你要做的就是把我散发魅力的瞬间捕捉下来。
E: A photo needs a story to attract attention, and you're looking at a man full of stories. All you have to do is capture the moment when I exude charm.

C: 要问它的状态为什么这么好，那都多亏了我数年如一日的不懈打理…当然，我雇佣的二十人机动车保养小组也有一定的功劳。
E: If you want to ask why it's in such good condition, it's all thanks to my years of care... Of course, the <unbreak>20</unbreak>-person car maintenance team I hired also had a hand in it.

C: 我欣赏你的自信。
E: I admire your confidence.

C: 不过莱姆士汀家的人是不会轻易气馁的。我迟早会交到能和我共享爱好、有共同话题的朋友。
E: But we Limesteins are not quitters. Sooner or later, I will find a friend who has the same hobbies and interests as me.

C: 可惜，本以为我能和她一起在歌德宾馆享用下午茶，畅聊演艺圈的趣闻轶事…看来这个愿望算是破灭了。
E: Too bad. I thought I could have afternoon tea with her at the Goethe Hotel and chat about the interesting things in the theater industry. I guess that will never happen.

C: 那些我苦思冥想才能写出的辞句，他却信手拈来，这种感觉就像是…我正在与一位遍历风雪的「国王」交谈，他如此伟岸，我才是那个渺小的流浪汉！
E: Words that take me ages to come up with seem so easy to him. I feel like... I am conversing with a "King" who conquered the wind and snow. Like he is a saint while I am just an insignificant vagrant!

C: 不过，为什么会掉在那种地方呢…我得想一想，再好好想一想……
E: But why was it left there... Let me think... Let me think real hard...

C: 交给我吧。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 谁说要鉴定了？我只是让你去找，没说别的——你可别到处胡说八道啊！
E: Who said anything about appraisals? I just want you to go for a search — don't go spewing nonsense!

C: 你难道没见过这种型号吗…
E: You've never seen a model like this before...?

C: 啊，光顾着看花，都忘了还有老爸的信了。让我看看……
E: Uh, I almost forgot about the letter. Lemme see...

C: 我这儿有一份论文…
E: I have this thesis here...

C: 所以…你要提交一份论文给大守护者？
E: So you want to give a thesis... to the Supreme Guardian?

C: 没关系，这位民间人士已经通过了两轮考验，按照流程也该我出马了。
E: Not a problem! This citizen has completed two rounds of testing. Per proper procedure, my attendance is required next.

C: 请您慢走。
E: So long.

C: 啊——我明白了，您是带着任务来的，对吗？您是想来验收一下教育部的题库储备，对吧？
E: Ah, I see. You've come on a mission, haven't you? You've come to test the variety of questions in our quiz pool, haven't you?

C: （这样就算刺探成功了吧…该回去找雷金了。）
E: (Mission accomplished... let's report back to Regin.)

C: 听说波瓦大臣要退休了？
E: I heard Minister Bova is thinking about retiring soon?

C: 转达菲丝的话…
E: Relay Fizz's reply...

C: 嘿，这种事我可见多了。下次再碰到那种死缠烂打的粉丝，记得拔腿就跑！
E: Hey, I see this thing all the time. Run for the hills next time you bump into that kind of stalker!

C: 「夫人~夫人~您身后的阴影不知所踪~而我看着您~犹在镜中~」
E: "Madam~ madam~ that shadow behind you has gone~ but I see your reflection~ still in the mirror~"

C: 关于塔米拉的一切…
E: Everything about Tamila...

C: 看看这些人吧。贵族和官员、小贩和工人、满嘴胡话的笨蛋和不苟言笑的天才…他们都是我的养料。
E: Just look at these people. Aristocrats and bureaucrats, merchants and workers, vocal fools and mirthless geniuses... they're all nourishment for me.

C: 喔喔，原来如此…小女子对塔米拉小姐的理解更深了~
E: Ooh, I see... I have a deeper understanding of Tamila now.

C: 喔喔，原来如此…小女子对塔米拉小姐的理解更深了~
E: Ooh, I see... I have a deeper understanding of Tamila now.

C: 我的状况…是这样的。我本是《雪国冒险奇谭》续作代笔，可我实在没办法模仿出原作的韵味……
E: My situation... is this. I'm the ghostwriter of the sequel for Tale of the Winterlands, but I just can't manage to copy the feelings of the original...

C: 如果他有兴趣的话，不妨让他来与我社当面商议。主编似乎很中意他，条件什么的都好商量——如果能成，他也不用每天抱着垃圾桶唉声叹气了吧……
E: If he's interested, he can come directly to our office for a discussion. The chief editor really likes his work and our terms are negotiable — He won't have to sigh all day while hugging a trashcan anymore...

C: 我来帮你行使正当权益！
E: I'll help you exercise your rightful rights!

C: 我没偷过东西，你认错人了。
E: I didn't steal anything. You've got the wrong person.

C: 呜呜…可是…爸爸妈妈还没回来……
E: *sob*... But... Mom and Dad aren't back yet...

C: 在你面前的孩子嚎啕大哭了起来。当你正准备俯身、想要摸头安慰她时，却见自己的指尖穿透了她幼小的身躯。
E: The child before you starts to wail. As you bend down and try to pat her head in comfort, you see your fingers go through her small figure.

C: 这么说…是我已经死了呗？
E: So... I'm dead?

C: 不过，我怎么找也找不到娜塔莎姐姐…正好{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}你路过，我就想能不能问问看，嘿嘿。
E: But I can't find Miss Natasha at all... Then you passed by and I thought maybe I can ask you, hehe.

C: 这下屏障就启动了…至少能抵挡它们一段时间！我得赶紧去疏散平民了——你也保重…你是个好人，可千万别死了啊！
E: The Barrier is activated... It can at least fend off those monsters for a while! I have to evacuate the civilians... You look after yourself. We can't have good folks like you die!

C: 你有没有听说过，有一类化外民组织叫作「放生帮」？叫他们为组织也有些奇怪，我听说有些人是抱团行动，有些人则纯粹是自发行为……
E: Have you heard of an Outworlder organization called "The Unshackled"? It might not be suitable to call them an organization, as while some of them act as a group, others operate alone...

C: 说是「通过放生来积累功德」的一群人，这都不重要……
E: It is said to be a group of people who accumulate merits by releasing living creatures, but that's not the point...

C: （看来海滩也没有其他情况了，巡逻就到此结束吧。）
E: (It seems there is nothing else out of the ordinary happening along the beach. I'll end my patrol here.)

C: 你认为「星期六」不应该逃避责任，应该勇敢地返回现代文明社会之中…至少这里有玉兆、有网络，有着文明社会的宝藏，总比荒岛要好得多。
E: You believe that Saturday should not run from their responsibilities, that they should bravely return to civilized society... At least there are jade abaci, the internet, and treasures of modern civilization that far exceed those of life on a deserted island.

C: （<color=#dbc291ff>要是发现了放生帮就去威慑他们，要是发现了放生对象就处理一下</color>…今天还会有漂流瓶吗？）
E: (<color=#dbc291ff>Drive away The Unshackled and take care of the things they release</color>... I wonder if there will be any drift bottles today?)

C: 来来来，先喝这杯试试，你若是觉得这一杯还不够滋味，别急，喝了这一杯接着还有一坛子呢。
E: Here, feel free to give it a try, and if you feel like drinking more, there's plenty where that came from.

C: 这「烈焰浓茶」新品，已经按照你先前的建议，保证「燃」味十足。
E: This is the new flavor for Flaming Potent Tea. I've followed your suggestions from last time, and this one is sure to lift your spirits with its spicy kick.

C: 怎么样？好喝吗？口感上你觉得还有什么问题吗？身体上呢？有没有不舒服的地方？
E: How does it taste? Good? Any room for improvement? Are you experiencing any discomfort?

C: 正如它也早已在我腐败的耳中沉寂。
E: As they have long since fallen silent in my decaying ears.

C: 昭示衰亡的月相
E: The Moon Phases of Decline

C: 早夭的玻吕刻斯啊，
E: O Pollux, who died young,

C: 我曾向你的母亲发誓，用生命捍卫你的王冠。在你成王之后，我将做你的铸铁双翼，你若想统一翁法罗斯，我永远会是冲在最前面的那个！
E: I once vowed to your mother that I would give my life to protect your reign. Once you become king, I will be your iron wings. If you wish to unite Amphoreus, I will always be the one who charges ahead of you into battle!

C: 把树种交给严肃的学者。
E: Give the Seed to the serious scholar.

C: 预言典籍与玩具诡异地共处一室——堆满灰尘的布偶旁是半掩的预言卷轴，蒲团上散落的糖果纸边上是密密麻麻的笔记。
E: This is a strange coexistence of prophetic texts and toys — dust-covered cloth dolls lie next to half-unfurled scrolls, while scattered candy wrappers sit beside densely scribbled notes on a meditation mat.

C: 若不想在横渡冥河时被万千哀魂撕为碎片…还请审慎行事。
E: If you do not wish to be torn to shreds by the countless mourning dead when you cross the River of Souls... I would implore you to act with caution.

C: 只是…要尽早。你知道，我这年纪…已经看得见塞纳托斯的影子了。
E: It's just... It must be soon. As you know, I am not a young man anymore... I can already see Thanatos' shadow before me.

C: 嗯…据说刻法勒不再回应凡人了，所以你已经问不了它了。
E: Hmm... It's said that Kephale no longer responds to mortals, so you won't get an answer.

C: 没有，这就是个普通柱子。
E: No, it's just an ordinary pillar.

C: 地板没有发光，这就是刻法勒的回答。
E: The floor does not glow. That's Kephale's answer.

C: 呼呼…也就是说，即使被困在废墟里，这也是泰坦的试炼，所以大家都要听从祭司的安排对吧？
E: Phew... So, even if they're trapped in the ruins, this would be a Titan's trial, and everyone must follow the priest's guidance, right?

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>友爱之馆的水车上</color>……
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>on the waterwheel of the Library of Philia</color>...

C: 辛苦，别把自己累着了。
E: Thank you, and don't wear yourself out.

C: o((•'ω´• )っ「好的欧，累计消费满<unbreak>500</unbreak>块沐浴皂赠<unbreak>100</unbreak>块的赠品券，发放到{NICKNAME}的账户里了欧」)∋
E: o((•'ω´• )っ "Alrighty. The 'buy <unbreak>500</unbreak> soaps get <unbreak>100</unbreak> free' coupon has been sent to the account of {NICKNAME}." )∋

C: 胃、胀胀的…
E: I feel bloated in my belly...

C: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o「猜猜看…先抵达『结局』的是你，还是我…或者是他们？」)∋
E: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o "Who do you think will reach the 'end' first — you, or me... or them?" )∋

C: 在这黑漆漆的迷雾中，你隐约看见几位身着白袍的祭司正面向圣烛静默祈祷。他们的脚下铺陈着新摘的松枝、月桂与鲜花，你似乎闻到了某种阳光晒在干爽衣物上的味道。
E: In the pitch-black mist, you vaguely see several white-robed priests silently praying before the holy candle. Freshly picked pine branches, laurels, and flowers are laid beneath their feet, and you catch a faint scent reminiscent of sun-dried clothes.

C: 在你触碰开关的瞬间，流淌的金色液体渐渐沉寂。你的意识也随着金色一同逝去……
E: The moment you touch the switch, the flowing golden liquid gradually stills. Your consciousness fades away along with the gold...

C: 毫无疑问，你曾在故事里见过这个庞大的木制道具，瞧它那高高昂起的头颅，以及宽广到足以装进好几个人的空洞腹部——所有特征都与你的认知相符。
E: No doubt you recognize this massive wooden prop from tales of old — its proud head held high, its cavernous belly large enough to hold several people — every detail matches the stories you know.

C: 能见到那个人了吗！
E: Can I finally meet that person!?

C: 好好好，我这就离开。
E: Alright. I'll get going.

C: 「岁月」泰坦的神像，没有面孔，和你在命运重渊见过的颇为相似。
E: A faceless statue of the Time Titan stands here, much like the one you encountered in the Abyss of Fate.

C: 麦粒与面粉是哀丽秘榭的主要物产，凝结着村民们的汗水与心血。
E: Grain and flour are key exports from Aedes Elysiae, each sack packed with the villagers' sweat and pride.

C: 迷！还让不让人睡觉了？我要画个圈圈诅咒你！
E: Mem! Can I get some sleep around here!? I'm gonna put a hex on you!

C: 除去饮品之外，葡萄蜜酿还常被斯缇科西亚人用作烹饪的佐料，用以增加食物的口感与风味…可惜你只能在幻境中品尝了。
E: Apart from drinking it, the people of Styxia also use grape honey brew as a seasoning in cooking to enhance both flavor and texture. Pity you can only taste it in a fantasia.

C: 「曳石爵」阿波罗尼，生于光历<unbreak>3704</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年。
E: "Dux Helkolithist" Apollonius. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3704</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>.

C: 「浪漫之半神」阿格莱雅，生于光历<unbreak>3860</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4210</unbreak>年。
E: Aglaea, the Demigod of Romance. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3860</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4210</unbreak>.

C: 未来的命运？在那样的命运之中，还会有你我吗？
E: The future destiny? In such a destiny, will you and I still exist?

C: <size=28>——「馄饨回忆」吧！</size>
E: <size=28>"Memory of Chais"!</size>

C: 你仔仔细细检查了每一片叶子，每一条根茎，甚至翻开了每一块泥土，并没有发现躲藏着的神秘间谍。
E: You scrutinize every leaf and rhizome, turn over every piece of dirt, and do not find anything suspicious.

C: 即使物质泯灭了，只要它还存在于记忆中，就将一直活下去。
E: Even if all matter is annihilated, it can continue to live on in the form of memories.

C: 我尽量解答～
E: I'll try to answer to the best of my abilities!

C: 是我。
E: It's me.

C: 明白！您已经帮了我们太多——接下来的事就交给我们吧。
E: Got it! You've helped us out so much already, so leave the rest up to us.

C: 不必多说，带路吧。
E: Say no more. Take me there now.

C: （佩佩和{NICKNAME}是天下第一好的搭档，你会帮佩佩的对吧？）
E: (Peppy and {NICKNAME} are the world's best detective duo! You'll help Peppy, right?)

C: 与其他终端不一样的是，这台终端与外界联系——基于数据保密原则，其他终端仅限在内网使用。
E: Unlike other terminals, this terminal can contact the outside world — due to data protection, other terminals are limited within the intranet.

C: 佩佩将它揣进了背包中，多节俭的狗狗啊，不知道它会不会把平时散落的每一颗狗粮都捡起吃掉。
E: Peppy tucks it into the backpack. What a thrifty puppy! I wonder if it'll usually pick and eat all the scattered dog food?

C: 出示
E: Present Evidence

C: （神探佩佩——等等，差点忘记解除同步了！）
E: (Detective Peppy — hold on! Almost forgot to desynchronize!)

C: 我们这儿锁门了，你从哪里进来的？
E: Our door is locked. Where did you come from?

C: 哪来的狗？去去去！
E: Where did this dog come from? Shoo, shoo!

C: 好有活力！但人家总觉得，翁法罗斯的忙碌日子似乎要暂时告一段落了。这样也好，步调慢下来，生活才更放松。
E: Such energy! But it seems like Amphoreus' hectic days are winding down. That's a good thing. Slowing down helps to relax and enjoy life.

C: 接下来，可能会一段时间没有新的故事了。
E: There might not be new stories for a while.

C: 光说我，你不也没睡觉嘛。
E: You admonish me, but you didn't sleep either.

C: 夜晚那么长，千万别让自己孤单。笑一笑，好吗？
E: The night stretches on forever, don't sit here feeling lonely. How about a smile?

C: 是的，在发呆。
E: Yes, I'm just spacing out.

C: 对阿格莱雅来说，那会是什么呢？
E: What would that be for Aglaea?

C: 出什么事了？
E: What's happened?

C: 滴、答…心境阻塞……
E: Tick, tock... I'm having a bad mood...

C: 唉，咱们都是苦命人…
E: Alas, tough lives for both of us...

C: 好吧，请问要让我做什么？
E: Well, what do you want me to do?

C: 老夫以为今天的测试会难住你，没想到被你三下五除二地解决了。
E: I thought that today's test would be difficult for you. Didn't expect you to solve it so quickly.

C: 欸，若是再加一力场束缚粒子，把无法逃逸的岁阳能量拧成一根打狗棍，那这「匣里流光」岂不是能够削～铁～如～泥～了！
E: If we add a force field to bind the particles and twist the inescapable heliobus energy into one strand, it will make the Luminflux Pyxis able to cut anything.

C: 哈哈哈，还是小娃儿你靠谱。老夫我准备回去了，你也注意安全啊。
E: You're more reliable than them. I am going back now, you take care.

C: 绘星突然想到什么，向你投来的目光转了几转。
E: A thought suddenly pops into Huixing's head, and she looks you up and down.

C: 我告辞了。
E: See you later, then.

C: 有什么事吗？
E: What's up?

C: 你好像一直隐瞒着什么事啊？
E: I feel like you've been hiding something this whole time.

C: 你一直都在接私活吧！
E: You've been doing side gigs the whole time!

C: 下次我要输了，我绝不废话！你记住了啊！
E: If I lose next time, I will not prattle! Remember this!

C: 对不起，我比赛要开始了。
E: Sorry, but my match is about to start.

C: 现在就玩。
E: Let's play!

C: 甚至还有激进一些的方案，叫作「Re凿六合」。
E: There was even a more radical option called "Re-xanexus."

C: 仅限我们被金丝相连时。你早就亲自体验过了，不是吗？
E: Only when we are connected by the golden thread. You've experienced it personally before, haven't you?

C: 我从预言中得到了提示…但好像并不完整？
E: I got a hint from the prophecy... But it seems incomplete?

C: 嗯…比起未来，有位织者更注重当下的生活。金丝带来消息，它正<color=#dbc291ff>趴在一面墙上</color>悠闲地打发时间呢，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... a weaver is more concerned with their present than future. The golden thread brings tidings: It is <color=#dbc291ff>lying on a wall</color>, leisurely whiling time away. Go look for it there.

C: 嗯…如果没有记忆残晶，衣匠是无法提供协助的——就连大地兽都不会饿着肚子工作。之后再来吧，贵客。
E: Hmm... The Garmentmaker cannot provide their services if you have no Memory Crystal Shards... Not even a dromas will work if they are left hungry. Come again another time, dear customer.

C: 眼下我们手头已经有一则预言了。在处理完它之前，其他预言的解读就暂且搁置吧。
E: We are already working on one prophecy. We must put any other prophecies to the side for now while we work on this one.

C: 它们会同意吗？
E: Will they agree to it?

C: 嗯…有位织者不满于美的凋零，总想为人们添加一分亮色。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>某位卫兵的头上</color>，把自己扮成饰品呢。去欣赏一下吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver, unsatisfied with the fading of beauty, who wishes only to add a touch of brightness to others. The golden thread brings tidings: It now resides <color=#dbc291ff>on the head of a certain guard</color>, pretending to be an ornament. Seek it out and admire its glow.

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the remaining nymphs?

C: 你证明了自己的力量——任何若虫都无法比拟，我会为你让路。
E: You have proven your strength. No nymph is your equal, I will open the path for you.

C: 喀喀——都过去这么久了，居然还有人想要踏上求索之路……
E: Crrrkkk... Long has it been, yet there are still some who wish to tread the path of discovery...

C: 敝人虽不才，可「神偷」的名头还是远近闻名的。您要是入伙，一定不会为今天的下注后悔。
E: Though I may not have your talents, my reputation as the Master Thief is still known far and wide. Joining us would be a bet you wouldn't regret...

C: 已经可以做出判断了。
E: The truth is clear as day.

C: 实在是太奢靡了！这里纸醉金迷的气息，让我感到恶心！
E: It's far too extravagant in here! The stench of its opulence and lavishness makes me sick!

C: 关于你的过去…
E: About your past...

C: 一、一定是有人冒充吧？或者，也可能是当时我计策的一环…一定是这样的！
E: S—Someone must be impersonating me! Or perhaps, it could be one of the steps in my plan back then... That must be it!

C: 我银河球棒侠，天下无敌！
E: I am the Galactic Baseballer, and I'm invincible!

C: ——和我抢宝箱也就算了，现在连张写满废话的旧纸，您也揪着不放了？
E: ...Trying to snatch chests loaded with treasure from me is one thing, but an old scrap of paper covered in nonsensical scribbles? You won't even let something like that go?

C: 它从大海深处的无底洞里偷出了一颗巨大的原石；又为了鉴定其中是不是真的蕴含着一块充满魔力的水晶，所以把这块石头升到了天上，好劈开看看究竟……
E: This huge raw stone was pilfered from the bottomless depths of the sea. Then, to determine if it really held a crystal filled with magical power, the stone was lifted to the sky to split it open and peer inside...

C: 它恢复了泰坦的力量？
E: Did they recover their Titan powers?

C: 你猜，咱们分别在这个比喻的第几层里？
E: Can you tell the implication of this metaphor I am referring to right now?

C: 说到底，你为什么不独吞它呢？
E: Why didn't you just keep it for yourself in the end?

C: 你别说…咱有时候就想，对于更外面的世界来说，翁法罗斯是不是就像一个大大的宝箱？要是这样，和咱们作对的铁墓，大概就相当于一只讨厌的宝箱怪吧！
E: Y'know what... Sometimes I wonder if Amphoreus is like one big treasure chest to the outside world? If that's the case, then Irontomb, our enemy, would be nothing but an annoying mimic!

C: 哦，当然，巴特鲁斯随时随地响应您的召唤！
E: Oh, absolutely! Bartholos, at your service, anytime, anywhere!

C: 懂了，我上。
E: Got it. I'm on it.

C: 而{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的回应，毫无疑问是在点醒愚笨的我，父亲的学识早已在世间各处开花结果…他是位伟大的人。
E: And {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s response is undoubtedly reminding me that my father's wisdom has long taken root all over the world through his students... He was a great man.

C: 原谅我的自作主张，辅祭。但我…也希望能得到答案。交给你了。
E: Forgive my presumption, acolyte. But I... I also wish to know. Your turn.

C: 门开了——这边这边——
E: The door's open — this way, this way—

C: 义不容辞。
E: I won't turn my back on this.

C: 伊来内…我…？啊，是的…我是祭司伊来内。
E: Alain... I...? Ah, yes... I am Priest Alain.

C: 这次匣子里面是余火吗？
E: Is this one holding the ember?

C: 不，不要紧。谢谢你，英雄大人！只是……
E: Yeah, we're fine. Thanks for the rescue, hero! It's just...

C: 云朵？莫非……
E: Clouds? Could it be...

C: 请帮我…找到回去的路。我想要回到那片天空。
E: Please help me... find the way home. I want to return to that sky.

C: 声音没有回答，半晌：「这是你的选择…」它低声说，「但均衡必将得到维系……」
E: The voice does not answer, then after a while: "It is your choice to make..." And it continued, "But in the end, equilibrium will be upheld..."

C: 我还可以存档？
E: I can save?

C: 继续…
E: Continue...

C: 继续…
E: Continue...

C: 「成功了！」黑塔兴奋地喊道，「那是浮黎，祂以为你是已陨的阿基维利，主动向你搭话——比我想得还棒，浮黎对我们的研究非常有帮助，因为祂拥有所有人的记忆，知道的东西仅次于{RUBY_B#「智识星神」}博识尊{RUBY_E#}！出来吧，{NICKNAME}，我要升级『模拟宇宙』，以后你要在里面待更久一点！」
E: "We did it!" Herta yells with excitement, "That was Fuli. THEY thought you were the fallen Akivili, so THEY actively started a conversation with you. Fuli is valuable for our research because THEY have the memories of all beings and know almost as much about everything as {RUBY_B#Aeon of Erudition}Nous{RUBY_E#} does! Come on out, {NICKNAME}, I want to upgrade the Simulated Universe. You need to stay in there even longer in the future!"

C: 什么？
E: Huh?

C: 你在说啥？
E: What are you talking about?

C: 「出什么事了？」黑塔说，「你怎么像睡着了一样？噢，难道Ⅸ又来了？快离远点！」
E: "What's going on?" Herta asks. "Why do you seem to be asleep? Oh, is IX here again? Stay away from it!"

C: 你就是个球！
E: You are a ball!

C: …活在过去也没什么不好。
E: ...There's nothing wrong with living in the past.

C: 你对眼前突然出现的漆黑并不陌生…毕竟什么怪事都可能被你撞见，第一次或又一次…你面前出现了三个影子：那些存在过却又已湮灭的生灵偶尔会出现在这里，他们面容闪烁，有时又变成梅尔西耶兹养子般的虫类形象…或许他们有着不同的灵魂。
E: You are no stranger to the sudden darkness that envelopes you... for you have experienced too many inexplicable things, time and time again... This time, three shadows appear before you. Those who have once lived and perished may occasionally appear here. Their features flicker and waver, at times taking the form of insects resembling Melchiez's adopted sons... Perhaps they possess different souls.

C: 她的面色凝固了…她的血液似乎在血管里停止流动。接着，她请你离开。
E: She winces... as if her blood has stopped flowing through her veins. Then, she asks you to leave.

C: 一切都结束了——你得相信一切已经结束。你的面前只剩一些正在参与「灾后心理救助」的忙碌人群…他们面色青灰，如同昔日城邦的遗址；一切彰显着末日的余韵。
E: The calamity has ultimately ceased, or at least one must believe so. Ahead lies only those tending to the psychological needs of survivors, their ashen visages not unlike the ruins of their forlorn city now deprived of its former glory in the wake of the apocalypse.

C: 「是你对食材太挑剔了，螺丝。」黑塔呛声， 「每次下午茶都是阮•梅的糕点，和你的贵族料理，还有机油…我都看腻了。」
E: "Come on, Screwy. You're simply too picky about dishes," Herta retorts. "Our refreshments for afternoon tea are always Ruan Mei's pastries and your aristocratic cuisine served with machine oil... I am getting tired of them."

C: 但斯蒂芬•劳艾德觉得这次是个大工程，坚持要单开一个项目分支，叫《模拟宇宙：寰宇蝗灾》。
E: But Stephen sees this as a major project and insists on creating a separate branch for it called Simulated Universe: Swarm Disaster.

C: 「我们好像有进展了，别晕头转向。」黑塔的气声传来，她难得正经，似乎对接下来要发生的事带有一丝兴奋，「你能不能给自己弹个脑瓜清醒下？仔细看——我们推演出塔伊兹育罗斯了。」
E: "We seem to be making progress. Don't get overwhelmed." Herta's voice comes through. Unlike her usual self, she speaks seriously and seems excited about what is going to unfold. "Can you hit yourself on your head and focus? Take a closer look - we've derived Tayzzyronth."

C: 「是啊，{NICKNAME}身兼要职。」黑塔说，「每个天才都觐见过博识尊——我是说那位真正的星神——你可以随时向祂发问，但祂几乎不会回应…呃，你是阿基维利，祂的兴趣应该会高一些。」
E: "That's right. {NICKNAME}'s got an important task ahead." Herta says. "Each Genius pays their respects to Nous — the real Aeon, mind you. You can query THEM at any time, but THEY will almost never respond... Err, you're Akivili, so THEY'll probably be more interested in you."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>善见天论证一个比之前更为浩瀚与恐怖的战争将在某个杀毒程序启动后爆发</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>eden of blessed insight argue a war more epic and terrifying than before will erupt after a certain virus killer program activate</color>

C: 「仪器已记住了你的选择。」星际和平公司特聘专员向你鞠了一躬，「期待你的自我认知发展，旅途愉快。」
E: "Your choice has been recorded in the device." The IPC recruiter bows at you. "I look forward to seeing the development of your Intra-Cognition. Have a great trip."

C: 你唯一知道的是：自己要窃取「反有机方程」。
E: There is only one thing on your mind — stealing the Anti-Organic Equation.

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 获得第三个启示。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — Obtaining the third revelation.

C: 曾有人想要把它们改造成间谍无人机，但谁都没法忽视一条在空气里慢悠悠甩动尾巴的金鱼。
E: Someone once wanted to change them into spy drones, but it's frankly impossible to ignore a goldfish slowly waggling its tail through the air.

C: 超负荷运行引发的材料疲劳，让舰队不得不停下休整。几位路过的行商登上了舰船，带着仙舟联盟的警示，劝告你们结束这场求药的旅程。
E: Overloaded operations led to material fatigue, forcing the fleet to stop and rest. Several traveling merchants pass by and board, bringing warnings from the Xianzhou Alliance advising you to cease this voyage for the elixir.

C: 文明的伊始。
E: The beginnings of civilization.

C: 要足够高效。
E: You must be sufficiently efficient.

C: 他递交给你一份药单，要求你如数抓取。你认出手中药单是治疗狂思症的秘方。
E: He hands you a list of medications and asks you to collect precisely the amounts instructed. You recognize this list of medications as a secret formula for curing mania.

C: 导师边喘气边骂。「他们是一群历史的蛀虫，文明的天敌。烧毁图书馆、砸碎文物、谋杀烛墨学派学者…我真恨不得拿这把铁铲拍扁他们。」
E: The teacher begins to curse through intermittent panting. "They are no more than an infestation in the annals of history, the enemies of civilization. They burned down libraries, smashed cultural relics, and assassinated Candelagraphos scholars... If I had my way, I'd smash their heads in with this shovel!"

C: 《基础星神论》是帕隆莱刻学院的新生必修课。台下是你的第三十届学生，他们来自帕隆莱刻及其周边的七十九颗星球，在联觉信标的帮助下，知识的跨语言传播成为可能。
E: Basic Aeonic Theory is a mandatory class for new students at Palonglek Academy. Seated before you, you see your thirtieth class of students, originating from Palonglek and its 79 surrounding planets. Thanks to the Synesthesia Beacon, the cross-linguistic sharing of knowledge has been made possible.

C: 你和学士彼此对视。第一次见面时，你们还是三十岁出头的青壮年，如今五十年过去，你们已满头白发。
E: Your gaze meets the scholar's. When you first met, you were fit and young <unbreak>30</unbreak>-year-olds. Now, your hair white and your faces wrinkled.

C: 似乎所有人都遗忘了一个事实——这些智慧并不属于在场的任何有机生命。
E: It seems like everyone has forgotten a truth — all these pearls of knowledge do not belong to any organic life present.

C: 我有保持沉默的权力。
E: I have the right to remain silent.

C: 「权杖」摧毁了整个星域的联觉信标，你回到了没有欺骗与谎言的时代。在星间蔓延的呓语中，烛墨学派捕捉到谜语的气息，可他们也不清楚，记录本身是否也染上「神秘」。
E: The Scepter destroyed the Synesthesia Beacons active in the entire quadrant. You have once again returned to a time without deceit. Inside the gibberish that spreads among the stars, the Candelagraphos caught the scent of riddles, but they could not tell if even the records themselves had been tainted by Enigmata.

C: <unbreak>0.1</unbreak>秒后，最后的核心成为了废铁。
E: <unbreak>0.1</unbreak> seconds later, the final core becomes scrap metal.

C: 她多半也是来问那些无聊问题的，老人心想。孤波算法难题，要么，就是追问博识尊和帝皇的线索。
E: She's probably here to ask me the same old boring questions, the old lady thinks to herself. Something about the solitary waves theory or clues on how to locate Nous and the Emperor.

C: 它太美了…
E: It's beautiful...

C: 希望这些知识会为你的探索提供帮助。
E: I hope that this knowledge will assist in your search.

C: 想象一只蝴蝶，一只微不足道，振翅飞翔的蝴蝶。
E: Imagine a butterfly, an insignificant butterfly flitting its wings.

C: 我是一个世界。
E: I am a world.

C: 「琥珀王的恩赐，『克里珀』存护这片地脉。你可以挑一个带走。」
E: "Qlipoth, the blessing of the Amber Lord, preserves these leylines. You can have one of them."

C: 穹顶圣洁的光辉，照耀楼梯上的杂书。你随手打开一本书，书页上布满斑驳的色块代码。
E: The sacred light from the firmament shines on the books scattered on the stairs. You open a random one to find the pages filled with patchy color block codes.

C: 「杰姆·哈克在<unbreak>371029</unbreak>秒前已经停止运转，杰姆·哈尔即将在<unbreak>74158</unbreak>秒后停止运转，无法再保存哥哥的物品。不情之请，请您带一个离开这里。」
E: "Jim Hulk stopped functioning <unbreak>371,029</unbreak> seconds ago. Jim Hall is about to stop functioning in <unbreak>74,158</unbreak> seconds and can no longer keep my brother's items. Please help me. Bring one of these out of here."

C: 将你从危机中解救后，纯美骑士们忧郁地注视着你…
E: After rescuing you from danger, the Knights of Beauty stare at you with melancholic expressions...

C: 一位纯美骑士认为你仍对「奇物」不堪重负，因而帮你将奇物全部换成了宇宙碎片！
E: One of the knights thinks you are unable to bear the weight of the Curios, so he replaces all your Curios with Cosmic Fragments!

C: 他小声对你说，「将你的废物投入，它们会进化出一些进步意识…然后自己精神焕发地跑出来！」
E: In a hushed voice, he says, "Put your waste in it, and the items will evolve into an advanced awareness, then come running out energetically on their own!"

C: 你呆在食人鱼的胃里等待着漂流过海…你暗自想着：它不爱吃萝卜，对此你很庆幸。等抵达岸上，就即刻储存进度吧！
E: You stay in the piranha's stomach, waiting to cross the sea... You think to yourself, "Luckily, it doesn't eat carrots." Save your progress immediately when you reach the other side!

C: 「造物工作已完成，请验收——注：由本设备制造的任何物品，其专利及解释权归▄▀▄▄学派所有。」
E: "Creation complete. Please take your item. Please note: The patent and right to interpretation of any items created by this equipment are the sole property of the School of ▄▀▄▄."

C: 自然的纯粹，科学的简洁，演化毫不吝啬把它们赠予同一位造物。你悄悄靠近这只苍猿，蠕动的手指已按捺不住心中的激动。
E: The purity of nature, the simplicity of science — evolution has generously gifted both of these traits into one creation. You silently sidle close to this ape, your wriggling fingers barely able to suppress the excitement threatening to boil over in your heart.

C: 不知是否被触碰到了伤口，亦或是单纯心情不爽，苍猿蛮横地纵身而起，露出獠牙，发出威吓的吼叫。
E: Perhaps you accidentally touched its wound — or it is simply agitated — the ape brusquely leaps to its feet, bares its fangs, and bellows loudly in intimidation.

C: 迪喀纳人以垂钓的方式向水晶母亲献上祈祷，母亲会顺应每个人的意识，给予相应的回报。说罢，大祭司将一块黄金挂在鱼钩上，用力抛投向固体海洋。
E: The Dygnans use angling to offer prayers to the Crystal Mother, and she gives everyone reciprocating rewards based on each of their will. After saying this, the High Priest hangs a piece of gold to the hook, casting it powerfully into the solid sea.

C: 你遇见一位胡子拉碴的吟游诗人，他为你展示古老的布袋，盛满了银河的记忆。
E: You come across a bearded poet that shows you an ancient pouch stuffed full of the cosmos' memories.

C: 「第<unbreak>312</unbreak>次失败，可以接受。」学士格式化了失败的电子培养皿。
E: "The <unbreak>312</unbreak>th failure. This is acceptable." The scholar formatted the failed electrical incubator.

C: 「这可是我的珍藏。」愚者大笑，「青面獠牙的面具，在疯王卡利的王国里掀起了一场暴乱，在那个只有高举宝剑的孩子才能进入的王国，猜猜她干了什么？」
E: "This is my treasure." The Fool roars in laughter. "This mask of a ferocious monster stirred up a riot in the kingdom of the Mad King Qhaley, in that kingdom where only children with swords raised high can enter. Guess what she did?"

C: 你从狂热的氛围中脱身，逃也似的离开了多洛斯城，身后骰子的声音仍转动不停。
E: You extract yourself from the fervent atmosphere, leaving Dolos as if fleeing from it, the relentless sounds of rolling dice behind you.

C: 草地的湿润与泥土的香气，都在告诉你，危险已离你远去。你张开双臂，手却骤然触摸到一块冰凉的东西。
E: The dampness of the grass, the fragrance of the earth... they all tell you that danger is far behind you. You stretch your arms, only for your hands to abruptly touch something cold.

C: 生命从此会死亡。
E: From that moment, life became capable of death.

C: 雨滴是它的佳酿。
E: The raindrops are their finest brew.

C: 你可知晓蝴蝶曾掠过窗前？纺织此世爱的金线。
E: Do you know the Butterfly Flitted Past Window, weaving the golden thread of love into this world?

C: 羞愧的浪漫之泰坦在逃跑时扇动翅膀，鳞粉落下，让苹果都染上黄金。当然，这不过是诗人们蹩脚的牵强附会，仅当作笑谈，倒还算合理。
E: The shamed Romance Titan, in their flight, flapped their wings, and the scale powder fell, turning apples to gold. Of course, this is just a clumsy justification by poets, merely a reasonable jest when taken as such.

C: 一切井井有条。
E: Everything is meticulously ordered.

C: 经过羊肠般蜿蜒的经纬小径，穿越正在进行哲学辩论的仙女木林，出现在你面前的是所有翁法罗斯学者的圣地——神悟树庭的友爱之馆。
E: You follow the Woven Trail, its winding paths twisting in intricate, almost deliberate patterns. Passing through the White Dryad Woods, where philosophical debates took place, you finally arrive at the most sacred place in all of Amphorean academia — the Grove of Epiphany's Library of Philia.

C: 毕竟就算明天便是世界末日，我们也没办法改变任何事情，只不过是徒增烦恼。所以，活在今天才是最好的答案。
E: After all, even if tomorrow brought the world's end, we could change nothing, it would only multiply our despair. So living for today remains the wisest answer.

C: 当小偷也挺惨的。
E: It's pretty rough being a thief.

C: 确实很伟大。
E: They are truly merciful.

C: 但死神并不知道，瑟希斯早已和大地秘语轻谈，让腐朽的生命化为滋养的元素，去盈润崭新的生命。
E: But the Reaper did not know Cerces had already murmured to the earth, transmuting decay into nourishment for new life.

C: 一枚千纸鹤，或许藏有终端机的密码，你小心地将它拆开，字迹浮现于眼前——
