E: An origami crane that perhaps contains the password for this terminal. You gently take it apart, and some words unfold before you...

C: 回答错误，请不要自欺欺人，欺人！
E: Incorrect answer, please don't deceive yourself and others, don't deceive!

C: 目前排名第一的歌曲名叫：《黑塔女士乃世界之光》，第二名叫：《黑塔情歌》，第三名叫：《黑塔女士发现我一个人做实验》。
E: The current #1 song is titled "Madam Herta is the Light of the World." #2 is "Herta's Love Song," and #3 is "Busted by Madam Herta Experimenting Alone."

C: 就算说了，难道你会不签吗？你看着就是那种藐视代价的人，先把选择做了，哪管洪水滔天。
E: Would you have refused to sign if I'd told you that? You seem like the kind who doesn't think much about consequences. You will make a decision regardless of its price.

C: 崇拜星神「浮黎」的派系，他们觉得认知即世界，记忆则是世界存在的证明。为此，这群人不惜放弃肉身。
E: It is a faction that worships the Aeon Fuli. In their opinion, the world is defined by everyone's perception, and memories are the proof of the world's existence. They are willing to forgo their physical bodies for that purpose.

C: 他似乎注意到了你。「先生，」他以那惯常一丝不苟的微笑示人，「这剧目令您感到厌烦了么？」你无法从他的话语中察觉任何情绪…这令你有些许不适。
E: Renoir seems to notice you. "Sir," he asks with his usual impeccable smile, "do you find the opera boring?" The fact that you cannot detect any emotions in his words makes you feel uncomfortable.

C: 你以直径<unbreak>20</unbreak>厘米的<unbreak>160</unbreak>度广角镜头环视会场。<unbreak>46</unbreak>根大理石石柱将直径<unbreak>43</unbreak>米、高<unbreak>138</unbreak>米的穹顶高擎，使这东西宽<unbreak>190</unbreak>米、南北长<unbreak>310</unbreak>米的柱廊大厅显得十足宽阔。
E: You scan the venue through a <unbreak>160</unbreak>-degree wide-angle lens with a diameter of <unbreak>20</unbreak> cm. Thanks to the <unbreak>46</unbreak> marble pillars that support the dome ceiling with a diameter of <unbreak>43</unbreak> meters and a height of <unbreak>138</unbreak> meters, the colonnaded hall <unbreak>190</unbreak> meters wide and <unbreak>310</unbreak> meters long appears spacious.

C: 这场会议真是无聊到令人绝望…「在凯尔萨斯星，人人都可以畅所欲言！」翻译官如是说。黏土女王满怀深情地望着你，而你正好奇它的眼睛究竟长在哪里。
E: The meeting is boring you to tears... "On Kalsas, anyone can speak their mind!" The interpreter relays to you. The Clay Queen gazes at you, and you wonder where the queen's eyes are.

C: 全完了！——你猛然意识到这一点。你想喝止他，却发现自己发不出声…毫无疑问，你正在由内自外快速*硬化*——就像眼前那几尊熟悉的骇人骨雕……
E: Oh no! You suddenly realize something. You want to stop him, only to discover that you can't speak... Beyond the shadow of a doubt, you are experiencing rapid PETRIFACTION from inside out, just like those familiar-looking yet terrifying bone sculptures in front of you...

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：闲暇时光。
E: Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "Free Time."

C: 豹~
E: Seal~

C: 这些大高个子穿得都好土啊，一点也不符合我家太太的审美……
E: These big guys are all dressed so unfashionably, nothing like the style my lady likes...

C: 吾主会找到我吗…
E: Can my master locate me...

C: 我听说，它们把人抓到后就、就会……
E: I hear, that after catching innocent people, th—they will...

C: 你说这不是高山，只是持矛君王的雕塑？差点被它骗了喀！
E: Are you telling me that's not a mountain, but a statue of the Spearlord? You almost had me there!

C: 不过…持矛君王手下的工匠，用料也太扎实了！我的脑壳都嗡嗡响了喀！
E: However... The Spearlord's craftsman really gets to use the good stuff! My head's buzzing loud!

C: 虫子应该呆在真正的家！
E: Nymphs should live in their true home!

C: 我不能接受！
E: I won't accept this!

C: …你没事吧，{F#姐们儿}{M#哥们儿}？
E: ...Going to be all right, {F#sister}{M#brother}?

C: 奸商…
E: What a sly merchant...

C: 敌意和臭味一同消散了。你眼前只剩下一个空空如也的宝箱。
E: The hostile presence and stench dissipate. An empty chest lays in front of you.

C: …可这样的好意却徒增了你阅读的压力。你扫过那些客套的、用来传递友好的文字，眼睛已经开始生疼…终于，你在纸张的最下方发现了值得注意的重点。
E: ...But this kind thought only manages to make reading more difficult for you. As you scan over those polite and pointless words, your eyes start to hurt... Finally, you find the most important part at the bottom of the page.

C: 床铺舒适度——不满意。
E: Bed: Unsatisfactory.

C: 「亲爱的住客，请您评价本宾馆房间的采光和窗景。」
E: "Dear guest, please rate the lighting and view from your hotel room."

C: 那我就收下了——谢谢你嘞，{NICKNAME}！你的意见非常宝贵，我这小宾馆的服务质量肯定会因为你的反馈得到提升的。
E: I'll take that, then — thanks loads, {NICKNAME}! Your opinion is highly regarded, and your feedback will definitely help improve the quality of our service in this boutique hotel.

C: 那我们先来猜拳，决定一下谁来抓人吧！
E: We'll decide who's it by rock-paper-scissors.

C: …算了算了！今天就玩到这里吧——
E: ...Whatever! We're stopping the game here...

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 那个，这是我的一点心意…还请铁卫{M#大哥}{F#大姐}笑纳！
E: Umm. This is just a small token... Please kindly accept it, {M#Sir}{F#Miss}!

C: 有缘再见了，我的同好！我要回去静养了…愿我们下次相遇时……
E: Until we meet again, my fellow fan! I need to go and recover... I hope that the next time we meet...

C: 诶，天平的这部分其实并不会动？被我家大大骗了喀！
E: Wait, this part of the scale can't actually move? Boss hustled me!

C: 你打开了小宝箱，木板腐朽的气味扑鼻而来。
E: You open the small chest. The smell of rotten wood pervades your nostrils.

C: 我保证。
E: I guarantee it.

C: …虎克已经无语了！
E: ...I'm too shocked to talk!

C: 不错，思路清奇。于是，你挺起腰板，站到了桌子后……
E: Nice. That's some fresh thinking. So, you stand up and get behind the table...

C: 你为自己争取到了又一次机会，新晋矿工{NICKNAME}。别浪费它。
E: You've earned yourself another chance, rookie miner. Don't waste it, {NICKNAME}.

C: 真是的，让我瞧瞧…这个原本是放在哪里的喀……
E: Honestly now, let's see... which shelf did this belong on, crrk...

C: 如此壮美、如此宏伟…
E: How magnificent... such grandeur...
Two...

C: 嘤嘤~我是女王大人的骑士，奉命于此守护宫殿——目前看来一切正常嘤。
E: Eep~ I'm the knight of the queen, tasked with guarding this palace — everything seems fine for now, eep.

C: 我记得这宝库里曾经琳琅满目，为何现在空空如也嘤？
E: I remember this treasury used to be filled with treasures. Why is it empty now, eep?

C: 瞄准了再打！
E: Aim before you shoot!

C: 这只虫托举着一个石球，仿佛在扮演「负世」的刻法勒。只要稍微不小心，这球就可能从它身上滚落……
E: This little creature bears a stone ball, playing the part of the "Burden of the World" Kephale. One slip, and the sphere could fall...

C: 咕嘟咕嘟，头好晕，意识远去了，思绪模糊了，烦恼和忧愁也都通通融化了……
E: Bloop bloop... My head's spinning, my thoughts drifting, my worries and sorrows melting away...

C: 黑潮怪物，别过来啊！
E: Black tide monster, stay back!

C: 无礼，这种危急关头，你竟不遵守骑士礼仪，偷袭了我心爱的坐骑！
E: How rude! At such a critical moment, you disregarded knightly etiquette and ambushed my beloved steed!

C: 果然我天生就遭人嫌弃，你别催了，我马上就离开，永远地离开。
E: Just like I thought, I naturally cause people to dislike me. Don't rush me. I'll leave right away. I'll leave forever.

C: 嗯，仙舟上到处都能遇到，毕竟它们要送快递嘛…要不，你再讲讲「忧伤」是什么情况？
E: Uh-huh. You can see them all over Xianzhou. They handle deliveries... Why don't you tell me about what this "depressed" business is all about?

C: 有没有可能是你不知道呢？
E: Is it possible that you just don't know?

C: 你们在这里做什么，闲杂人等，不得靠近！
E: What are you doing here? Idlers are to stay away!

C: 等等…有一只机巧鸟商品是在动的。
E: Wait... A cycrane product is moving.

C: 我要输了，我就回到梓桥那里，你要是输了，那就算货全老哥也输了，如何？
E: If I lose, I'll go back to Ziqiao. If you lose, then Salesby loses as well. How 'bout that?

C: 题目也不简单，我听说很少有人能答得上来。
E: It's not a simple one, and hardly anyone can answer it.

C: 我本来不打算告诉你的，实际上，在你来之前，我就在考虑要不要回到鹤运物流，一直很难下定决心…你算是顺水推舟了。
E: I wasn't planning on telling you, but before you came I was thinking about whether or not to go back to Heron Express. It's so hard to make up my mind... You're really just pushing things along.

C: 千载难逢！
E: A once-in-a-lifetime opportunity!

C: 那我可更不能放水了——我一定要让你体会一下，三百岁的实力究竟有多恐怖！
E: Then I'm definitely not throwing — I'll show you how terrifying three hundred years of might can be!

C: 你给我等着！我一定要让你体会一下，三百岁的实力究竟有多恐怖！
E: Wait for me! I'll show you how terrifying three hundred years of might can be!

C: 这是你的奖励，请拿好！明年也请记得再来小店看看啊！
E: Here's your prize. It's all yours! And we'll see you next year for the next annual contest.

C: 多亏了你，我们实际没有蒙受什么损失，所以我们并不打算索赔。
E: Thanks to you, we didn't even end up suffering any damage — so we didn't need any compensation.

C: 不署名了，你们随便写吧。
E: I'm not signing it. You guys write whatever you want.

C: 这上面的颜文字说要去<color=#dbc291ff>网上发帖</color>…是在暗示什么吗？
E: The emoji here says to <color=#dbc291ff>make a post online</color>... is that supposed to be a hint?

C: 我知道，我知道，我也向神策府的青镞大人打听过，有没有云骑军或者飞行士的志愿者愿意来参加测试，就是没人回应嘛。
E: I know, I know. I even asked Madam Qingzu at the Seat of Divine Foresight if there were any volunteers from the Cloud Knights or pilots willing to participate in the test, but no one responded.

C: 我是重生了吗…
E: Did I get reborn?

C: 看热闹的人闻着味儿就来了，结果这俩傻蛋儿连面都没见着，就知道在那儿狂刷玉兆放狠话。
E: People who wanted to watch the show came on their own. Those two fools only knew how to brag and talk big using the jade abacus, but they didn't even manage to meet face to face.

C: 广告牌小姐优雅地躺在货架先生的怀里，他们沉浸在彼此的坚硬身躯中，挡住了你的去路。
E: Miss Billboard is gracefully laid in the embrace of Mr. Shelf. They have lost themselves in each other's hard, unyielding bodies and are blocking your path ahead.

C: 这地方比我家宽敞…
E: This place is bigger than my house...

C: 我追求的艺术就是这个！
E: This is the art I'm pursuing!

C: 前面的区域，请您继续探索吧。
E: Please continue exploring the area up ahead.

C: 看…看不见我…
E: C—Can't see me...

C: 你们之后有什么打算？
E: What plans do you all have for later?

C: 塞纳托斯远离我！
E: Thanatos, begone!

C: 为什么你要哭呢？
E: Why are you crying?

C: 物资只够撑十五晨昏…
E: We've got rations for fifteen daybreaks, tops...

C: 返航之后，是不是忘了些重要的事帕？
E: Since coming back, is there anything important that you've forgotten about?

C: 怎么样？你觉得帕姆能拿几分？
E: How about it? What would you score me?

C: 我的衣服纽扣不知道什么时候丢了…明明上次有认真缝好的！现在衣服就豁开了个大口子，太丢人了……
E: Pom-Pom's not sure where, but my button's fallen off somewhere... Pom-Pom did sew it on my uniform last time. But now my clothes have this big open gap, and it's simply embarrassing...

C: 没有办法的，帕姆的耳朵里、脑海里，已经都是那个声音的样子了！
E: There's nothing Pom-Pom can do. My mind and ears are just full of that song!

C: 「逛逛」？你想「逛」什么，不如直接问我帕！
E: "A stroll"? Why stroll around when you can just ask me anything!

C: {NICKNAME}乘客的评价确实公平公正，只是通过给配色取外号的方式，就凸显出了其中的核心问题！
E: {NICKNAME}, you've indeed evaluated the colorways fairly. The nicknames you gave them have highlighted their core weaknesses!

C: 让我检查一下…呜哇！怎么地板这么湿了！难道{NICKNAME}乘客把水壶打翻了吗？
E: Let me check... Woah! Why is the floor so wet? Did you flip over a kettle or something, {NICKNAME}?

C: 「双手」？
E: Hands?

C: 听说艾丝妲给空间站买了处理杂务的机器人，要是能借一两个到列车上来就好了。
E: I heard that Asta bought some robots for the space station to handle chores. It would be great if I could borrow one or two for the Express.

C: 噢，正巧「种子岛」新研发了一批代餐食品。稍等，我需要在终端上走一下流程。
E: Oh, it just so happens that the Seed Isle has newly developed a batch of meal replacement foods. Hold on, I need to get the process done on the terminal.

C: 现在列车上收藏的碟片并不多，你要是有什么特别想听的音乐，可以先跟我说。
E: There are not many discs on the train now. If you have any music you want to listen to in particular, you can tell Pom-Pom.

C: 前方区域风险系数较高，请及时清除高危单位，降低物流风险。
E: The risk factor for the area up ahead is very high. Please clear away high-risk units to reduce the impact on deliveries.

C: …嗯？你在说什么呢？
E: ...Huh? What are you talking about?

C: *电波滤音*为了你的安全，我帮你远程启动了「回响发生装置」。
E: *electronic voice* For the sake of your safety, I've remotely activated the Reverberation Generator.

C: 不过，仅凭一只次元扑满是没有办法在如此大范围内制造异象的，你懂我的意思吧？
E: However, it's impossible for only one Warp Trotter to create such a large-scale anomaly, if you understand what I mean.

C: …那你别来凑热闹！
E: ...Then go away!

C: 神秘的孩子
E: Mysterious Kid

C: 回…家……
E: Go... home...

C: 什么？！你连自己犯了什么事都不知道，怎么一秒就怂了？
E: What? Did you just give up without knowing what you did?

C: 自动刷新？你怕不是在做梦吧！
E: Renew? Are you from another world?

C: 无论如何，你得打开这个箱子才能知道里面装了什么。但这听起来有点…不道德。
E: Either way, we've got to open the suitcase to know what is inside. But that sounds a little... dishonest.

C: 但一码归一码——消耗「崇高道德的赞许」后，你就可以心安理得地打开这可疑的箱子了。上吧！
E: But one thing at a time, you will have nothing to worry about when you consume a "Praise of High Morals" to open this suspicious suitcase. So, go ahead!

C: 算了，算了！你请便，就打开它看看吧——反正没人知道这是谁的箱子……
E: Fine, you go ahead and open it. No one knows whose suitcase this is anyway.

C: 上面刻有「华劳斯」的字样，另附一行「如有好心人拾到此物，请速联系华劳斯•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀，必有重谢」。
E: The moniker "Wallace" is engraved on the watch, along with the line, "Should this item come into your possession, kindly contact Wallace Cambridge Limestein. Your act of kindness shall be handsomely recompensed."

C: 左脚…右脚…转身…深呼吸…见鬼，为什么要深呼吸？你想打喷嚏，但努力忍住了…站定…然后……
E: Left foot... Right foot... Turn around... Take a deep breath... Darn it, why a deep breath? You wanna sneeze, but manage to suppress it... Stand firm... And then...

C: 可不是吗？好好想想，现在——猜猜看，那是谁的脚步声？
E: That's exactly right! Just think about it. Now, take a guess. Whose footsteps are those?

C: 你看，这幅——我记得你这位同伴是叫「三月七」吧？这张画像是我最满意的…我觉得它非常生动。
E: Look, this one — I remembered your companion's name is March 7th, right? This is the one I'm proudest of... I think it's indeed very vivid.

C: 四处瞎看。
E: Blindly look around.

C: 可惜，虽然你的志向远大，但地理就是一门死记硬背的学问。你必须找到一个记忆的基准点，一个突破口……
E: Despite your great aspirations, geography is a field that relies on memorization. To make a breakthrough, you will have to find an efficient mnemonic.

C: 你还以为这里会有克里珀堡的机密文件呢。真没劲。至少得给本阅读物吧？
E: You really thought there'll be some top-secret documents on Qlipoth Fort here. How boring. At least give me something to read?

C: 还是惩罚我吧，布洛妮娅大人！
E: Punish me, Lady Bronya!

C: 准备好了。
E: Ready.

C: 即便如此，菲多拉总是不自觉地哼唱起这首歌，突然有一天，她问我自己唱得是否好听。
E: Even so, Fidora always hums along to this song involuntarily. One day, she suddenly asks me whether her singing is good or not.

C: 现在比较流行这种随机感。
E: Being spontaneous is totally in right now.

C: 碧翠丝哭了一整晚。但我知道你根本不在乎。
E: Beatrice cried the whole night, but I know you don't care.

C: 咔哒！清脆的声音从机械锁中响起。第二道机关也被你解开了，真棒！
E: *click* The lock clanged loudly and crisply. You've solved the second number too. Awesome!

C: 哟，这不是…西蒙勋爵给我的那块表嘛！我正纳闷这玩意跑哪去了呢，谢谢你啊。
E: That's the watch Lord Simon gave me as a gift! I was just wondering where it had gone. Thank you so much.

C: 虽说冤有头债有主，但咱碰瓷过的苦主数不胜数，记不得了…
E: Every action must be held accountable, yes, but I'm afraid I've lost count of the number of people I've run this scam on...

C: 被骗了这么多？要说怎么骗子不够用呢……
E: That much!? Not even a scammer could spend that much...

C: 可它绝对与那些罐子不同。即使你说不上来哪里不同。它有一种压倒性的存在感，但不知怎么，四周的行人都对它视而不见。
E: But it's definitely different from all those other vases, even if you can't tell what that difference is. Its presence is overwhelming, but is somehow ignored by passers-by.

C: 看来，这是一封匿名咨询信。从信中言语看来，这小店曾属于一名为「逍遥先生」的神秘人，大概是以写信提供建议、为人排忧解难营生。
E: Looks like this is an anonymous advisory letter. Judging from the contents, this small shop once belonged to a mysterious person named Mr. Carefree, who probably made a living by composing advice for other people.

C: 你提笔落款，一气呵成，将自己这篇不大美观的书法作品放回盒内。
E: You sign your name in one flowing motion, and shove your crude calligraphy back into the box.

C: 这附近好像有一些<color=#dbc291ff>干扰信号</color>…怎么回事？虽然应该和咱们要找的货物没关系，不过要不要过去看一看呢？
E: There seem to be some <color=#dbc291ff>interfering signals</color> in this area... What's going on? I suppose they aren't related to the items we are looking for. Should we check them out anyway?

C: 信号监测系统提示，当前区域搜寻任务已完成，但附近仍有<color=#dbc291ff>可疑的信号</color>。
E: The signal monitoring system indicates that the search of the current area has been completed, but there are still <color=#dbc291ff>suspicious signals</color> nearby.

C: 这里猎狗绝对找不到…
E: The hounds will never find this spot...

C: 没关系，没关系…毕竟是我们有求于人，还得看你的时间安排。
E: No worries... After all, we were the one requesting help. We'll work around your time.

C: 你怎么也是银行工作？
E: So you work in a bank, too?

C: 我找的不是书，那真的是一个铁盒。
E: I'm not looking for a book, but an actual iron box.

C: 抱歉，没想到你是个这么感性的人，我问错问题了。
E: Sorry, I didn't expect you to be such a perceptive person. I asked the wrong question.

C: 我想，我的愤怒…大概只是出于妒忌而已。
E: I think that this rage of mine... probably stems from envy.

C: 倒过来的M？
E: An upside-down M?

C: 有这么可怕吗？
E: Is he that bad?

C: 哈？就算我对你这家伙印象还不错，再敢乱开这样的玩笑，小心挨揍哦？
E: What? Sure, we've been getting on well, but if you dare to joke around like that again, I'll give you a hiding, okay?

C: 掏出球棒。
E: Pull out a baseball bat.

C: 我还有事要忙。
E: I have other matters to attend to.

C: 你看着倒是个好苗子…怎么样，有兴趣进军影视圈吗？老头子我保证能把你培养成知名导演。
E: You seem like a good prospect... How about it, are you interested in joining the ranks of the cinema circle? I guarantee to train you up to become a famous director.

C: 一群乌合之众……
E: A real motley crew...

C: …要不你们好好聊聊？
E: ...Why don't you guys sit down for a nice chat?

C: 你觉得我是在耍小脾气，是吧？你觉得我这是任性、蛮横、无理取闹，是吧？
E: You just think I'm sulking here, don't you? You think I'm headstrong, rude, and causing a scene — right?

C: 你知道吗？我时不时就能回忆起当时的情景。
E: You know what? Sometimes I think about what happened back then.

C: 浪漫一点的。
E: Make it a little more romantic.

C: 你一定打得很漂亮。
E: I'm sure you're a master.

C: 最后，我决定把坐标发送给公司——这会暴露我的行踪，而且捞不到半点好处。不过在如此壮观的景象面前，钱已经无足轻重了。
E: Finally, I decided to send in the coordinates to IPC — which would expose my location without offering me up any gain whatsoever. But after witnessing such a grand sight, money no longer seemed to matter.

C: 是啊，也很有{RUBY_B#「欢愉」}乐子{RUBY_E#}。为祸一方的机械海盗王，最后落得个这样的死法。
E: Yes, truly an {RUBY_B#"Elation"}enjoyable{RUBY_E#} moment. The Mechanical Pirate King, a menace of the era, meeting his end like this.

C: 是吗？那我们算竞争关系了。到手的肥肉可不能随便让给你！
E: Really? Then we're competitors. I'm not gonna let you in on this cash cow that just fell into my lap!

C: 一千就一千。
E: That's a deal.

C: 你们不走，我就打到你们走！
E: If you don't, I'll beat you up till you do!

C: 这{M#小子}{F#丫头}如此嚣张，指不定身上也背着什么悬赏，咱们先把{M#他}{F#她}拿下再说。
E: If this {M#boy}{F#girl} can be so aggressive, there might be a bounty out for them. Let's arrest {M#him}{F#her} first and find out later.

C: 探索本身就是最大的意义。
E: Exploration is the main reward, in and of itself.

C: 如果权贵让步，结局会好吗？
E: Will the ending be better if the rich and the powerful relented?

C: 不尊重我可以，但要是不尊重我的团队、还有我们辛苦产出的作品，那就越界了！

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 后面做事还是得小心点。还是先拿逐梦客开刀比较好…让我想想，除了豪华飞车，还有什么商品用到了我的专利……
E: I should be more careful about my next step. Maybe it's better to target those Dreamchasers... Let's see what other things have infringed on my patents...

C: 男人的声音十分沙哑，这在遍地苏乐达的美梦中并不多见。他瞥了一眼身旁的拼图架。
E: The guy's voice is hoarse, which is pretty rare in this sweet dream filled with SoulGlad. He glances at the puzzle rack next to him.

C: 刺耳的风凉话…但我已经习惯了，随便你吧。
E: Harsh sarcasm, huh...? But I'm used to it, whatever.

C: 如果您有寻人需求，可以前往前台咨询接待人员。如果有需要，猎犬家系会尽力配合……
E: If you need to find someone, please ask the receptionist. The Bloodhound Family is always ready to help...

C: 为了她，我努力精进自己的厨艺…我希望让她足不出户就能品尝到来自四面八方的佳肴，这就是我展现爱的方式。
E: So, I dedicated myself to perfecting my culinary skills for her... I wanted her to experience the flavors of the world without leaving her home. That was my way of showing love.

C: 但她是如何回报我的？她抛弃了我！践踏了我的尊严！有一天，她下班时谎称自己加班，结果却被我撞见在隔壁的快餐厅偷吃汉堡！
E: But how did she repay me? She abandoned me and trampled on my dignity! One day, she told me she was working overtime, but I caught her red-handed eating a burger from the fast food joint next door!

C: 有什么话就快说吧——浪费的绩效算在我不讲礼貌的部下身上就好。
E: Spill it now. My rude subordinate here will take the rap for my subpar work efficiency today.

C: 谢谢您，不过我的经纪人完全不认同这种音乐。
E: Thank you, but my manager doesn't approve of it at all.

C: 拉洛丝露出了更加自信的笑容，仿佛正站在万众瞩目的舞台上。
E: Larose's smile grows more confident, as if she were standing on a stage in the spotlight.

C: 听过你的话后，女人主动退回了安全地带。
E: The woman steps back to safety after hearing you.

C: 不，不是故意的…怎么可能是呢……
E: No, I didn't do it on purpose... How could it have been...

C: 我犯的错，真能那么轻易放下吗？
E: Can I really let go of my mistake so easily?

C: 他等待着、谋划着，终于在<unbreak>13</unbreak>岁那年，成为某个外来取材的漫画家的助手——从此，再没有什么能阻碍他了 。
E: He waited and made plans for it. Finally, at the age of <unbreak>13</unbreak>, he became an assistant to a visiting manga artist who came to find inspiration. From then on, nothing could stand in his way.

C: 再说了，就算我真的经常和员工培养感情又如何？凭什么因为这点小事就污蔑我审美低俗、对青少年造成不良影响？
E: Also, what's wrong with me having a close relationship with my employees? Why should I be criticized for having vulgar taste and being a negative influence on teenagers?

C: 你知道吗，我最大的优点就是敏锐的嗅觉——尤其是对于金钱与时尚。
E: You know what? My keen senses, especially for money and fashion, are my strong suit.

C: 我有话想跟你说。
E: I want to talk to you about something.

C: 鉴于诸位的身份和过去的行为，我破例准许你们在朝露公馆自由行动。
E: In light of your status and previous behavior, I am making an exception and allowing you free rein in Dewlight Pavilion.

C: （看起来她好像没有什么攻击性…要不要给她一些她想要的东西呢？）
E: (She doesn't seem to be that aggressive... Why don't we give her a little of what she wants?)

C: 甜甜的…酸酸的……
E: Sweet... sour...

C: 我感觉自己受到了背叛…因为我无法理解他们怎么能背着我做出那种行径。我们是同父同母的兄弟姐妹…我们本应无话不说，没有隔阂，像真正的「家人」那样。

C: 啊…我突然想起一段美好的时光。
E: Ah... I just recalled a wonderful time.

C: 啧…看来你都知道了啊。
E: Tsk... Looks like you've figured everything out.

C: 乖乖跟我们走吧，「大慈善家」？

C: 明明没有人能拒绝镜子、没有人能拒绝自己心中的「完美」…碎片怎么就失效了呢……

C: 在梦境里，那东西比粘在鞋底的牛皮糖还要难缠。若不是家族和诸位贵客及时出手，后果将不堪设想。
E: In the Dreamscape, that thing is even more difficult to get rid of than gum on the bottom of your shoe. I can't imagine what would have happened if it were not for you and The Family.

C: 啧…都说学校教的东西没用，我又何尝不清楚这些呢？

E: Satisfied, you depart with your newfound loot. This world has witnessed a new merry soul.

C: 事物不是一成不变的——就像这些木桶不会一直空着一样。

C: 这里似乎是她的实验室？你不合时宜的困惑剥夺了所剩无几的求生欲。

C: 你跟艾丝妲说啊，别找我。
E: Tell Asta, I don't want to know about it.

C: 大家都没有疑问吧？
E: No one has any objections, do they?

C: 哼，希望「公司」真能有这么好心。
E: Humph, let's hope the IPC is feeling generous.

C: 伐木机枪。
E: A tree-felling machine gun.

C: 很好，等一切结束后，我们的征途就会是星辰蓝天。

C: 如果装上高出力的塔吊，它就能协助我们修复其他机体，凑出一支由造物引擎组成的「筑城队」。
E: If we equip a powerful tower crane, it will be able to assist us with repairing other machines and form a "fortification team" made up of Engines of Creation.

C: 再想想。
E: Let's keep thinking.

C: 几个木箱子凌乱地摆在这儿，看来它就是第二处废料点。
E: A few wooden boxes are piled carelessly on the floor. Looks like this is the second scrap point.

C: 看表！现在的时间是——
E: Look at the watch! It's time to —

C: 那…那你该醒来了啾！
E: Then... Then it's time to wake up, tweet!

C: 就是在下！
E: It's me!

C: 得回去向赤红大哥报告安全隐患了啾——

E: There's something here that feels invisible...

C: 钟表小子最近不在家，房子里只有我和巡逻的小弟们啾——但它们却没能发现偷溜进来的客人，太丢脸了啾！
E: Clockie hasn't been home recently. It's just me and the patrolling lads, tweet. Yet they didn't see the guest who snuck in. What an embarrassment, tweet!

C: 关于折纸小鸟…
E: Tell me about the origami birds...

C: 总之，小镇外很危险，工地也很危险啾！请尽快离开吧，啾啾！
E: In short, it's dangerous outside the town, and the construction site is very dangerous too, tweet! Please leave quickly, tweet tweet!

C: 哼哼…没错，有个调皮的助手老爱在工作中恶作剧，常常躲在<color=#dbc291ff>「咖啡套组座椅」附近</color>吓鸟一跳啾~
E: Hehe... That's right. There's a mischievous helper who loves playing pranks during work. It regularly hides <color=#dbc291ff>near the coffee set chair</color> to give others a scare, tweet!

C: 求解真理的道路还很漫长啾…要是脑子还没开窍，就去大树那边找我吧。
E: The path to understanding the truth we seek is long, tweet... If your mind has not yet been opened, come and find me at the Great Tree.

C: 没错！小镇中的所有电影都是在这里拍摄的啾。关于小镇居民们的影片也会在这里上映呢~
E: That's right! Every movie in Dreamville was shot right here, tweet! Any movies about the residents of Dreamville are shown here, too~

C: 满分，我给满分！
E: Full marks, I'm giving this full marks!

C: 他们迷路了。
E: They're lost.

C: 人在哪儿？
E: Where's everyone?

C: 啾！你好，要不要握个爪啾？
E: Tweet! Hello, want to shake claws, tweet?

C: 这样啊，我下次换一种类型的灯泡再试试啾。
E: I see. I'll switch up the lightbulb and try again next time, tweet.

C: 这个座位有什么特别的吗？
E: What's so special about this seat?

C: 是景元将军派我来的。
E: General Jing Yuan sent me.

C: 但似乎原本难解的局面因你的出现而发生了改变，这是永仁也未曾想到的。
E: However, the originally unsolvable dilemma has changed thanks to your intervention. It was something that Yongren didn't expect.

C: 这里没有第二个人。
E: There is no one else here.

E: (What should I do? Come on, {NICKNAME}, say something!)

C: 朋友，你说话好吓人。
E: Friend, you're a real scary talker.

C: 救、救救救命啊——
E: H—Help me...!

C: 怎么样，就当是给我解闷儿了。我心情好了，自然就不会乱跑，我不乱跑，大家心情都好。是这个道理吧？
E: How about it? Just think of it as a way for me to stave off boredom. If I'm in a good mood, I won't run around all over the place. And if I don't run around all over the place, everyone else is in a good mood — right?

C: 我跟你学。
E: I'll learn from you.

C: 那还不好办？我可以附在我师弟身上挨打啊！
E: Isn't that easy? Just possess my junior frater and take a beating!

C: 啊？这……
E: Oh? Well...

C: 走吧，小佩。我们一定要找到她……
E: Let's go, Pennie. We have to find her...

E: ...Three of the same symbol. You lose.

C: 你认识那位赌神吗？
E: Do you know this Ace Gambler?

C: …我愿意。
E: ...I will.

C: 金色酒瓶的律动最为欢脱，它似乎早已习惯了、并且在享受着这个游戏。它与水晶杯之间的距离不断地拉进、放远、拉进、再放远；尽管无言，但它们之间似乎早已达成了某种默契。
E: The gold wine bottle is the best dancer. It appears to be very experienced in attending such occasions and is having a good time. It approaches the crystal chalice and then pulls away from time to time. Although the two do not speak, they seem to have formed some sort of rapport with each other.

C: 你懂得真多…我还没去过「热砂的时刻」呢，下次你带我去嘛，好不好？
E: You're so knowledgeable... I've never been to Moment of Scorchsand. How about you take me there next time?

C: 这…确实没有人啊。我也不知道为啥突然出现那么多怪物啊！
E: But... there really isn't anyone around. I have no idea why there are suddenly so many monsters here!

C: 就是个名不见经传的杂牌工厂，外包了点业务，才挂了名酒的牌子。
E: They said you're from a no-name producer that outsourced some work and stuck on a label from a high-end brand.

C: 我自知天赋愚钝，但若有您的助力，或许能为死者做到什么。
E: I know that I am a little slow-witted, but with your help, maybe I could at least do something for the deceased.

C: 咱们好好过自己的日子，不和小混混一般见识。
E: Let's just go on with our lives and not sink to those nasty gangsters' level.

C: 犯人并不是故意杀人，是驾车途中意外撞到了受害者。在不知情的前提下，受害者被车向前拖拽，所以磁带才会被扯到这么长。
E: The culprit did not intend to kill him. They just accidentally hit the victim with their car while driving. Unaware of what had happened, they continued to drag the victim forward with their car, which is why this tape had been stretched so far.

C: 想带离现场的话…
E: If they wanted to take it away from the scene...

C: 桂乃芬…
E: Guinaifen...

C: 你是不是故意放水？
E: Did you make it easy on purpose?

C: 是我，知更鸟。这副面孔说话不太方便，稍等……
E: It's me. It's a bother talking with this face, hang on...

C: 你说的没错，不过…我们还有许多能做的事。
E: You're right, but... we still have much more to do.

C: 总有人要把手里囤的货出掉，但我不建议你找他们购买。想买这张专辑的粉丝很多，价格也自然水涨船高，另一方面……
E: You'll always find someone who's stockpiled the albums and can sell you one, but I don't recommend buying from them. So many fans want to get their hands on it that of course the price has been driven up. And also...

C: 对，这才像话，你向来都是遵纪守法的好公民，即使偶尔误入歧途，也不会再犯错。只是…该去哪找刚才的那几个猎犬家系成员呢？
E: Yes, now that's more like it. You've always been a good law-abiding citizen even if you're sometimes misled, and you won't be making any more mistakes. If only... if only you could find those Bloodhound Family members from just before.

C: 买吧，不会吃亏的。
E: Buy it. You're not getting a bad deal.

C: 邀请，狠狠地邀请！
E: Yes! Send the invites to 'em all!

C: 那要是放到某些{NICKNAME}不想公开的场景，岂不是…岂不是尴尬了！
E: But what if it plays something {NICKNAME} doesn't want anyone to see? Th—That would be so embarrassing!

C: 冥差大人，{F#她}{M#他}心虚了。
E: Your Honor, {F#she}{M#he} is guilty.

C: 在下一定会将今天发生的一切作为重要的教训。
E: I will definitely take what happened today as an important lesson.

C: 我们本来还在丹鼎司四处找人询问如何爬建木，结果那个小孩就是十王司的。
E: We were looking around the Alchemy Commission to find someone to ask how we could climb the Ambrosial Arbor. However, we didn't expect the little kid that we asked was from the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: 你们去就去，千万别提我。
E: Just don't mention that you've met me if you're planning to go there.

C: （预感到会有麻烦，扭头就走）
E: (I sense this is going to be a pain. Time to turn and leave.)

C: 别人会让我放炮？
E: They're just going to let me fire them?

C: 怎么，还没结束吗？
E: What? Are we not done here?

C: 你们来到竞锋舰的擂台中，你感觉到仁科以某种方式固定住了你的视角。
E: As you arrive at the Skysplitter stage, you feel Renke fix your line of sight using some strange methods.

C: 老头，刚才不是很嚣张么？
E: You had a lot more to say for yourself before, old man. Why so quiet now?

C: 门外刚来的那六个人，我数数…你们尽量站得让我能看清，哦，那就是你的七个孙子？
E: Those six outside that just arrived, let me count them... Stand still so I can count you properly! Oh, so these are your seven grandsons?

C: 你不带个兄弟吗？
E: Will you not take a brother with you?

C: 我投降！我投降了！
E: I surrender! I surrender!

C: 至于自始至终都没听懂的课程？说真的，除了筑梦学院那位讲师之外，谁在乎呢。
E: As for the class that you couldn't understand from start to end? Honestly, apart from that Dreamweaver Academy lecturer, who cares about those lessons?

C: 啊？剧本不是写好了吗？
E: Eh? I thought the script already decided it?

C: （「小金」对演艺事业相当有激情，但能力或许还有所欠缺。）
E: (Goldie is pretty enthusiastic about acting, but its skill might be left wanting.)

C: 把电影场景布置好。
E: Set up the film scene.

C: 对啊，不过你放心，睡相很好，没有踢被子呢，阿妈说，睡觉不踢被子的小孩就是好孩子。
E: Yeah. But don't worry, you slept really well. You didn't kick off the blankets. Mom says that kids that don't kick off their blankets are sweethearts.

C: 圣烛底座上有着扎格列斯的标识…钱袋…想必是这位泰坦对你这种外来者的恶作剧。
E: The base of this holy candle seems to have a symbol of Zagreus... The pouch... This whole thing might just be a prank the Titan is playing on outsiders like yourself.

C: 不知为何，听他这么说，望着熄灭的烛火，你心中忽然有种跃跃欲试的冲动。
E: You don't know why... But hearing him say that and gazing upon this extinguished candle makes you feel an impulse to give things a try.

C: 下次记得听题，抱歉。
E: Remember to listen to the question next time. Sorry.

C: 所以这说明什么？
E: So what does that mean?

C: 竟然无法反驳……
E: Touché, can't argue with that logic...

C: 关上灯吧。
E: Let's turn off the lights.

C: 求知若渴的本狮可不会轻易放走送到嘴边的「猎物」，你已经别无选择了吼！
E: My thirst for knowledge will not easily let go of prey that presents itself on a silver platter! You have no other choice!

C: <unbreak>25</unbreak>万利衡币！
E: <unbreak>250,000</unbreak> Balance Coins!

C: 使用传信石版求助。
E: Ask for help with the teleslate.

C: 没错，是无法放下的仇恨。
E: That's right. It's hatred that people refuse to let go.

C: 听起来很可怜！但没事，大大扎是怪家伙，搞丢脑袋也不会觉得疼！
E: That sounds awful! But it's okay. Big Zaggy's a strange fellow — they won't feel pain even from losing their head!

C: 再想想？
E: Think again?

C: 吼吼，标准答案还是要等本狮来揭晓——很简单，就是「时间」！
E: Ho-ho, I shall reveal the correct answer then — simple, it is "time"!

C: 它生前最爱假扮成旁白。
E: Pretending to be the narrator was its favorite hobby.

C: 放心吧，我不仅不会给你添麻烦，还会帮助你保护你的电脑。绝对没有任何杀毒软件，比我「超智能病毒」更擅长消灭计算机病毒！
E: Trust me, not only will I not cause you any trouble, but I will help you protect your computer. There is absolutely no antivirus software that is better at killing viruses than me, the Supersmart Virus!

C: 呼呼。我还要燃烧自己到什么时候？
E: *crackle* How much longer do I have to keep burning myself?

C: 讲讲你的故事？
E: Tell me your story.

C: 我就是颗滚动的小石子，被风吹到哪里，呼呼，我就呆在哪里。离开{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}神躯的时候，我还以为冒险总算要开始了。
E: I am a rolling stone, and I go where the wind takes me. *crackle* After leaving {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios'{RUBY_E#} divine body, I thought my adventure was finally going to start.

C: 呼呼。屋顶的风很大，我得保护好火苗才行。
E: *crackle* The wind up here is very strong, and I must protect the flame.

C: 接下来是最后一个问题：什么东西在这里令人生厌，却能在别处产生价值；有些人嫌弃万分，有些人爱不释手？
E: Now, for the final question: What is loathed by some but cherished by others? What is shunned by some and sought by others?

C: 垃圾。
E: Trash.

C: 正确答案是垃圾！如果你是这样看待自己的，那就让我把你装进桶里吧！
E: The correct answer is: Trash! If that's how you see yourself, then let me place you inside me!

C: 没钱万万不能…
E: You can't do anything without money...

C: 拿好吧，这是本王赐予你的奖励。
E: Here, take this. A reward bestowed upon you by your king.

C: 改成一片火红。
E: Paint the town fiery red.

C: 哥哥，我们是不是要被灭口了？
E: Brother, are we going to be eliminated?

C: 好厉害的守擂者…
E: What a monstrous defending champion...

C: 什么？你应该感到恐惧，恐惧！既然你不打算害怕，那就体会痛苦的滋味吧！
E: What? You should be terrified, petrified! If you don't intend to be fearful, then experience the taste of suffering!

C: 和恶霸桶一起踢小桶。
E: Join the bullying can in kicking the little can.

C: （好伙伴，我当然是白厄！八岁那年……）
E: (Of course I'm Phainon, good partner! When I was eight...)

C: 传授它「电子邮箱」。
E: Teach them about "email."

C: 家里还没收拾干净，还没做好旅行的口粮，离开太久的话家里怎么办？风铃没有响起，恐怕不是个好兆头吧？
E: The house still needs tidying. I haven't packed food. If I'm gone too long, what'll happen back home? And the wind chime... it hasn't rung. That can't be a good sign, can it?

C: 你仔细查看风铃，一切都完好无缺。或许还缺少一些能让它响起的契机吧……
E: You took a closer look, and nothing seemed broken. Maybe it just needed the right moment to ring...

C: 等一下，变出来了一只小奇美拉！不过，怎么有点眼熟……
E: Wait a second, a little chimera appears! But it looks kinda familiar...

C: 不知翁法罗斯背后暗中酝酿的毁灭，是来自早已闻名寰宇的焚风、星啸、铁墓，还是像幻胧这样尚不为世人所知的大君。
E: I wonder if the destruction secretly brewing behind Amphoreus comes from renowned Overlords like Zephyro, Celenova, and Irontomb, or from one still unknown to the world, like Phantylia.

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡。靠近时，能依稀听到一些零散的字词，例如…「来古士」。
E: Bubbles drift through the air. When you get close, you can dimly make out disconnected words, including... "Lygus."

C: 因为我们一同经历过很多事。在朦胧的记忆里，人家可是作为要好的伙伴，在{NICKNAME}身边待了很久呢。
E: Because we've been through so much together. Even in those blurry memories, I was always by {NICKNAME}'s side as a close friend.

C: （上前看看…）
E: (Step forward to look)

C: 我也是个贪心的人，所以要坐得更高一些。这样收进眼底的风景也会更多。
E: I'm a greedy person too. So, I want to sit a little higher. That way, I can take in more of the scenery before me.

C: 对了，我不在的时候，可不许自己一个人跑到屋顶上哦？别让人家担心。作为替代，人家还会带你来屋顶看风景的！
E: Oh, when I'm not around, you can't come up to the roof alone. I'll be worried. In exchange, I'll bring you up on this roof to look at the view.

C: 讲讲匹诺康尼的见闻。
E: Talk about Penacony.

C: 悄悄告诉你一个秘密，哀丽秘榭的麦田，会永远地留在丰收的时刻。
E: I'll let you in on a secret. The wheat fields of Aedes Elysiae remain eternally in the season of harvest.

C: 在记忆黯淡的时候，我们依然能够跨越所有距离，把目光投回「当时」，让自己与那些重要的瞬间——再度{RUBY_B#初见}重逢{RUBY_E#}。
E: Even when our memories fade, we can still traverse all distances and look back at the "past" to {RUBY_B#encounter}reunite{RUBY_E#} with those treasured moments.

C: …先放在这里。走，跟我去搬其他东西。
E: ...Leave it there for now. Let's go. There's more where that came from.

C: ——愿塔兰顿给予他与牺牲相等价的馈赠。愿他的灵魂安息。
E: ...May Talanton reward him with a gift fitting of his sacrifice. May his soul rest in peace.

C: 右…右右右，还是右…您的意思是，我该先迈右脚？虽然不太习惯，但我尽量。
E: Right... Right, right, right, and another right... You mean that I should step out on my right foot? That seems unnatural to me, but I will try my best.

C: 这次你总算说对了。别在这匹木马上耗费时间，还是去做点更「开拓」的事吧。
E: That's right for once. No more wasting time on this wooden horse. Time to go and do something more fitting of the Trailblaze.

C: 你来晚了。
E: You're too late.

C: …去找同伴的那个。
E: ...The one searching for their partner.

C: …去找同伴的那个。
E: ...The one searching for their partner.

C: 毕竟这里是高温浴池。
E: After all, this is a hot spring.

C: 你看得出来，佩佩对这个名字十分满意。
E: You can tell that Peppy is really happy with the name it's been given.

C: （带它去拜访其他人）
E: (Take it to visit other people)

C: …呃，不过要是有什么设备需要维修，还是跟大家一样，喊我「修东西的那个谁」或者「维护科小哥」就好。
E: ...Uh, but if any of your devices needs fixing, then you can just call out the same as everyone else: "Hey, Mister Fix-it" or "Maintenance Dude" — either's fine.

C: 那还是不打扰你了。
E: Well, then, I'd better leave you alone.

C: 别怪我没提醒你，军团余孽尚未清缴完毕，现在的空间站还是危机四伏。
E: Don't say I didn't warn you. The station hasn't been cleared of Remnants of the Legion yet, there's still danger lurking around every corner.

C: 而且……我总是觉得，身边会突然出现一道裂缝。而那些怪物，就会从裂缝里缓缓走出来……
E: And... I always feel like a crack might suddenly appear next to me. And those monsters will slowly emerge out of the crack...

C: 不仅如此，研究课题进度汇报也暂停了。这句话意味着什么，不用我多说了吧？
E: Moreover, the research progress report is also suspended. You don't need me to spell it out for you, do you?

C: 他但凡拿出雕刻石头的心思，到真正的科研上去，做出和莱斯莉一样的成就来，那才叫一个厉害！哎，这小子，真是气死我了。
E: If only he had spent his effort carving rocks into his research and made achievements like Lesley! Hmph! He's killing me!

C: 关于你的工作…
E: About your job...

C: 你也在那个群里吗？
E: Were you in the group chat we busted?

C: 说起来，你和我们不一样，我们都是阮•梅造物，你感受到了吗？她的爱…都凝结在这里。
E: You're different from us, you know? We're Ruan Mei's creations. Can you feel it? Her love... It's all here in this place.

C: 我是个…阮•梅都不要的失败品，你来，你是来看我笑话的吗？喵？
E: I'm just a failure that even Ruan Mei doesn't want. Say, are you here to laugh at me? Meow?

C: 还有…还有芝士流心，它有时候会故意过来嘲笑我，呜呜…它说是因为我太失败了，阮•梅才不回来看我。
E: And... there's also Molten Cheese Tart, who sometimes comes out of its way just to mock me. *sniffles* It said that Ruan Mei didn't visit me because that's how much of a loser I am.

C: 你不是失败品，你很独特。
E: You aren't a failure, you're special.

C: 好吧！
E: Alright!

C: 以后别在大家面前喊我「芝士流心」了，就算是喊我「尊贵的芝士流心大人」也不行。
E: Please stop addressing me as "Molten Cheese Tart" in public, not even "Honorable Lord Molten Cheese Tart".

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: {F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}呜？一起玩呜？
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, woo? Play with me, woo?

C: 我负责用小机器人远程实时监控它们，记录一下收集到的数据、它们的行为表现什么的…听起来有点枯燥，不过我感觉还蛮有意思的。
E: I'm in charge of monitoring these creatures remotely with a little robot and recording the collected data and their behavior... It sounds a bit dull, but I find it pretty interesting.

C: 一道模糊的投影出现在你眼前，你似乎在空间站的某处见过这位女子的画像。
E: A blurry projection materializes in front of you. You seem to have come across this woman's portrait somewhere at the space station.

C: 还好我按捺住了购买的冲动…赞美理性，赞美瑟希斯！
E: Good thing I suppressed my impulse to buy any... Praise reason, praise Cerces!

C: 这可激起了你的好奇心。要知道，你在奥赫玛城里见过了形形色色的召唤仪式，但能让你从头开始亲自体验的，这还是头一回。
E: This scroll has aroused your curiosity. Though you have experienced all sorts of summoning ceremonies inside Okhema, this will be the first that you have experienced personally from the beginning.

C: 当然。无论何时，那里都是我的家乡。
E: Of course. No matter what time we speak of, Icatus is my hometown.

C: 这难道不是倒果为因，陷入了无限循环的推论模式吗？
E: Are you not confusing cause and effect and creating an endless loop of inference?

C: 原来神谕里说的「身陷险境」，竟是这个意思……
E: So this is what the oracle meant by being "in peril"...

C: 波瑟芬妮一定是因为…某些特殊的原因才至今未归……
E: Possephone just has her reasons... whatever they are... for why she hasn't made it back yet...

C: 没错，我就是这么认为的。
E: That's right. That's what I think.

C: 老人眼神放空，面色一派恍惚颓然，不住喃喃自语起来。
E: Her eyes glaze over and her face is in a daze as she mumbles to herself over and over.

C: 最近，我们私会有些频繁，宁芙的父母似乎察觉到了什么，开始派人暗中跟踪她，或是亲自陪同她一起。
E: We've been sneaking off a lot lately, but Nympha's parents seem to be onto us and have started sending spies to secretly tail her — or assigning a personal escort to her.

C: 这种订购的阵仗，我还只在婚宴上见过…宁芙要结婚了？！
E: It's the kind of order that you normally only see at wedding banquets... So is Nympha getting married!?

C: 厄琉斯奋力挥出强而有力的一拳，顷刻锤倒了眼前的守卫…
E: Aelius throws all his might into a massive punch, instantly knocking down the guard...

C: 过了一会，你才意识到原因……
E: It takes a while before you fully understand why...

C: 我、我明白了。我会努力攒钱，直到能去找他们的那天……
E: I—I understand. I'll do my best to save money until I've got enough to go find them...

C: 咋，你有事？
E: What's up? Do you need something?

C: 碰见您的时候，我就灵机一动：或许您拿着这几样东西去树庭里转一转，就能通过某种方式知道他们几个的下落了。
E: I had an idea when I saw you — Maybe you can somehow sense what happened to them if you go take a walk in the Grove with these things on you.

C: 太感谢了！我就在这里等着…您要是找不到线索也没关系，本来就是非分之请，我不会怪您的！
E: Thank you! I'll wait here... It's all right. Even if you don't find any clues, this is an unexpected favor, and I won't blame you for it!

C: 我也有这种感觉。
E: I have that feeling too.

C: 那个黑衣剑士…
E: That black-robed swordmaster?

C: 入侵者未免太熟悉树庭了。
E: The invader seems unusually familiar with the Grove.

C: 叫你走…不肯走…你从小就不听话……
E: You never listen... just like when we were kids...

C: 黑潮怪物…想要伤害阿塔卡玛，倒是试试看啊！
E: Back off, you black tide creature! If you want Artakama, you'll have to go through me first!

C: …老提图斯，你动作快些，慈爱之庭已经失守，晚了就走不了了。
E: ...Old Titus, you must get moving. The Courtyard of Storge has been lost. You must leave now before it's too late.

C: …《禁忌之恋：树与蝶》？气煞我了，哪个渎神的混账放的？
E: ...Forbidden Love: The Tree and the Butterfly? Damnations, which blasphemous fool put this here?

C: 我还是没忍住，一口气买了足足十份商业保险。
E: I couldn't help myself and bought ten whole insurance policies.

C: 但废话可以显得字数多。
E: But nonsense can sometimes stretch out your word count.

C: 哎，小事小事。
E: Ah, it's no big deal.

C: 这两天始终定不到实验室，哎，总之就是感觉特别焦虑。
E: I haven't been able to book a lab the past two days. *Sigh* I'm just feeling extremely anxious about it all.

C: 我看你早就做完实验了，那正好，分点那个给我，我拿去配胰酶。
E: Looks like you finished your experiment ages ago. That's good. Just give some of that to me and I can go make some trypsin.

C: …嗡嗡！
E: ...Grumph!

C: 万敌刚走就闹事是吧？！
E: So Mydei leaves, and now you're stirring up trouble!?

C: 这是什么新型的占卜仪式吗？
E: Is this some new kind of divination ceremony?

C: 你是来探望科可波三世的吧？来得正好，看——那些悬锋人给它准备了什么！
E: You're here to check on Kokopo III, right? Perfect timing — look what the Kremnoans have prepared for him!

C: 它凭什么给我试炼，我不要试炼！
E: What gave them the rights to make me go through trials? I don't want trials!

C: 以塔兰顿之名，我们在此庄严宣誓——我们将手持天平与宝剑，接受众神和众人的监督，不欺骗，不隐瞒，维护律法和秩序。
E: In the name of Talanton, we solemnly swear: We shall uphold justice with scales and sword, under the watchful eyes of gods and mortals alike. We will not deceive, we will not conceal, and we will protect the law and its order.

C: 我想带个人进去。
E: I want to bring someone in.

C: 凯妮斯大人的孙女？嗯…硬要说的话，她看上去确实和那位大人有些相像……
E: The granddaughter of Lord Caenis? Hmm...if you insist, she does look a bit like that esteemed figure...

C: 好羡慕你，能和泰坦说话。
E: I'm so jealous you got to speak to a Titan.

C: 你这家伙又来了？就算你这回带上{NICKNAME}阁下一起，我也不会答应你。
E: You again? Even if you brought {NICKNAME} along this time, I still won't agree.

C: 那很有诚意了。
E: That's quite sincere.

C: 必须写满一整页。
E: Make sure to fill an entire page with it!

C: 我的操作是一流的。
E: My skills are top-notch.

C: 诸位有什么妙计？
E: Do any of you have a brilliant plan?

C: 关于避难的难民…
E: About the refugees...

C: 小心哦！泰坦举久了也会累。
E: Careful! Titans get tired too.

C: 还有，我可是希瑞雅啊！睡过破木箱、靠偷东西把自己养活的希瑞雅，不管神谕会不会实现，我一直都很想努力地活下去。
E: Plus, I'm Serena! I've slept in busted wooden boxes, and kept myself alive by stealing. Don't matter if the prophecy comes true or not, I've always done my best to keep surviving.

C: 这就是你，亲爱的阿波罗尼，哪怕我们如今只是幻境中的一簇泡沫……
E: That's who you are, dear Apollonius, even though we're now just bubbles in an illusion...

C: 再来一次！
E: One more time!

C: 懂了，我用祷言修一下。
E: Let me guess, you want me to fix it with prayers?

C: 没错，没错，就是这个——哎呀，暌违十五年的「专属心酿」，总算回来了。
E: Oh yes! This is definitely it! The "exclusive soul brew" I've been craving for fifteen years is finally back!

C: 救世主阁下，我有一件物品要交付于你。
E: Great Deliverer, I have a special item that belongs in your hands.

C: 「心酿」回归了。把握好「仅一次」的机会，让一位翁法罗斯遇到的朋友来尝试，或许……
E: The soul brew has returned. Make the most of this "one and only chance." Let a friend from Amphoreus try it, and maybe...

C: 「星星碎了，列车要到处去接星星，所以在天上飞。」
E: "The stars exploded, and the Express has to go everywhere to pick up all the pieces, and that's why it flies up in the sky."

C: 诊所更漂亮！
E: The clinic!

C: 怎么能麻烦客人呢…
E: How could we trouble our guests...?

C: 还可以飞上天…飞到宇宙里哦！真的好厉害！
E: They launch themselves into the sky and even into outer space!

C: 期待宇宙中的摇滚演出！
E: Looking forward to rocking out in space!

C: 大机器人狂热爱好者。
E: Fanatical fan of big robots.

C: ——这是真话，不是和你在客气……
E: Truly, I'm not just being polite with you...

C: 我觉得，它和我们铁卫使用的自动机兵有些类似。如果我们能把自动机兵像「卫星」一样部署到太空中，就能在战斗中取得优势。
E: It works in a similar way to our automatons. If we could launch our automatons into space like satellites, it'd definitely give us an edge in combat.

C: 我得感谢丹恒的邀请，这趟列车之旅当真不虚此行。商人的星际跃迁大多枯燥乏味，很少有这种旅行的感觉。
E: I must thank Dan Heng for his invitation — this journey upon the Astral Express has been well worth my while. Interstellar warp jumps with merchants are often dull, and rarely ever feel like an actual journey.

C: 想象一下，在一列长夜孤灯似的列车里眺望窗外的文明。纷争、痛苦、绝望、悲鸣，仿佛都被隔绝在了另一个世界……
E: Such a train can be likened to a solitary candle in the darkness of night... One may peer upon civilizations where strife, hardship, desperation, and sorrow exist seemingly in a separate plane of existence...

C: 事先说清楚，这只是我的直觉，对你不一定管用，如果没有效果，我不负责。
E: Let's be clear about one thing first — this is just my intuition. It may not work for you, and I am not responsible for any sub-optimal results.

C: 坐上「司舵」那张椅子之后，我已经很久没有机会像这样观看天空了……
E: Since assuming the role of Helm Master, it's rare that I have the chance to gaze upon the stars like this...

C: 现在想想，也挺对不起她的…虽然她自己倒不在意，还经常提起这事儿。
E: ...Thinking back, even if she wasn't too affected by my absence, I do feel guilty.

C: 也对哦…那我想想还有什么帕姆喜欢的。
E: Hmm, you might be right... What else does Pom-Pom like?

C: 虽然梦里想去哪儿就去哪儿，但是梦醒了之后总感觉空落落的。
E: Even though I can go wherever I want in my dreams, I always feel a bit empty when I wake up.

C: 请你拿走，这我不能收下！
E: That's too generous of you. I don't deserve them.

C: 既然都说到这个份上了……
E: Well, since you insist...

C: 听过「歼星大剑」吗？
E: Have you heard of Star Bane?

C: 诶，还好还好啦。托你的福，进度还行啦。
E: It goes, it goes. It's going alright. Thanks for asking.

C: 能像这样偶尔来到你们的列车上做客，我就已经很满足了。
E: I'm already very happy that I get to visit your Express like this once in a while.

C: 宇宙…感觉我已经跃跃欲试起来了。
E: The universe... I'm already feeling hyped up.

C: 玲可似乎睡着了。
E: Lynx seems to have fallen asleep.

C: 这叫「透视」。
E: It's called "perspective."

C: 唔，是吗？
E: Um. Really?

C: 你看，我这只机械手是下层区的工匠帮忙打造的，用上的技术在贝洛伯格也算尖端了。
E: See, my mechanical hand is made by the craftsmen in the Underworld. The techniques they used are the best in Belobog.

C: 你喜欢就好。
E: I'm glad you like it.

C: 告诉你吧，「镰叶紫菀草」会散发出一种特别的气味，人类的鼻子几乎察觉不到。但账账对这种气味特别敏感——瞧！
E: Asters are a type of plant that release a unique scent — barely noticeable to humans. However, Numby is extremely sensitive to it — look!

C: 小插曲而已~别管它。
E: Market hiccup — don't worry about it.

C: 哈？这么谦虚干嘛，这可不像你。
E: Huh? Not like you to be modest.

C: 为啥帕姆一直不理我呢？
E: Why is Pom-Pom ignoring me?

C: 真是个温暖的小窝啊，你们列车组的生活真是幸福。我也参考参考，等以后过上好日子了，把房间重新装饰一下。
E: It's super cozy — you guys really have it good on the Express. When things get better, I'm gonna redesign my room and use the Express' style as inspiration.

C: 畏惧它的黑暗深邃吧。
E: Fear its infinite darkness.

C: 而看车厢这井井有条的模样，便知这些工作列车长信手拈来。它不急不慢的样子，不正是我说的「松弛感」吗？
E: From the orderly condition of the carriages alone, it is plain to see that the conductor is masterful in their responsibilities. Their calm demeanor is precisely the state of composure I am talking about.

C: 很难抉择，两者都很可爱。
E: Tough choice — they're both very cute.

C: 过去，我因为「贞凶之命」一直倒霉，最近我开始觉得「运势」其实并不简单。
E: As a cursed one, I've always been unlucky, but recently I've started to feel like there's more to fortune than meets the eye.

C: 可以将其放在阳光下拍摄。
E: Just place them in a sunny spot and snap a few pics.

C: 如果喜欢的话，下次我得多准备些。
E: Should you take a liking to them, I'll make sure to prepare more next time.

C: 小时候不懂得什么是疲倦，到了夜晚也不安生，总拉着哥哥一起数星星，而且越数越精神……
E: When I was younger, I didn't know what weariness was. Even at night, I was restless. I'd always drag my brother along to count the stars. The more stars I counted, the more energetic I got...

C: 为了成功让这十层盒子套起来，它们的尺寸可是经过精心计算，多一点少一点都不行！
E: To make sure these ten boxes fit within one another, I had to meticulously measure them — it would've been a bust if I was off by even one millimeter!

C: 好困……
E: So sleepy...

C: 其实收到你的邀请后，我就一直幻想列车内是什么样子，越想越兴奋，一整晚都没睡。
E: Actually, after I got your invitation, I couldn't stop imagining what the Express looked like on the inside. I got so excited about it that I couldn't fall asleep all night.

C: 用谜语回答谜语么？恩公好生聪明。
E: Answering a riddle with a riddle? You're quite smart, benefactor.

C: 请你再考虑一下吧！
E: Please think about it again!

C: 我拒绝！我莉拉最讨厌那种把私人交往和学术工作混为一谈的人！
E: I refuse to! I hate people who confuse academic work with personal relations the most!

C: 唔…站久了果然就会想打瞌睡。
E: Ah... Standing for such a long time makes Pom-Pom want to take a nap.

C: 具体的流程请在预约时咨询窗口办公人员。
E: To inquire about the specific processes, please consult the window staff when making the appointment.

C: 我以为你是个目光长远的人呢。难道你只看眼前吗——
E: I took you for someone who can think long-term! Don't be shortsighted.

C: 来聊聊天吧…
E: Let's have a chat...

C: 以前的我在技术部总是和大家格格不入。同事们不愿意搭理我，搞得我到离职时都没能和其中的某些人说过话。
E: I just did not fit with everyone at the Technology Division. My coworkers wouldn't even acknowledge my existence. There were some people I never spoke to before even by the time I left.

C: 唉，还能怎么样？无非就是和我那些个同事接着怄气呗……
E: Ugh, how do you think I've been? I've just been so angry with my coworkers...

C: 唉，你看看这《水晶日报》，上边刊的都是些什么新闻！这些新闻媒体再这么搞下去，贝洛伯格迟早要完！
E: *sigh* Have you read today's Crystal Daily? What kind of news is that!? If the media keeps going on like this, Belobog will eventually be doomed!

C: 你在跟我说话吗？
E: Are you talking to me?

C: 科幻小说…你会喜欢主角一行搭乘蒸汽火车在银河中穿行、探索星际文明的故事吗？这本小说在科幻爱好者群体中广受好评哦！
E: Science fiction...? Would you like to try reading a story about a group traveling by steam train through the cosmos to explore interstellar civilizations? This book is widely acclaimed!

C: 听说你招了些流浪者进矿队？
E: I heard you recruited some of the vagrants into the mining team.

C: 你这家伙，真是不识好歹，哼，回头后悔了可别回来求我。
E: Hmph, you'll regret it. Don't come asking me to change my mind later.

C: 其实我想问…
E: I want to ask you...

C: 我的目标是在地底搞个全链路深度推广，细分观众群体，抓住话题风口，形成拳赛视听娱乐的产业闭环……
E: My goal is to create an end-to-end in-depth marketing campaign, segment the audience, seize on the trends, and build an audio-visual entertainment industry around boxing in the Underworld...

C: …什么？
E: ...Huh?

C: 咦？是问我最近有收到什么样的礼物吗？最近的话…有一大包「雪地跳跳糖」，还有一只很可爱的毛绒兔哦！
E: Mmm? Are you asking me if I've gotten any nice gifts recently? Well... Recently, there's been a big bag of snow-white popping candy, and also a cute fluffy bunny rabbit!

C: 下次去上层区玩的时候…我想问问鼹鼠党的小朋友要不要一起去。毕竟一个人玩总会无聊的～
E: When I go to the Overworld... I'm gonna ask the Mole kids if they wanna come with me. 'Cos it's boring just playing by yourself.

C: …这种苔藓，只有极少量会伴生在地髓矿上，它会汲取地髓的精华，因此拥有着强盛的生命力……
E: ... Rare moss only growing in the Geomarrow mines! This moss draws on the essence of Geomarrow, and has great vitality...

C: 拜托你了，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}！
E: Thank you!

C: 在我看来，机械结构可比人体美妙多了…我才不会傻到把机器人做成和人类一样的外观呢，真无趣。
E: In my opinion, mechanical structures are much more beautiful than the human body... I'm not stupid enough to try to make a robot look like a human. How boring would that be?

C: 我们这行就是这样，时间长了总能碰上些稀罕事儿。
E: It happens a lot in our industry. We always encounter weird things, especially when we've been in the industry for a long enough time.

C: 哈哈，难怪你们不认识我。我刚才的态度多有冒犯，你们别介意啊！
E: Haha, no wonder you don't know me. That was embarrassing. Please excuse me!

C: 那来聊天吧…
E: Let's chat...

C: 来聊聊吧，娜塔莎。
E: Let's talk, Natasha.

C: 冬城的孩子，「存护」骄傲的子民，抬起你们的头来！不要被忙碌且庸俗的日常磨平了棱角，时刻铭记筑城者和大守护者的教导！
E: Children of the Everwinter City, proud citizens of Preservation: Hold your heads up high! Grind NOT against the mundane vulgarities of your everyday lives. ALWAYS remember, deep in your hearts, the teachings of the Architects and the Supreme Guardian!

C: 前线压力越来越大，现在必须得调整铁卫的战术策略了……
E: The pressure on the front lines is increasing, and now the strategy of the Silvermane Guards must be adjusted...

C: 我就是没闯过军事禁区，想试试。
E: I've never busted into a restricted zone before, and wanna give it a try.

C: 呃，我刚刚清点到哪一年了来着……
E: Um, which year was it just now?

C: 虽然贝洛伯格没有被公司并购或接手，但还是有不少员工留驻在了城里。
E: Although Belobog has not been acquired or taken on by the IPC, many of their employees have remained stationed in the city.

C: 唔…好的。
E: Oh... okay.

C: 但生活的艰难只有妈妈知道
E: Life can be so tough, only ya momma really ever knows

C: 星星来的战士，为他人逆流而上
E: Go against the grain like that alien guardian

C: 说唱是禁锢和自由的拼杀
E: Rap is how I break out of my prison of pain

C: 用鼓舞人心的诗篇，溶化缠绕太久的心魔
E: Inspiring and admiring, keeping evil off the streets

C: 你可能没有听过这个组织…大守护者可可利亚还在任的时候，我们的工作被叫停，也就从公众视野里淡出了。
E: You probably haven't heard of this organization... Our job got called off during Supreme Guardian Cocolia's tenure, and we faded out of the public eye.

C: 托帕总监？我这种底层员工没机会跟她打交道的。
E: Director Topaz? Well, I'm just a low-level employee, and I don't really have a chance to talk with her.

C: 我的父亲是一位电子游戏重度玩家——他从小就带着我和我的双胞胎兄弟，培养我们的游戏兴趣：而这《以太战线》就是我们兄弟俩接触的第一款游戏了。
E: My father was a hardcore gamer who introduced my twin brother and me to gaming at a young age, and Aetherium Wars was the first game we ever played.

C: 虽然只是一簇数据，但次元扑满 / 扑满 / 泡泡 / 毛球 / 白色恶魔 / 肥大 / 扑满侠 / 扑神确实对你表现出了热情，也许它还会梦见电子羊呢。
E: Although it's just a bunch of data, Warp Trotter / Trotter / Bubbles / Puffball / Ivory Menace / Chunky Chops / Turbo Trotter / Trotterlord really does seem fond of you. Perhaps it even dreams of electric sheep.

C: 小熊表现得意犹未尽。也许你可以试着表现得更亲密些……
E: The cub seems to be in a great mood. Maybe you could try befriending it...

C: 啊，不对，应该是——「帮助其他会员暂时逃离家庭和责任的束缚」！
E: Oh, no — I mean, "They help people temporarily escape the bonds of family and duty"!

C: 哎…臭小子总不回信……
E: Ah... that no-good kid never wrote me back...

C: 克里珀大人啊……
E: Lord Qlipoth...

C: 难道妈就是当年那位…？
E: Could you really be the one back then who...?

C: 「矿灯」的积木有点意思啊……
E: The building blocks for the Miner's Lamp look pretty interesting...

C: 那哪儿成啊，还得攒钱买「冷面小青龙」签名限量安全帽呢。
E: How can I settle for that? I have to save up for my limited-edition safety helmet signed by Cold Dragon Young.

C: 难道是那个蓝头发的……
E: Could it have been that blue-haired guy...

C: 漂亮！
E: Wonderful!

C: 就他？我上届冠军必秒那个机械臂。
E: That robot-armed guy? He is apparently no match for the champion of last season.

C: 啊，是你，{NICKNAME}。我刚才看着母亲大人的画像有些出神，可能没有注意到你，还请容许我向你道歉。
E: Ah, it's you, {NICKNAME}. I was spacing out at my mother's portrait and didn't realize you were here, my apologies.

C: …我收回刚才那句话。
E: ...I take back what I just said.

C: 行，都行。您啥时候来都行，咱翘首以盼！慢走啊，路上小心！
E: Fine. Not to worry. Any time! Can't wait! Take care! Stay safe out there!

C: 最近生意好得不得了啊！以前金人巷没什么游客，我做的也都是仙舟人的生意…但仙舟人嘛，你也懂，不太需要我的业务。
E: It's been amazing! Aurum Alley never used to have any travelers, and I only ever did business with Xianzhou locals... But, well, you know how the Xianzhou folks are like... They don't really need my services.

C: 我这人还喜欢狐人戏伶，在我这办公桌上放了些美女照片，用来振作精神好好努力工作，也被净砚执事给没收了。她说这里是公务空间，这些东西有伤风化。
E: I also like pretty foxian actresses, so I've put up a couple of their pictures on my desk to perk up my spirits. But Officer Jingyan confiscated those too. She said this is the workplace and those images are indecent.

C: 托你的福，没有之前那么忙了。但我们毕竟是地衡司，司掌天上天下所有屁大的事，不忙是不可能的。
E: Thanks to you, we aren't as busy as before. However, as the Realm-Keeping Commission manages basically everything in both the sky and the world, we can never be idle.

C: 您是不知道，我为了把脱落的毛发编织成绳子，付出了多少时间和心血！这东西要是放在外面，那不得卖个艺术品的价格啊！
E: You don't know how much time and effort I've put into weaving my shed hairs into a rope! If I were selling it outside, it would be sold as a piece of art!

C: 先天的体质固然重要，这后天的巩固那更是重要啊！
E: Your natural constitution is important, yes. But the way you're nurtured is far more important!

C: 当时我还在外面推广健身武术课程呢，我记得当时是一个化外民老太太，我给她讲，练习咱们这套拳法，可以「枯木逢春」！
E: I was out on the streets promoting our gym when it happened, and I remember chatting with this old outworlder lady. I told her to train with us for a new lease on life, "just like a tree's regrowth"!

C: 我才不要呢。
E: I'll pass.

C: 不过，我个人还是劝您先自己试着解决看看…毕竟等到各种活分配下来，苦的就是我这种小杂役咯。
E: But I should personally advise you to try solving things first yourself... After all, once all the tasks have been allocated, it's always a lowly orderly like me who has to suffer.

C: 其实我原名景亓——倒也没什么显赫家世，就是一普普通通的仙舟民罢了。
E: My real name's actually Jing Juan, and I'm not from any famous family or anything. Nope, I'm just a normal Xianzhou citizen.

C: 那么卑职便继续在此戒备，恕不远送。
E: I'll continue my guard duty. Please take care.

C: 这里是神策府，请注意公序良俗。
E: This is the Seat of Divine Foresight. Please watch what you say.

C: 我自己逛逛吧。
E: I'll look around for myself.

C: 暂时没别的问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 后来发现，「水镜」并没有那么神奇。只是因为那世界信息有限，故而预测未来需要的情报量和计算量都相当小。
E: We later came to realize that this Aquascope was no mystery at all. That world simply has a limited amount of information. There wasn't much computational power and data input needed to predict the future there.

C: 他这是来地衡司赋闲了？
E: So he came to the Realm-Keeping Commission to slack off?

C: 你的同事们都挺随意的。
E: Your colleagues sure all love to.

C: 这小小公廨里就只有三个执事…
E: There's only three officers staffing this tiny Chancery...

C: 你做的都是什么？
E: What do you do, then?

C: 看在你这么关心我一个坏老头子的份上，给你一个建议——年轻人，不要妄图刺探那些不该知道的东西，这仙舟的水太深，你把握不住……
E: Just because you cared for an old criminal geezer like me, here's a piece of advice for ya — kid, don't spy on things you shouldn't know about. The water of Xianzhou runs deep, you won't be able to handle it...

C: 建木生发导致的阴阳相感让机巧鸟到处乱飞，丢了好几十只…处理出入港系统的术算机也坏掉了，造成了好几场交通事故……
E: The Ambrosial Arbor's new growth set the cycranes flying about all over the place, and we lost dozens... The calculation device processing entry and exit at the port also broke down, causing several traffic accidents...

C: 不过，一切终归还是在朝着好的方向发展。我相信很快，一切都会变好的，而您对此居功至伟。
E: But everything is still moving along in the right direction. I'm sure that things will get better soon, and you can take credit for most of that.

C: 都是成年人啦，甭管您是化外民，还是我们仙舟本地人，都得为生计而努力嘛！何况这种事…咱们也没得选不是吗？
E: We're both adults. You understand, right? Whether you're an Outworlder or a Xianzhou native, we all need to earn a living! ...It's not like we have a choice in the matter, right?

C: 太卜大人临危受命，有要务在身，这司内上下事宜，卜官们自当殷勤打理。每个人都应该对自己应该完成的工作心中有数，而不是等待着别人催促。
E: The master diviner is trying to manage the situation as best as she can with so many important tasks at hand. The managing diviners should be working hard to take care of their own departments. Everyone should know what they need for their roles and shouldn't need other people to keep hounding them.

C: 那只小麻雀想尽办法将自己不惹人瞩目，但在我看来，这是弄巧成拙——有谁能永远只做到及格分呢？这不是有意为之，又是什么呢？
E: That little sparrow has tried her best to stay out of the spotlight, but in my estimation this has only backfired on her. Who out there is capable of only doing just enough every time? If it's not intentional, how else can we explain it?

C: 想和你打听一下静斋的事。
E: I'd like to ask you about Jingzhai.

C: 坏了就坏了，没坏就没坏，在我们工造司都是一句话的事，怎么还能扯出这么多有的没的啊？哎，我这嘴又笨，只得愣在那儿张着嘴「阿吧阿吧」半天讲不出话，丢死人了。
E: If it's broken, it's broken. Otherwise, it's fine. That's all we need to say at the Artisanship Commission. So why do they keep blathering on about all this other unrelated stuff? And I'm not good with words either, so I just stand there stuttering and can't get my point across. It's just so embarrassing.

C: 工造司怎么会派你来这儿？
E: Why did the Artisanship Commission send you over here?

C: 好了，没什么事的话以后再聊吧，我手里还有一大堆活儿没做完呢。
E: Okay, if there's nothing else, then let's talk again later. I've still got a mountain of work to get through.

C: 放心，都交给我来处理。
E: Don't worry. Let me handle everything.

C: 您是主动调任鳞渊境的？
E: Did you volunteer to be transferred to Scalegorge Waterscape?

C: 听到这个消息，我整宿整宿无法睡着。我想为他做些什么。他…年纪还轻，刚完成自己的初狩仪式，被授予了云骑的武器。
E: I couldn't sleep for many nights when I heard the news. I wanted to do something for him. He... He was still so young, and was just gifted a weapon of the Cloud Knights after he'd completed the ritual of his First Hunt.

C: 阁下要是有什么想知道，可以去问问那边在站岗的云骑队长，叫德威。他不知道的，差不多就是阁下不该知道的。
E: If you'd like to ask questions, please ask the Cloud Knight captain on duty over there. His name's Dewei. Anything he doesn't know is what you should not know about.

C: 在下是十王司的冥差。平日里接引大限将至的仙舟住民入因果殿、归于寂灭。
E: I'm a humble spiritfarer for the Ten-Lords Commission. I receive everyday Xianzhou citizens into the Hall of Karma as they approach the end of their life and wait for their time to come.

C: 你眺目远望所看到的一切，在不可胜数的往昔，都曾是持明故土的一部分。但随着持明迁徙，我们将这故土移栽至了仙舟洞天中。
E: Everything you see before you has been part of the Vidyadhara homeworld for eons. But as we migrated, we've transplanted parts of our homeworld to some of the Xianzhou Delves.

C: 没事，不打扰，不打扰。要是想聊聊天，你可以随时来找我。我平时也找不到谁能跟我聊这些。
E: All good, it's no bother at all. Any time you want to chat, just come and find me. I usually can't find anyone to talk with about this stuff.

C: 哎，在回来的路上我就听说啦，没想到你也知道啊？
E: Oh, I heard about that on my way back. I'm surprised you know about it too.

C: 啊哈哈哈…有趣，幽囚狱实在是太有趣了。这才是监狱该有的样子，相比之下我之前蹲过的那些监狱简直就是菜市场。
E: Ahaha... Interesting! The Shackling Prison truly is fascinating. This is what a real prison should be like. It makes all those other prisons I've served time in look like open-air markets!

C: 我来办事，刚好问你点问题…
E: I'm here for business. There are some things I wanted to ask you...

C: 不过凭我多年的经验，我觉得幽囚狱最大的安全保障在于环绕四周的水障。要是有精通御水之术之人帮助我，可能会更容易逃出去。
E: But, my many years of experience tell me that The Shackling Prison's greatest insurance is the surrounding moat. If only I had someone proficient in water magic with me, my escape would be a lot easier.

C: 你好像很享受越狱？
E: You seem to enjoy breaking out of prison?

C: 不过这不重要，我感觉现在的状态蛮好的，让我回归本体我还不乐意呢。
E: But that's not important. I am happy with how I am at the moment. Going back to my real body now wouldn't bring me any joy.

C: 幽囚狱的破绽在哪里。
E: What are The Shackling Prison's weak spots?

C: 不好意思，我有些离题万里了…我认得您，您是符玄大人委以重任的英雄，一点见面礼，不成敬意。请问还有什么事情找我吗？
E: Forgive me for going off-topic here... I've seen you before. You are the hero whom Master Fu Xuan regards highly. Here is a small gift for you. Is there anything else I can do for you?

C: 没有其他想问的事儿了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 可以理解，您和这里的商户一样，对公司充满了敌意。
E: I understand why you'd be asking that. You're just like the other merchants here, all hostile towards the IPC.

C: 奔赴新的人生多好啊，你说是吧？
E: It's always great to embrace a new life, don't you think?

C: 无论她做了什么，我不会真正地怪罪于她。别看她有些疯疯癫癫的，她比大多数人都更加清醒，至少我是这样认为的。
E: Whatever she does, I do not blame her. She may appear to have lost her mind, but she sees the world more clearly than most people — at least, that is what I think.

C: 啊？是吵到你了嘛？抱歉抱歉，我只是在念叨我的每日计划。
E: Ah! Was I too loud? Sorry. I was just going over my daily routine.

C: 我个人比较喜欢去星槎海和长乐天，出入都很方便，运气好的还有机会遇到同好，说不定能学到新的放生知识。
E: Personally, I like Starskiff Haven and Exalting Sanctum for the convenient location. Plus, if I get lucky, I may run into fellow enthusiasts and pick up some new insights on releasing.

C: 看你的打扮，应该也是外来的游客吧？你要是有观光方面的问题可以问我。
E: Judging by your outfit, you must be a tourist from the outside world, right? Feel free to ask me if you have any questions about sightseeing.

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 一星就算是了不起的「星际严选」了，五星则会被称为「银河最佳餐厅」。整个仙舟世界唯一拿到他们五星评级的是朱明仙舟上的一家「龙宫私房菜」。
E: If you get one star, you're part of the "Interastral Selection." If you get five stars, then you're the "Cosmos's Finest Diner." Across all of the Xianzhou ships, the only place to ever get five stars from them is "Dragon Palace's Kitchen" on the Xianzhou Zhuming.

C: 你家店铺的特色是？
E: What's your store's specialty?

C: 战争旷日持久，无数生灵湮灭…后来机械帝国覆灭，人们的恐惧却从未停止，人们将能言会道的智慧机械视作是潜在的威胁。
E: The war lasted for eons and consumed countless lives... Even after the downfall of the Machine Empire, the fear it aroused never ceased, as people saw intelligent machines as a potential threat.

C: 我想想…那时这里充满了金人，都是为了自己的主人来金人巷购物取货的，街道拥堵不堪，几乎没有落脚的地方。
E: Let me see... Back then, this alley was alive with aurumatons shopping and picking up goods for their masters. The alley was so crowded that you could barely get in.

C: 我想和你随便聊聊。
E: I'm just here for a casual chat.

C: 其实也没什么事要办…
E: No particular reason...

C: 你认识我？不会是我抓的你吧？
E: You know me? I didn't throw you in there, did I?

C: 幽囚狱里素材虽多，但设备有限。很多东西在外面稀松平常，但在这里可是稀罕玩意儿。以我的大才做这些日用化学品绰绰有余～
E: We have an abundance of raw materials in the Shackling Prison, but there's also an appalling lack of equipment and facilities here. Many things you wouldn't even take a second look at outside are rarities in here, and making these simple household chemical products is but child's play to me!

C: 想问你点事。
E: I'd like to ask you something.

C: 但加入药王秘传后，很多事情就变得简单多了～有了药王秘传这层地下关系网，连请假的审批流程都快了很多～
E: But after I became a disciple, things became much less complicated. After I gained access to the underground connections afforded by the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, even the approval process for taking time off work was much quicker!

C: 但是我现在已经反省了！真的！我现在只想本本分分做生意，跟我兄弟阿合马和白鸟一起，把铁窗集团做大做强！
E: I've turned over a new leaf since, though... No, really! My only goal now is to be an honest businessman alongside Arma and Shiratori. We'll grow the Correctional Group into as large and powerful a business as we possibly can!

C: 就聊到这里吧。
E: That's it for now.

C: 朔雪是谁？
E: Who is Snowmoon?

C: 我们随便聊聊。
E: Let's talk.

C: 其实我不太明白，干嘛做什么都得追求意义呢？它好玩，好玩就够了嘛。
E: I don't get it. Why must everything we do be meaningful? Isn't it good enough that the game is fun?

C: 等我再长高些，我就请个没有头的长假，离开仙舟到外边的世界逛逛吧。
E: When I grow taller, I'll take a long vacation and travel beyond the Xianzhou.

C: 丹鼎司这边处理得过来吗？
E: Can you handle the workload at the Alchemy Commission?

C: 这是个玩笑。寒鸦说，吾应该多和人开开玩笑。
E: It's a joke. Hanya said that I should try cracking more jokes when conversing with others.

C: 但吾也承认，凭依于金人之中，挥挥手臂便将孽物碾为齑粉…的确快意。
E: But I must also admit that crushing abominations with my own fists as an aurumaton... does feel satisfying.

C: 再后来就逃难到公司的矿星上了，和哥哥姐姐们讨了很多年生活，那破地方更没啥可说的了。
E: I ran from my planet and escaped to an IPC mining planet. My siblings and I lived there for many years, but there's not much to say about it.

C: 换句话说，{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}，十王司只有保持绝对的独立，才能完成它自诞生起被授予的使命。
E: In other words, {F#kiddo}{M#kiddo}, only by maintaining complete independence can the Ten Lords complete the mission they were entrusted at birth.

C: 我算是自愿来的。该怎么说呢…有个和我缘分颇深的家伙，我必须找到他，然后亲手处决他。
E: Well, I guess I volunteered. How should I put it... There's a man who has history with me. I need to find and kill him personally.

C: 好啊，聊点什么呢？
E: Great. What do you want to talk about?

C: 十王司的性质比较特殊，这个你也清楚。它司掌仙舟人的生死，职责实在是太重大了。
E: As you know, the Ten-Lords Commission is a rather unique place. It has a vital duty of administering Xianzhou people's lives and deaths.

C: 「一者，令堕长生。二者，贪取不死。三者，迷乱心智。四者，诱陷魔阴。五者，残杀胞族。」
E: "One, Involuntary Immortalization. Two, Immortality Theft. Three, Beguilement. Four, Mara Ensnarement. Five, Phratry Murder."

C: 再多讲一点儿吧！
E: Tell me more!

C: 趣事谈不上，说起来曾经有客人来店里与我打招呼，希望我能把店里珠宝当物的价格尽量往高了抬，我大概理解了他的意图，随即同意了下来。
E: I'm not sure if I'd call these events amusing, but there was once a customer who came in and hoped I would raise the prices of the jewelry pieces in the shop. I gathered his motive, and agreed instantly.

C: 实在谈不上。我这「赎珠阁」开张数百年，就没有遇到什么暴利的机会，全是小本生意，只够勉强营生。
E: Not at all. The Jeweler's Pagoda has been open for hundreds of years, but I've never had a chance to make a killing. It's all slow and steady, and I can barely make ends meet.

C: 所以你看我，一个说书人管什么茶水生意啊？要不是这小老板娘提供这块场地、给咱赏饭吃，我们这些老艺术家也没地儿吃饭了。
E: And so you see me and ask: What's a storyteller doing, manning a teahouse? If it weren't for the little owner providing me with a venue and food, us old artistes wouldn't be able to feed ourselves.

C: 是啊，先前建木生发之时，我就在想，以前父母总跟我说，要化危机为机遇。既然这建木生发是一场危机，那必然也是能转化成机遇的吧？
E: Totally. Before the Ambrosial Arbor's growth happened, I had been thinking about my parents, who always told me to turn a crisis into an opportunity. Since the Ambrosial Arbor's new growth was a crisis, I thought I would be able to turn it into an opportunity.

C: 没有冒犯你的意思，但我对这个话题没什么兴趣。它长起来能怎么样呢，它停止生长了又能怎么样呢？吃饭才是人生的头等大事啊。
E: No offense, but I'm not interested in this topic. So what if it grows or not? Filling up my stomach is at the top of my priority list.

C: 想再深入地和你聊聊天。
E: I want to know more about you.

C: 据说在建木存在的时代里，有不少丹士为了能获得一手资料，会用一种叫解语丹的药物给自己的实验对象提升智力，询问动物感受。
E: It's said that in the era of the Ambrosial Arbor, many alchemists — in order to gain knowledge — would feed what's called a Freelingo Pill to their own experimental animal subjects to increase their intelligence, then inquire the animals on their emotions.

C: 怎么太卜司到您这儿就变成体育运动了。人家说的那是「不诚不占、不义不占、不习不占。」
E: Why are you making the Divination Commission sound like a sport? They actually say, "No insincere divination, no unjust divination, and no unpracticed divination."

C: 平时咱们俩都忙，时间老对不上，得亏这个港口也不远，能练上一段是一段。这些本事都是越练越得心应手。
E: We're usually really busy and can never find the time. Luckily, the port is close by, so we can squeeze in some practice. It's the kind of thing you get better at by practicing.

C: 我来说一段报菜名。蒸羊羔、蒸羊羔、蒸羊羔、蒸羊羔……
E: Let me show you what I can do recounting a restaurant menu. Steamed lamb, steamed lamb, steamed lamb, steamed lamb...

C: 啊，没错！你想象一下自己最理想的模样吧，认真向肌肉许下愿望，会实现的！
E: That's right. Visualize your ideal physique and then make a wish upon these muscles. It'll come true for sure!

C: 他发起怒来，土地都要裂开，泉眼儿也不出水。为了取悦他，乡亲们年年供奉，为他掘山开矿，还要献出亲生儿女充作山君的侍僮哩。
E: When he got angry, the earth would split open and springs go all dry. The village gave him tribute every year to appease him, work in mines for him, and even offered their children as the Mountain Lord's servants.

C: 我还以为遇上了同道中人，结果就只是遇见了一位复读机。算了，我也不与你计较了，我是在说仙舟历史文化的事情。
E: I thought I met a kindred spirit, but you're just a bot who repeats everything. Forget about it. I don't have any beef with you. I'm just talking about the history and culture of Xianzhou.

C: 就是随便聊聊天。
E: Just a casual chat.

C: 虽然说处理这些废置的快递箱也是我的工作，但是实在是太多了，如果实在找不到失主，我们也只能慈善处理了。
E: It may be my job to deal with these abandoned parcels, but there're just too many. If we can't track down the owner, we end up donating things to charity.

C: 人家是长生种，十年八年只当是休假，可我们化外民就不一样了…零工倒是挺多的，可我想找一份稳定点的工作，这样也能在仙舟多待些时日啦！
E: As long-life species, they can afford to rest for years, but it's different for us Outworlders... There are many odd jobs available out there, but I'd prefer something more stable. That way, I can stay on Xianzhou for a longer time!

C: 关于停云…
E: About Tingyun...

C: 我去请彦卿骁卫。
E: I'll go get Lieutenant Yanqing.

C: 我对这种事不感兴趣。
E: I'm not interested in that.

C: 我本来就是应物科的科员，你听说过仙舟的「息壤」技术吗？要是洽谈顺利的话，「息壤」就是我的研究课题了。
E: I worked for the Department of Implement Arts. Have you heard of Xianzhou's Fallow Earth tech? If the negotiations go well, that'd be my research.

C: 貘馍卷！鸣藕糕！来看看哎！
E: Tuskpir wraps! Songlotus cakes! Come get 'em while they're hot!

C: 现在有了这只「宝萝」在手，无论是什么赌局，我从未输过。只要你愿意投入一定资本，与我联合做局，我保证你赚得盆满钵满。
E: Since getting Baoluo, I have never lost no matter what kind of gamble I partake in. So, as long as you're willing to invest some capital and join hands with me in the setup, I guarantee that you'll be raking in the profits soon enough.

C: 有痛感？！这一切都是真的！
E: I feel pain!? It was all real!

C: 谢谢你，亲爱的…
E: Thank you, my dear...

C: 妈妈，小孩子不做选择…
E: Mommy, I can't choose...

C: 你从哪里来？
E: Where are you from?

C: 你知道的，要是通稿足够多，很多事情都会很方便。
E: You know how it goes: Sing the praises of somebody enough times, and life will naturally be made easier for them.

C: 引擎对于竞锋舰，就像心脏对于人是一样的。但凡它出一点问题…最直接的结果就是大家一起手拉手告别余生。
E: For the Skysplitter, the engine is akin to a heart in the human body. Any malfunction... and the most immediate result is everyone stepping into the afterlife, hand-in-hand.

C: 成年人的生活需要欺骗。
E: Trickery is encouraged when you're an adult.

C: 那个星球自转周期长
E: It's a planet with a slow rotational period.

C: 镇妖塔轻轻浮起，你想要与哪位岁阳对话？
E: The suppression towers float gently. Which heliobus would you like to talk to?

C: 噗，感觉这也是咱们这些智慧生命难得的共通之处——认为有些东西比「生命」更有价值。
E: Heh. I feel that concept to be a rare commonality between us intelligent species — the belief that some things have more value than "life" itself.

C: 煨赫。
E: Singerd.

C: 你好可怕。
E: You're scary.

C: 人类，求我所为何事？是觉得自己错过了发财的机会，后悔了吗？
E: Human, what do you seek from me? Worried you've missed out on a chance to get rich, and you are starting to regret it?

C: 原来是叫这个名字吗，我记住了。
E: So that's what it's called. I'll remember it.

C: 在青春期的时候，任何人都会遭遇困难与挫折，那些遗憾与悔恨，都将成为遥远未来的美好回忆。要我说啊，没有遗憾的青春才是最遗憾的！
E: When anyone is in their youth, they will undoubtedly run into trials and tribulations. Those experiences of regret and remorse will become beautiful memories in the distant future. Personally, spending your youth without regrets is the most regretful thing!

C: 等等…红发、独臂、义肢…咱和咱的前世不会是遇到了什么半神的锋刃吧？
E: Hang on... Red-haired, one-armed, prosthetic... we couldn't have run into the metaphorical blade of a demigod, could we?

C: 没别的事了，告辞。
E: I don't have anything to ask, goodbye.

C: 我爸是最好的飞行士！
E: My dad is the best pilot ever!

C: 我学的不是这个！
E: That's not my area of education!

C: 知足吧，知足常乐…
E: Be content. Be content, and you'll always have joy...

C: 这批货物登记不合规。
E: This batch of goods is not registered properly.

C: 这些都是茶呀？
E: Are these all teas?

C: 你要哪个，我这里有很多。
E: Which one do you want? I have plenty here.

C: 看到那小货运星槎了吗？
E: See that small freight starskiff?

C: 我们形虎拳馆可是仙舟上的老字号，今年正巧是百年店庆大酬宾活动——
E: The Tiger Boxing Gym is a well-established one on the Xianzhou. Today happens to be our <unbreak>100</unbreak>th anniversary...

C: 只要购买我们的「一对一拳法特训」项目，就额外赠送三百节「形虎拳惬意放松练」课程。
E: With the purchase of our One-on-one Boxing Training, you will get <unbreak>300</unbreak> sessions of Tiger Boxing Easy Class for free.

C: 都不是。没想到大名鼎鼎的瑟希斯，在如此显而易见的成果面前栽了跟头。
E: Neither. Who would've thought the great Cerces would stumble over such obvious results.

C: 咦，小夏，我记得你小时候送我的…发卡，就是用这些材料做的吧？
E: Hey Naxy, wasn't... the hairpin you gave me as a kid made from these materials?

C: 孩子他爸，别愣着呀，你想吃什么。
E: Darling, don't just stand there. What would you like to eat?

C: 何况，做好每顿饭，与夺下战功同样光荣。
E: Besides, preparing each meal is just as glorious as winning battles.

C: 这些答案和意义，只能在一次次走向明天的过程中找到啦！
E: These answers and meanings can only be found as we keep moving forward toward tomorrow!

C: 也好，我准许它的存在。比起颂歌与塑像，臣民的笑语才是对君王至高的赞美——看，剑旗爵他们正相谈甚欢呢。
E: Very well, I shall permit its existence. Rather than hymns and statues, the laughter and chatter of subjects are the highest praise for a ruler... Look, Dux Gladiorum and the others are having quite a delightful conversation.

C: 这是好事啊，要不然，怎么配得上「救世主」的名号呢？
E: That's a good thing! Otherwise, how could he live up to the title of "Deliverer"?

C: 那么，这一杯…敬我们的昨日与明日。
E: Well then, here's to our yesterdays and tomorrows.

C: 这…不…可…能……
E: This... is... impossible...

C: 是呀！它们生活在天空，对风和气流，一定最熟悉了！
E: Yeah! They live in the sky, so they must know the winds and air currents better than anyone!

C: 听说荒笛也在树庭仰望过「星空」，遮蔽双眼的永昼辉光退去后，天外真正的星空依旧令人着迷。
E: I heard that even Terravox once gazed at the stars in the Grove. After the blinding radiance of Eternal Day faded, the true starry sky beyond is still mesmerizing.

C: 下去找轻量级的玩吧！
E: Why not start with something more lightweight?

C: 目前流程还未走完。
E: Currently, the inspection process has not been completed.

C: 呃…减肥可以，这个不行。
E: Um... It can help you lose weight, but probably not make you grow taller.

C: 这样啊，我也决定了…
E: Well, I have decided too...

C: 历代剑首可动手办！
E: Action Figure of past Sword Champions!

C: 我是～漂流的究极生物！
E: I am~ The ultimate drifter!

C: 猜～猜～我～是～谁？
E: Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~

C: 异星水魈。
E: A Xenohydro.

C: 「二营长，把老子的炮拿来！」
E: "Sergeant, bring me my dang cannon!"

C: 你为什么不找？
E: Why aren't you looking then?

C: 我找不到，所以才来问你。我感觉有人藏在这里，并且一直在暗中观察着我，这让我鸟有些紧张。
E: I can't find anything, that's why I'm asking you. I get the feeling that someone's hiding here and watching me from the shadows — it's gotten me a little anxious.

C: 一会儿可以合个影么？
E: Can we take a picture together?

C: 不愧是我看好的选手！
E: There's no doubt you're the one I'm rooting for!

C: 怎么？这可一票难求啊！
E: What? This ticket is hard to come by!

C: 不至于让我玩命吧！
E: I don't think I have to gamble my life, right?

C: 如果各种星槎配件不用组装上去，而是同样由星槎种子演化形成，效率是否会更高呢？星槎工程师真该好好考虑这个想法的。
E: Will the process be more efficient if the components are evolved from the starskiff seed instead of being fixed on it at a later time? It is something the starskiff engineers should ponder about.

C: 「天才俱乐部#64原始博士试图对翁瓦克施行『返祖计划』时，巡海游侠阻止了此人的计划，也保护了万木之林。」
E: "Thwarting the attempted rebellion by the <unbreak>64</unbreak>th member of the Genius Society, Dr. Primitive and protecting the Thousand-Tree Greenwood."

C: 你才一年级！
E: You're only in the first year!

C: 一只被打开的快递箱，快递箱的发件地来自星际和平影视。盒内装着各式办公文件和私人物品，还有被揉成一团的信纸孤零零地躺在快递箱里。
E: The opened courier package is sent from Interastral Peace Media. Inside the package are some documents, personal effects, and a crumpled letter.

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
E: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
E: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

C: 但其实也不必担心，你很清楚，鹤运物流的专员们都是好样的。那位新人总有一天也会像你一样，背得出十万只机巧鸟的编号。
E: In fact, there is no need to worry. You know very well that everyone who works for Heron Express is competent. One day, the newcomer will be able to remember the serial number of one hundred thousand cycranes, just like you.

C: 穹顶的人造天空闪烁着舒缓的流光，行人带着不同的表情在街上匆匆走过。星槎、机巧鸟、阴晴伞，天空中飞着各式各样的人造物，你看得出来，它们也很忙碌。
E: Streams of light shimmer soothingly in the artificial sky on the dome. The pedestrians, with different expressions, hustle to and fro on the streets. All kinds of artificial things, like starskiffs, cycranes, and Baroumbrellas are flying in the sky. You can tell they, too, are having a busy day.

C: 简单的线索在你脑海内形成了一种叙事——有黉学的学生*不小心*将假期作业遗落在无人问津的纸箱里，要是假期结束，他（或许是她）会遇上麻烦。
E: Simple clues begin to form a narrative in your head: A lyceum student "accidentally" misplaced their holiday homework in an unattended cardboard box. Once the holidays are over, he (or maybe she) could be in big trouble.

C: ——缭乱！缭乱！缭乱！
E: ...Dazzling! Dazzling! Dazzling!

C: 「首先，我要讲清楚，是在你的强烈要求下我才贷款购入饭团的。其次，得了吧，你以为我不知道你想玩什么把戏？」
E: "Firstly, let's get this straight. It was you who kept telling me to take out a loan to buy Riceball. Secondly, just give up. You think I don't know what kind of games you're playing?"

C: 将小狗送去地衡司。
E: Send the puppy to the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 眼前的三个箱子上分别写着：「铁块（1斤）」、「铁块（1斤）」和「帝弓遗物（1斤）」。
E: The three boxes in front of you read: "Iron Block (1 kilo)," "Iron Block (1 kilo)," and "Reignbow's Relic (1 kilo)."

C: 那我在<unbreak>1501</unbreak>米能用手接住飞箭吗？
E: So you're saying if I stood <unbreak>5001</unbreak> feet away, I could catch her arrows.

C: 你一边待着去吧！
E: I'm not hungry anymore.

C: 十王司收集的各类文件——其中不乏某些珍贵的特殊印本，还有特意收集而来的短生种们出版的刊物。
E: The Ten-Lords Commission collects various kinds of documents, including certain rare and valuable special printings, as well as journals published by the short-life species that have been deliberately collected.

C: 观察力敏锐的人早就发现了，为逝去的飞行士献上风筝，是狐族人一种不言的传统——可见，飞行早就是他们生命中的一部分了。
E: An observant person would have quickly realized that it is an unspoken tradition among the foxians to dedicate kites to fallen pilots — it is evident that flying has long been a part of their lives.

C: 你听见男男女女的笑声彼此交叠…如果你也是其中之一，你会邀请谁呢？
E: You can hear the laughter of men and women washing over each other... If you were inside, who would you have invited along?

C: 斯坦威游隼，加长型豪华飞车。运行平稳，乘坐舒适，在梦境中使用苏乐达动力。成功人士的品质之选。
E: The Steinway Falcon is a sleek and luxurious speedster. Smooth and comfortable, it's powered by SoulGlad in the Dreamscape. It is a choice of quality for the successful.

C: 据说在漆黑环境下，这些装饰牌也会发出光芒——但「黄金的时刻」总是灯火通明，根本没机会用到它们。
E: They are said to glow in the dark — but the Golden Hour is always well-lit, so there's no chance of using them.

C: 供游客欣赏梦境时刻壮丽景象的望远镜。不过这架望远镜里面被堵住了，你只能看见一片漆黑。
E: A telescope for tourists to enjoy the splendid views of the Dreamscape. However, the view is blocked, so all you can see is darkness.

C: 你不会从里面找到任何有价值的物品，省省这份力气吧。
E: You will not find anything of value here. Save your energy.

C: 「于我之下，万物流转，方嬗变者嬗变」
E: "After me, everything flowed, when all evolved"

C: 发觉你已经注意到它，猎犬的身影一眨眼便消失了。
E: Upon realizing that you have noticed it, the Hound swiftly vanishes.

C: 家族能够在匹诺康尼取得如此成就，得益于从一开始就选对了方向。我们第一时间发现，肆意蔓延的情绪能量正在摧毁梦域，它们必须受到控制。
E: The Family has been so successful in Penacony because we chose the right direction right from the start. We were the first to discover the need to control the rampant emotional energy, as it was destroying the Dreamscape.

C: 惠特克爵士面无表情，深沉的目光穿透了你的脸庞。
E: Sir Whittaker's visage is expressionless, his brooding gaze piercing through your face.

C: 不用怕。哈…哈哈，我都准备好了。放心，不会让你们吃苦的。哈哈哈……
E: All right, fear not. Ha... Haha, I'm all ready now. Don't worry. You won't suffer. Hahaha...

C: 球笼轨道维修资格、剧院报幕员证、训物大赛银奖、还有酒店下水道疏通技能证……
E: Spheroid rail repair, theater announcer, object training silver medal, and hotel drainage unclogging certificates...

C: 没有关系吧。
E: I'm not sure it matters.

C: 游览的景点越多，就能收集到越多贴纸，这、这是人生的记录，是知识和阅历的证明！
E: The more sights you see, the more stickers you can collect. This, this is a journal of your life, and it's proof of your rite of knowledge!

C: 和您在这遇见的大部份人一样。享受，发财…谁能拒绝美好的梦呢？
