E: Not that different from most of the people you've met here. To enjoy, to make a fortune... Who can withstand the allure of a beautiful dream?

C: 不过…我想在外面透透气，还不打算回去。抱歉。
E: But... I prefer to take a breather outside, so I'm not ready to return yet. Sorry.

C: 不希望。
E: I don't.

C: 少女的脸颊泛起薄红，眼睫低垂，神情中略带羞涩，娇艳之中平添几分动人。
E: The girl's face reddens, her eyelashes downcast, a glimpse of faint bashfulness in her demeanor — they only accentuate her delicate beauty.

C: 深呼吸，别急，至少对方目前没有生气，你还有充足的时间来思考对策。
E: Take a deep breath and don't get excited. At least they aren't angry right now, and you still have plenty of time to think about mitigation strategies.

C: 你无法再容忍这只调皮捣蛋的呜呜伯了，它就该被关在空间站的收容舱里！活活关上整整一百万个琥珀纪！
E: You can no longer tolerate this cheeky, mischievous Wubbaboo. It should be locked up in the space station's containment cabin! For a million Amber Eras!

C: 绒球对皮皮西来说可是很私密的，随便乱摸会出现严重后果！
E: Fluff balls are very personal things when it comes to the Pepeshi people. There's going to be serious consequences if you just pet them without consent!

C: …没什么，我不需要别人同情。
E: ...It's nothing. I don't need any sympathy.

C: 对职业的热忱消散后，维塔利的脑子里就只剩下了生意经。
E: Now that the passion for his career has melted away, Vitali's mind is only filled with business ideas.

C: 重组家庭？
E: A blended family?

C: 匹诺康尼真是个躺平的好地方。自从来到这里之后，好事情一件接着一件。
E: Penacony is such a wonderful place for one to chill and relax. Ever since I've been here, good things have been happening to me.

C: 希望你能珍惜自己的天赋，做出一番不会令自己后悔的事业。
E: I hope you'll value your talent and use it to do something you'll not regret.

C: 广告牌不再说话，它看起来和其他广告牌别无两样了。
E: The billboard has stopped talking. It looks just the same as all the other billboards around here.

C: 他是如此伟大的「工匠」，但我甚至在匹诺康尼里却见不到他的作品。
E: He is such a great "craftsman," yet I cannot see a single one of his works in Penacony.

C: 这颗心脏还不够稳定——超于负荷——它会、它会——
E: This heart of mine is still unstable... If it is overloaded, it will... It will...

C: 这可真是了不起的大发现！
E: This is truly an astounding discovery!

C: 我很高兴他愿意来到这座梦中的城市、愿意和自动乐团的大伙儿成为同伴。
E: I'm glad that he's willing to come to this dream city and find companions in the automated orchestra.

C: 我告诉你，我们才是他*最重要*的伙伴，永远都是！
E: I'm warning you! We are his *most important* companions, and we will always be!

C: 梦中有哪些值得我关注的人？
E: Is anyone worth my attention in the dream?

C: 实际上，梦境里确实有一批…比较特殊的人，是猎犬的重点观察对象。
E: In truth, there are a bunch of quite... special people in the Dreamscape. They are also our observation targets.

C: 好嘞，那您自便，我再呆一会儿。
E: Sure thing, you do you. I'll stay a while longer.

C: …手头的员工优惠始终没用，正好他原本的车也该换了，就想着…趁这个机会，占点车行的便宜。内部价，再打上折扣还真挺实惠的。
E: ...I never used my employee's discount, and it was time to replace his car. So, I saw it as a good opportunity to take advantage of the dealership — the discounted internal price is actually quite a steal!

C: 何况我可是丹西，「黄金的时刻」最逍遥的派对客，怎么会因为玩乐倒下？
E: Plus, I'm Dancy! I am Golden Hour's most legendary partygoer. You think a bit of fun is enough to take me out?

C: 这是一件幸运的事，真的！经此一遭，我有信心如常盘国的那些建国先贤一样，成为伟大的漫画家！
E: I am truly fortunate to have this opportunity, truly! I am confident that I can become a great manga artist, just like Tokiwa's founding sages!

C: 家族会为您提供最正规、最安全的服务，以及最完美的梦境体验。
E: The Family offers the most secure authorized service, along with a flawless dream experience.

C: 偶尔有来宾因常年沉浸于梦中，其大脑已变得无法分辨梦境与现实的区别。
E: In rare cases, prolonged exposure to dreams can cause guests to struggle in differentiating between dreams and reality.

C: 你说，是不是这个理？
E: Don't you agree?

C: 愿您在匹诺康尼度过一段愉快的时光。
E: I hope that you have a pleasant time in Penacony.

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 另外，还有少数比较特别的梦境…哦，糟糕，差点忘记——这部分是秘密！就像一些高级餐厅的私藏菜单一样，不能随便透露！
E: In addition, there are a few more unique dreams... Oops, I almost forgot, that part is a secret! Like the private menus in restaurants, they are exclusive to certain guests!

C: 窥梦电话突然爆发出一阵脆生的「叮铃」声——你听不出那是嘲弄还是爽朗的笑。
E: The phone suddenly emits a crisp ring, leaving you uncertain whether it is a taunt or a hearty laugh.

C: 咩咩…咩…咩咩…咩……
E: Baaaa... Baa... Baaaa... Baa ......

C: 晚上好，尊贵的客人！您今天是否有兴趣打一通神奇的「窥梦电话」？
E: Good evening, esteemed guest! Would you be interested in making a Dreampeek Call today?

C: 哇哦？！你真是太令人羡慕了！不过你还是可以了解下我们的玩具——这玩意最近都卖到断货了！
E: Wow, I'm green with envy! Still, there's no harm in learning more about this product. It's been selling like hotcakes lately!

C: 送我去「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」。
E: Bring me to The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand.

C: 如急需出行，请使用其他飞车。感谢您的配合，祝您生活愉快。
E: If you're in a hurry, do consider using another flying car. Thank you for your cooperation and have a pleasant day ahead.

C: 小鸟好可爱啾！
E: The birds are so lovely, tweet!

C: 我们一起经历了这么多冒险，还帮助那么多在梦里迷失的人们找回了自我…真是不可思议！这是我经历过的最棒的旅程！
E: We've been through all these adventures and helped so many lost people find themselves again in these dreams... It's really extraordinary! This is the best adventure I've ever been on!

C: 那你还来做志愿者？
E: Why did you volunteer then?

C: 我承认自己是个懦夫，但我无论如何也无法接受…他居然先我而去了，从此我们再也没有和好的可能……
E: I know I'm a coward, yet there's no way I can ever accept the fact that... he passed away before me. There's no chance for us to ever patch things up...

C: 一个博识学会的学者，竟然想要垄断知识——这种事情传出去，只会是天大的笑话！
E: As a scholar of the Intelligentsia Guild, he actually thought of monopolizing knowledge. What a massive joke that would be if others heard about it!

C: …可能是战甲缺少能源？是时候狂吃飞碟堡补充快乐元素了。
E: ...Maybe the armor needs more energy? It's time to chow down on some Floatdisc Burgers for more of that happy element.

C: 别的不说，光是冒险中可能用到的资源装备，我就已经收藏了整整一屋子。
E: I already have a whole room full of resources and equipment that might be useful on an adventure, and that's just the beginning.

C: 更何况…虽然还没离开过阿斯德纳星系，附近的星球我可没少转悠。但没有哪一颗能让我感受到冒险的快乐——
E: What's more... Although I've never left the Asdana star system, I have travelled to a lot of the nearby planets. It's just that none of them have really allowed me to feel the joy of adventure...

C: 哎呦，怎么竟然还有人相信「在匹诺康尼工作满<unbreak>70</unbreak>年，才能拿到永久居留权」这种事情啊，怪好笑的……
E: Ah, how are there people who still believe that "you have to work in Penacony for <unbreak>70</unbreak> years to receive the right to permanent residency" nonsense... It's ridiculous...

C: 来，客人想聊什么？您问，我必定知无不言！
E: What would you like to talk about, dear customer? Ask me anything and I'll tell you all I know!

C: 施舍似的带我们去吃喝玩乐，满口什么兄弟情谊…哼，也就那个愣头青看不出来，人那是把咱这群打工仔当宠物遛呢！
E: He takes us out to eat, drink, and be merry like it's some kind of charitable act, chatting about "the bonds of brotherhood..." Pfft! Even if that smooth-brained dumbo couldn't tell, he was treating us workers like pets!

C: …关于你和艾米绮。
E: ...About you and Amiky.

C: 道理你都明白，但隐夜鸫为什么这么大？
E: You understand the logic, but why are the Nightingales so large?

C: 那二人终将如化冻河冰，冰下裂隙滋生，河上湍流暗涌。
E: The fate of those two is like that of ice on a frozen river. As the ice cracks, the river will grow turbulent.

C: 柔和的话语随乐声而至，不知何时，那架钢琴出现在了麦克斯的身边。
E: His soft words are accompanied by a melody. Before you realize it, the piano materializes beside Max.

C: 恍惚间，你听见了某位绅士的声音，语气克制礼貌，如弦乐般舒缓而悠扬。
E: Out of nowhere, you hear the voice of a gentleman. His tone is restrained and polite, soothing and melodious like string music.

C: 想听听你对我的看法。
E: I want to know what you think about me.

C: 哈哈哈哈，要我说，这可真是个傻地方！我早就知道有几位驯物师同僚，把道具当作自己的伙伴，又是照顾又是保护的，没想到就是这里。
E: You know what? This place is filled with morons! I've heard that some of my fellow Props Masters treat props like companions, but I didn't know they're living here.

C: 当然。正好给我打掩护，尽管聊吧。
E: You bet. That'll be the perfect cover. Chat to your heart's content.

C: 嘘、嘘——「秩序」的残秽们又有新动静了。
E: Shhhh. The remnant of Order is up to something again.

C: 比如，我做过一艘超光速飞船，想要像电影里的驾驶员那样，享受在宇宙里高速航行的快乐。
E: Like how I had this dream of making a faster-than-light spaceship and being one of those pilots you see in the movies. I'd get to enjoy flying around the universe at blinding speeds.

C: 酒店前台，商店服务员，猎犬的警卫，其实大家的生活都是平凡普通的。盲目追求所谓的有钱，只会迷失自我，被老板画的饼骗到。
E: Attendants at hotels, clerks working in stores, Bloodhound guards, all of us lead average lives. Blindly chasing after the goal of being wealthy will just cause us to lose ourselves. We'll be duped by the pie our bosses draw for us.

C: 自从我那同样热爱诗歌的挚友不知所踪，我已许久未曾有过如此感受…说来我是否还未向你介绍过我的挚友——
E: Ever since my kindred friend — an avid compatriot of poetry like me — disappeared, I have not felt this way for a long time... Speaking of which, I haven't introduced that bosom friend of mine...

C: 说人话。
E: Speak human please.

C: 你是…什么？浣熊？
E: You're a... what? Raccoon?

C: 「自愿放弃肉身」可是第Ⅶ音级的家人们梦寐以求的*特权*。他们初入家族，虽然能感受到其他家人的情绪和集群之声的模糊指引，但也只是浅尝辄止。
E: "Voluntary body abandonment" is a special privilege that scale degree VII Family members can only dream of. When they first enter The Family, they can sense the emotions and hear the vague guidance of other Family members, but it's all just superficial.
Argo... Argenti?

C: 说起来，有件事我觉得还是提醒你一下比较好……
E: Speaking of which, there's something I think I'd better remind you about...

C: 网络可真是个大泥坑，坑里那些泥鳅，就喜欢将你的过失无限放大、对你的言行恶意解读，想尽办法溅你一身泥水。
E: The internet really is a giant cesspool, with pesky trolls there blowing up your mistakes a thousandfold, uncharitably twisting your words and deeds as they try their best to drag you down into the mud with them.

C: 说来倒是又好气又好笑：我来到流梦礁这些天，最大的收获竟然不是「灵感」，而是「清净」。
E: Speaking of, there's something quite funny and frustrating: The most valuable thing I gained from these few days in the Dreamflux Reef was not "inspiration" at all, but "peace."

C: 其实，我不是没办法离开筑梦边境。只是我在银河里摸爬滚打这么多年，直觉告诉我这一趟必定凶险异常——家族可能早就有所防范了。
E: Truth be told, I have the means to leave the Dream's Edge, but I've spent enough time in the cosmos to instinctually know that the trip is going to be perilous. The Family may have already taken precautions.

C: 和「黄金的时刻」不同，流梦礁的夜晚更加平静。怎么说呢？就像在现实里熬夜似的。我的心也会跟着一起平静下来，得以好好感受夜晚…或者说太空，最原本的面貌。
E: The evenings of Dreamflux Reef are calmer and quieter than the Golden Hour. I'm not sure how to explain it. It's like staying up through the night in the real world. My heart falls calm alongside it, and I'm able to experience the true nature of the night fully... Or maybe I should say space.

C: 我第一次看到了梦的具象化，神奇的联觉梦境将身处不同空间的人们联系在一起，创造出种种奇观。
E: It was the first time I saw the materialization of a dream. The mysterious Synesthesia Dreamscape connected people from different spaces together to create all sorts of wonders.

C: 我还能陪伴他们多久……
E: I wonder how much longer I can accompany them...

C: 诶，又是个生面孔，怎么称呼？
E: *sigh* Another unfamiliar face. How do I address you?

C: 记得那时，无名客们就站在我面前。他们说，要把这里变成全宇宙最耀眼的地方。
E: As I recalled, the Nameless were standing before my eyes. They said they wanted to make this the brightest place in the universe.

C: 先聊到这儿吧。
E: Good chatting with you.

C: 匹诺康尼的今天绝不是梦主或者任何一个人创造的，它的辉煌应当属于所有的匹诺康尼人。
E: Today's Penacony is in no way created by the Dreammaster or any one person. Its splendor should belong to all Penaconians.

C: 乐坊啊…这家乐坊在这座城寨刚刚建立起来的时候就已经存在了。
E: Our band... it's been around since this city was first founded.

C: …或许我有些反应过度了，但我确实感到恼火——当然，这情绪并非针对小号先生，而是我自己。
E: ...Maybe I overreacted, but I felt really angry at the time — not at Mr. Trumpet, of course, but rather directed at myself.

C: 烘焙的香味，就是幸福的味道！
E: Fresh baking: That's the smell of happiness!

C: …找鸟找傻了？
E: ...Did you go silly from hunting for birds?

C: 看来你已经找到所有小鸟了。
E: Looks like you found all the birds.

C: 玩游戏要遵守游戏规则，一枚硬币对应一条线索，多了少了都不行——你还没找到上一只小鸟呢。
E: There are rules to playing a game. A coin for a clue. No more, no less. You haven't found the previous bird.

C: 以后再说吧。
E: Catch you next time.

C: 你要是能做到，我就把「美梦小镇飞得最快的鸟」的称号让给你啾。
E: If you can do it, I'll present you with the title of "Fastest Flying Bird of Dreamville," tweet.

C: 唔…虽然小家伙们逃跑时一哄而散，但就凭它们的速度，还逃不出我的眼睛……
E: Hah... Those little fellas may be speedy when they're fleeing, but slowpokes like them won't even be able to escape my eyes...

C: 客官，如果您有「魔法硬币」就好了，魔法硬币可以唤醒人家的记忆啾！
E: Dear guest, it'd be fantastic if you have a "magic coin." Magic coins can reawaken my memories, tweet!

C: 让我想想…对了，有个调皮的孩子，总爱对<color=#dbc291ff>剧场的画像</color>搞恶作剧，要是给客人留下不好的印象就糟了啾～
E: Let me think... Oh, that's right, there's a playful child that loves fooling around with the <color=#dbc291ff>theater's portraits</color>. It'd be troublesome if that left a bad impression on guests, tweet!

C: 在此刻、在眼前，我愿笃信、我将得见——\n所向往、所期盼，我愿笃信、我将得见……
E: And right here and now before me, I sincerely believe that I shall see...\nThe yearning, the aspiration, I sincerely believe that I shall see...

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 有人注视着你——
E: Someone's watching you...

C: 抱歉，我酒精过敏……
E: Apologies, I'm allergic to alcohol.

C: 即便是在梦中，高空的景致也总因未被人烟熏染，而显得格外清新宁静，让人不由想要自此沉睡下去……
E: Even in dreams, the scenery from above is especially serene because it has not been tainted by humans yet. Such landscapes can really make me quite sleepy...

C: 你可真受欢迎啊。
E: You must be really popular.

C: 而晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号的特色下午茶，便是邀请宾客与大厨一同谱就这首曲目。
E: As for The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand's special afternoon tea, it's merely an invitation for the guests to compose the tune along with its chef.

C: 那时候，我们都想钻研出前所未有的菜式，一举成名。
E: Back then, we were trying to create a never-before-seen dish and use it to become famous.

C: 一瞬间，你还以为钟表把戏出了什么差错，对方甚至没有表现出半分消沉。
E: For a brief moment, you thought your clockwork malfunctioned. She doesn't look sad at all.

C: 不过，另外两样，又何尝不是美食？
E: But what about the other two? You don't think they're gourmet?

C: 不过，现在应该也没什么必要吧？虽然这艘船上都是有身份的客人…但您…您看上去像个好人……
E: But it seems unnecessary now, right? Everyone here probably has some fancy status, but you... you seem genuinely nice...

C: 萨曼莎没有说话，但你从她嘴角向下的弧度里读出了某种沉默的悲伤。
E: Samantha keeps silent, yet a quiet sorrow is discernible in the downturned corners of her mouth.

C: 哼，连「交易」原则都搞不懂的蠢货，有什么资格来我面前晃悠！
E: Hmph, an idiot who doesn't even understand the principles behind making deals. What right do they have to strut in front of me?

C: 啾——客官与人家真是心有灵犀，不点就通~那么就当您答应了啾！
E: Tweet — I can't believe that you figured out my request before I could even say it! We really are on the same wavelength. In that case, I take it that you've agreed to help me out?

C: 你这儿都卖些什么？
E: What have you got for sale here?

C: 我选帕姆！
E: I'll go with Pom-Pom!

C: 你正想与冷芯就他的人才管理知识继续探讨下去，但在你正要开口的瞬间，你却发现——
E: You want to keep discussing the art of talent management with Caldwick, but just as you are about to speak, you notice that...

C: 或许，改日你顺路经过博识学会，可以帮我问问他是怎么想的，如果他还在的话。
E: If you ever pass by the Intelligentsia Guild one day, and if he's still around, can you help me to ask him just what he was thinking back then.

C: 我说，今年预热派对的规模非同小可，开支也是。正巧我父亲是校球笼赛的忠实观众，非常乐意全额赞助此次派对，免去大家一桩心事。
E: I mentioned that this year's kick-off party is going to be grand and costly. Luckily, my dad, who's a big fan of the school Spheroid races, would be more than happy to fully sponsor the party and ease their financial burden.

C: 我能做什么呢…有了！成为罗密欧那样的球笼赛车手吧，那可是校园里最受尊敬的角色！
E: But what will I do? Oh, I know! I'll become a Spheroid racer like Romeo. That's pretty popular on campus!

C: …唉，你不知道，她是筑梦学院的优等生，是个心思纯粹的设计师…商人的天敌！
E: ... *sigh* You won't understand. She's a model student at Dreamweaver Academy, an altruistic architect with a heart of gold... The archenemy of us entrepreneurs!

C: 他们在关心你。
E: They are showing concern for you.

C: 各学院的车手都是什么风格？
E: What are the drivers of each academy like?

C: 当然，请随便问。我很乐意提供解答！
E: Of course, ask whatever you like. I would be happy to answer your questions!

C: 我很好奇，要不你继续？
E: I'm curious, please go on?

C: 原本大家还对小猴爱得死去活来，到处「蕉蕉蕉蕉」呢，就一天不到的功夫，所有人都去讨论《银河忍法帖》了。
E: Everyone was obsessed with that little monkey. All you'd hear was "bana bana bana." Then, before a day had even passed, everyone moved on to that Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions.

C: 去上班吧！
E: Go to work!

C: 既然找不到合适的方向，说明每条路都不适合我。有简单的模式可以选，我也别给自己的人生增加难度了。
E: Since I can't find the right direction, that means that none of the paths are suitable for me. If l can choose an easy mode for life, I shouldn't make it any harder than it needs to be.

C: 让我看看…太好了，真适合我，不愧是经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}！短短几句话就令我的页面与众不同！
E: Let me see... That's amazing, it suits me so well! No wonder you're our {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager! You've made my page stand out with just a few sentences!

C: 我与那位代表相识很长时间了，知道他是位真心替学生着想，将艺术理念看得比名誉更为重要的优秀教师。
E: I've known that rep for a long time, and I know he sincerely cares for the students. He is an excellent teacher who puts artistic ideals far above fame.

C: 呵，这就是做老师的好处吧，至少还有人能把我的所学所想，我的技巧和信念传承下去。我…还能活在学生们的创作里。
E: Heh, this is the perk of being a teacher, at least there are those who can impart my learnings, thoughts, techniques, and beliefs. I... will still live on my students' creations.

C: 你这都卖些什么？
E: What are you selling here?

C: 记得，怎么突然改名了。
E: I remember, but why the sudden change in name?

C: 不过有机会的话，你可以介绍我们认识一下吗？都是要出镜的，四舍五入也算是半个同行，交流交流经验也好呀。
E: But if there's a chance, could you introduce us? We're all trying to get on camera, so we're considered coworkers in the same industry anyway. It'd be good to talk shop.

C: 我也想过放弃，但…乱破同学说过，每个人的「忍道」都是充满辛酸苦楚的，此乃成为忍者必需的试炼——当越过刀山火海，一定能在忍道的尽头得到参悟。
E: I've thought of giving up before, but... Rappa said that every person's way of the ninja is full of bitter experiences, that these are the necessary trials and tribulations that a ninja has to suffer — when all hardships are overcome, enlightenment will be waiting at the end of our path.

C: 它们大多走上灶台，担负起厨师的职责，唯独一个机器人，在餐厅遇袭的危急时刻，意外解锁了智械核心的战斗模块。
E: Most of them ended up in kitchens, charged with chef responsibilities. Only one robot, during a critical moment when its restaurant was attacked, accidentally unlocked its Intellitron core's combat module.

C: 亲爱的无名客， 您或许对智能拟真模块的训练方式略有所闻？
E: Dear Nameless, I assume you might be somewhat aware of the training methods with AI realism modules?

C: 而这个机器人，也会用它的数据训练新的机器人…哦，这该多么有趣呀！
E: And this robot, will use its own data to train a new robot... Oh, how interesting that would be!

C: 还有别的事。
E: Nah, I've got better stuff to do.

C: 您对星神感兴趣吗？我这里还有一个关于星神的笑话。
E: Are you interested in Aeons? I have another joke about Aeons.

C: 比如「天国」，「净土」，「乐境」…用词略有不同。但愿此后，我能有机会造访，看看它们是否名副其实。
E: They go by different names — Heavenly Kingdom, Pure Land, Blissful Realm... Hopefully, I can visit these places to see if they truly live up to their names.

C: 列车上的生活如何？
E: How's life on the Express?

C: 点石成金小课堂开课啦，只收学费，不包教会。
E: Alright. The lesson about turning garbage into gold begins. Note that this only includes the tuition fee and that the demonstrations are not included.

C: 看着从天而降的苏乐达，盛会海选时的点点滴滴又涌上心头。
E: Looking at the SoulGlad falling from the sky, your memories of the Festivity Auditions return.

C: 你注意到一个标有「隐形模式」的开关，随即试探性地按了下去，屏幕上的控制界面瞬间隐藏了起来——名副其实，可这又有什么用呢？你无法理解它的设计初衷。
E: You notice a switch labeled "Stealth Mode," and you experimentally press down on it — the control panel on the screen is instantly hidden. It certainly lives up to its functional name, but what's the point of it? You cannot fathom the reason for its design.

C: 你看到飞艇机翼上的涂装，那是你「{NICKNAME}严选」的成果，即使在高空中，它也如此突出，如此帅气，就像飞艇的现任船长一样……
E: You see the paint on the ship's wings: It's the result of "{NICKNAME}'s stringent selection." Even when soaring through the sky, it is still that vibrant and sleek — just like the ship's current captain...

C: 望着眼前凌乱的一桌用具，你感慨万千——满满都是成年人的煎熬。
E: Gazing at the stationery strewn across the table before you, you are hit by a profound sense of emotion — these all represent the hardships of adults.

C: 悬挂在船身的球形救生艇，希望你没有用上它的时候。
E: An orb-shaped lifeboat strapped to the side of the ship. You hope you never have to use it.

C: 你注意到梦泡上竟站着一只扑满，它朝你点了点头，似是致意，你很感动——原来你并不孤独，世界上竟然有这么多理解你的生物存在。
E: You notice a trotter standing atop the dream bubble. It nods its head at you, as if greeting you. You are moved — you aren't truly alone, for the world still has so many creatures that understand you.

C: 签在我手机壳上！等等…还是先合照吧，我马上发给我朋友看，嘻嘻。
E: Sign on my phone case! Wait... Let's take a photo together first so I can show it off to my friends, hehehe!

C: 你在泳池中急速奔跑的行为使你受到了领班的注目礼，他将你拎出泳池，你为他惊人的臂力咋舌。
E: While at the pool, your act of running around catches the attention of the supervisor, who pulls you out of the swimming pool. You're amazed by the strength of his arm.

C: 这里的东西都太大了。
E: Everything here is too big.

C: …人脸识别失败？
E: ...Face verification failed?

C: 「斯登家族」新款腕表现已面世。
E: A new model of wristwatch by the "Sten Family" has just hit the market.

C: 这怎么可能实现嘛…
E: How can that be done...

C: 手机上明明显示有啊。
E: But my phone says there are rooms available.

C: 这个可以有。
E: We can definitely have that.

C: 看我的！
E: Watch this!

C: 怕不是个大工程。
E: It'll be a massive undertaking.

C: 这多亏了您领导有方，夫人。
E: It's all thanks to your leadership, Madam.

C: 我们要投诉！
E: We want to complain!

C: …他是如此沉稳可靠、如此帅气逼人…一切敌人都将在他的利爪与獠牙面前不堪一击……
E: ...He's so calm and reliable, so strong and handsome... No enemy could stand against his sharp claws and ferocious fangs...

C: 啧，这也能过关？
E: Tsk, that's all?

C: 我会追上他们的！
E: I'll catch up to them!

C: 作为开赛前最大的黑马之一。
E: As one of the strongest contestants this time,

C: 您印象最深的是哪一场比赛？
E: Which round was the most memorable for you?

C: 当然是决赛，那场太帅了。
E: The finals, of course! That final round was epic!

C: 下面，有请本台的特别评论员。
E: Next up, our special commentator.

C: 你好好想想，自己都看到了什么？除了星期日，还有哪些叛徒？
E: Think carefully, what did you see? Who else were the traitors, besides Sunday?

C: 听说是送给一位无名客了。
E: I heard it was given to a Nameless.

C: 您是第一位试吃者…
E: You're the first taster...

C: 我、我迷路了…
E: I... I'm lost...

C: 嘘——小心隔墙有耳…
E: Shhh, the walls have ears...

C: 别离开我，好么？
E: Don't leave me, okay?

C: 我是第一个来的！
E: I was here first!

C: 真的什么都能典押吗？
E: Will it really take anything as collateral?

C: …整天丢三落四的，实在不行就去广播站发个寻物启事，让别人帮忙找找吧。
E: ...You're always losing stuff. If you really can't find it, just go to the broadcast station and put out a lost-and-found notice, so someone can help you look for it.

C: 武装考古学派曾断言人类文明建立在「冰箱的发明」之上，这个论断以一票之差输给了「取火」。
E: The Armed Archaeologists once asserted that human civilization was founded upon the "invention of the refrigerator," but this claim lost by a single vote to the "discovery of fire."

C: 镜子里浮现出一张引人歆羡的脸庞。你简单调整了角度和表情，现在它看起来更加完美了。
E: A captivating face appears in the mirror. You adjust your angle and expression slightly, and now it looks even more perfect.

C: 水温逐渐稳定，热气开始升腾……
E: The water temperature gradually stabilizes, and steam begins to rise...

C: 有时你会忽然想和它说说话，但你知道不会有回应。
E: Sometimes you suddenly want to talk to it, but you know it won't respond.

C: 具备闹铃功能，能够用一百句钟表小子经典台词叫你起床。
E: Equipped with an alarm function, it can wake you up with a hundred classic lines from Clockie.

C: 向它声明房间守则。
E: Declare the room rules to it.

C: 不准偷吃零食。
E: No stealing snacks.

C: 还有位颇为负责的大人，偶尔也会来与我探讨人体绘画之美妙哩，绘制肌肉线条如何流畅又饱满，哪个款式的肩甲能显得身形更加宽阔……
E: There's another responsible heir who drops by occasionally, discussing the beauty of portraying the human form, the intricate lines of muscles, and the armor styles that highlight the body's figure...

C: 店里都有些什么？
E: What do you have in stock?

C: 免了，我就随便尝一口。
E: It's okay, I'll just eat it in my own order.

C: 说到底，它不一定意味着你会遭遇不测，所以…倒也不必如此消极。
E: After all, it doesn't necessarily mean something bad is going to happen, so... maybe you need not be so pessimistic.

C: 拿来干什么呢？打游戏，看视频，还是发呆？
E: What to do with that time? Play games, watch videos, or just zone out?

C: 有，刚出锅的。拿着。
E: Yeah, fresh from the pot. Take it.

C: 你好，陌生的孩子。世界苦难深重，人生不如意之事也十有八九。但没关系，在这座美丽的圣城里，我们都可以获得片刻的安宁。
E: Greetings, unfamiliar child. The world is full of agony, and life is brimming with misery and mishaps. However, don't fret about it. We can all obtain a momentary peace here in this beautiful holy city.

C: 老身名为塔瓦纳安娜，来自遥远东方的哈图西里城邦。虽说在黑潮之前，我的家乡也曾像花园一样美丽，但赞美{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}磐岩之脊{RUBY_E#}——果然还是{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}刻法勒庇护下的圣城{RUBY_E#}举世无双。
E: My name is Tavananna, hailing all the way from Hattusili in the far east. While my homeland was a paradise before the black tide — praise the {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Pillar of Stone{RUBY_E#} — its charm would pale in comparison to the splendor of {RUBY_B#Okhema}the holy city under Kephale's wings{RUBY_E#}.

C: 嗯，要我为阿格莱雅大人做补充，实在是有些惶恐…那我就给您讲些只有我们工作人员才知道的事好了。
E: Mm, it somewhat terrifies me that I am to elaborate on Lady Aglaea's words... I shall tell you about matters that only staff are privy to then.

C: 你们的心灵感应好方便。
E: Your telepathy must be very convenient.

C: 啊！你是谁？是塞纳托斯派来的使者吗？我...我还没准备好！
E: Ah! Who are you? A messenger sent by Thanatos? I... I am not ready yet!

C: 好像不对…我记不清了，我真的记不清了……
E: Something's not right... I can't remember. I really can't...

C: 我的经历？哪一段？是我们如何在尼卡多利的指引下勇敢战斗，还是...我们最后是如何失败的？
E: What I experienced? Which part? The part about how we battled bravely under the guidance of Nikador? Or... How we were eventually defeated?

C: 那好吧……
E: Alright then...

C: 我还有事，先走了。
E: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

C: 成为半神的圣女以「自我分裂」为代价，将获知的「创世神谕」传递给各个城邦。但…此举却反被有心人歪曲利用。
E: This maiden who became a demigod paid the price of self-fragmentation and passed on the Prophecy of Creation to all cities. However... it's a move that was twisted and misused by someone harboring ulterior motives.

C: 当然啦，平日里占卜一下图个安心还是没问题的，不然我这种老婆子岂不是要饿肚子了，哈哈~
E: Of course, it's fine to tell a few fortunes now and then to set some minds at ease — otherwise an old woman like me would go starving, haha~

C: 嗐，您要是对故事不感兴趣，那咱们也可以直接找个僻静的地方验货——西尔菲翁肥皂是名贵之物，这里人多眼杂，我怕东西被偷被抢。
E: Well, if you're not interested in stories, we just find some place quiet to inspect the wares... Silphion soap is a precious commodity and there's lots of people around here. I'm worried we might get mugged.

C: 呃，有那么明显吗？
E: Uh, was it that obvious?

C: 家庭的温暖。
E: A family's warmth.

C: 目前我有点怀疑，这是不是某种古老的习性——也许古老到在吉奥里亚将它们赐予我们之前，它们就生性如此，只是被驯养了这么多年，因为生活原因，很少对人展示出这一点。
E: Right now, I'm a little skeptical about whether it's some kind of ancient habit — perhaps a habit so ancient that it was how they naturally were prior to Georios gifting them to us. But, through years of domestication, they have rarely displayed this to humans, likely due to changes in their living conditions.

C: 能给我介绍下大地兽吗？
E: Could you please tell me a little about dromases?

C: 我还有事，先不聊了。
E: I've got to go. Talk to you later.

C: 我们虽然无法控制剧本，但好的戏剧却总是能调动起人的情绪，让我们的内心像刚泡过温泉一样，鼓满生命的力量。
E: Though we have no control over the script, a good play can stir up the emotions of humans and stoke the power of life in our hearts — like we have been immersed in a warm spa.

C: 不过像你这样的人肯定闲不下来吧？劳碌命也真是辛苦…要记得忙里偷闲哦！
E: Although, I'm sure someone such as yourself does not get free time, right? A life of hard work is truly tough... Make sure you remember to enjoy a moment of leisure when you can!

C: 我们聊些东西吧。
E: Let's talk about something.

C: 呵！我闭关修炼了二十年，早就忘记怎么交朋友了。你让我去找两个志同道合的伙伴，不是存心刁难我吗？
E: Hah! I've been training for twenty years as a recluse, and have long forgotten how to make friends. Now you're making me find two like-minded comrades? That's deliberate sabotage!

C: 呃…其实刚刚所说的迷醉体验…也都是他人向我转述的。我生来便遭法吉娜大人忽视，至今从未迷醉过。
E: Err... these intoxicated experiences I have described... were what others have told me. I have been ignored by Phagousa all my life and never had the chance at the experience.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，可有回想起什么？
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}, do you remember anything now?

C: （继续听下去）
E: (Keep listening)

C: 无论「四味烤红土」、「大地排」还是「土包子」！样样手到擒来！
E: Whether it's "Four Flavors Redsoil Roast," "Earthbound Delight," or "Ground Buns" — I can whip them all up!

C: 你好！唔…是没怎么见过的生面孔啊。
E: Hello! Hmm, I don't recognize you. You're new around here, aren't you?

C: 倒也是一种自然选择。
E: It's sort of a natural selection.

C: 狡诈！我可不用这种小人手段。
E: Cunning! I'd never stoop to such petty tricks.

C: 搞不好啊，都是泰坦起的头。看到天边的刻法勒了吗，那强健的体魄，惊人的力量，我估计它也没少练。
E: It might all have started with the Titans. Do you see Kephale on the horizon? That strong physique, that incredible strength — I bet they've put in a lot of training as well.

C: 虽然不能断言，但至少体能的水平十分相近。如此独特的样本一百个光历年也难遇一例…孩子，这是个好事，但也要注重休息，别太勉强自己的身体喽……
E: Although I can't say for certain, at least your level of physical ability is very similar to them. Such a unique specimen is rare, only one in a hundred Light Calendar years... Kid, this is a good thing, but you should also pay attention to rest and not push your body too hard...

C: 博莱斯检视着自己栩栩如生的义肢，留意到了你的到来后，望向了你这边。
E: While inspecting his lifelike prosthetic, Bolaris notices your arrival and looks over at you.

C: 算了，我没那么好奇。
E: Forget it. I'm not that curious.

C: 哈，想来些乐子？那你可找对人喽——放心，我手里的消息向来明码标价，绝对不坑朋友~
E: Hah. Wanna have some fun? Then you found the right person. Don't worry — I run an honest business. My intel is always clearly priced, and I'd never scam a friend~

C: 哈哈，这倒是常听人问起，但要知道，卷轴也好纸张也罢，都只是一种形式，凡是载有学识的媒介，在我们这统一都可称做「书」——包括字画和石版，均在馆藏范围内。
E: Haha, that's a question I hear quite often. But you see, whether it's a scroll or paper, they're just forms. Any medium that carries knowledge is collectively referred to as a "book" here — this includes calligraphy, paintings, and even steles, all of which are part of our collection.

C: 如何，年轻人？找到想看的书了吗？
E: So, youngster, have you found a book you like?

C: 我听到了你的「思乡」。
E: I can hear your longing for home.

C: 说起来…我也有段时间没去树庭听讲座了。不知道他们有没有什么新发现……
E: Speaking of which... I haven't listened to a lecture at the Grove for quite a while. I wonder if they've made any new discoveries...

C: 我想听听其他学派。
E: I want to hear about other schools.

C: 我见过你的同伴。
E: I've met your companions already.

C: 至于收集这些的缘由…时机到了，雅努斯自会让你知晓。
E: As for the reason behind collecting all these... When the time comes, Janus will let you know.

C: 哇！你的语音信箱差点被塞爆了，你筛选下要先听谁的留言吧？我已经按照星图地区给你做好分类啦！
E: Wow, your voicemail is nearly full! Why not sort through and decide whose messages to listen to first? I've organized them by astral regions for easy access.

C: 埃美丽。
E: Emily.

C: 感觉像是伪科学合集。
E: Sounds like a compendium of pseudoscience, doesn't it?

C: 其实我也知道老爸当了几十年的兵，对部队有很深的感情，但是我和妈妈也很想念他啊。
E: I understand that Dad has been in the military for decades and has a strong bond with it, but Mom and I really miss him too.

C: 听听黄金世怎么朝圣。
E: Tell me about the pilgrimages of the Era Chrysea.

C: 所以在黄金世，人们的朝圣旅途并不是从四面八方抵达这里：恰恰相反，他们会从这里出发，尽力抵达世界尽头，亲身穿过雅努斯在那里设立的门。
E: So, in the Era Chrysea, people would not conduct their pilgrimages from all directions to arrive here. On the contrary, they would start their pilgrimages from here and try their best to make it to the end of the world to personally pass through the gates that Janus themself had set there.

C: 所以，有一派祭司就认为，黄金世那些立于世界边缘的雅努斯之门，在最初就一并诞生于雅努萨波利斯这个世界的原点——
E: So, there is a faction of priests who believe that the Gates of Janus standing at the ends of the earth originated in Janusopolis, the starting point of this world.

C: 先不聊了，祝你好运。
E: I can't chat now. Good luck with everything.

C: 再说说你的理念？
E: Tell me your philosophy again?

C: 哈哈，那是你践行的律法，我可没必要遵从。不过我理解，在这里还能遇见如此坚持正义的人，想必你也会受到塔兰顿的赞扬吧。
E: Ha, that's your law to follow, not mine. But I get it. Running into someone so devoted to justice around here is a rare thing. I'm sure Talanton would commend you for it.

C: 阁下，您的意思莫非是…按照规定，动用雅努斯迷津进行卜算，需要有卫士陪同，这样…就能带我在不违背律法的前提下进入内殿？
E: Esteemed one, are you suggesting...? According to the rules, using Janus' Maze for divination requires a guard's presence, which... would allow me to enter the inner sanctum without breaking the law?

C: 是！您慢走，祭司大人。愿圣女的慈爱永远与您，还有我同在！
E: Yes! Safe travels, noble priest. May the Holy Maiden's mercy be with you, and with me as well!

C: 啊…阁下愿意这么说，我很开心。我平素深居简出，又身负死亡的诅咒，已经很久没有认识新的朋友了，也许给人的初印象确实有些冰冷……
E: Ah, I'm glad you think so. I've spent much of my life in seclusion, bearing the curse of death, so it's been a long time since I made new friends. Perhaps my initial impression does come across as cold.

C: 比如说，曾有人问*我们*身上戴着的五瓣花有什么意蕴，*我们*三人使劲想呀想，却始终想不起来。
E: For instance, someone once asked us about the five-petal flower we wear. We racked our brains, but no matter how hard we tried, we just couldn't remember its meaning.

C: 三角形的小旗子，挥一挥就可祛除人们的病痛…好方便的道具，要是我也能有这样的一面神奇的旗子就好啦。
E: Small triangular flags that can cure ailments just by being waved around... What a convenient tool! I wish I had a miraculous flag like that too.

C: 没啥要紧事，下次再聊！
E: Nothing urgent for now. Let's chat next time!

C: 实践是有实践，但没有什么工作需要这种实践。
E: Oh, there's plenty of practice — it's just not the kind of practice that translates into any real occupational skills.

C: 你不用说，我明白的。
E: No need to explain, I get it.

C: 更多的战士无法得知死亡何时而至，他说「告诉他们，我身体的一侧疼得厉害」。
E: Many more soldiers didn't know when death would come. One said, "Tell them that it hurts really bad on one side of my body."

C: 无需忧心，圣城的光芒依旧，只要「祭仪」流程完整，我将为你赐下{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的祝福。
E: Do not worry. The light of the holy city still shines. As long as the ritual is properly followed, I will bestow the blessing of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} upon you.

C: 也希望你不要忘了自己的任务，贵客，我们都有未完成的使命。
E: I hope you don't forget your task, honored guest. We all have unfinished missions.

C: 我想起来了…有位织者与蝴蝶颇为交好。它正在<color=#dbc291ff>亡语蝶嬉戏的枝干前</color>，喃喃着要加入它们呢。
E: I remember now... A weaver is quite fond of butterflies. It's murmuring about joining them in front of <color=#dbc291ff>the branch where the Eulogistic Butterflies play</color>.

C: 恐怕不会是什么好地方…
E: It probably won't be a good place...

C: 一段熟悉的跫音…{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，想不到在这样的时刻还能与你重逢。
E: A rather familiar footstep... {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}, I never imagined we would meet again in times like these.

C: 如果真的有再创世，利波希望能再见赫西俄德老师一面。
E: If Era Nova is real, I hope to see my teacher Hesiod once again.

C: 我站在这里，是为了提醒他们——逃难是没有尽头的，不如安心留在圣城。
E: I stand here to remind them – fleeing has no end. Better to stay peacefully in the holy city.

C: 有点酷。
E: That's actually pretty cool.

C: 别慌，再创世……
E: Don't panic. The Era Nova...

C: 远在纷争世，金丝仍能触及天空诸邦的年代，天空诸邦也有若虫通行往来，沿着金丝的指引将消息带回大地。
E: Back in the Era Bellica, when the golden thread could still reach the cities in the sky, nymphs used to travel between those places and bring back news to the earth under the guidance of the golden thread.

C: 务必小心，贵客。您能平安归来，于我们而言便是最好的消息。
E: Please be careful, honored guest. Your safe return would be the best news for us.

C: 你已经完成了预言的试炼，贵客，我的使命也总算告一段落了。
E: You've completed the prophecy's trial, esteemed guest. My duty is finally at its end.

C: 贵客做得真棒。现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
E: Well done, esteemed guest. And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies.

C: 迷地一口就吃完了。
E: Mem gobbled it all in one bite.

C: 采蘑菇？去过了迷。
E: Picking mushrooms? Already did that, memi.

C: 新来的客人，欢迎迷！
E: Welcome, newcomer memi!

C: 妖精迷路采花蜜，寻寻觅觅穿林径~
E: Fairies wander, nectar sweet, tiptoe past the clover sheets~

C: 不对，怎么是你敲的！
E: Wait, you rang it?

C: 时光流转，生生不息，我又何时才能等到我的那只虫呢……
E: Time passes and life circles. When will I find that dear friend of mine...

C: 好吧，只要你把我拉起来，我就把桌子让给你。
E: Fine, pull me up and the table's yours!

C: 萝卜可不会闪闪发光。
E: But radishes don't glow like you do.

C: 有人在吗？
E: Hello? Anybody here?

C: 好呀！人家也有想做的事，可以和你一起吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Great idea! I have something in mind too. Can I join you, {NICKNAME}?

C: 也许是因为哀丽秘榭没有夜晚吧？在这里，一切都是最美好的模样，比如阳光下的麦田，波光粼粼的水面……
E: Maybe it's because there's no nighttime in Aedes Elysiae? Everything here stays in its most beautiful state — golden wheat fields under the sunshine, water surfaces sparkling with light...

C: 抱歉，现在没心情…
E: I'm sorry, but I'm not in the mood right now...

C: 看您的表情，应该是在疑惑，我为什么能参加这场欢宴吧？答案很简单——在您未见证的历史中，我站在了凯撒这边。
E: Your bewilderment shows on your face. You must be confused about why I am here? Simple: In the histories unwitnessed by you, I sided with the Imperator.

C: 正，正确答案是——葡萄。
E: The r—right answer is grape.

C: 蜜酿的唯一功效，就是让你变得快乐愉悦吼！而且是没条件的快乐吼！
E: The only positive effect it has is to make you happy! Unconditionally happy, might I add!

C: 嗯…有位织者偏爱美好之物。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>藏珍甬道的</color>宝库里，欣赏琳琅的陈列呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who adores fine things. The golden thread brings tidings: They are in the vault <color=#dbc291ff>of the Passage of Treasures</color>, admiring the dazzling collection.

C: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I've found all the nymphs here.

C: 不愧是你。
E: As expected of you.

C: 灵魂在得以质变擢升之前，就因肉体的衰败而枯萎——这将是何等的悲剧！
E: For the soul to wither and decline before achieving elevation because of a debilitated body... What a tragedy that would be!

C: 即便我将再度跨越轮回…当我们在来世再见时，我也一定会像最初诞生时那样……
E: When we meet in the next world... Even if I have endured another reincarnation...

C: 嗷呜嗷呜…嗷——
E: Awoo awoo... awoo...

C: 来吧，我愿意向年轻人分享我的智慧和狡猾。
E: Come. I am willing to share my wisdom and cunning with the youth.

C: 我会继续回忆其他孩子的去处，就拜托你把刚才提到的小调皮带回来咕。
E: I'll try to recall where the other kids went. I'm counting on you to bring back these playful ones, hoot.

C: 老师，我的算术老是不及格啾，也可以像黄金公子那样…设计出金光闪闪的广场吗？
E: Professor, I keep failing math, tweet. Can I still be like Young Master Gold... and design a golden, shiny plaza?

C: 最好是第一时间，只与我一个人联系！
E: Preferably right away, and only me!

C: 哦，又见面了。你没有遭遇不测，我也还尚且能够喘息，真是太难得了。
E: We meet again. You are still alive and I am still breathing. How rare is that!

C: 哈！？你知不知道你在说什么话？奇物怎么可能是想要就能给的！
E: Huh!? Do you even know what you're talking about? I can't just give a Curio to a random person!

C: 我还有些问题想要问…
E: I've got something to ask you.

C: 为了这个梦想，我已经奋斗了多年，而现在…你告诉我，瑟希斯没了，学者们也跑了，我的梦想不能实现了？
E: I've been chasing this dream for years, and now... you're telling me that Cerces is gone, the scholars have fled, and my dream can't come true?

C: 嗷呜…其实说来很简单，我掉进了一个洞里。
E: Awoo... Actually, it's pretty simple. I fell into a hole.

C: 这只若虫的触角努力探出，似乎也想变成贼灵…
E: The nymph's antennae stretch out eagerly, like it wants to be a Spirithief too...

C: 嗯…有位织者对神明不吝溢美之词。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>瑟希斯雕像的脚边</color>高声宣扬自己的信仰呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who has been singing high praises of the gods. The golden thread brings tidings: They're loudly proclaiming their faith right <color=#dbc291ff>at the feet of Cerces's statue</color>.

C: 嗯…有位织者口渴难耐。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>友爱之馆的金池旁</color>，为自己的选择发愁呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who's quite thirsty. The golden thread brings tidings: They are at the <color=#dbc291ff>Golden Pond in the Library of Philia</color>, fretting over their choices.

C: 又来了…那个「在某一个时刻，我可以是你，你也可以是我」理论吗？
E: Here we go again... that whole "somewhere in this endless cycle, I might live as you, and you as me" spiel?

C: …边缘这里最好用回针来绣，重叠的针脚能让花纹变得更加清晰。
E: ...It's best to use a back stitch for the edges here. The overlapping stitches will make the patterns clearer.

C: 你那是什么表情！我的小说可是本本大卖好吗？而且我这次打算写严肃文学，你就给我好好期待吧！
E: What's with that look on your face! All my novels are bestsellers, okay? And this time I'm going for serious literature, so you'd better look forward to it!

C: 你有所不知，莲食学派的「素肉」可是很受欢迎呢！不过话说回来……
E: You'd be surprised that the "mock meat" made by the Lotophagists is actually super popular! But anyway...

C: 我花的都是自己的小金库！再说了，我总共才找他借过几次钱，哪回没老老实实打欠条！不像某人，儿子不声不响地连养老的房子都给买好了。
E: I'm spending my own savings here! Besides, I've only borrowed from him a few times, and I've always written an IOU like a good sport! Unlike someone whose son went and bought a retirement home without saying a word.

C: 呃，为民众谋福利确是贵族义务的一部分，但…说实话，小时候背的那些律法，我早就忘得一干二净了。
E: Uh, serving the people's welfare is part of an aristocrat's duty, but... honestly, all those laws I memorized as a kid? Yeah, they're completely gone from my memory now.
*sigh* ...

C: 嗷呜？想要的话，这个就送给你吧，在工作里派不上什么用场。
E: Awoo? If you want it, you can have it. It's not really useful for work anyway.

C: 呼~感觉有点困了…是时候闭上眼睛，去梦里相见啦……
E: *yawn* I'm feeling kinda sleepy... Time for some shuteye. See you in dreamland...

C: 厨、厨神争霸赛？这里不是翁法罗斯第一届手工制品交流会现场吗？
E: A—A Culinary Showdown? Isn't this supposed to be the 1st Amphoreus Handicraft Convention?

C: 此世已是没有纷争和牺牲的世界，做得好，救世主。
E: This world is now free from strife and sacrifice. Well done, Deliverer.

C: 若是回归最朴素的生命本能，填满「大地」的胃袋，只需要一块块滋味丰盛的红土。
E: If we return to the most basic instinct of life, all it takes to fill the "Earth's" belly is rich and flavorful redsoil.

C: 嗯…有位织者行动缓慢。金丝带来消息，它正<color=#dbc291ff>向闪烁电光的高处</color>，举步维艰一步步攀登呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who moves at a burdened pace. The golden thread brings tidings: They're <color=#dbc291ff>climbing towards the heights where lightning flickers</color>, struggling with every step.

C: 在一切彻底结束前，让我们先拾尽若虫——他常用来自比的对象吧。
E: Before all comes to an end, let's gather all the nymphs, the creatures he so often used as a metaphor for himself.

C: 凭借「记忆」的力量，你所熟悉的形象们会在这一页故事中永远生活下去，我也不例外。
E: By the power of Remembrance, the figures you know will live forever upon this page of the story, and so shall I.

C: 来古士？
E: Lygus?

C: 没有丹恒的许可，我不能随便说他的事情；好像有什么敌人在追逐他，丹恒来到星穹列车是个巧合，留下则是因为无处可去。

C: 「探索」未知的世界，不断拓宽前方的旅道。
E: Explore the unknown world to continue our journey ahead.

E: Beep, beep, beep... Based on your search history, I recommend the Humanoid Tactical Microwave. Press Skip to cancel personalized ads.

E: Why was this drawn on the old photos?

E: "Cocolia Rand, the Martyr." / "Cocolia Rand, the Hurried." / "Cocolia Rand, the Callous."

C: 好，就这么决定啦！我把受损的相片和大致的拍摄区域发给你，你去重新拍一张类似的照片就行！
E: Alright, it's decided then! I'll send you the damaged photos and the approximate location they were taken in, and you just take a similar pic there!

C: 该片为葛瑞迪影业制作的灾难片，描绘了匹诺康尼的末日——因为苜蓿草家系的疏忽，纸醉金迷的社会在经济危机下崩溃，贪心的人们引来了可怕的超级忆域迷因。
E: The End of the Gala is a disaster film produced by Grady Films, depicting the apocalypse of Penacony. Due to the negligence of the Alfalfa Family, the society that is obsessed with extravagance collapses during the economic crisis. The greed of the people attracts the much-dreaded super Memory Zone Memes.

C: 把最热烈的掌声，献给两位年轻有为的来宾吧！
E: Let's give a round of applause to our aspiring young guests!

C: 啊哈，我们的盛会巨星，你回来了！
E: Ah! Our Festive Superstar! You're back!

C: 拍摄这部影片时，我们没能得到那位纯美骑士的形象授权，所以我就让导演把这只怪物安排在了关底——是不是很刺激？
E: When shooting this film, we couldn't get the rights to that Knight of Beauty, so we had the director place this monster as the final obstacle. Isn't that a thrill?

C: 因为我是为凋亡世界悼念之人。
E: Because I'm the one who mourns for the dying world.

C: 我亲眼见证的末日么…让我想想。
E: The apocalypse I've witnessed myself? Let me think.

C: 即使先知被刺杀，也并未能终止纠纷。一个充盈混沌忆质的洞，凭空地出现在两个政权的交界地上。
E: Even the assassination of the prophet wasn't enough to quell the chaos. A cavity filled with chaotic memoria appeared out of nowhere at the border between the two opposing forces.

C: 成为仗剑天涯、磊落坦荡的大侠…这倒是个能勉励习剑的理由。
E: Becoming a swordmaster who fights for justice and battles evil... Well, that's definitely a good reason to keep you motivated in swordplay training.

C: 来人，给乡下人亮亮家伙。
E: Well, guess it's time to show these bumpkins something serious.

C: 我看你家将军也没教会你，战斗的时候别像只麻雀般乱蹦啊！
E: Heh, looks like your general hasn't told you to stop hopping around like a sparrow in a fight, huh?

C: 你们查清楚了吗？
E: So, have you found any information about her?

C: 我倒要看看，你们这些「十五天速成班」教出来的徒弟，到底能有多大的本事！
E: Now I'm curious to see what this "<unbreak>15</unbreak>-day crash course" apprentice is really capable of!

C: 好耶！
E: Yeah!

C: 三月，凭你眼下的剑术，即便面对公司的机甲，也能稳操胜券。
E: With your swordplay skills, you can effortlessly take down IPC mechs, March.

C: 协助三月七练习剑术
E: Help March 7th with her sword training.

C: 我给你贴上符纸，你再好好休息一会……
E: I'll apply a talisman on you, and then you need to have a good rest...

C: 一段时间后……
E: Some time later...

C: 被岁阳一附身就好累啊，{NICKNAME}，咱们去吃点好吃的吧。
E: It's draining being possessed by a heliobus, {NICKNAME}. Let's go grab something tasty to eat.

C: 哈哈哈，看这小妮子自信满满的样子，我还以为能有多强呢！结果还不是被我们轻松拿捏～
E: Hahaha, and to think she was so full of herself. I thought she'd be a tough opponent, but we handled her with ease.

C: 哈哈哈哈，真是痛快啊！真是痛快啊！哈哈哈哈哈哈！
E: Hahaha! This is so satisfying! So satisfying! Hahahahaha!

C: 啊，不好意思。刚听闻三月小姐准备靠「丹药」解决斯科特，就稍微做了些安排。
E: Oh, sorry! I heard March was planning to use some medicine against Skott, so I made some preparations.

C: …你是怎么知道的？哼，鄙人的城府还是不够深啊。
E: ...How did you figure that out? Hmph, looks like I'm too predictable.

C: 那只是愿赌服输吧——道歉也好，学猪叫也好，估计他都不是心甘情愿的。
E: Nah, it's more he's just honoring a bet. Whether it's apologizing or squealing like a pig, I doubt he'd do it willingly.

C: 你即便和人吵架也不忘顺带宣传公司的机甲产品，确实敬业。但是，你真的拥有属于自己的生活吗？
E: Even in the middle of an argument, you don't miss the chance to plug the IPC's mech products — you're truly dedicated. But do you really have a life of your own?

C: 呵呵，你们记得「寿瘟祸祖留下长生果实」的传说吧？世间是有灵丹妙药的，它们早已暗中标好价格，恐怕我们谁也偿还不起……
E: Hee-hee, do you remember the legend of the Plagues Author leaving behind the Fruit of Longevity? There are miracle elixirs in this world, and they've long had price tags on them, but I'm afraid we will never be able to afford them...

C: 幸好，你我都不必理解它的意思。
E: Fortunately, we don't have to understand its meaning.

C: 快把三月七还给我。
E: Give me back March 7th!

C: 最初老夫还只是个懵懵懂懂的学徒时，就想做出个厉害的机巧鸟，那时我有无数天马行空的想法，但终究没有将它实现出来——毕竟我不想让师父看见我玩物丧志。
E: In my early days as a naive apprentice, my ambition was to fashion an impressive cycrane. I harbored countless lofty ideas, yet in the end, I failed to realize any of them — for I dared not let my master catch me indulging in mere toys.

C: 找我？我们先说好啊，闲聊可以，但要是有工作……
E: To see me? Let me be clear, I will happily chat, but if you've come to me with work...

C: 这时，众人才注意到书库一角的三月七早已昏倒了过去，旁边散落着一本禁书。
E: It was at this moment that the group noticed that March 7th had been passed out in a corner of the repository for some time, with a forbidden text open by her side.

C: 抱歉，是我太马虎了，不该让你接触到那么危险的东西。
E: I'm so sorry, I should not have been so careless and let you come into contact with such dangerous objects!

C: 啊，{NICKNAME}你来的正好。我刚一胃疼，就想到了你，一想到你，你就来了。这也算是仙舟人说的「心有灵犀」了。
E: Ah, {NICKNAME}, perfect timing. I just got a stomach ache and thought of you. As soon as I thought of you, you appeared! It's like that Xianzhou saying: "Two hearts beating as one."

C: 原来你也不知道啊？
E: You don't even know?

C: 到时候，你需要获得能够代表这段友谊的「友谊凭证」——成功之后，我便能借用「友谊魔法」，与你一同击退黑影生物！你只要跟着我的分身发出的信号，找到我就好。
E: After that, you will need to obtain a Proof of Friendship that represents your friendship... Once you are successful, I will be able to use your Magic of Friendship and defeat the dark shadow creatures alongside you! You just need to follow the signal sent by my clone and find me.

C: 咦…我怎么变成这幅张牙舞爪的模样了！
E: Wh—Why do I look so aggressive and angry?

C: 话别说的这么难听嘛，{F#姐们儿}{M#哥们儿}！想开点，友谊的本质不就是利益交换嘛？
E: My friend, how can you be so cruel? Think about it. Isn't the essence of friendship just mutual benefit?

C: 每一段经历，都是弥足珍贵的「友谊凭证」。在与各位的相处中，我学会了很多。
E: Every experience is truly a Proof of Friendship that should be treasured. I have learned a lot through meeting all of you.

C: 不过，你身为人类的一大优势就是拥有「做梦」的能力…或许我们还能在梦中相见！
E: Although, being human gives you a great advantage in that you have the ability to "dream"... Perhaps we can meet again in your dreams!

C: 那不是…素裳吗！
E: Isn't that... Sushang!?

C: 此时此刻，布洛妮娅大人、奥列格师父，还有希儿…留在贝洛伯格的人们正在兢兢业业地维持她的运转。
E: Right now, Lady Bronya, Master Oleg, and Seele... all the people who stayed in Belobog are working day and night to keep it up and running.

C: 卢卡选手，我也会尽全力帮助你们的！你们会成为最传奇的教练和格斗家，而我将会做出足以令我转正的专题报道！
E: Luka, I'll do everything I can to assist you! You'll both become the most legendary coach and fighter team there is, and I'll create a special feature that will finally bag me that permanent role!

C: 好！是时候燃起来了！咱们快回休息室吧！
E: Okay! Time to get fired up! Let's head back to the lounge!

C: （既然成了对手，我一定要让她见识我们的厉害…不能输给她！）
E: (If she's my opponent, I will let her witness our strength... I can't lose to her!)

C: 那个姑娘应该就在那边，和其他几个卜者在玩什么「游戏」。
E: The girl should be just over there, playing some game with other diviners.

C: 唉…也瞒不过你。太卜大人不是回玉阙老家办事了吗？临走前塞给我一大堆数据、表格、数据、表格、数据、表格…眼睛都快看瞎了！
E: ...Nothing gets past you. You know that the master diviner has returned to the Yuque on business? Before she departed, she left me with a mountain of data, spreadsheets, and even more data and spreadsheets... My eyes were seeing stars!

C: 现在有机会摆在眼前，能修复重要的历史文献…这差事严格来说不算摸鱼，还能看到点新鲜故事，何乐而不为呢？
E: Now that such an opportunity has fallen into my lap to restore an important historical document... Strictly speaking, taking this job doesn't count as slacking off, and I might even get to unveil a fascinating tale. Why wouldn't I take the job?

C: 听不懂也没关系。这种症状无药可医。
E: It's all right. There's no cure for such a symptom.

C: 哈哈，真不错！有个值得依靠的朋友，真是世界上最幸福的事了。
E: Haha, not bad at all! A friend that you can rely on is the most blissful thing in the world.

C: 过来吧，宝宝，嘿嘿嘿～你这样的小梦貘，生来就是要被裳裳姐姐吃掉的哟～嘿嘿嘿～
E: Come here, cutie, hehe~ Adorable little tusky, you're so cute. I could just gobble you right up, hehe~

C: 确实，光看照片就觉得是个不好惹的角色……
E: Indeed, by the looks of his photo he really looks like a formidable character...

C: 他被改心了…
E: He's changed his mind...

C: 说起来，那个人气复活赛不是要靠人气抢名额的吗？卢卡先生现在有参加复活赛的资格吗？
E: Speaking of which, doesn't the popularity revival repechage rely on popularity votes? Is Mr. Luka qualified to join the repechage?

C: 可如果无论如何都只有「惨败」这一条路可走，那到底怎么才算「赢」呢？
E: If there is nothing but a path of complete and utter defeat to walk, what exactly can be considered "winning?"

C: 不过，尽管我非常认可你，但按照演武仪典的规则，我们还是必须较量一番。
E: However, even though I hold you in high regard, we still have to compete according to the rules of the Wardance.

C: 聊起公司负面就顾左右而言他！
E: You always change the subject whenever we mention anything negative about IPC!

C: 确实…还是别喝了。
E: Right... I shouldn't drink that.

C: 好啦，没事的。{NICKNAME}，卡美丽小姐，我相信波提欧大佬没有恶意。你们不必担心。我去喝杯茶，很快就回来。
E: {NICKNAME}, Miss Carmella, please don't worry about me. I believe Boothill means no harm. I'll be back soon.

C: 我早就准备好了。
E: I've been ready for a long time.

C: 这就不是我一个天舶司职员能回答的事情啦。
E: As a Sky-Faring Commission staff member, I'm afraid I don't have the answer to that question.

C: 在永冬铭碑的见证下，我——大守护者布洛妮娅•兰德宣布：《仙舟「罗浮」-贝洛伯格互惠贸易协定》从今生效了！
E: With the Everwinter Monument as our witness, I, the Supreme Guardian Bronya Rand, hereby announce that the Xianzhou Luofu - Belobog Mutual Trade Agreement is now in effect!

C: 老朋友，你曾说自己向往长生种的人生。因为我们活得够长，有更多的时间成长、弥补错误、改变未来。
E: My old friend, you once expressed your desire to be a long-life species. Because we had a longer lifespan, you thought we would have more time to grow, rectify mistakes, and change the future.

C: 有机生命的演算缺乏逻辑，充满错谬。为纠正这一错误，帝皇鲁珀特撰写出完美的反有机方程，试图修复宇宙程序中的漏洞。
E: The extrapolations of organic life lack logic and are riddled with fallacies. To correct this error, Rubert the Emperor devised the perfect Anti-Organic Equation, attempting to repair the loopholes in the universe's programming.

C: 我明白…我一直都明白！但是我不甘心！驮那师父、毗梨护法，还有善逝……他们为了这次旅行献出了一切！
E: I understand... I always have! But I refuse to give up! Master Dhyana, Dharmic Monk Virya, and Sugata... They gave everything for this journey!

C: 不过卢卡的幻觉越来越严重了，得想个办法解决……
E: Although, Luka's hallucinations have been getting more and more intense. I have to think of a way to stop them...

C: 请这位记者朋友提问。
E: Please ask your questions.

C: 前排左手边第三位。
E: Front row, third from the left.

C: 这就是教练的作用。
E: That's what a coach is for.

C: 卢卡，滚回你老家，罗浮不欢迎你。
E: Go home, Luka. You're not welcome on the Luofu.

C: 不然庙会的场地里只有你孤零零一个玩家，多吓人啊！
E: I mean, otherwise it'll just be the player on their own in the arena, all sad and lonely — so scary!

C: 我觉得还挺好玩的，你要是有兴趣也可以试试。
E: I think it's pretty fun. You can give it a shot if you're interested.

C: 咦，这位猴友，你认识涂鸦的作者？带我们去找他好不好！
E: Oh, you know this graffiti artist, fine monkey friend? How about taking us to him!

C: 劝你们还是别找她。
E: I don't think you should look for her.

C: 不对，现在流行的打招呼方式是——哟！{NICKNAME}•忍者阁下，缭乱•忍侠阁下！在下潮流•忍徒，参上！
E: No, wait, the trendy way to greet right now is... Yo! {NICKNAME} Ninja, Dazzling Ninja Hero! Trendy Ninja, reporting in!

C: …匹诺康尼。
E: ...Penacony.

C: 唉，既然是知更鸟小姐推荐的人选，又是芮克先生看中的明星，那应该不会出什么问题。
E: *sigh* Since it's someone recommended by Miss Robin, and a superstar picked by Mr. Reca, that shouldn't be a problem.

C: 大概明白了。
E: I've just about got everything.

C: 展示你的诚意，跟上我的节奏，来场琥珀纪末的终极说唱大比拼吧——
E: Express your sincerity. Keep up with my flow. We're gonna have the ultimate rap showdown that marks the end of the Amber Era!!!

C: 为何？我等先前的音律•狩猎不是很成功吗？
E: Why? Wasn't our last Sound Hunt a huge success?

C: 丢下这句话后，艾尔菲迅速离开了，甚至没带走属于她的那把吉他。
E: After finally getting these words out, Arfey leaves in a hurry, even forgetting to take her own guitar with her.

C: …那原本的候选忍徒呢？
E: ...Then, what happened to the original ninja initiate?

C: 金属•大师！依在下所见，阁下制定的选拔方式或有失偏颇。不仅无助于选出合适成员，更有损流派传承，长此以往，必沦为凡庸。
E: Metal Master! As I can see, there may be an undetected bias within your selection process. Not only does it not help in selecting the most suitable candidates, but it could also serve to damage traditional teachings. Should this be allowed to continue, it will lead to only mediocrity.

C: 制定绩点优先的规则，是希望激励学员将心思放在学业上。但即使学员再不成器，作为学院代表，我也必须为她的未来负责。
E: The reason for formulating a grade priority system was to encourage students to focus on their studies. However, no matter how much of a failure the student is, I am still responsible for their future as a representative of the academy.

C: 艾尔菲向我保证过。
E: Arfey assured me.

C: 莫、莫要慌张，容在下先去探探虚实！
E: Th—There's no need to panic. I will get to the bottom of this!

C: 乱破同学不擅长乐理知识，这段编曲对她而言有些太复杂了。
E: Rappa is not great with musical theory, so this arrangement is a little complicated for her.

C: ——「天之邪鬼在学院兴风作浪，缭乱忍侠将害虫统统清场！」
E: — "Malicious demons prowl the school in nests, and the Dazzling Ninja vanquishes all these pests!"

C: 赶紧让开！再扰乱校园秩序，那几个学生就不只是被处分了！
E: Get out of the way! Any more disruptions, and those students won't just be disciplined!

C: 相信你们已经对我很熟悉了，哈哈…呃，音乐万岁！我爱舞台！也爱现场的所有人！
E: I believe everyone is already familiar with me. Haha... Um, music for the win! I love the stage and everyone here!

C: 看来诸音忍经历此次修行，都大有长进啊。
E: Seems like all the sound ninjas have made significant progress through this training.

C: 明明刚才还在和我一起烤洞螈。
E: You were just roasting olms with me just now.

C: （摸摸肚子）
E: (Rub its belly)

C: 知更鸟
E: Robin

C: 歌舞•忍者
E: Songstress Ninja

C: 因为…我大概永远都忘不了，和乐队朋友们共同欢笑的那段时光了吧。
E: Because... I probably won't ever be able to forget the times when I laughed and played with my bandmates.

C: 马马虎虎吧。
E: Eh. So-so.

C: 三月，我也曾教过你，不要骄傲，不要轻敌。
E: March, I also taught you before not to be arrogant and underestimate your opponent.

C: 可是，明天有机动球大赛的直播，我约了杨叔一起看……
E: But, tomorrow's the Roboball Contest finals livestream. I'm catching it with Mr. Yang too...

C: 三月，你来得正好。我一早起来找不到眼镜了，你们或许在哪见过？
E: March, you're here just in time. I haven't been able to find my glasses the whole morning. Maybe you've seen them somewhere?

C: 你们两个够了帕！不要再深耕垂直细分领域了，好好准备些*真正有用*的应急物资吧！
E: Enough, both of you! Stop puttering around in vertical classification and properly prepare some actually useful emergency supplies!

C: 不是我，我在打扰丹恒看书。
E: It's not me. I'm disturbing Dan Heng while he reads.

C: 这回他和谐乐学院合作开办了摄影展，我可不能错过！
E: Now that he's collaborating with Charmony Academy to organize a photography exhibition, I simply can't miss out!

C: 放心！你可不能光干看着，我也需要你提供创意哦！
E: Don't worry. You won't just be watching me do my work. I'll need creative input from you too!

C: 「开拓顶个『啾』用」。
E: "Trailblazing is Bird-Brained."

C: 「丽宾超跑虹光版」，无名客的钟爱，有识之士的最佳选择！带你畅游寰宇，终抵群星！
E: The Leybent Supercar Rainbow Edition, beloved by the Nameless — the only choice for those who know! Roam the cosmos, and reach the stars!

C: 汪！有这么多人陪司令玩，真幸福哇！
E: Woof! So many people to play with Mr. Bigwig. I'm so happy!

C: 一群岁阳？
E: A group of heliobi?

C: 不管啦。这张照片不如就叫「岁阳蹦迪」吧？
E: Whatever. How about calling this photo "Heliobi in Rave"?

C: 这…您还是饶了我吧。不然随意开阵，太卜司可就饶不得我了。
E: Err... How about something else? The Divination Commission will put me out of commission if we casually initiate that formation.

C: 好…好酷的名字！我喜欢！
E: Wh... What a cool name! I like it!

C: 快看，我们已经拍完了整整七天的课题了。回头看看这些天的作品，真是不容易！
E: Look, look, we've completed the tasks for the whole week. Looking back at what we photographed, these few days sure have been tough!

C: （嚼嚼嚼）
E: (Nom nom nom)

C: 都是我这摄影助理的功劳！
E: It's all thanks to my awesome assistant skills!

C: 并且，小奇美拉也很能干。最近奥赫玛不是遭到了袭击嘛，到处都乱糟糟的。多亏了这些小家伙帮大家工作，这才解决了人手不足的问题。该好好感谢它们才是呢。
E: And little chimeras are very capable. Okhema was under attack recently, so it's a mess everywhere. It's all thanks to these little ones that we managed to solve the labor issue. We should be grateful to them.

C: 你先做个错误示范吧。
E: You should demonstrate a bad example first.

C: 喂…为什么啊？我邀请了你这么多次，亲自跑了不下三回，你都不肯加入我的小队。
E: Hey... Why? I tried inviting you so many times personally, but you refused to join me.

C: 喂，确定花园的工作量统计没出错？塔兰顿在看着你，所以麻烦上点心，负责任地帮我再检查一遍——我的队伍，完成的工作，比他们少？
E: Hey, you sure the Garden didn't tally our workload wrong? Talanton's watching from above, so please be more meticulous about your evaluations and help re-verify the results more responsibly — did my squad really do less work than theirs?

C: 缇宝大师？我很感谢你平日里对奇美拉的照顾，欠的零食也会归还，但这是我与{F#她}{M#他}之间的决斗，还请不要插手。
E: Master Tribbie? I'm really grateful for your constant care toward the chimeras, and owed snacks must be repaid, but this is a final fight between me and {F#her}{M#him}. Please do not interfere.

C: 这边——
E: Over here...

C: …又不是要告别，至于这么舍不得吗？
E: It's not like we're saying goodbye. Why so reluctant?

E: I told you, I'm not Phainon! I am Pie-non, the ultimate Pie-non!

E: You hear innocent "tweet tweets" now, but what it's really saying is: "Play with me or DIE! I'll suck your soul out like a kitchen exhaust fan on full blast..."

C: 啾、啾啾？
E: Tweet, tweet tweet?

C: 呵呵。
E: Hehe.

E: (It's been a while since I last saw Lancer. I wonder what he's up to.)

E: Whether it's the Bloodhound or the Hound, pups always seem to leave without saying a word...

C: 用奇思妙想调配独属于自己的配方，与不期而至的客人留下独属于今夜的回忆…希望这份「特调配方」，能为你带来一段难忘的奇遇。
E: Mix up your own unique recipes, and create lasting memories with unexpected guests... May these "Signature Recipes" be the beginning of many remarkable adventures for you.

C: 嗯？印象里，战略投资部对这家酒吧没有注资计划，更别提收债了。

C: 托帕小口抿着调饮，仿佛手中拿着的是工作间隙的咖啡。
E: Topaz takes measured sips, approaching the drink like a quick coffee between meetings.

E: Is there something even more delightful in the last chest...?

C: 其实相比调饮，我对你的这份配方更感兴趣。不过，等我忙完手头的麻烦事再说吧。
E: Honestly, I'm more intrigued by your recipe than the drinks themselves. I'll get back to it once I've sorted out a few current nuisances.

C: 呵，睡眠解决不了问题，只会把变得更棘手的问题推迟到下一天。
E: Heh, sleep doesn't solve anything. It just makes the problems worse and pushes them into tomorrow.

C: 今天会遇见什么样的客人呢……
E: I wonder who'll walk through that door today...

C: 放心放心，花火将军什么都没听到哦~

C: 我们注定只能陪伴彼此走过人生的一小段旅程。现在，该向前看了。
E: We're destined to only accompany each other for a small part of life's journey. Now, it's time to look ahead.

C: 晚了！你喜欢并不是发自真心。
E: Too late! You're just saying that to win.

C: 你在找的，不会是这个吧？
E: Looking for this?

E: No one knows how much time has passed...

C: 玻璃杯、吧匙、摇饮器，都安然地待在原地。没有证据证明卡芙卡未曾来过，就像没有痕迹证明她的确来过。
E: The glass, spoon, and shaker are all in place. Just as there's no proof Kafka never came, there's no trace she ever did.

C: 要小心电信诈骗。
E: Be careful of online fraud.

C: 忙，忙点好啊。
E: Busy, busy, guess staying busy isn't so bad.

C: 你应该也听说过，在寒潮降临之前，天上来的怪物入侵了这里，这应该是那时古人留下的避难所。
E: You probably heard about how monsters from the sky invaded this place before the Eternal Freeze. This should be a kind of shelter for people back then.

C: 古代遗迹里危险吗？
E: Is it dangerous in the ancient ruins?

C: 胡了？不，我是说，结束了？别这样看着我，在下确实一直在认真听您讲故事。

E: "Less idle chit-chat! Please ladies and gentlemen, esteemed guests: Lend me your ears! Next up we have the main feature: 'Calamity Ensnares Commission of Alchemy, Nameless Battles Author of Plagues!'"

C: 只消找到其上标出的位置，距离神器现世的那一刻就不远了。

C: 幻胧自以为派出手下精锐便能得计。却不知今日的{NICKNAME}有龙尊助阵，远胜往昔。反物质军团不消几合便大败亏输，神形俱灭。
E: Phantylia assumed dispatching crack troops would be enough to win. Little did it know that today, {NICKNAME} had the high elder's support and was far stronger than before. The Antimatter Legion was routed before long, and utterly annihilated without a trace.

C: 这歌诀它不押韵…
E: This verse doesn't rhyme that perfectly...

C: 我就知道{NICKNAME}也是满腹才学啊，此剑如风有灵，如月照影，正合其名「风灵月影」，端的是好名字！
E: Ha! I always knew that the great {NICKNAME} was a very cultured {F#young lady}{M#young man}. This blade is more than just a physical weapon — it connects, deciphers, and even modifies the rules of the world itself. An unusual but fitting name!

C: 不是这个问题…
E: That's not the problem...

C: 空间站的效率你也知道，过了这么久，灾后复兴工作进度还是很缓慢。而那些负责执行的家伙说，自己是因为权限过低无权处理，才会拖这么久。
E: I'm sure even you know about efficiency here on the space station. Post-disaster recovery work is still going very slowly. And the guys in charge said it's because their access level is too low, and they don't have the appropriate authority.

C: 原来你是来跟我说这件事的啊…那我不太有空，抱歉。
E: So, that's what you want to talk with me about... Then I don't have the time. Sorry.

C: 呵呵，这款游戏确实蛮有趣的。谢谢你，{NICKNAME}，我玩得很开心，希望你也收获了愉快的体验。
E: Hehe, this game really is quite interesting. Thanks, {NICKNAME}, I had a lot of fun. I hope you had an enjoyable experience, too.

C: 哎哟，这不是{NICKNAME}吗？你也在玩《以太战线》？

C: 这只<color=#dbc291ff>「以太灵」</color>就是最后的奖励了，拿去吧。

C: 混蛋，赢了区区一场就神气活现！再来，再来啊！
E: You bunch of meat bags! One minor victory and you think you're something special! Come on, show me what you've got!

C: 哎哟，这边这位{NICKNAME}我认得，是星穹列车的人。我印象里听龙女大人提过{F#她}{M#他}的。

C: 没错，我们想把这件事渲染成灵异现象，越夸张越好，然后再对外宣称已被咱们这个小队顺利解决了！配上照片视频若干，一定能抓人眼球，换来更多的消息。
E: That's right, we wanna report this incident like it's a paranormal phenomenon — the more exaggerated the better — and then announce that it was solved by our ghost-hunting squad! Then we add on a few photos and videos — it'll be sure to get lots of views!

C: 感觉不是很靠谱。

C: 素裳小姐的关注点好奇怪啊。
E: Miss Sushang, I think you missed the interesting part...

E: I may not have the same predictive power as Keralum, little fox girl... but one thing I do know is that sooner or later, you will beg for my help.

C: 虽然不知道哪里不对，但这个词用在这儿肯定不太妥当……
E: That's not quite the right way to describe it...

E: If you're still not convinced, I can demonstrate to you the true nature of destiny — in a way that your human brain can comprehend.

C: 我…我没事。只是有些头疼。
E: I... I'm fine. Just a small headache, nothing more.

C: 寒鸦大人……
E: Madam Hanya...

C: 世界上没有任何变数。

C: 虽然不知道青雀小姐会如何解决眼前这个问题，但判官不惜一切也要完成使命。

C: 是啊，妖怪的心思你别猜。尾巴被封印了这许多年，大概就像我一样，突然得到了自由，铁定会有一段时间到处乱跑的。
E: That's right — we can't really know what a heliobus is thinking, right? Tail was sealed away for ages and then suddenly let free... If it were me, I'd want some away time.

C: 我念她心诚，大发慈悲告诉她「尾巴现在躲在流云渡，正准备随星槎逃出仙舟」。
E: I started feeling sorry for her. Out of pity I told her that her Tail was hiding in Cloudford — preparing to flee the Xianzhou on a starskiff.

C: 藿藿长久与岁阳共存，她恐怕早已习惯了这样的状态。尾巴离去后，她的身体对其他岁阳来说，也是处于完全不设防的状态。
E: Huohuo spent a long time in coexistence with a heliobus — it is likely she became accustomed to that state. With Tail now gone, she was relatively defenseless against other heliobi.

C: 总之，浮烟的事情交给我，至于「罗浮杂俎」的事情…按照老规矩，你们得编一套新的说辞了，这些事情就交给你们了。
E: Well then, I will take care of the Cirrus situation. As for what gets written in the Luofu's Ghostly Grove, I'll leave that up to you.

C: 尽管知道这也是岁阳的幻影，同学们离开后，藿藿再次陷入到失落的情绪里。
E: Even though she knows this is just a mirage made by the heliobus, Huohuo still feels depressed after her classmates leave.

C: 你们别聊天了，给我棋鬼一点基本的尊重好吗？到底敢不敢跟我对弈！
E: Enough talking! You will show me some basic respect! Will you play chess with me or not?

C: 毫无疑问，这应该是岁阳！
E: No doubt about it: Heliobi!

C: 有些岁阳会利用受害者内心最渴望的事情，变出各种幻象。在折磨对方的过程中，将他们的情绪和欲望吸干…这样，受害者就很危险了！
E: Some heliobi will take advantage of a victim's deepest desires to call forth all kinds of illusions. They torture the victim, draining them of all emotions and desires... putting them in grave danger!

C: 判官果然应该这样，雪衣前辈也会这样做。
E: That's what a Judge should do. That's what Xueyi sensei would do.

C: 这非常奇怪！
E: It's extremely strange!

C: 琼玉补给箱
E: Jade Supply Crate

C: 我命由我不由天，你应该住下去。
E: We decide our fates, not the heavens. You should continue living there.

C: 谁告诉你的，凶宅不是你们人类自己搞出来的吗？真是的。
E: Who told you that? Aren't humans the ones who make houses haunted? Seriously.

C: 是假冒的雷诺！
E: It's an imposter Renault!

C: …我已经心里有数了，走吧，我们回去找那位「房东大叔」。
E: ...I think I have an idea. Come on. Let's go back and see that "landlord."

C: 那么，「T」…好像没有办法一笔画。

C: 是我，你们喊我「阿月」就好了。
E: Yeah, you can just call me A-Yue, though.

C: 你有得罪过什么人吗？
E: Have you offended anyone?

C: 我，第一次感觉到自己时，我被关在黑暗里。我从没见过外面的样子，听大家伙们说起，我想看看！
E: The first time I was aware of myself was when I was locked up in a dark place. I had not seen the outside world. But hearing the others talking about it aroused my curiosity!

C: 辛苦了，回见……
E: Thank you for your hard work. See you later...

C: 把大家喊过来，是因为我觉得这个奖牌我们都有份。
E: I've called everyone over because I think we each have an equal share in this medallion.

C: 未成年请在家长的监护下观看，身体不好的也请慎重，一切都是真实直播，没有任何后期加工。
E: Minors, please view under parent supervision, and please be careful if you are in poor health. Everything is real and shot live without any editing in the post.

C: 「你们小队以后还播吗？」这个嘛…我看这个问题就让我来替大家回答吧。
E: "Will your team keep streaming in the future?" This one... Let me answer this one for everybody.

C: 时间过的好快啊，来，我们在这边拍个照好不好，{NICKNAME}，就拜托你了。
E: Time really flies! Come, let's snap a team photo right here. {NICKNAME}, could you please do the honors?

C: 最后一站就是…绥园，和大家一起冒险的地方。
E: The final stop is... Fyxestroll Garden, where we've all adventured before.

C: 我觉得，以全新的面貌回访过去直播的地点还不够。我们并肩作战这么久，有些观众老爷就一直在跟我打听你们的事。
E: I still think we need something more than just revisiting previous vlog spots with a new look. We've been fighting side by side for so long now that a few fans in the live stream have been asking me about you guys.

C: 我没想到给你们造成了麻烦…我、我只是想见见你。骗你们是我不对，我也只能用钱来弥补你们浪费掉的心血了，真的很抱歉……
E: I didn't expect to put you out like this... I—I just wanted to see you, that's all. I shouldn't have tricked you. All I can do is use this money of mine to make up for all your wasted efforts. I'm really sorry...

C: 机器人就在医疗室里，我带你过去，测试的事情你问它就好了。
E: The robot's over in the clinic. I'll take you over. If you have any questions about the test, just ask away.

C: 好哦！
E: Alright!

C: 长得…有点眼熟。
E: Looks... a little familiar.

C: 我会讲故事吗？枷锁千钧而穿行于薄冰、灰色的情感顺着刀尖滴落、矫饰的真实形成悖谬。是的，我会讲故事。
E: Do I tell stories? Shackled, skating 'cross thin ice, go grayed emotions, dripping down the knife's edge as pretentious truth forms scornful paradox. Yes, I've been known to tell a story or two.

C: 唉…正常情况。你看这鸟笼的样子就知道，它肯定不是普通的鸟。听它讲完故事，就是会莫名觉得…这故事似乎真的发生过。
E: *Sigh*... That's pretty normal. You can tell just by looking at its cage that it's no ordinary bird. Once you hear it tell a story, you have this inexplicable feeling that... that this story really did happen.

C: 你为什么只和我说话？
E: Why do you only talk with me?

C: 伟大、尊贵、永世光荣的嘀嗒嘀•嗒嘀阁下，恭迎您出征归来。
E: Welcome back, Your Excellency, the esteemed and illustrious Lord Tick-Tock.

C: 这么轻松？那人家开始咯？
E: That simple? Then I'll start?

C: 汪！谢谢，我会珍惜的哇！
E: Woof! Thank you! I'll cherish it!

C: 带我走吧！
E: Take me with you!

C: 呀！好可怕，人家不想和你们约会，别缠着不放——走开，走开啦！
E: Gah! That's scary. I don't want to date you people! Leave me alone! Go away!

C: …咕噜。
E: ...*gulp*

C: （这话轮得到你来说吗？）
E: (I don't think you're in a position to say this?)

C: 我这一生，尽是遗憾，你说我还能获得幸福吗？
E: Regrets have permeated my life. Do you think I can still discover happiness?

C: 你是故意来找茬的么？
E: Are you trying to start a fight?

C: 不是。
E: No.

C: 为什么你会突然发狂？
E: Why did you suddenly go all frenzied?

C: 对，它曾经是个失意的戏剧演员，在角色里陷得很深，除了念叨那些听不懂的台词外，就没有多少正常想法。
E: Yeah, they used to be a disillusioned actor, so deep in their role that they don't have any normal thoughts other than reciting lines that nobody can understand.

C: 你应该知道，我们是「美梦剧团」，是家族制造出来，用来娱乐宾客的道具。
E: As you know, we Sweet Dreams Troupe are a creation of The Family to entertain the guests.

C: 你似乎不明白…这个目标，对我们而言究竟意味着什么。
E: It seems you don't really understand... what this goal really means to us.

C: 汪！不用谢，即使答应了帮忙，我也什么都不会做哇。
E: Woof! No need to thank me. Even if I agree to help, I won't lift a paw to help.

C: 这样公平了吧！没任何问题汪！
E: That's fair, right? That should be no problem, woof!

C: 你不相信也无所谓，反正我也只是随口说说哇！
E: I don't care if you don't believe me. I'm just saying whatever I want!

C: {NICKNAME}{F#老姐}{M#老哥}，怎么样，玩玩看嘛？好歹是我小半年的研究心血，帮忙测试下给点意见呗！
E: Want to have some fun, {F#Sister}{M#Brother} {NICKNAME}? I've put almost a year into this game, so give it a go and let me know what you think!

C: 没问题
E: No problem

C: 我<rhythm>是
E: I <rhythm>am

C: 跟随其余「阮•梅」造物的节奏，在恰当的时候<color=#f29e38ff>长按空格</color>。
E: Follow the beat of the rest of Ruan Mei's creations, and <color=#f29e38ff>press and hold space</color> at the right moment.

C: 跟随其余「阮•梅」造物的节奏，在恰当的时候<color=#f29e38ff>长按按键</color>。
E: Follow the beat of the rest of Ruan Mei's creations, and <color=#f29e38ff>press and hold the button</color> at the right moment.

C: 你做的好啊！喝这个仿佛就能体会到那些黑西装的苦涩心情，就像…呜呜，哭着回去找妈妈的那种感觉哈哈哈哈哈！
E: You did a good job! Drinking this, it's like I can feel the bitter emotions of those people in black suits. It's like... *sob* going home crying to your mother. Hahaha!

C: 公司那帮家伙趁着谐乐大典和家族搭上了线，这事你肯定知道。但我猜你不知道的是，这游戏就是家族为了示好，投给公司的「问路石」。
E: I'm sure you're aware that those guys in the IPC made use of the Charmony Festival to hook up with The Family. But I bet you didn't know that this game is The Family's way of testing the waters and a show of goodwill to the IPC.

C: 我和拼图先生已经在这里等很久啦！
E: Mr. Jigsaw and I have been waiting here forever!

C: {NICKNAME}？没想到能在这里遇见。你也是来参加那个折纸小鸟游戏测试的吗？
E: {NICKNAME}? I didn't think I would be able to meet you here. Are you here to test the game about Origami Birds too?

C: 是啊，我刚刚和{NICKNAME}玩了一局，感觉还挺有趣的。
E: Yes, I just played a match with {NICKNAME} and it was indeed quite interesting.

C: 我查了查他的对战记录，不算是个特别厉害的选手。你应该可以放心接下挑战。
E: His combat history suggests he's not particularly formidable. You should be able to take on this challenge with confidence.

C: 你是…铄金？
E: Are you... Shuojin?

C: 走了～改变主意记得叫我～
E: I'm off now. Should you change your mind, remember to call me.

C: 托帕！你这个阴险歹毒的公司狗！我是不会放过你的！我要宰了你！
E: Topaz! You treacherous, ruthless corporate lapdog! I won't let you get away with this! I'm going to take you down!

C: 还以为是要给我分配房间…
E: And here I thought you were going to assign me a room...

C: 看吧！我就说大家都会觉得羞耻！
E: See! There's no way anyone can do this without feeling awkward!

C: 格式化期间不当操作，可能引起严重后果！包括但不限于维生系统紊乱、列车脱轨。佚失的「餐饮数据」，甚至可能引发一场新的「果核之灾」。
E: Mishandling during the reformatting process may also lead to serious consequences, including but not limited to disruption of the life support system and derailment of the Express. The loss of dietary data may even result in a new Subsistellaron Disaster!

C: 当然，这些都只是派对前的小小玩笑。
E: I'm sure you've already realized, but that was just a joke for before the party begins.

C: 别看我房间那么精致，那都是我自己花心思设计的！
E: My room may look pretty fancy now, but that's because I put a lot of effort into designing it myself!

C: （放下枕头）
E: (Put the pillow down)

C: （早就准备好的装机清单，终于有了用武之地！）
E: The build list I prepared long ago finally has a purpose!

C: 气色变好了？
E: Looking better?

C: 上回你可把我害惨了！
E: Hmph, you got me in hot soup last time!

C: 这个话题还是先放一放吧——看到那些复杂的道路了吗？想要通过这里，恐怕不像之前那么容易。
E: Let's set this discussion aside for now... Do you see these complicated paths? It seems that progressing onward won't be as easy a task as before.

C: 这关都过不了，还怎么去天外？
E: If you can't even get past this hurdle, how do you still expect to venture beyond the sky?

C: 好，那就这么办。
E: Alright, let's do as you say then.

C: 至少你们仍在与黑潮对抗。
E: At least you're still resisting the black tide.

C: 呜…（我…出不来……）
E: Grumph... (I'm... stuck...)

C: 虽然这只是美好的幻想，但你和驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大都坚信，未来就近在咫尺！
E: Even if it's just a lovely dream, you and Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas both believe that greatness awaits!

C: 呜嗡？！？！（我怎么变小了啊？！？！）
E: Grumph!?!? (Why did I shrink!?!?)

C: …呜嗡。（…我可能，还没准备好。）
E: ...Grumph. (...I might not be ready yet.)

C: 现在修正还来得及，跟我念：规则，就是用来打破的！
E: It's not too late to fix this, repeat after me: Rules are made to be broken!

C: 看来阁下提前做过功课了啊——听说大地兽之祖「荒笛」仍在世时，它的追随者们还组成了「宪分团」，史称三大兽团。
E: Sounds like someone did their homework. Back when Terravox, the ancestor of the dromases, was still around, its followers formed the Military Police Brigade, one of the three legendary beast groups.

C: 孩啊，我们来谈谈人生吧。
E: Hey kiddo, let's talk about life.

C: 这也是艾丝妲布置的任务吗？
E: Is this another mission from Asta?

C: 想要吗？但现在还不能给你。
E: Want it? But I can't give it to you yet.

C: 知己知彼，才能战无不胜。所有造物的情报，都在我的掌握之中喵。
E: Know thyself, know thy enemy. A thousand battles, a thousand victories. The intel of all creations is at my fingertips, meow.

C: 那肯定呀，{NICKNAME}可是单手接末日兽的大神啊。
E: Agreed. {NICKNAME} is the legend who single-handedly took down the Doomsday Beast!

C: 太好啦！我就知道您会答应的！
E: Awesome! I knew you'd say yes!

C: 我们与{RUBY_B#凡人}沉睡者{RUBY_E#}的距离最近，履行连接一切分离之物的责任，故被称作「结绳人」。
E: We are closest to the {RUBY_B#mortal}Slumberers{RUBY_E#}, fulfilling our duty to connect all that is separated, hence we are called "the Knot-tiers."

C: 我知道这些就够了。
E: That's all I need to know.

C: 为什么我要接受审判？
E: Why should I be put on trial?

C: 而今，你已站在更重的那一端，我们需往另一端添上砝码。
E: Now that you stand on the heavier end, we need to add weights to the other side.

C: 轻柔的睡意逐渐包裹住思绪，你坠入了最深沉的梦中……
E: A gentle drowsiness gradually envelops your thoughts, and you fall into the deepest of dreams...

C: 只是把菜品送去评审的话，也不会影响正常营业。
E: Besides, simply submitting our dishes for review won't interfere with regular operations.

C: 行呀。准备好了就出发吧。
E: Alright. Let's head out when you're ready.

C: 就拿所有人都喜欢的菜作为主题吧！猜猜看，会是什么呢？
E: Let's build the theme around the dish everyone loves! Can you guess?

C: 万众瞩目的迷其林美食评审，再度召开——
E: The long-awaited Memchelin Food Review is officially back —

C: 其余人都点评过了？我现在来尝尝。迷！
E: Has everyone else already given their verdict? Then let me grab a bite. Mem!

C: 你做的烤饼确实不错，但这次，我会研制出胜过你的菜品。
E: You make a decent pancake, I'll give you that. But this time, I'm cooking up something that'll blow yours out of the water.

C: 啊？村长知道这事吗？
E: Wait, does the chief know you're doing this?

C: 别、别紧张，说不定真会有奇迹发生呢。
E: N—No need to worry. Maybe something amazing will actually happen.

C: 呵呵。帮忙经营餐馆的各位贵客，辛苦了哪。
E: Hehe. My distinguished guests who helped with the restaurant, thank you for your hard work.

C: <size=28>赛飞儿兴奋地同「金织」述说着旅途中见闻，珍贵的时光在留影石机中定格。\n无须再去分辨，这里不需要任何谎言。{RUBY_B# } {RUBY_E#}</size>

E: About the Chef...

C: 只是…我也不理解，为何他会如此钟情沙拉呢？
E: Still... I don't understand why he's so obsessed with salads.

E: The clean and bright kitchen feels very trustworthy.

C: 帕姆带着「闭嘴」，将杂乱无章的货运车厢整理得井井有条。它们看着整洁的货运车厢，觉得内心受到了莫大的治愈。
E: Pom-Pom, accompanied by Shush, organized the messy cargo compartment into a neat and orderly space. They looked at the tidy cargo area and felt a profound sense of healing within.

C: 为感谢列车组的长期帮助，艾丝妲送来了一桌超级丰盛的宴席。真是太奢华了，好吃到流眼泪。
E: To thank the Express Crew for their long-term support, Asta sent a meal full of incredibly sumptuous dishes. It was so luxurious that it brought tears of joy!

C: 她们仅余彼此，\n<color=#9e5738>耳目相连、心灵相交。</color>
E: They are all that remains of one another.\n<color=#9e5738>Their senses intertwined, their souls in communion.</color>

C: <color=#9e5738>再见，再见，再见——</color>\n仍在世间的孩子，\n悄悄藏起自己的啜泣。
E: <color=#9e5738>Farewell. Farewell. Farewell —</color>\nThe children who still walk the earth,\nSilently hide their wrenching sobs.

C:
欧洛尼斯轻声叹息。
它悄悄地掀开时光帷幕，
将一颗酹奠给勇敢者的水晶，
放在拿剑的娃娃身前。
E:
Oronyx softly sighs,
And carefully lifts the curtain of time,
Presenting a crystal given in libation to the brave,
Before the doll holding a blade.

C: 那是少女珍重万分的赠礼，\n少有人能获此殊荣，
E: It is a gift greatly treasured by the maiden,\nFew have the honor to be graced with such work.

C: 「这实在难以下笔…」 少女如此辩解， 「我的使命，是将生者引向结局。」 「对于死者，我想不出结尾的诗句。」
E: "This is truly difficult to write..." The girl excuses herself, "My duty is to lead the living to the end." "I cannot think of a fitting end for a poem to the dead."

C:
冥河围裹着大地的黑夜流向彼岸，
静缓，深阔，恒无止息。
它属于存于世的所有生灵，
顺流而下，殊途同归。
E:
The River of Souls flows to the other side, wrapped in the land's night,
Broad, slow, an eternal and silent sight.
It belongs to all in this world that has life,
All of which flows downstream, converging as one.

C: 「永昼啊，照耀圣城无止尽！」
E: "O Eternal Day, endlessly illuminate the holy city!"

C: 在茫茫大地跋涉的岁月，\n巨龙始终谨记泰坦的叮嘱。
E: In the years spent wandering the earth,\nThe Giant Dragon always remembered the Titan's words for their worth.

C: 逐火是不断失却的旅途，\n可巨龙牢记着造主的嘱咐。
E: Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey,\nYet the Giant Dragon remembers their creator's command.

C: 荒笛所托的万千生灵，\n如今仍在我胸中涌动，\n如一尊永不止熄的熔炉。
E: The countless souls entrusted by Terravox\nStill surge within my chest,\nLike an eternally burning furnace.

C: 「别怕，别怕…」\n陌生的声音响起——
E: "Don't be scared, please don't be afraid..."\nAn unfamiliar voice rings out —

C: 「如果捉迷藏的两方都是高手，\n最后就会变成比谁更抗饿。」\n——{NICKNAME}
E: "When both players in Hide-and-Seek are experts,\nIt will turn into a contest of who can last longer without food."\n— {NICKNAME}

C: 再次拜访雅利洛，玩转煦日节，\n特意换了身漂亮衣服。
E: Visiting Jarilo again for the Solwarm Festival,\nI put on some pretty clothes specially for the occasion.

C: 「那冰原熊岂不是要改名叫水熊？」 ——{NICKNAME} 「数据显示，雅利洛的环境正在缓慢恢复。 但那些冰应该不会化得太快。」 ——丹恒 「是时候把购物车里的泳圈拿掉了。」 ——{NICKNAME}
E: "Then wouldn't those polar bears have to be renamed water bears?" — {NICKNAME} "The data shows that Jarilo's environment is slowly recovering. But the ice shouldn't melt too quickly." — Dan Heng "Time to remove those floaties from the shopping cart." — {NICKNAME}

C: 抱歉，即便如此，*我们*的目光，\n禁不住被您王冠上的烈焰吸引…
E: Even so, please excuse us, as our eyes...\nContinue to be drawn to your crown's flames...

C: 「娇蛮的鱼儿…可知嘴角还挂着甜渍？」
E: "Such hubris, delicate fish... Are you not aware that there's food on your face?"

C:
不久后，树庭传开消息，
心如死水的人们慕名而来。
少女备好糖果与茶点，
聆听每一位访客的哀怨。
E:
The news is soon spread by the Grove,
And people with empty hearts visit in droves.
The girl prepares candies and tea,
And listens to every visitor's complaints.

C:
在那画中，
名为塞涅俄丝的「少女」化为神目，
抛却慈悲悬临万物，
以泰坦之身审判旧族。
E:
Within the mural,
The "girl" named Seliose became the divine eye,
Gazing down without mercy,
A titan passing judgment upon her own kind.

C: 「奇迹是最傲慢的神迹，\n它是神以伟力对人的否定。」
E: "Miracles are the most conceited actions of gods.\nThey are gods' denial of humanity via might."

C: 那木鸟也曾是玩具，\n如今是他的信使…\n或还是玩具。

E: "The water here flows constantly. Let's make a bet about this outlet on whether a golden laurel leaf will float by within <unbreak>30</unbreak> seconds... I bet there will be."

C: 「哈哈哈哈哈，有意思。我没理由拒绝，但在正式赌局之前…你得先穿上漂亮的衣服。啧啧，光着脚来的？这双靴子送给你了，就当是见面礼。」
E: "Hahaha, interesting. I have no reason to refuse, but before we start a proper gamble... you'll need to dress up properly. Tsk tsk, came here barefoot? Here, take these boots. Consider them a welcome gift."

C: 「树庭同袍对我十分友爱。但有一事令人疑惑，人们常说『悬锋城的字典里没有字』，这是什么缘故？另，树庭有一学派名叫『曳石学派』，崇尚强身健体，于磨练筋肉中窥探本我，我心向之。」
E: "My fellow companions at the Grove have been very kind to me. However, there's one thing that puzzles me: People often say, 'There are no words in Castrum Kremnos's dictionary.' What's that all about? Also, there's a school in the Grove called Helkolithism that focuses on physical training, seeking to discover the Self through muscle conditioning. I'm quite drawn to it."

E: "Easy for you to say! What am I supposed to do?"

E: The white-haired man startled awake beneath the shade of the tree. The sunlight spilling through the dense leaves stung his eyes. In his momentary daze, he mistakenly thought his childhood friend was standing right before him.
