C:
这次我们要讲的是钟表小子信赖的好伙伴——哈努兄弟的故事！

很久很久以前，哈努兄弟曾是「野狼小镇」的一位普通镇民，这里的镇民们都生活在鳄鱼商人们的管理之下，商人把镇民当作拉货的奴隶，大家的生活苦不堪言。

但哈努兄弟是条正义的狼，他不喜欢给鳄鱼商人们工作——野狼都应该在荒原中自由地奔驰才对！
哈努兄弟集结了一群正义的伙伴，一把火烧掉了野狼小镇的工厂，掀起了狼与鳄鱼的战争。因为哈努兄弟的努力，野狼小镇的居民们纷纷向鳄鱼呲起獠牙，让这些可恶的家伙见识了野狼的厉害。

但可惜世上的鳄鱼实在是太多了，野狼小镇最后还是陷入了绝境。为了让镇民们得救，哈努兄弟选择牺牲自己，让鳄鱼们放过镇民。
鳄鱼们把哈努兄弟丢给了凶狠的鳄鱼商人——石头老板。石头老板决定把哈努兄弟丢到环境恶劣的噩梦小镇里，让他挖一辈子石头，以儆效尤。

但是这次经历并没有磨平哈努兄弟的正义之心。看到噩梦小镇也生活在石头老板的压迫之下，哈努兄弟无法忍受鳄鱼们的横行霸道，再次带领镇民们掀起反抗的浪潮。
这次多亏了远道而来的「罗盘号」船员，聪明的钟表小子帮哈努兄弟打败了鳄鱼，噩梦小镇才没有因失败重蹈野狼小镇的覆辙。

哈努兄弟把噩梦小镇改名为美梦小镇，宣布要让小镇成为一场无忧的美梦，大家都信赖着这位象征自由的英雄，与他一起建设美梦小镇。
可惜，他的理想因为一场灾难而受到了挑战……在灾难之中，他只身闯入沙暴营救遇难的镇民，用自己的积蓄填饱镇民们的肚子，忍痛将背叛小镇的朋友驱逐出境，最终抵挡石头老板的袭击身负重伤……

无法帮助哈努兄弟的钟表小子无可奈何，只好让神通广大的木头老爷来到小镇，才让哈努兄弟与美梦小镇摆脱了困境。
在木头老爷的帮助下，哈努兄弟的心愿得到了实现，美梦小镇越来越像一场美梦。镇民们歌颂着哈努兄弟的事迹，与他一起享受镇中美好的盛会……

（注：本篇内容与正传不处于同一世界线，相关故事请以《钟表小子》与《美梦往事》正传为准）
E: This time, let us narrate the story of Clockie's trusted companion — Brother Hanu! Once upon a time, Brother Hanu was an ordinary resident of Wolfsville, a place ruled by the crocodile traders. The townsfolk, being treated as slaves that manually transported goods, lived in agony. Brother Hanu, being a wolf with a sense of justice, does not like working for the crocodile traders. In his opinion, wolves were supposed to run free in the wilderness! Brother Hanu rallied others who were as righteous as him and set fire to the factory in Wolfsville, setting off the war between the wolves and the crocodiles. Thanks to Brother Hanu's effort, the townsfolk of Wolfsville bared their fangs at the despicable crocodiles and showcased their might. However, there were simply too many crocodiles in the world, and Wolfsville eventually ended up in a crisis. Brother Hanu decided to sacrifice himself for the crocodiles to spare the lives of the townsfolk. The crocodiles handed Brother Hanu over to a ruthless crocodile trader — Boss Stone. Boss Stone was set to send Brother Hanu to the harsh environment of Nightmareville, making him dig for stones for the rest of his life as punishment. Nevertheless, the experience didn't deprive Brother Hanu of his sense of justice. Seeing that Nightmareville was also suffering from Boss Stone's oppression, Brother Hanu could no longer tolerate the crocodiles' tyranny and decided to stage another rebellion with the townsfolk. Thanks to the crew of the Compass, who came from afar, and Clockie's help, Brother Hanu successfully defeated the crocodiles and prevented Nightmareville from suffering the same fate as Wolfsville. Brother Hanu then renamed Nightmareville to Dreamville, claiming he would turn it into a worry-free dream town. Everyone believed in this hero who symbolized freedom and worked with him to build the town. Unfortunately, his aspiration suffered drawbacks when disaster struck... He ventured into the sandstorm by himself to rescue the stranded townsfolk, fed the townsfolk using his savings, and reluctantly expelled his friends who had betrayed the town. In the end, he was severely injured when defending against Boss Stone's attack... Clockie, who failed to help Brother Hanu, was left with no choice but to seek help from the resourceful Old Man Wood to free Brother Hanu and Dreamville from the debacle. With Old Man Wood's help, Brother Hanu realized his dream by making the town more and more dream-like. The townsfolk sang praises for Brother Hanu's deeds and enjoyed the wonderful festivals in town with him... (Note: The content of this passage does not exist in the same timeline as the canonical events. For canon, please refer to Clockie and Dreamjoy Memoir.)

C:
嘿，看看这只毛毛躁躁的小仓鼠，如果不是他胸前的奖牌，谁能想得到他就是在美梦小镇和匹诺康尼都赫赫有名的大明星——仓鼠球骑士呢？这次就让我们来讲讲他的故事吧，冲冲冲冲冲！

在仓鼠球骑士的仓鼠小镇，每个镇民都过得十分枯燥无味，这里的仓鼠们不懂寻欢作乐，生活毫无趣味，更不懂得什么叫做*爽*。仓鼠球骑士从小就立志要离开这里，开辟自己足够爽的生活。
他听说在远方有一个叫做美梦小镇的地方，那里到处都是游戏、挑战和比赛，绝对很爽！仓鼠球骑士二话不说，立马启程，冲向了美梦小镇。

但当他看到美梦小镇时就傻了眼，这里根本没有足够爽的东西，只有一个穷酸的镇子和看不到尽头的荒漠，这怎么爽？仓鼠球骑士本想离开，但这里独特的交通工具——球笼，留住他了脚步。作为仓鼠，这个能滚动的玩意儿具有无与伦比的吸引力。

在之后的日子里，钟表小子经常能看到一颗名为「音速坚果」的球笼在荒漠中奔驰，冲在拓荒队伍的最前方，大喊着「冲冲冲冲冲」，一副很爽的样子。

后来，小镇在一番波折后回归宁静，越来越多的人聚集在美梦小镇。虽然小镇变大了，镇民变多了，但小镇中还是没有足够好玩的东西。这时，感到无聊的钟表小子想起了那个在拓荒一线奔驰的仓鼠，还有它的球笼。

钟表小子筹办了一场球笼比赛，精心设计了复杂的赛道，只要参加比赛，就能体验到一段惊险刺激的赛程！这让仓鼠球骑士起了兴致，他带着自己的音速坚果报名了比赛。在比赛中，所有选手都无法与仓鼠球骑士匹敌——他真的太*快*了！这个比赛简直是为他定制的！

仓鼠球骑士赢下了比赛，收获到了有生以来最爽的一段经历，比赛成了他最重要的事情。钟表小子和仓鼠球骑士成了好朋友，他们经常在深夜乘着球笼在街上驰骋，仓鼠球骑士的每场比赛钟表小子都不会缺席。

仓鼠球骑士对快乐与爽的追求已经实现，接下来，他会夺得更多冠军，让自己的传奇更加辉煌……

（注：本篇内容与正传不处于同一世界线，相关故事请以《钟表小子》与《美梦往事》正传为准）
E: Hey, all eyes on this flustered little hamster! If it weren't for the medal on his chest, who would have thought he was the famous superstar in both Dreamville and Penacony — Hamster Ball Knight? This time, let us cover his story. Go, go, go, go! In Hamsterville where Hamster Ball Knight lived, everyone lived a dull life. As the hamsters there did not know how to have fun, their lives were boring, and they had no idea what *excitement* felt like. Hamster Ball Knight was bent on leaving the place since little to carve out a more exciting life for himself. He heard of a faraway place called Dreamville, where games, challenges, and contests abound! It'll definitely be exciting! Without hesitation, he hit the road and made his way toward Dreamville. But the moment he set his sights upon Dreamville, he was dumbfounded — there was nothing exciting there. The town was just a poor rundown place with an endless stretch of desert. How was he supposed to have fun? Hamster Ball Knight thought of leaving, but he was drawn to Spheroid, the unique transportation tool there. As a hamster, he found the rolling contraption irresistibly appealing. In the days that followed, Clockie often spotted a Spheroid named "Velocinut" racing through the desert, leading the pioneer team, with the rider constantly shouting "Go, go, go, go!" The rider really seemed to enjoy the journey. As peace was restored in Dreamville after a series of events, more and more people gathered in the town. Although the town had expanded, it still lacked things that were fun enough. Then, the bored Clockie thought of the galloping pioneering hamster and his Spheroid. Clockie later organized a Spheroid race and put in a lot of effort to design a complicated racetrack. Whoever participated in the race would experience a journey full of thrills! The race piqued the interest of Hamster Ball Knight, who signed up along with his Velocinut. Hamster Ball Knight had no match during the race because he was simply too *fast*! The race was almost tailor-made for him! Hamster Ball Knight won the race and enjoyed the most exciting experience in his life. Participating in races became the top priority in his life. Clockie and Hamster Ball Knight became friends and often rode in Spheroids together down the road in the middle of the night. Clockie never missed a race Hamster Ball Knight participated in. After achieving the goal of having fun and excitement, Hamster Ball Knight aimed to win more races, making his story more legendary... (Note: The content of this passage does not exist in the same timeline as the canonical events. For canon, please refer to Clockie and Dreamjoy Memoir.)

C:
「浪漫」的火种已被归还。

墨涅塔是象征美与爱的泰坦，其形象常被描绘为一只身形缥缈的蝴蝶，蝶翼上雕琢着黄金的纹路。它与它的眷属们追逐着世间的美好，编入金丝，织作世间的浪漫，令翁法罗斯的众生拥有情与爱。

传说，墨涅塔恋慕着理性的瑟希斯，曾长久驻留在那巨树之下，向泰坦倾诉心中的思慕之情，但瑟希斯却从来未曾回应。墨涅塔泣血而死，黄金的蝶蛹中诞生出人形。它身披残败的蝶蜕，在血亲们的祝福下，踏上了环游翁法罗斯的旅途。最终，墨涅塔带着大地上的族亲之爱、友亲之爱与纯粹之爱归来，将它们与自己的蝶蜕、心脏与身体编作金丝，献予瑟希斯，并在爱人的拥抱中，于黄金之茧中重生。自此，蝶与树形影不离，永恒相依。

如今，旧日的废墟上流动着往世的幻影，这些如散碎轻纱一般的影子承载着过去的记忆，它们是不应被遗忘的遗产。墨涅塔的神力将这一缕又一缕丝线收拢，编织，从中窥见命运，揭示预言。
E:
The Coreflame of "Romance" has already been returned.

Mnestia is the Titan that symbolizes beauty and love. Their appearance is often illustrated as a beautiful and elusive butterfly with golden patterns carved into their wings. They and their Titankin pursue beauty in the world, weave it into the golden thread, spin the romances of humankind and grant everyone in Amphoreus love and affection.

Legend states that Mnestia fell in love with the Reason Titan, Cerces. They sat under the giant tree for a long time, endlessly confessing their love to the Titan — but Cerces never responded. Mnestia passed away crying tears of blood, and arose reborn from their golden cocoon as a humanoid figure. Covering themselves with their broken cocoon, they set out on a journey around Amphoreus with the blessing of their kin. Finally, Mnestia returned from their adventures with the love of family, friends, and true love gathered from the world, wove them into their golden chrysalis alongside their body and heart, and gifted them to Cerces. In the arms of their lover, they were reborn in the Chrysalis of Gold. Ever since this moment, the butterfly and the tree have been inseparable and dependent on each other for survival.

Today, shadows of the past are cast across ancient ruins. These shadows that drift like scattered veils carry memories of the past. They are legacies that must not be lost. The divine powers of Mnestia gather these threads and weave them together one by one to reveal destiny and prophecies.

C: 万一有个万一，姬子你要帮帮我哦！
E: If push comes to shove, I'm counting on you, Himeko!

C: 技多不压身，咱还得多练练~
E: You can never have enough skills! Let's train some more⁓

C: 我一个可以打十个！
E: I could take ten of you!

C: 左青龙，右白虎，少吃碳水化合物——看招！
E: Azure Dragon, White Tiger, eating less carbs — watch this!

C: 要在宇宙间搜寻自己的所求之物，大多数时候并非是「有了！就是那！」的灵光一现，而是「会是这个吗？万一不是呢？」的斟酌，怀疑与踌躇。
E: When we scour the universe for the things we seek, most of the time it's less of a "Eureka, I found it!" moment and more of a "Is this it? What if I'm wrong?" moment.

C: 你好，我是瓦尔特•杨，遇到任何困难，欢迎随时来找我。
E: Hi, I'm Welt Yang. If there's something you need help with, you can come find me anytime.

C: 活着，才能继续战斗。
E: You can't fight from the grave.

C: 渴望着星星奥秘的钥匙啊，向开拓者们赐予你真正的祝福吧！
E: Oh profound secrets of the stars, give these Trailblazers your blessing!

C: 刚才的不算，我们重新来过。
E: That didn't count, let's go again!

C: 我还以为要苦战一场呢。
E: I thought it was going to be a tough battle.

C: 即使生活在地下，我们也不会被这座城市所掩埋。
E: We may live underground, but we won't be buried by this city.

C: 不按规矩办事就是希露瓦的规矩。
E: *sigh* Serval's rule is: No rules.

C: 周末去图书馆借阅一些喜欢的…读物，然后和朋友分享读后感。
E: I like to go to the library on the weekend and take out some... literature. Then when we're finished reading, me and my friends meet up to discuss it.

C: 克拉拉：我回来了。
E: Clara: I'm back.

C: 欠你个人情~
E: I owe you one~

C: 还没填…事假申请……
E: Didn't file... leave application...

C: 手握顺风局，闷声发大财~
E: Play hard, win big, keep quiet~

C: 不想…回去工作……
E: Time for a... day off...

C: 前程似锦，金玉满堂。
E: I see a future full of potential.

C: 寰宇方圆，星罗棋布，每一手都是抉择，而抉择铸就命运。
E: The sky is a chessboard, and the moves we make betwixt the stars forge a cosmic destiny.

C: 缚住魔阴的绳子在她手中，在约定的时限之前，她不会拉动绳索，但也绝不会松手。
E: The mara's tether is firmly in her grasp. She will not pull upon it before the designated time, but nor shall she relinquish it.

C: 居…居然有这个！
E: Whoa... I can't believe I found this!

C: 我见过死去的太阳放射最后的光芒，也见过活化的星球沸腾涌动，犹如血肉。我甚至见过帝弓司命的光矢飞抵光年之外，流光天君的虹彩忆泡在火中碎裂……
E: I have seen the last ray of light right before a sun dies, and the pulsing volcanic veins akin to flesh and blood on planets brought to life. I've seen the Lux Arrow of the Reignbow Arbiter flying to places light-years away, and the Rainbow Memory Bubble of the Glowswather bursting within flames...

C: 云骑互为臂助，携手破敌。
E: Cloud Knights assemble!

C: 身手不错。
E: Impressive.

C: 试探就到此为止了。
E: Practice is over.

C: 如智库所记，按持明礼俗，见面问候需以手加额。我们…不用如此。
E: As recorded in the data bank, it is customary among the Vidyadhara to place one's hand on one's forehead when greeting someone. But... we don't need to do that.

C: 吾生前似乎有诸多爱好，逛市集、读小说、看幻戏。如今，半日光阴虽足够吾回忆，一旦躺进棺材，吾又会遗忘……
E: I used to enjoy many things: Walking around the markets, reading novels, and watching immersia. Now, I can only relive those moments during my wakespan. When I return to my coffin, my memories don't follow.

C: 藿藿：我果然还是适合做这些事情…
E: Huohuo: I—I'm actually pretty good at these things.

C: 你在。那我们直接说正事，速战速决。
E: You're here, then let's get straight to business.

C: 正面给我。背后的事，你全权负责。
E: I'll handle what's in front. You look after everything behind us.

C: 你要回去了？突然想顺路去吃点好的…走吧，我买单。放心，我有爷爷给的零花钱。
E: You're leaving? Actually, I suddenly have a craving for some good food... Let's go, I'll treat you. Don't worry, I have some pocket money from grandpa.

C: 截剑式。
E: Intercepting sword technique.

C: 我，即是锋刃……
E: I am the blade...

C: 没有危险，收好。
E: Nothing dangerous, that's good.

C: 生命醇美如佳酿。
E: Life's like a good brew – full-bodied and sweet.

C: 「纯美」无处不在——于咫尺之间、于壮丽星河之外。
E: The Beauty is universal — they exist within our grasp and beyond the grand expanse of the galaxy.

C: 可惜，星神的谜团仍未解明。
E: Unfortunately, the mystery of the Aeons remains unsolved.

C: 吃点吗？这糕点用的梅花是新渍的，我为它排了很久队。
E: Want some pastry? The plums used in this recipe are freshly macerated — I waited in line for ages.

C: 唇齿最为敏感，糕点要评得上筹，只要一小口的机会。我偏爱鲜果花木等时令原材，定格在片刻的生命仪态，更易引起多巴胺反应。
E: As one with a sensitive palate, I only need one small bite to judge the taste of a pastry. I favor seasonal ingredients such as fresh fruits, flowers, and herbs. Pristine slices of life preserved inside a pastry — these provide the best dopamine response food has to offer.

C: 想诈我？
E: Trying to pull a fast one?

C: 又一天过去了，如果你的问题还没解决，有没有可能是你自己的问题？
E: Another day has passed. If your problem still hasn't been solved, is it possible that the problem is you?

C: 我喜欢笑话——这个世界太苦大仇深了！当然，笑话不能让世界变得更好，但至少不会让世界变得更加虚伪~不是吗？
E: I dig jokes — there's just too much sorrow and resentment in the world. Sure, jokes won't make the world any better, but they don't make it any worse either.

C: 打捞那些珍贵的记忆，将它们封存于净土之中。如此，一切都不会真正逝去。
E: Recover those cherished recollections and enshrine them in a land of purity. In doing so, all will be preserved from true oblivion.

C: 坚持就有回报，对吧？
E: Perseverance pays off, doesn't it?

C: 来吧「忍侠」，让我们闹翻天吧！
E: Come on, Ninja Hero, let's turn this place upside down!

C: 再等下去，宇宙都要大爆炸咯。
E: If I wait any longer, the universe might just implode.

C: 新世界的大门~
E: The door to a whole new world~

C: 愿我们都能行过漫长的路。
E: May we all emerge from this endless journey intact.

C: 用你的双眼见证，何谓「力敌万邦」！
E: Witness with your own eyes what it means to have "a power to rival all lands"!

C: 以无名客的意志，她一定能直面与克服过去的阴影。
E: With the will of a Nameless, she'll definitely be able to confront and overcome the shadows of her past.

C: 体会到了么？被仇恨灼烧的滋味。
E: The scorching hatred... Do you feel it now?

C: 开始吧！
E: Let's get started!

C: 王者为先，万民随后。
E: The sovereign shall walk ahead, and their people shall follow them.

C: 来日，我将赐你荣耀。
E: In the coming days, I shall grant you honor.

C: 万物生灵皆有自己的沟通方式，譬如，光大地兽的语言分三十二种不同地域的变体…抱歉，这知识是不是太冷僻了？
E: All living beings have their own ways of communication. For instance, the dromas language has thirty-two different regional variants... Was that a bit too much? Sorry.

C: 愿「天空」治愈晨昏。
E: May the "Sky" heal the twilight.

C: 嗯哼♪
E: Mm-hmm ♪

C: 贯穿！
E: To the finish!

C: 战利品，我们三七分？谁三谁七，可以再商量。
E: Shall we split the spoils thirty-seventy? As to who gets the seventy, I'm open to negotiations.

C: 选择，并非像看上去那般遥不可及。
E: Choice isn't as elusive as it seems.

C: 要开始了。
E: Let's go.

C: 再这样试试呢…
E: Let's try it this other way...

C: 为了黄金般的未来，一同努力吧。
E: Let's work together for a golden future.

C: 「梦想之地」匹诺康尼。有人在此地醉生梦死，也有人以梦想交换奇迹。
E: Penacony, Land of the Dreams. Some people drown in dreams here, and some wish to trade their dreams for miracles.

E: Penacony

C: 队伍中最强的燕麦粥被击倒时：使所有同伴<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When the strongest Oatmeal in the team is knocked down: Causes all companions' <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK to increase by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> and <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP to increase by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 对战开始时：若属性总和大于等于<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点，则随机变成1只更高稀有度的非专属奇美拉，并使自身<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>，<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>
E: At the start of combat: If total stats is <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> or more, randomly transforms into a non-exclusive chimera of a higher Rarity, its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>, and <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP increases by <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>.

C: 前1格同伴受到伤害时：与其交换位置，使自身<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>，<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>。若受伤者为呜利呜，则提升双倍属性
E: When the companion 1 tile ahead takes DMG: Swaps positions with the companion, and its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> and <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP increases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>. If the hurt unit is Wooreo, doubles the stat bonuses.

C: <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个回合后：队伍中最强的暖龙龙获得当前<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>的<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>攻击力
E: After <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s): The strongest Toasty Dragon in the team increases its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK by a value equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of its current <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP.

C: 购买专属奇美拉时：你最强的车厘比斯使自身和随机<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个专属奇美拉<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>
E: When purchasing exclusive chimeras: Grants the strongest Krenabis in the team and <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> random exclusive chimera(s) <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK.

C: 扶我起来，我还能打！
E: Help me up, I can still fight!

C: 我喜欢你们！
E: I like you guys!

C: 不灭，不朽！
E: Permanence remains!

C: 毁灭吧！
E: Bring Destruction!

C: 我才是小奇美拉专家哦。
E: I'm the real Little Chimera expert here, you know.

C: 开拓者：成为盛会巨星
E: Trailblazer: Becoming the Festive Superstar

C: 追忆：存在的地平线
E: Recollection: Horizon of Existence

C: 用石头砸向那有罪的
E: Cast stones at the guilty.

C: 这就是我等应许之地！
E: This is our promised land!

C: 「梦主」的回信
E: Reply from the Dreammaster

C: 本关敌方目标<color=#f29e38ff>生命值较低，但造成伤害较高</color>，在【负载清算】行动前，通过<color=#f29e38ff>治疗</color>避免我方单位生命值为0以下。
E: Enemy targets in this stage have <color=#f29e38ff>lower HP but deal higher DMG</color>. Before "Overload Settlement" takes action, use <color=#f29e38ff>healing</color> to prevent ally units' HP from dropping below 0.

C: 今天花姐回来，你不会忘了吧？
E: Someone's making a sparkly return today. You haven't forgotten that, have you?

C: 我想知道你不为人知的秘密
E: I want to know your untold secrets

C: 其实……
E: Actually...

C: 恭喜
E: Congratulations

C: 「齐响诗班」神主日
E: "Harmonious Choir" The Great Septimus

C: 对我方全体造成大量虚数属性伤害，该伤害无视目标的防御力。
E: Deals massive Imaginary DMG to all targets. This DMG application ignores the targets' DEF.

C: 对我方全体目标造成火属性伤害，同时大概率使击中目标陷入灼烧状态。
E: Deals Fire DMG to all targets, with a high chance to Burn the attacked targets.

C: 令自身和指定我方角色及该角色召唤的目标进入<u>【决斗】</u>状态。并在2回合后施放【破心灭道】。优先选择增益效果数量最多的目标。
E: Causes this unit, a designated target character, and the target character's summon to enter the <u>"Duel"</u> state. Uses "Spirit Breaker" after 2 turns, prioritizing the target with the most number of buffs.

C: 太初有为
E: Im Anfang war die Tat

C: 银狼解释，家族在美梦中近乎全知全能，流萤的潜入一定会被发现，进而遭到追捕。虽然很冒险，但流萤想到了一个计划。
E: Silver Wolf explained that The Family was nearly omnipotent within Dreamjoy, and Firefly's infiltration would surely be discovered, leading to a pursuit. Though risky, Firefly had a plan in mind.

C: 卡芙卡带来讯息，称艾利欧已将流萤选为「虚无」的「最后幸存者」。只要做得到，流萤必须避免你沾染「虚无」力量，哪怕一分一毫。
E: Kafka brought word that Elio had chosen Firefly as "the last survivor" of the Nihility. Whatever it took, she had to prevent you from being tainted by the power of the Nihility, even by the slightest amount.

C: 丢弃#2个负面奇物，获得#5个1-2星祝福。
E: Discard #2 Negative Curio(s), and obtain #5 Blessing(s) of 1- to 2-star rarity.

C: 好有道理！
E: That makes so much sense!

C: 烧掉你们共同的画作。
E: Burn your shared artwork.

C: 我的剑术愈发娴熟。
E: My swordplay is getting more refined.

C: 向树庭学者请教。
E: Consult the Grove scholars.

C: ●初始获得金血祝颂：#1
E: ● Initial Golden Blood's Boon: #1

C: 被添加的额外物理弱点，物理属性抗性降低<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: Additionally implanted Physical Weakness. Decreases Physical RES by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 攻击提高
E: ATK Boost

C: 宣教
E: Proselytize

C: 奥赫玛著名的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」正在火热进行中。完成赛事组安排的数场定级赛，确定你的初始等级吧！
E: The famous "Chimera World Tournament" is in full swing in Okhema! Complete several placement matches arranged by the tournament organizers to determine your initial rank!

C: 你是……
E: ...And you are?

C: 你究竟是谁？
E: Who exactly are you?

C: 你似乎对星核猎手很熟悉…
E: You seem to know quite a bit about the Stellaron Hunters...

C: 但我不会忘记。
E: But I won't forget.

C: 原来如此，利用联觉梦境。但看起来，我没能进入真正的匹诺康尼？
E: I see. We're using the Synesthesia Dreamscape. But it seems I haven't made it into the real Penacony?

C: 算了，大家都一样。明知不会有用，却总想为过去做点什么。
E: Never mind. Everyone's the same. They all try to do something for the past, even when they know it's futile.

C: 信号中断了…？
E: The signal's gone...

C: 「应该能认出对方吧。」
E: "Should be able to find each other."

C: 不，我的直觉没错…那女孩果然不简单。
E: No, my intuition was right... That girl is definitely not what she seems.

C: 啊…他来了！
E: Ah... He's coming our way!

C: 也对。早该想到，那里时常会有偷渡案件。是我粗心了，当时应该问问那两位猎犬的。
E: Right, makes sense. I should've known. That place is a hotspot for smuggling cases. I should've pressed those two Bloodhounds for answers back then.

C: 当然，匹诺康尼不存在真正的死亡。对知更鸟来说，这只是一次小小的波折。
E: Of course, there's no such thing as true death on Penacony. For Robin, this is just a minor setback.

C: 别急，眼下我们安然无恙。或许他并非不想，而是暂且不能为难我们呢？
E: Easy now, we're safe for the time being. Maybe it's not that he doesn't want to act against us, but rather that he can't. At least not yet?

C: 会有什么不同吗？我很想听你告诉我…这也只是忆质而已，并非真实。
E: Would it be any different? I really want you to tell me... that this is not real. It's just memoria.

C: 哦？你确定？如果…只是我太过「善变」，忍不住会叛离任何人呢？
E: Oh? Are you so sure? What if... I'm just too "capricious" and can't help but betray anyone?

C: 为清剿虫群而生的铁骑，竟是行于「繁育」的命途行者。
E: The Glamoth Knight, born to purge the Swarm, turned out to be a Pathstrider walking the Path of Propagation.

C: …要去哪儿啊？费尽心机，演了这么一出好戏，不过来聊聊吗？
E: ...Where do you think you're going? After putting on such an elaborate show, won't you stay for a little chat?

C: 老实说，他们没作出一点贡献，但却为我发现了一件「遗产」——
E: To be honest, they didn't contribute a thing, but they did help me discover a certain "legacy"...

C: 你到底是哪边的？
E: Whose side are you really on?

C: 星期日同样来到了这里，他假意合作，为你们揭开匹诺康尼的真相——藏于大剧院幕布之后的美梦根基，实为「星核」；幕后的真凶，则是「梦主」歌斐木。
E: Sunday also came here, feigning cooperation, to reveal to you the truth about Penacony. The foundation of the sweet dream, hidden behind the Grand Theater's curtain, was actually a Stellaron, and the true mastermind behind everything was none other than the Dreammaster Gopher Wood.

C: …伙伴？
E: ...Buddy?

C: 可惜，你走不掉。
E: Sorry, but you're not going anywhere.

C: 但既然他将要行下大恶，留下律令的「梦主」，恐怕是在期待我走向另一种可能。
E: Since he was about to commit a great evil, perhaps the Dreammaster who left behind these laws was hoping I would choose a different path.

C: 或是「强权」之路吧。但流萤小姐不妨自便，今日我不作他想。
E: Probably the path of "force." But Miss Firefly, feel free to do as you please. I have no other thoughts today.

C: …仓促得生，力不能逮。
E: ...To survive, but without the power to do anything.

C: 一位忆者正在寻找他们，我们也必须尽己所能。
E: A Memokeeper is looking for them. We must do everything we can as well.

C: 「秩序」是希佩的一重面相，此刻，「同谐」却坐视「太一」重诞，没有更进一步的干涉——这其中必然有着极深的隐情。
E: The Order is one of Xipe's aspects, yet the Harmony stands idle at this moment as Ena is being reborn, without any further intervention.... There must be some deeper reason behind this.

C: {NICKNAME}，过去我常常感慨：命运啊，你要往何处去。
E: {NICKNAME}, I used to wonder about destiny, about where it's heading.

C: 愚者千面，能让我满意的美梦，一时半会可编不出来。
E: A fool has thousands of faces. It's gonna take a lot to create a sweet dream that can satisfy me.

C: 我永远不会逃走。
E: I will never run away.

C: 但此时此刻，我不在乎，<color=#dbc291ff>因为我的欣喜是真实的，我的悲伤是真实的。</color>
E: But right now? I don't care. <color=#dbc291ff>Because my joy is real. My sorrow is real.</color>

C: 还好啦……
E: I'm doing okay...

C: 多看动画片。
E: Watch more cartoons.

C: 你们是我教过的奇美拉里，最优秀的一届。
E: Among all the chimeras I've instructed, you are the most outstanding.

C: 庸人的愿望
E: Mundanite's Wish

C: <color=#f29e38ff>出售奇美拉时，装备会消失。</color>灰宝在购买装备前可得考虑清楚啦！
E: <color=#f29e38ff>When selling a chimera, its equipment will disappear.</color> Grayie, you have to think carefully before purchasing equipment!

C: 完成<color=#f29e38ff>前置难度</color>的挑战后即可解锁下一个难度等级。
E: Complete the <color=#f29e38ff>prerequisite difficulty</color> challenge to unlock the next difficulty level.

C: 挑战成功
E: Challenge Completed

C: 是否将以上角色的当前命途保存为「<icon SpritePath=UI/Atlas/AtlasRoot/Common/Icon/IconFixedPaths2.png id=0 Height=1 color=ffffff>队伍预设」？
E: Do you want to save the current Path(s) of the above character(s) as <icon SpritePath=UI/Atlas/AtlasRoot/Common/Icon/IconFixedPaths2.png id=0 Height=1 color=ffffff>team preset?

C: 天赋•二
E: Talent 2

C: 发现敌方目标
E: Enemy Target Found
